papers.title: Power Reinforcement Post-Training of Text-to-Image Models with Super-Linear Advantage Shaping
papers.abstract: Recently, post-training methods based on reinforcement learning, with a particular focus on Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO), have emerged as the robust paradigm for further advancement of text-to-image (T2I) models. However, these methods are often prone to reward hacking, wherein models exploit biases in imperfect reward functions rather than yielding genuine performance gains. In this work, we identify that normalization could lead to miscalibration and directly removing the prompt-level standard deviation term yields an optimal policy ascent direction that is linear in the advantage but still limits the separation of genuine signals from noise. To mitigate the above issues, we propose Super-Linear Advantage Shaping (SLAS) by revisiting the functional update from an information geometry perspective. By extending the Fisher-Rao information metric with advantage-dependent weighting, SLAS introduces a non-linear geometric structure that reshapes the local policy space. This design relaxes constraints along high-advantage directions to amplify informative updates, while tightening those in low-advantage regions to suppress illusory gradients. In addition, batch-level normalization is applied to stabilize training under varying reward scales. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that SLAS consistently surpasses the DanceGRPO baseline across multiple backbones and benchmarks. In particular, it yields faster training dynamics, improved out-of-domain performance on GenEval and UniGenBench++, and enhanced robustness to model scaling, while mitigating reward hacking and preserving semantic and compositional fidelity in generations.

analysis.tldr: 提出超线性优势塑形（SLAS）方法，通过信息几何视角重塑策略更新，缓解文本到图像模型强化学习后训练中的奖励黑客问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 强化学习后训练方法在文本到图像模型微调中易出现奖励黑客现象，即模型利用不完美奖励函数的偏差而非真正提升性能，现有归一化方法导致校准偏差，限制了信号与噪声的分离。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种强化学习后训练方法，既能有效利用优势信号提升生成质量，又能抑制奖励黑客和虚假梯度，同时保持语义和组合保真度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出归一化会导致校准偏差，直接移除提示级标准差项虽得到线性最优策略方向，但仍无法有效分离真实信号与噪声。
analysis.method: 从信息几何视角出发，通过扩展Fisher-Rao信息度量引入优势依赖权重，在高优势方向放松约束以放大信息更新，在低优势方向收紧约束以抑制虚假梯度，并采用批次级归一化稳定训练。
contributions: 识别了归一化在GRPO后训练中导致的校准偏差问题，并分析了线性优势更新的局限性。
提出超线性优势塑形（SLAS）方法，通过非线性的信息几何结构重塑策略更新，有效缓解奖励黑客。
在多个骨干网络和基准上验证了SLAS优于DanceGRPO基线，具有更快训练动态、更好域外性能和更强鲁棒性。
analysis.experiments: 在多个骨干网络和基准（GenEval、UniGenBench++）上进行评估，SLAS一致超越DanceGRPO基线，训练速度更快，域外性能提升，对模型缩放更鲁棒，同时缓解奖励黑客并保持语义和组合保真度。
limitations: 摘要未讨论SLAS在不同奖励函数设计下的泛化能力。
未提及计算开销或与更大规模模型的兼容性。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出超线性优势塑形（SLAS）方法，通过信息几何视角重塑策略更新，缓解文本到图像模型强化学习后训练中的奖励黑客问题。

papers.title: Personal Visual Context Learning in Large Multimodal Models
papers.abstract: As wearable devices like smart glasses integrate Large Multimodal Models (LMMs) into the continuous first-person visual streams of individual users, the evolution of these models into true personal assistants hinges on visual personalization: the ability to reason over visual information unique to the wearer. We formalize this capability as Personal Visual Context Learning (Personal VCL), the prompt-time capability of using user-specific visual context to resolve personalized queries. To systematically evaluate this, we present Personal-VCL-Bench, a comprehensive benchmark capturing the personal visual world across persons, objects, and behaviors. Our analysis of frontier LMMs identifies a profound context utilization gap, revealing that the mechanisms for leveraging visual evidence, as well as aggregating multiple visual observations, remain critically understudied. Motivated by these findings, we propose the Agentic Context Bank, a strong inference-time baseline that structures a user's visual context into a self-refining memory bank and employs query-adaptive evidence selection. Our baseline approach consistently improves over standard context prompting regimes across tasks and evaluated backbones, demonstrating a practical path towards future personalized LMMs.

analysis.tldr: 提出个人视觉上下文学习（Personal VCL）概念、基准和Agentic Context Bank方法，以解决大多模态模型在可穿戴设备中的视觉个性化问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 可穿戴设备（如智能眼镜）将大多模态模型（LMM）集成到用户连续的第一人称视觉流中，但现有LMM缺乏利用用户特定视觉信息进行个性化推理的能力，限制了其成为真正个人助手。
analysis.problem: 如何使LMM在推理时利用用户特定的视觉上下文（如人、物体、行为）来回答个性化查询。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 对前沿LMM的分析揭示了显著的上下文利用差距：模型在利用视觉证据以及聚合多个视觉观察方面的机制严重不足。
analysis.method: 提出Agentic Context Bank，一种推理时基线方法，将用户的视觉上下文结构化为自优化记忆库，并采用查询自适应的证据选择机制。
contributions: 形式化定义了个人视觉上下文学习（Personal VCL）能力。
构建了Personal-VCL-Bench基准，涵盖人、物体和行为三个方面的个性化视觉世界。
揭示了现有LMM在利用视觉上下文方面的关键差距。
提出了Agentic Context Bank方法，在多个任务和骨干网络上持续优于标准上下文提示方法。
analysis.experiments: 在Personal-VCL-Bench上评估了多个前沿LMM，并对比了Agentic Context Bank与标准上下文提示方法，结果显示所提方法一致提升性能。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的用户视觉上下文数据。
Agentic Context Bank的推理时开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出个人视觉上下文学习（Personal VCL）概念、基准和Agentic Context Bank方法，以解决大多模态模型在可穿戴设备中的视觉个性化问题。

papers.title: Pixal3D: Pixel-Aligned 3D Generation from Images
papers.abstract: Recent advances in 3D generative models have rapidly improved image-to-3D synthesis quality, enabling higher-resolution geometry and more realistic appearance. Yet fidelity, which measures pixel-level faithfulness of the generated 3D asset to the input image, still remains a central bottleneck. We argue this stems from an implicit 2D-3D correspondence issue: most 3D-native generators synthesize shape in canonical space and inject image cues via attention, leaving pixel-to-3D associations ambiguous. To tackle this issue, we draw inspiration from 3D reconstruction and propose Pixal3D, a pixel-aligned 3D generation paradigm for high-fidelity 3D asset creation from images. Instead of generating in a canonical pose, Pixal3D directly generates 3D in a pixel-aligned way, consistent with the input view. To enable this, we introduce a pixel back-projection conditioning scheme that explicitly lifts multi-scale image features into a 3D feature volume, establishing direct pixel-to-3D correspondence without ambiguity. We show that Pixal3D is not only scalable and capable of producing high-quality 3D assets, but also substantially improves fidelity, approaching the fidelity level of reconstruction. Furthermore, Pixal3D naturally extends to multi-view generation by aggregating back-projected feature volumes across views. Finally, we show pixel-aligned generation benefits scene synthesis, and present a modular pipeline that produces high-fidelity, object-separated 3D scenes from images. Pixal3D for the first time demonstrates 3D-native pixel-aligned generation at scale, and provides a new inspiring way towards high-fidelity 3D generation of object or scene from single or multi-view images. Project page: this https URL

analysis.tldr: 提出像素对齐的3D生成范式Pixal3D，通过像素反投影条件化建立直接2D-3D对应，显著提升图像到3D的保真度。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有图像到3D生成方法在保真度上存在瓶颈，主要因为隐式的2D-3D对应关系模糊，导致生成结果与输入图像在像素级上不够忠实。
analysis.problem: 如何实现像素级对齐的3D生成，使得生成的3D资产在几何和外观上与输入图像高度一致。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，大多数3D原生生成器在规范空间合成形状并通过注意力注入图像线索，导致像素到3D的关联模糊，这是保真度瓶颈的根本原因。
analysis.method: 提出Pixal3D，一种像素对齐的3D生成范式。核心是像素反投影条件化方案，将多尺度图像特征显式提升为3D特征体，建立直接的像素到3D对应关系。
contributions: 首次在大规模上实现3D原生像素对齐生成，显著提升图像到3D的保真度。
提出像素反投影条件化方案，建立明确的2D-3D对应，消除歧义。
自然扩展到多视图生成和场景合成，实现高保真、对象分离的3D场景生成。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖输入图像的质量和视角，对于极端视角或遮挡可能效果下降。
像素对齐方式可能增加计算开销，影响生成速度。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出像素对齐的3D生成范式Pixal3D，通过像素反投影条件化建立直接2D-3D对应，显著提升图像到3D的保真度。

papers.title: Confidence-Guided Diffusion Augmentation for Enhanced Bangla Compound Character Recognition
papers.abstract: Recognition of handwritten Bangla compound characters remains a challenging problem due to complex character structures, large intra-class variation, and limited availability of high-quality annotated data. Existing Bangla handwritten character recognition systems often struggle to generalize across diverse writing styles, particularly for compound characters containing intricate ligatures and diacritical variations. In this work, we propose a confidence-guided diffusion augmentation framework for low-resolution Bangla compound character recognition. Our framework combines class-conditional diffusion modeling with classifier guidance to synthesize high-quality handwritten compound character samples. To further improve generation quality, we introduce Squeeze-and-Excitation enhanced residual blocks within the diffusion model's U-Net backbone. We additionally propose a confidence-based filtering mechanism where pre-trained classifiers act as quality gates to retain only highly class-consistent synthetic samples. The filtered synthetic images are fused with the original training data and used to retrain multiple classification architectures. Experiments conducted on the AIBangla compound character dataset demonstrate consistent performance improvements across ResNet50, DenseNet121, VGG16, and Vision Transformer architectures. Our best-performing model achieves 89.2\% classification accuracy, surpassing the previously published AIBangla benchmark by a substantial margin. The results demonstrate that quality-aware diffusion augmentation can effectively enhance handwritten character recognition performance in low-resource script domains.

analysis.tldr: 提出置信度引导的扩散增强框架，通过合成高质量孟加拉复合字符样本提升低资源手写字符识别性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 孟加拉手写复合字符结构复杂、类内差异大且标注数据有限，现有系统难以泛化到多样书写风格，尤其对复杂连字和变音符号识别困难。
analysis.problem: 低分辨率孟加拉复合字符识别中，因数据稀缺和类内变异大导致分类器泛化能力不足。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 结合类条件扩散模型与分类器引导合成样本，引入Squeeze-and-Excitation增强残差块提升生成质量，并设计基于置信度的过滤机制保留高类别一致性样本，将过滤后的合成数据与原始训练集融合后重新训练分类器。
contributions: 提出置信度引导的扩散增强框架用于低资源手写字符识别。
在扩散模型U-Net中引入Squeeze-and-Excitation增强残差块。
设计基于置信度的过滤机制确保合成样本质量。
在AIBangla数据集上取得89.2%准确率，超越先前基准。
analysis.experiments: 在AIBangla复合字符数据集上使用ResNet50、DenseNet121、VGG16和Vision Transformer架构进行实验，最佳模型准确率89.2%，显著超过先前基准。
limitations: 仅针对孟加拉语复合字符，可能不直接适用于其他语言或字符类型。
依赖预训练分类器作为质量门控，分类器性能可能影响过滤效果。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出置信度引导的扩散增强框架，通过合成高质量孟加拉复合字符样本提升低资源手写字符识别性能。

papers.title: CapVector: Learning Transferable Capability Vectors in Parametric Space for Vision-Language-Action Models
papers.abstract: This paper proposes a novel approach to address the challenge that pretrained VLA models often fail to effectively improve performance and reduce adaptation costs during standard supervised finetuning (SFT). Some advanced finetuning methods with auxiliary training objectives can improve performance and reduce the number of convergence steps. However, they typically incur significant computational overhead due to the additional losses from auxiliary objectives. To simultaneously achieve the enhanced capabilities of auxiliary training with the simplicity of standard SFT, we decouple the two objectives of auxiliary-objective SFT within the parameter space, namely, enhancing general capabilities and fitting task-specific action distributions. To deliver the goal, we only need to train the model to converge on a small-scale task set using two distinct training strategies, resulting in two finetuned models. The parameters' difference between the two models can then be interpreted as capability vectors provided by auxiliary objectives. These vectors are then merged with pretrained parameters to form a capability-enhanced meta model. Moreover, when standard SFT is augmented with a lightweight orthogonal regularization loss, the merged model attains performance comparable to auxiliary finetuned baselines with reduced computational overhead. Internal and external experiments demonstrate that our capability vectors (1) are effective and versatile across diverse models, (2) can generalize to novel environments and embodiments out of the box.

analysis.tldr: 提出CapVector方法，通过参数空间解耦辅助目标与标准SFT，生成可迁移的能力向量以提升VLA模型微调效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 预训练VLA模型在标准监督微调（SFT）中性能提升有限且适应成本高；现有带辅助目标的微调方法虽能提升性能，但计算开销大。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持标准SFT简洁性的同时，获得辅助目标微调的性能提升，并降低计算开销。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在参数空间中解耦辅助目标SFT的两个目标（增强通用能力与拟合任务特定动作分布），通过两种训练策略在小规模任务集上训练得到两个微调模型，其参数差作为能力向量，与预训练参数合并形成能力增强的元模型；标准SFT中加入轻量正交正则化损失。
contributions: 提出CapVector方法，通过参数差提取可迁移的能力向量，无需额外辅助损失即可提升VLA模型微调性能。
实验证明能力向量在不同模型上有效且通用，并能零样本泛化到新环境和新本体。
analysis.experiments: 内部和外部实验验证了能力向量的有效性、通用性和泛化能力。
limitations: 可能依赖小规模任务集的选择。
正交正则化损失的权重可能需要调参。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CapVector方法，通过参数空间解耦辅助目标与标准SFT，生成可迁移的能力向量以提升VLA模型微调效率。

papers.title: Counterfactual Stress Testing for Image Classification Models
papers.abstract: Deep learning models in medical imaging often fail when deployed in new clinical environments due to distribution shifts in demographics, scanner hardware, or acquisition protocols. A central challenge is underspecification, where models with similar validation performance exhibit divergent real-world failure modes. Although stress testing has emerged as a tool to assess this, current methods typically rely on simple, uninformed perturbations (e.g., brightness or contrast changes), which fail to capture clinically realistic variation and can overestimate robustness. In this work, we introduce a counterfactual stress testing framework based on causal generative models that create realistic "what if" images by intervening on attributes such as scanner type and patient sex while preserving anatomical identity, enabling controlled and semantically meaningful evaluation under targeted distribution shifts. Across two imaging modalities (chest X-ray and mammography), three model architectures, and multiple shift scenarios, we show that counterfactual stress tests provide a substantially more accurate proxy for real out-of-distribution performance than classical perturbations, capturing the direction and relative magnitude of performance changes as well as model ranking. These results suggest that causal generative models can serve as practical simulators for robustness assessment, offering a more reliable basis for evaluating medical AI systems prior to deployment.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于因果生成模型的反事实压力测试框架，通过生成语义有意义的反事实图像来评估医学图像分类模型的分布外鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 医学影像深度学习模型在新临床环境中常因分布偏移而失败，现有压力测试方法使用简单扰动无法捕捉临床真实变化，且可能高估鲁棒性。
analysis.problem: 如何生成语义有意义且临床真实的压力测试样本，以准确评估模型在目标分布偏移下的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于因果生成模型，通过干预属性（如扫描仪类型、患者性别）同时保持解剖结构不变，生成反事实图像，用于压力测试。
contributions: 提出基于因果生成模型的反事实压力测试框架，生成语义有意义的分布偏移样本。
在胸部X光和乳腺摄影两种模态、三种模型架构上验证，反事实测试比经典扰动更准确地反映真实分布外性能。
analysis.experiments: 在胸部X光和乳腺摄影两种成像模态、三种模型架构和多种偏移场景下进行实验，反事实压力测试能捕捉性能变化的方向、相对幅度和模型排名。
limitations: 依赖因果生成模型的质量和可解释性。
可能仅适用于可定义属性的分布偏移。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于因果生成模型的反事实压力测试框架，通过生成语义有意义的反事实图像来评估医学图像分类模型的分布外鲁棒性。

papers.title: Count Anything at Any Granularity
papers.abstract: Open-world object counting remains brittle: despite rapid advances in vision-language models (VLMs), reliably counting the objects a user intends is far from solved. We argue that a central reason is that counting granularity is left implicit; users may refer to a specific identity, an attribute, an instance type, a category, or an abstract concept, yet most methods treat "what to count" as a single, category-level matching problem. In this work, we redefine open-world counting as multi-grained counting, where visual exemplars specify target appearance and fine-grained text, with optional negative prompts, specifies the intended semantic granularity across five explicit levels. Making granularity explicit, however, exposes a critical data bottleneck: existing counting datasets lack the multi-category scenes, controlled distractors, and instance-level annotations needed to verify fine-grained prompt semantics. To address this, we propose the first fully automatic data-scaling pipeline that integrates controllable 3D synthesis with consistent image editing and VLM-based filtering, and use it to construct KubriCount, the largest and most comprehensively annotated counting dataset to date, supporting both training and multi-grained evaluation. Systematic benchmarking reveals that both multimodal large language models and specialist counting models exhibit severe prompt-following failures under fine-grained distinctions. Motivated by these findings, we train HieraCount, a multi-grained counting model that jointly leverages text and visual exemplars as complementary target specifications. HieraCount substantially improves multi-grained counting accuracy and generalizes robustly to challenging real-world scenarios. The project page is available here: this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出多粒度计数范式，通过显式粒度定义和自动数据合成解决开放世界计数中用户意图模糊的问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有开放世界计数方法将计数目标隐式视为单一类别匹配，无法区分用户意图中的不同粒度（如个体、属性、类别等），导致计数结果与用户期望不符。
analysis.problem: 如何让视觉语言模型在开放世界中根据用户指定的语义粒度（从具体身份到抽象概念共五个层级）准确计数，并解决缺乏多粒度标注数据的瓶颈。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，多模态大语言模型和专用计数模型在细粒度区分下均存在严重的指令跟随失败现象。
analysis.method: 提出自动数据合成流水线（3D合成+图像编辑+VLM过滤）构建大规模多粒度计数数据集KubriCount，并训练联合文本与视觉示例的多粒度计数模型HieraCount。
contributions: 重新定义开放世界计数为多粒度计数，并显式定义五个语义粒度层级。
提出首个全自动数据扩展流水线，构建最大且标注最全面的计数数据集KubriCount。
系统评估揭示现有模型在细粒度计数上的指令跟随失败。
提出HieraCount模型，联合利用文本和视觉示例显著提升多粒度计数精度。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提及系统基准测试和真实场景泛化验证。
limitations: 数据合成依赖3D场景和图像编辑，可能无法覆盖所有真实分布。
五个粒度层级的定义可能无法涵盖所有用户意图。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多粒度计数范式，通过显式粒度定义和自动数据合成解决开放世界计数中用户意图模糊的问题。

papers.title: Geometry-aware Prototype Learning for Cross-domain Few-shot Medical Image Segmentation
papers.abstract: Cross-domain few-shot medical image segmentation (CD-FSMIS) requires a model to generalise simultaneously to novel anatomical categories and unseen imaging domains from only a handful of annotated examples. Existing prototypical approaches inevitably entangle anatomical structure with domain-specific appearance variations, and thus lack a stable reference for reliable matching under domain shift. We observe that the geometric structure of human anatomy constitutes a reliable, domain-transferable prior that has been overlooked. Building on this insight, we propose GeoProto, a geometry-aware CD-FSMIS framework that enriches prototypical matching with explicit structural priors. The core component, Geometry-Aware Prototype Enrichment (GAPE), augments each local appearance prototype with a learned geometric offset encoding its ordinal position within the organ's interior topology. This offset is derived from an auxiliary Ordinal Shape Branch (OSB) trained under an ordinally consistent objective that enforces monotonic variation of geometric embeddings across interior strata, requiring no annotation beyond standard segmentation masks. Extensive experiments across seven datasets spanning three evaluation settings (cross-modality, cross-sequence, and cross-context) demonstrate that GeoProto achieves state-of-the-art performance.

analysis.tldr: 提出几何感知原型学习框架GeoProto，利用解剖结构先验提升跨域少样本医学图像分割性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 跨域少样本医学图像分割中，现有原型方法将解剖结构与域特定外观变化纠缠，缺乏稳定参考，而人体解剖的几何结构是可靠且跨域可迁移的先验，但被忽视。
analysis.problem: 解决跨域少样本医学图像分割中，模型在仅有少量标注样本下同时泛化到新解剖类别和未见成像域时，原型匹配因域偏移而不稳定的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到人体解剖的几何结构是可靠、跨域可迁移的先验，可作为稳定参考。
analysis.method: 提出GeoProto框架，核心是几何感知原型增强（GAPE），通过辅助序数形状分支（OSB）学习几何偏移，将局部外观原型与器官内部拓扑的序数位置编码结合，增强原型匹配。
contributions: 首次将几何结构先验引入跨域少样本医学图像分割，提出GeoProto框架。
设计几何感知原型增强（GAPE）和序数形状分支（OSB），无需额外标注即可学习几何偏移。
在跨模态、跨序列、跨上下文三种设置共七个数据集上取得最先进性能。
analysis.experiments: 在七个数据集上进行了跨模态、跨序列和跨上下文三种评估设置的大量实验，结果表明GeoProto达到最先进性能。
limitations: 可能依赖器官形状的规则性，对形状变异大的器官效果有限。
序数形状分支的训练可能对超参数敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出几何感知原型学习框架GeoProto，利用解剖结构先验提升跨域少样本医学图像分割性能。

papers.title: CADBench: A Multimodal Benchmark for AI-Assisted CAD Program Generation
papers.abstract: Recovering editable CAD programs from images or 3D observations is central to AI-assisted design, but progress is difficult to measure because existing evaluations are fragmented across datasets, modalities, and metrics. We introduce CADBench, a unified benchmark for multimodal CAD program generation. CADBench contains 18,000 evaluation samples spanning six benchmark families derived from DeepCAD, Fusion 360, ABC, MCB, and Objaverse; five input modalities including clean meshes, noisy meshes, single-view renders, photorealistic renders, and multi-view renders; and six metrics covering geometric fidelity, executability, and program compactness. STEP-based families are stratified by B-rep face count and all families are diversity-sampled to support controlled analysis across complexity and object variation. We benchmark eleven CAD-specialized and general-purpose vision-language systems, generating more than 1.4 million CAD programs. Under idealized inputs, specialized mesh-to-CAD models substantially outperform code-generating VLMs, which remain far from reliable CAD program reconstruction. CADBench further reveals three recurring failure modes: reconstruction quality degrades with geometric complexity, CAD-specialized models can be brittle under modality shift, and model rankings change across metrics. Together, these results position CADBench as a diagnostic testbed for measuring progress in editable 3D reconstruction and multimodal CAD understanding. The benchmark is publicly available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: CADBench是一个统一的多模态基准，用于评估AI辅助的CAD程序生成，包含18,000个样本和多种输入模态与指标。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有CAD程序生成评估分散在不同数据集、模态和指标上，难以衡量进展，需要统一基准。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个统一的、多模态的基准来系统评估AI从图像或3D观测中恢复可编辑CAD程序的能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要揭示了三个反复出现的失败模式：重建质量随几何复杂度下降、CAD专用模型在模态转换下脆弱、模型排名因指标而异。
analysis.method: 构建包含18,000个样本的基准，涵盖五个输入模态、六个指标和六个基准家族，并评估了11个CAD专用和通用视觉语言系统。
contributions: 提出了CADBench，一个统一的多模态基准，用于评估CAD程序生成。
通过大规模实验揭示了现有模型的失败模式和性能瓶颈。
analysis.experiments: 在11个CAD专用和通用视觉语言系统上进行了基准测试，生成了超过140万个CAD程序，并分析了不同输入模态和复杂度下的性能。
limitations: 基准可能未覆盖所有实际CAD场景（如交互式设计）。
评估指标可能无法完全反映程序的可编辑性和实用性。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: CADBench是一个统一的多模态基准，用于评估AI辅助的CAD程序生成，包含18,000个样本和多种输入模态与指标。

papers.title: Masked Generative Transformer Is What You Need for Image Editing
papers.abstract: Diffusion models dominate image editing, yet their global denoising mechanism entangles edited regions with surrounding context, causing modifications to propagate into areas that should remain intact. We propose a fundamentally different approach by leveraging Masked Generative Transformers (MGTs), whose localized token-prediction paradigm naturally confines changes to intended regions. We present EditMGT, an MGT-based editing framework that is the first of its kind. Our approach employs multi-layer attention consolidation to aggregate cross-attention maps into precise edit localization signals, and region-hold sampling to explicitly prevent token flipping in non-target areas. To support training, we construct CrispEdit-2M, a 2M-sample high-resolution (>1024) editing dataset spanning seven categories. With only 960M parameters, EditMGT achieves state-of-the-art image similarity on multiple benchmarks while delivering 6x faster editing, demonstrating that MGTs offer a compelling alternative to diffusion-based editing.

analysis.tldr: EditMGT首次用掩码生成式Transformer替代扩散模型实现图像编辑，速度提升6倍且保持高保真度。
analysis.research_motivation: 扩散模型的全局去噪机制会导致编辑区域与周围上下文纠缠，使修改扩散到不应改变的区域，缺乏局部可控性。
analysis.problem: 如何利用掩码生成式Transformer的局部token预测范式实现精确、高效的图像编辑。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 扩散模型的全局去噪机制导致编辑区域与上下文纠缠，修改会传播到非目标区域。
analysis.method: 提出EditMGT框架，包含多层注意力整合（将交叉注意力图聚合为精确编辑定位信号）和区域保持采样（显式阻止非目标区域的token翻转）。
contributions: 首个基于掩码生成式Transformer的图像编辑框架EditMGT，提供扩散模型的替代方案。
构建CrispEdit-2M数据集，包含200万高分辨率（>1024）样本，覆盖7类编辑任务。
在多个基准上达到最先进的图像相似度，同时实现6倍编辑速度提升。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准上评估图像相似度，并报告6倍速度提升。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能对复杂语义编辑（如大幅改变物体类别）效果有限。
数据集CrispEdit-2M的类别覆盖可能不够全面。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: EditMGT首次用掩码生成式Transformer替代扩散模型实现图像编辑，速度提升6倍且保持高保真度。

papers.title: Is Your Driving World Model an All-Around Player?
papers.abstract: Today's driving world models can generate remarkably realistic dash-cam videos, yet no single model excels universally. Some generate photorealistic textures but violate basic physics; others maintain geometric consistency but fail when subjected to closed-loop planning. This disconnect exposes a critical gap: the field evaluates how real generated worlds appear, but rarely whether they behave realistically. We introduce WorldLens, a unified benchmark that measures world-model fidelity across the full spectrum, from pixel quality and 4D geometry to closed-loop driving and human perceptual alignment, through five complementary aspects and 24 standardized dimensions. Our evaluation of six representative models reveals that no existing approach dominates across all axes: texture-rich models violate geometry, geometry-aware models lack behavioral fidelity, and even the strongest performers achieve only 2-3 out of 10 on human realism ratings. To bridge algorithmic metrics with human perception, we further contribute WorldLens-26K, a 26,808-entry human-annotated preference dataset pairing numerical scores with textual rationales, and WorldLens-Agent, a vision-language evaluator distilled from these judgments that enables scalable, explainable auto-assessment. Together, the benchmark, dataset, and agent form a unified ecosystem for assessing generated worlds not merely by visual appeal, but by physical and behavioral fidelity.

analysis.tldr: 提出WorldLens基准，全面评估驾驶世界模型在像素、几何、闭环驾驶和人类感知等多维度的保真度，发现现有模型无一全能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有驾驶世界模型评估仅关注视觉真实性，忽略物理和行为保真度，导致模型在闭环规划等实际任务中失败。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个统一、全面的基准来评估驾驶世界模型在像素质量、4D几何、闭环驾驶和人类感知对齐等多方面的保真度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 纹理丰富的模型违反物理规律，几何一致的模型缺乏行为保真度，最强模型在人类真实感评分中仅得2-3/10。
analysis.method: 提出WorldLens基准，包含5个互补方面和24个标准化维度；构建WorldLens-26K人类标注偏好数据集；训练WorldLens-Agent视觉语言评估器。
contributions: 提出WorldLens基准，全面评估驾驶世界模型的像素、几何、闭环驾驶和人类感知保真度。
构建WorldLens-26K人类标注偏好数据集，包含26,808条数值评分和文本理由。
训练WorldLens-Agent视觉语言评估器，实现可扩展、可解释的自动评估。
analysis.experiments: 评估了6个代表性模型，发现无模型在所有维度上占优。
limitations: 基准可能未覆盖所有驾驶场景。
评估器依赖人类标注数据，可能引入标注偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出WorldLens基准，全面评估驾驶世界模型在像素、几何、闭环驾驶和人类感知等多维度的保真度，发现现有模型无一全能。

papers.title: Verification Mirage: Mapping the Reliability Boundary of Self-Verification in Medical VQA
papers.abstract: Self-verification, re-invoking the same vision language model (VLM) in a fresh context to check its own generated answer, is increasingly used as a default safety layer for medical visual question answering (VQA). We argue that this practice is fundamentally unreliable. We introduce [METHOD NAME], a diagnostic framework for mapping the reliability boundary of medical VLM self-verification by decomposing verifier behavior into discrimination capability and agreement bias. Because the verifier and answer generator are capacity-coupled, the verifier can overly agree with the generator, creating a verification mirage: a regime with both high verifier error and high agreement bias, driven by false acceptance of incorrect answers. Evaluating six open-weight VLMs across five medical VQA datasets and seven medical tasks, we find that this boundary is strongly task-conditioned. Knowledge-intensive clinical tasks fall deepest into the mirage, simpler tasks are more resistant, and perceptual tasks lie in between. Verification also fails to provide an independent safety signal: logistic mixed-effects analysis shows that verifier error and agreement bias become more likely when the generator is wrong, while saliency analyses show that verifiers under-attend to image evidence relative to generators, a phenomenon we call the lazy verifier. Cross-verification reduces but does not eliminate the mirage. Moreover, when verification is reused in multi-turn actor-verifier loops, most initially wrong answers become locked in by false verification. Since our experiments use clean benchmarks, the observed reliability boundary likely underestimates failures in real clinical deployment.

analysis.tldr: 医疗VLM自验证不可靠，存在验证幻象，知识密集型任务最严重。
analysis.research_motivation: 自验证被广泛用作医疗VQA的安全层，但其可靠性未经系统检验，可能导致错误答案被误接受。
analysis.problem: 揭示并量化医疗VLM自验证的可靠性边界，分析其失败模式。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 验证器与生成器能力耦合导致过度同意，形成验证幻象（高错误率+高同意偏差）；知识密集型任务最易陷入，简单任务较鲁棒；验证器对图像证据关注不足（懒惰验证器）；交叉验证可缓解但无法消除幻象；多轮交互中错误答案易被锁定。
analysis.method: 提出诊断框架，分解验证器行为为判别能力和同意偏差，通过逻辑混合效应分析和显著性分析评估可靠性边界。
contributions: 首次系统揭示医疗VLM自验证的不可靠性，定义验证幻象现象。
提出诊断框架量化可靠性边界，发现任务条件依赖性。
识别懒惰验证器现象及多轮交互中的错误锁定机制。
analysis.experiments: 在6个开源VLM、5个医疗VQA数据集、7个医疗任务上评估，使用逻辑混合效应分析和显著性分析。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 仅使用干净基准，可能低估真实临床部署中的失败。
未探索不同验证策略或模型架构的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 医疗VLM自验证不可靠，存在验证幻象，知识密集型任务最严重。

papers.title: BabelDOC: Better Layout-Preserving PDF Translation via Intermediate Representation
papers.abstract: As global cross-lingual communication intensifies, language barriers in visually rich documents such as PDFs remain a practical bottleneck. Existing document translation pipelines face a tension between linguistic processing and layout preservation: text-oriented Computer-Assisted Translation (CAT) systems often discard structural metadata, while document parsers focus on extraction and do not support faithful re-rendering after translation. We introduce BabelDOC, an Intermediate Representation (IR)-based framework for layout-preserving PDF translation. BabelDOC decouples visual layout metadata from semantic content, enabling document-level translation operations such as terminology extraction, cross-page context handling, glossary-constrained generation, and formula placeholdering. The translated content is then re-anchored to the original layout through an adaptive typesetting engine. Experiments on a curated 200-page benchmark, together with human evaluation and multimodal LLM-as-a-judge evaluation, show that BabelDOC improves layout fidelity, visual aesthetics, and terminology consistency over representative baselines, while maintaining competitive translation precision. The open-source toolkit and its interactive downstream applications are publicly available and have attracted over 8.4K GitHub stars and 17 contributors at the time of writing. A demonstration video is also available.

analysis.tldr: BabelDOC 通过中间表示解耦布局与语义，实现高保真 PDF 翻译。
analysis.research_motivation: 全球跨语言交流日益频繁，但 PDF 等富视觉文档的翻译面临语言处理与布局保真之间的张力：传统 CAT 系统丢弃结构元数据，文档解析器则不支持翻译后的忠实重渲染。
analysis.problem: 如何在 PDF 翻译中同时保证高翻译质量和原始布局的精确保留。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有方法在语言处理与布局保真之间存在矛盾，缺乏统一的中间表示来协调两者。
analysis.method: 提出基于中间表示（IR）的框架 BabelDOC，将视觉布局元数据与语义内容解耦，支持术语提取、跨页上下文处理、术语表约束生成和公式占位等文档级翻译操作，并通过自适应排版引擎将翻译内容重新锚定到原始布局。
contributions: 提出基于中间表示的布局保持 PDF 翻译框架 BabelDOC
构建了 200 页的基准测试集，并通过人工评估和多模态 LLM 评估验证了方法在布局保真度、视觉美观性和术语一致性上的优势
analysis.experiments: 在 200 页基准测试上进行了实验，包括人工评估和多模态 LLM 评估，结果显示 BabelDOC 在布局保真度、视觉美观性和术语一致性上优于代表性基线，同时保持有竞争力的翻译精度。
limitations: 可能对复杂排版（如多栏、嵌套表格）的适应性有限
依赖中间表示的设计质量，可能引入新的错误模式
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: BabelDOC 通过中间表示解耦布局与语义，实现高保真 PDF 翻译。

papers.title: Transcoda: End-to-End Zero-Shot Optical Music Recognition via Data-Centric Synthetic Training
papers.abstract: Optical Music Recognition (OMR), the task of transcribing sheet music into a structured textual representation, is currently bottlenecked by a lack of large-scale, annotated datasets of real scans. This forces models to rely on either few-shot transfer or synthetic training pipelines that remain overly simplistic. A secondary challenge is encoding non-uniqueness: in the popular Humdrum **kern format for transcribing music, multiple different text encodings can render into the same visual sheet music. This one-to-many mapping creates a harder learning task and introduces high uncertainty during decoding. We propose Transcoda, an OMR system built on (i) an advanced synthetic data generation pipeline, (ii) a normalization of the **kern encoding to enforce a unique normal form and (iii) grammar-based decoding to ensure the syntactic correctness of the output. This approach allows us to train a compact 59M-parameter model in just 6 hours on a single GPU that outperforms billion-parameter baselines. Transcoda achieves the best score among state of the art baselines on a newly curated benchmark of synthetically rendered scores at 18.46% OMR-NED (compared to 43.91% for the next-best system, Legato) and reduces the error rate on historical Polish scans to 63.97% OMR-NED (down from 80.16% for SMT++).

analysis.tldr: 通过数据合成和编码规范化，实现零样本光学音乐识别，小模型超越大模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 光学音乐识别（OMR）因缺乏大规模真实扫描标注数据集而进展缓慢，现有合成训练方法过于简单，且音乐编码存在一对多映射导致解码不确定性。
analysis.problem: 如何在没有真实标注数据的情况下，实现高精度的零样本光学音乐识别，并解决编码非唯一性问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Transcoda系统，包含高级合成数据生成管道、**kern编码规范化（强制唯一范式）和基于语法的解码，训练紧凑的59M参数模型。
contributions: 提出数据驱动的合成训练方法，实现零样本OMR。
引入编码规范化解决一对多映射问题，降低解码不确定性。
在合成和真实历史扫描数据上达到最优性能，小模型超越大模型。
analysis.experiments: 在合成基准上OMR-NED为18.46%（次优Legato为43.91%），在历史波兰扫描上错误率降至63.97%（SMT++为80.16%）。
limitations: 仅针对**kern格式，可能不适用于其他音乐编码。
真实扫描数据性能仍较低，泛化性有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过数据合成和编码规范化，实现零样本光学音乐识别，小模型超越大模型。

papers.title: MMVIAD: Multi-view Multi-task Video Understanding for Industrial Anomaly Detection
papers.abstract: Industrial anomaly detection is critical for manufacturing quality control, yet existing datasets mainly focus on static images or sparse views, which do not fully reflect continuous inspection processes in real industrial scenarios. We introduce MMVIAD (Multi-view Multi-task Video Industrial Anomaly Detection), to the best of our knowledge the first continuous multi-view video dataset for industrial anomaly detection and understanding, together with a benchmark for multi-task evaluation. MMVIAD contains object-centric 2-second inspection clips with approximately 120 degrees of camera motion, covering 48 object categories, 14 environments, and 6 structural anomaly types. It supports anomaly detection, defect classification, object classification, and anomaly visible-time localization. Systematic evaluations on MMVIAD show that current commercial and open-source video MLLMs remain far below human performance, especially for fine-grained defect recognition and temporal grounding. To improve transferable anomaly understanding, we further develop a two-stage post-training pipeline where PS-SFT (Perception-Structured Supervised Fine-Tuning) initializes perception-structured reasoning and VISTA-GRPO (Visibility-grounded Industrial Structured Temporal Anomaly Group Relative Policy Optimization) refines the model with semantic-gated defect reward and visibility-aware temporal reward, producing the final model VISTA. On MMVIAD-Unseen, VISTA improves the base model's average score across the four tasks from 45.0 to 57.5, surpassing GPT-5.4. Source code is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 首个多视角视频工业异常检测数据集MMVIAD及两阶段后训练方法VISTA，显著提升视频MLLM在细粒度缺陷识别与时间定位上的性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有工业异常检测数据集主要基于静态图像或稀疏视角，无法反映真实工业场景中的连续检测过程，限制了视频多模态大模型在该领域的应用。
analysis.problem: 缺乏多视角连续视频数据集及有效的视频异常理解方法，导致当前视频MLLM在细粒度缺陷识别和时间定位上远低于人类水平。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出当前商业和开源视频MLLM在MMVIAD上远低于人类表现，尤其在细粒度缺陷识别和时间定位方面。
analysis.method: 提出两阶段后训练流程：第一阶段PS-SFT初始化感知结构化推理，第二阶段VISTA-GRPO通过语义门控缺陷奖励和可见性感知时间奖励优化模型，得到最终模型VISTA。
contributions: 构建了首个多视角连续视频工业异常检测数据集MMVIAD，包含48个物体类别、14种环境和6种结构异常类型，支持四项任务。
提出两阶段后训练方法VISTA，显著提升视频MLLM在工业异常检测任务上的性能，在未见类别上平均得分从45.0提升至57.5。
analysis.experiments: 在MMVIAD数据集上进行了系统评估，结果显示VISTA在MMVIAD-Unseen上平均得分从45.0提升至57.5，超越GPT-5.4。
limitations: 数据集仅包含2秒剪辑和约120度视角，可能无法覆盖所有工业场景。
方法依赖多任务标注，标注成本较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个多视角视频工业异常检测数据集MMVIAD及两阶段后训练方法VISTA，显著提升视频MLLM在细粒度缺陷识别与时间定位上的性能。

papers.title: Predicting 3D structure by latent posterior sampling
papers.abstract: The remarkable achievements of both generative models of 2D images and neural field representations for 3D scenes present a compelling opportunity to integrate the strengths of both approaches. In this work, we propose a methodology that combines a NeRF-based representation of 3D scenes with probabilistic modeling and reasoning using diffusion models. We view 3D reconstruction as a perception problem with inherent uncertainty that can thereby benefit from probabilistic inference methods. The core idea is to represent the 3D scene as a stochastic latent variable for which we can learn a prior and use it to perform posterior inference given a set of observations. We formulate posterior sampling using the score-based inference method of diffusion models in conjunction with a likelihood term computed from a reconstruction model that includes volumetric rendering. We train the model using a two-stage process: first we train the reconstruction model while auto-decoding the latent representations for a dataset of 3D scenes, and then we train the prior over the latents using a diffusion model. By using the model to generate samples from the posterior we demonstrate that various 3D reconstruction tasks can be performed, differing by the type of observation used as inputs. We showcase reconstruction from single-view, multi-view, noisy images, sparse pixels, and sparse depth data. These observations vary in the amount of information they provide for the scene and we show that our method can model the varying levels of inherent uncertainty associated with each task. Our experiments illustrate that this approach yields a comprehensive method capable of accurately predicting 3D structure from diverse types of observations.

analysis.tldr: 结合NeRF和扩散模型，通过潜在后验采样实现从多种观测中预测3D结构。
analysis.research_motivation: 2D图像生成模型和3D神经场表示的成功为整合两者提供了机会，但3D重建存在固有不确定性，需要概率推理方法。
analysis.problem: 如何从单视图、多视图、噪声图像、稀疏像素或稀疏深度等不同观测中，以概率方式准确预测3D结构。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不同观测类型提供的信息量不同，导致重建任务的不确定性水平各异，现有方法难以统一建模。
analysis.method: 将3D场景表示为随机潜变量，学习其先验，并使用基于扩散模型的得分推断方法结合体积渲染的似然项进行后验采样；采用两阶段训练：先训练重建模型并自动解码潜表示，再用扩散模型训练潜变量先验。
contributions: 提出一种结合NeRF和扩散模型的概率3D重建框架，将3D重建视为后验推理问题。
展示了该方法能处理多种观测类型（单视图、多视图、噪声图像、稀疏像素、稀疏深度），并建模不同不确定性水平。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量3D场景数据集进行训练。
两阶段训练可能计算开销较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 结合NeRF和扩散模型，通过潜在后验采样实现从多种观测中预测3D结构。

papers.title: PhyGround: Benchmarking Physical Reasoning in Generative World Models
papers.abstract: Generative world models are increasingly used for video generation, where learned simulators are expected to capture the physical rules that govern real-world dynamics. However, evaluating whether generated videos actually follow these rules remains challenging. Existing physics-focused video benchmarks have made important progress, but they still face three key challenges, including the coarse evaluation frameworks that hide law-specific failures, response biases and fatigue that undermine the validity of annotation judgments, and automated evaluators that are insufficiently physics-aware or difficult to audit. To address those challenges, we introduce PhyGround, a criteria-grounded benchmark for evaluating physical reasoning in video generation. The benchmark contains 250 curated prompts, each augmented with an expected physical outcome, and a taxonomy of 13 physical laws across solid-body mechanics, fluid dynamics, and optics. Each law is operationalized through observable sub-questions to enable per-law diagnostics. We evaluate eight modern video generation models through a large-scale, quality-controlled human study, grounded on social science lab experiment design. A total of 459 annotators provided 5,796 complete annotations and over 37.4K fine-grained labels; after quality control, the retained annotations exhibited high split-half model-ranking correlations (Spearman's rho > 0.90). To support reproducible automated evaluation, we release PhyJudge-9B, an open physics-specialized VLM judge. PhyJudge-9B achieves substantially lower aggregate relative bias than Gemini-3.1-Pro (3.3% vs. 16.6%). We release prompts, human annotations, model checkpoints, and evaluation code on the project page this https URL .

analysis.tldr: PhyGround 是一个用于评估视频生成模型物理推理能力的基准，包含 250 个提示、13 条物理定律和细粒度标注，并通过大规模人类研究和专用 VLM 裁判实现可靠评估。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频生成模型常被期望遵循物理规则，但缺乏细粒度、无偏且可审计的物理推理评估方法。
analysis.problem: 现有物理视频基准存在评估框架粗糙、标注者偏差与疲劳、自动评估器物理感知不足或难以审计的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建包含 250 个提示和 13 条物理定律（固体力学、流体动力学、光学）的基准，每个提示附带预期物理结果；通过大规模质量控制人类研究（459 名标注者，5,796 条完整标注）和开源物理专用 VLM 裁判 PhyJudge-9B 进行评估。
contributions: 提出 PhyGround 基准，包含 250 个提示和 13 条物理定律的细粒度评估框架。
通过大规模人类研究（459 人，5,796 条标注）验证基准可靠性，标注后分半模型排名相关性 >0.90。
开源 PhyJudge-9B VLM 裁判，相对偏差显著低于 Gemini-3.1-Pro（3.3% vs 16.6%）。
analysis.experiments: 评估了 8 个现代视频生成模型，通过大规模人类研究（459 名标注者，5,796 条完整标注，37.4K 细粒度标签）和 PhyJudge-9B 自动评估。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖 13 条物理定律，可能未涵盖所有物理现象。
PhyJudge-9B 的泛化能力可能受限于训练数据。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: PhyGround 是一个用于评估视频生成模型物理推理能力的基准，包含 250 个提示、13 条物理定律和细粒度标注，并通过大规模人类研究和专用 VLM 裁判实现可靠评估。

papers.title: Rapid Forest Fuel Load Estimation via Virtual Remote Sensing and Metric-Scale Feed-Forward 3D Reconstruction
papers.abstract: Accurate quantification of forest coverage and combustible biomass (fuel load) is critical for wildfire risk assessment and ecosystem management. However, traditional methods relying on airborne LiDAR or field surveys are cost-prohibitive and time-intensive, while satellite imagery often lacks the vertical resolution required for canopy volume analysis. This paper proposes a novel, automated pipeline for rapid forest inventory using virtual remote sensing data derived from Google Earth Studio (GES). Our approach first generates low-altitude orbital imagery and camera poses for a target region. For dense 3D reconstruction, we employ Pi-Long, developed within the VGGT-Long framework. This model serves as a scalable extension of the Pi-3 feed-forward Transformer architecture. To address the inherent scale ambiguity in monocular reconstruction, we introduce a metric recovery module that aligns the reconstructed trajectory with GES ground truth poses via Sim(3) Umeyama optimization. The metric-scale point cloud is then orthogonally projected into Bird's-Eye-View (BEV) height and density maps. Finally, we employ a watershed-based segmentation algorithm combined with height variance analysis to classify tree species (conifer vs. broadleaf), calculate Leaf Area Index (LAI), and estimate total fuel load. Experimental results demonstrate that this pipeline offers a scalable, cost-effective alternative to physical scanning, enabling near-real-time estimation of forest biomass with high geometric consistency.

analysis.tldr: 提出利用虚拟遥感数据和前馈3D重建的自动化流程，实现快速、低成本的森林燃料负荷估算。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统森林燃料负荷估算依赖机载LiDAR或实地调查，成本高且耗时；卫星图像缺乏垂直分辨率，难以进行冠层体积分析。
analysis.problem: 如何利用虚拟遥感数据实现低成本、近实时的森林燃料负荷估算。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 从Google Earth Studio获取虚拟遥感图像和相机位姿，使用基于VGGT-Long框架的Pi-Long模型进行稠密3D重建，通过Sim(3) Umeyama优化恢复公制尺度，生成鸟瞰高度和密度图，再结合分水岭分割和高度方差分析进行树种分类、叶面积指数计算和燃料负荷估算。
contributions: 提出一种结合虚拟遥感和前馈3D重建的自动化森林燃料负荷估算流程。
引入公制恢复模块解决单目重建的尺度模糊问题。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 依赖Google Earth Studio的虚拟数据，可能受限于数据可用性和质量。
方法在复杂地形或多种植被混合场景下的泛化能力未验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出利用虚拟遥感数据和前馈3D重建的自动化流程，实现快速、低成本的森林燃料负荷估算。

papers.title: Beyond the Last Layer: Multi-Layer Representation Fusion for Visual Tokenizatio
papers.abstract: Representation autoencoders that reuse frozen pretrained vision encoders as visual tokenizers have achieved strong reconstruction and generation quality. However, existing methods universally extract features from only the last encoder layer, discarding the rich hierarchical information distributed across intermediate layers. We show that low-level visual details survive in the last layer merely as attenuated residuals after multiple layers of semantic abstraction, and that explicitly fusing multi-layer features can substantially recover this lost information. We propose DRoRAE (Depth-Routed Representation AutoEncoder), a lightweight fusion module that adaptively aggregates all encoder layers via energy-constrained routing and incremental correction, producing an enriched latent compatible with a frozen pretrained decoder. A three-phase decoupled training strategy first learns the fusion under the implicit distributional constraint of the frozen decoder, then fine-tunes the decoder to fully exploit the enriched representation. On ImageNet-256, DRoRAE reduces rFID from 0.57 to 0.29 and improves generation FID from 1.74 to 1.65 (with AutoGuidance), with gains also transferring to text-to-image synthesis. Furthermore, we uncover a log-linear scaling law ($R^2{=}0.86$) between fusion capacity and reconstruction quality, identifying \textit{representation richness} as a new, predictably scalable dimension for visual tokenizers analogous to vocabulary size in NLP.

analysis.tldr: 提出DRoRAE，通过融合预训练视觉编码器的多层特征，显著提升视觉分词器的重建与生成质量，并发现表示丰富度与重建质量之间的对数线性缩放律。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视觉分词器仅使用编码器最后一层特征，丢弃了中间层的层次化信息，导致重建质量受限。
analysis.problem: 如何有效融合预训练视觉编码器的多层特征，以恢复被语义抽象丢失的低级视觉细节，并提升重建与生成性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 低级视觉细节在最后一层仅以衰减残差形式存在，显式融合多层特征可大幅恢复丢失信息；发现融合容量与重建质量之间存在对数线性缩放律。
analysis.method: 提出DRoRAE，包含轻量级融合模块，通过能量约束路由和增量校正自适应聚合所有编码器层，生成丰富潜表示；采用三阶段解耦训练策略。
contributions: 首次系统研究多层特征融合在视觉分词器中的作用，并揭示低级细节在最后一层的衰减现象。
提出DRoRAE，实现高效多层融合，在ImageNet-256上显著降低rFID和提升生成FID。
发现表示丰富度与重建质量之间的对数线性缩放律，为视觉分词器提供可预测的扩展维度。
analysis.experiments: 在ImageNet-256上评估，rFID从0.57降至0.29，生成FID从1.74降至1.65（带AutoGuidance），并迁移至文本到图像合成任务。
limitations: 仅在ImageNet-256上验证，更大规模数据集或更高分辨率下的表现未知。
融合模块的额外计算开销可能影响实际部署效率。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出DRoRAE，通过融合预训练视觉编码器的多层特征，显著提升视觉分词器的重建与生成质量，并发现表示丰富度与重建质量之间的对数线性缩放律。

papers.title: Towards a Large Language-Vision Question Answering Model for MSTAR Automatic Target Recognition
papers.abstract: Large language-vision models (LLVM), such as OpenAI's ChatGPT and GPT-4, have gained prominence as powerful tools for analyzing text and imagery. The merging of these data domains represents a significant paradigm shift with far-reaching implications for automatic target recognition (ATR). Recent transformer-based LLVM research has shown substantial improvements for geospatial perception tasks. Our study examines the application of LLVM to remote sensing image captioning and visual question-answering (VQA), with a specific focus on synthetic aperture radar (SAR) imagery. We examine newly published LLVM methods, including CLIP and LLaVA neural network transformer architectures. We have developed a work-in-progress SAR training and evaluation benchmark derived from the MSTAR Public Dataset. This has been extended to include descriptive text captions and question-answer pairs for VQA tasks. This challenge dataset is designed to push the boundaries of an LLVM in identifying nuanced ATR details in SAR imagery. Utilizing parameter-efficient fine-tuning, we train an LLVM method to identify fine-grained target qualities at 98% accuracy. We detail our data setup and experiments, addressing potential pitfalls that could lead to misleading conclusions. Accurately identifying and differentiating military vehicle types in SAR data poses a critical challenge, especially under complex environmental conditions. Mastering this target recognition skill may require a human analyst months of training and years of practice. This research represents a unique effort to apply LLVM to SAR applications, advancing machine-assisted remote sensing ATR for military and intelligence contexts.

analysis.tldr: 将大语言-视觉模型应用于MSTAR SAR图像自动目标识别，通过参数高效微调达到98%准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: SAR图像目标识别在军事和情报领域至关重要，但传统方法依赖人工分析，耗时且需要大量经验；大语言-视觉模型在遥感感知任务中展现出潜力，但尚未充分应用于SAR领域。
analysis.problem: 如何利用大语言-视觉模型对SAR图像进行自动目标识别，特别是区分复杂环境下的军用车辆类型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于MSTAR公共数据集构建包含描述性文本和问答对的SAR训练与评估基准，采用参数高效微调训练大语言-视觉模型（如CLIP和LLaVA架构）。
contributions: 构建了首个面向SAR VQA任务的MSTAR扩展基准，包含文本描述和问答对。
通过参数高效微调实现98%的细粒度目标识别准确率。
analysis.experiments: 在MSTAR数据集上评估，达到98%准确率，但未提供具体实验设置或对比基线。
limitations: 仅基于MSTAR公共数据集，可能无法泛化到其他SAR数据。
未讨论模型在复杂环境（如噪声、遮挡）下的鲁棒性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将大语言-视觉模型应用于MSTAR SAR图像自动目标识别，通过参数高效微调达到98%准确率。

papers.title: MPerS: Dynamic MLLM MixExperts Perception-Guided Remote Sensing Scene Segmentation
papers.abstract: The multimodal fusion of images and scene captions has been extensively explored and applied in various fields. However, when dealing with complex remote sensing (RS) scenes, existing studies have predominantly concentrated on architectural optimizations for integrating textual semantic information with visual features, while largely neglecting the generation of high-quality RS captions and the investigation of their effectiveness in multimodal semantic this http URL this context, we propose the Dynamic MLLM Mixture-of-Experts Perception-Guided Remote Sensing Scene Segmentation, referred to as this http URL design multiple prompts for MLLMs to generate high-quality RS captions, enabling MLLMs to perceive RS scenes from diverse expert perspectives. DINOv3 is employed to extract dense visual representations of this http URL design a Dynamic MixExperts module that adaptively integrates the most effective textual semantics. Linguistic Query Guided Attention is constructed to utilize textual semantic information to guide visual features for precise segmentation. The MLLMs include LLaVA, ChatGPT, and Qwen. Our method achieves superior performance on three public semantic segmentation RS datasets.

analysis.tldr: 提出动态MLLM混合专家感知引导的遥感场景分割方法，通过多专家视角生成高质量描述并自适应融合文本语义以提升分割精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有遥感场景多模态融合研究主要关注架构优化以整合文本语义与视觉特征，但忽视了高质量遥感描述生成及其在多模态语义融合中的有效性。
analysis.problem: 如何生成高质量遥感场景描述并有效利用其多模态语义信息提升分割性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 设计多个提示让MLLM从不同专家视角生成高质量遥感描述，使用DINOv3提取密集视觉表征，通过动态混合专家模块自适应整合最有效的文本语义，并构建语言查询引导注意力利用文本语义指导视觉特征进行精确分割。
contributions: 提出动态MLLM混合专家感知引导框架MPerS，利用多专家视角生成高质量遥感描述。
设计动态混合专家模块和语言查询引导注意力，实现自适应文本语义融合与视觉特征引导。
analysis.experiments: 在三个公开遥感语义分割数据集上取得优越性能。
limitations: 依赖多个MLLM生成描述，计算开销可能较大。
动态混合专家模块的泛化性可能受限于训练数据分布。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出动态MLLM混合专家感知引导的遥感场景分割方法，通过多专家视角生成高质量描述并自适应融合文本语义以提升分割精度。

papers.title: Dynamic Cross-Modal Prompt Generation for Multimodal Continual Instruction Tuning
papers.abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) achieve strong performance through instruction tuning, yet real-world deployment often requires continual capability expansion across sequential tasks. In such scenarios, Multimodal Continual Instruction Tuning (MCIT) aims to acquire new capabilities while limiting catastrophic forgetting. Existing methods mainly follow a module-composition paradigm: they maintain task-level prompts or LoRA experts and dynamically route or aggregate a subset of them at inference. However, samples within the same task can still differ substantially in visual scenes, question intents, and reasoning demands. This motivates instance-level adaptation to individual query-image pairs rather than only selecting or combining task-level modules. To this end, we propose DRAPE (Dynamic Cross-Modal Prompt Generation), a prompt-learning framework that synthesizes continuous instance-specific soft prompts for MCIT. Instead of selecting prompts from a fixed pool, DRAPE derives prompt queries from the textual instruction and cross-attends to visual patch features, producing query-image conditioned prompts that are prepended to the frozen LLM. To mitigate forgetting during sequential updates, DRAPE applies null-space gradient projection to the shared projector and uses CLIP-based prototype routing for task-label-free generator selection at inference. Extensive experiments on MCIT benchmarks show that DRAPE achieves state-of-the-art performance among representative prompt-based and LoRA-based continual-learning baselines.

analysis.tldr: 提出动态跨模态提示生成框架DRAPE，通过实例级软提示实现多模态持续指令微调，缓解灾难性遗忘。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态大模型在持续学习新任务时面临灾难性遗忘，现有方法依赖任务级模块组合，忽略了同一任务内样本的视觉场景、问题意图和推理需求的差异。
analysis.problem: 如何实现实例级别的自适应提示生成，以在多模态持续指令微调中平衡新能力获取与旧知识保留。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 同一任务内的样本在视觉场景、问题意图和推理需求上存在显著差异，任务级模块无法充分适应这种多样性。
analysis.method: 提出DRAPE框架，从文本指令生成提示查询，与视觉补丁特征交叉注意力生成实例特定的软提示；采用零空间梯度投影缓解遗忘，并使用CLIP原型路由实现无任务标签的生成器选择。
contributions: 提出动态跨模态提示生成方法，实现实例级别的自适应提示合成。
引入零空间梯度投影和CLIP原型路由，有效缓解灾难性遗忘并支持无任务标签推理。
analysis.experiments: 在MCIT基准上，DRAPE在基于提示和LoRA的持续学习基线中达到最先进性能。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练CLIP模型的质量。
零空间投影的计算开销在任务数量极大时可能增加。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出动态跨模态提示生成框架DRAPE，通过实例级软提示实现多模态持续指令微调，缓解灾难性遗忘。

papers.title: Break the Brake, Not the Wheel: Untargeted Jailbreak via Entropy Maximization
papers.abstract: Recent studies show that gradient-based universal image jailbreaks on vision-language models (VLMs) exhibit little or no cross-model transferability, casting doubt on the feasibility of transferable multimodal jailbreaks. We revisit this conclusion under a strictly untargeted threat model without enforcing a fixed prefix or response pattern. Our preliminary experiment reveals that refusal behavior concentrates at high-entropy tokens during autoregressive decoding, and non-refusal tokens already carry substantial probability mass among the top-ranked candidates before attack. Motivated by this finding, we propose Untargeted Jailbreak via Entropy Maximization(UJEM)-KL, a lightweight attack that maximizes entropy at these decision tokens to flip refusal outcomes, while stabilizing the remaining low-entropy positions to preserve output quality. Across three VLMs and two safety benchmarks, UJEM-KL achieves competitive white-box attack success rates and consistently improves transferability, while remaining effective under representative defenses. Our experimental results indicate that the limited transferability primarily stems from overly constrained optimization objectives.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于熵最大化的轻量级无目标越狱攻击UJEM-KL，通过操纵高熵决策令牌翻转拒绝行为，显著提升跨模型迁移性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有梯度驱动的通用图像越狱攻击在视觉-语言模型（VLM）上跨模型迁移性极差，质疑了可迁移多模态越狱的可行性，需要重新审视并解决这一瓶颈。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种无目标、高迁移性的VLM越狱攻击，避免固定前缀或响应模式的约束，同时保持攻击效果和输出质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 初步实验发现，自回归解码中拒绝行为集中在高熵令牌上，且非拒绝令牌在攻击前已在top候选词中占据显著概率质量。
analysis.method: 提出UJEM-KL，一种轻量级攻击方法，通过最大化决策令牌的熵来翻转拒绝结果，同时稳定低熵位置以保持输出质量。
contributions: 揭示了VLM拒绝行为与高熵令牌的关联，并利用熵最大化实现无目标越狱。
提出UJEM-KL攻击，在三个VLM和两个安全基准上达到竞争性白盒攻击成功率，并显著提升跨模型迁移性。
analysis.experiments: 在三个VLM和两个安全基准上评估，UJEM-KL实现了有竞争力的白盒攻击成功率，并一致提升了迁移性，在代表性防御下仍然有效。
limitations: 可能仅适用于自回归解码的VLM，对其他架构效果未知。
未在更大规模或更复杂的VLM上验证迁移性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于熵最大化的轻量级无目标越狱攻击UJEM-KL，通过操纵高熵决策令牌翻转拒绝行为，显著提升跨模型迁移性。

papers.title: GridProbe: Posterior-Probing for Adaptive Test-Time Compute in Long-Video VLMs
papers.abstract: Long-video understanding in VLMs is bottlenecked by a single monolithic forward pass over thousands of frames at quadratic attention cost. A common mitigation is to first select a small subset of informative frames before the forward pass; common for training-free selectors via auxiliary encoder-space similarities. Such signals are capped by contrastive pretraining, which usually fails on reasoning-heavy queries (negation, cross-frame counting, holistic summarization). We propose GridProbe, an efficient training-free posterior-probing inference paradigm that scores evidence in answer space using a frozen VLM's own reasoning and then selects question-relevant frames adaptively, resulting in sub-quadratic attention cost with little to no accuracy loss. We arrange frames on a $K{\times}K$ grid and run lightweight row R and column C probes, where each probe reads its peak posterior as a query-conditioned confidence. The outer product of R and C yields an interpretable importance map whose skewness and kurtosis drive Shape-Adaptive Selection, a closed-form rule that reliably replaces the fixed frame budget $M$ with a per-question $M_{\mathrm{eff}}$. We show empirically that $M_{\mathrm{eff}}$ tracks intrinsic question difficulty without ever seeing the answer, a sign of test-time adaptive compute. On Video-MME-v2, GridProbe matches the monolithic baseline within $1.6$ pp Avg Acc at $3.36\times$ TFLOPs reduction, while on LongVideoBench it Pareto-dominates the baseline ($+0.9$ pp at $0.35\times$ compute). Because the selector and QA models can be decoupled, pairing a small 2B selector with a stronger 4B or 8B QA is strictly Pareto-dominant over the 2B monolithic baseline (up to $+4.0$ pp at $0.52\times$ compute, on average), with no retraining. Finally, the interpretability of the importance maps opens future avenues for behavioral diagnostics, grounding, and frame-selection distillation.

analysis.tldr: GridProbe 通过后验探测实现长视频 VLM 的自适应测试时计算，在降低计算量的同时保持精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 长视频 VLM 处理数千帧时面临二次注意力成本，现有训练无关的选择器依赖对比预训练信号，在推理密集型查询上表现不佳。
analysis.problem: 如何在不重新训练的情况下，高效选择与查询相关的帧，实现自适应计算并降低注意力成本。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: GridProbe 将帧排列成 K×K 网格，运行轻量级行和列探针，利用冻结 VLM 的后验峰值作为置信度，通过外积生成重要性图，并基于偏度和峰度进行形状自适应选择，动态调整帧预算。
contributions: 提出 GridProbe，一种无需训练的后验探测推理范式，实现自适应帧选择。
引入形状自适应选择规则，根据问题难度动态调整帧预算。
实验表明 GridProbe 在多个基准上匹配或超越全量基线，同时显著降低计算量。
analysis.experiments: 在 Video-MME-v2 上，GridProbe 以 3.36 倍 TFLOPs 降低匹配全量基线（精度差 1.6 pp）；在 LongVideoBench 上以 0.35 倍计算量提升 0.9 pp。
limitations: 可能对极端长视频或复杂推理任务仍需验证。
重要性图的解释性应用尚未充分探索。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: GridProbe 通过后验探测实现长视频 VLM 的自适应测试时计算，在降低计算量的同时保持精度。

papers.title: RadThinking: A Dataset for Longitudinal Clinical Reasoning in Radiology
papers.abstract: Cancer screening is a reasoning task. A radiologist observes findings, compares them to prior scans, integrates clinical context, and reaches a diagnostic conclusion confirmed by pathology. We present RadThinking, a Visual Question Answering (VQA) dataset that makes this reasoning explicit and trainable. RadThinking releases VQA pairs at three difficulty tiers. Foundation VQAs are atomic perception questions. Single-step reasoning VQAs apply one clinical rule. Compositional VQAs require multi-step chain-of-thought to reach a guideline category such as LI-RADS-5. For every compositional VQA, we release the chain of foundation VQAs that solves it. The chain follows the rules of the governing clinical reporting standard. The dataset spans 20,362 CT scans from 9,131 patients across 43 cancer groups, plus 2,077 verified healthy controls with >1-year follow-up. To our knowledge, RadThinking is the first cancer-screening VQA corpus that stratifies questions by reasoning depth and grounds compositions in clinical reporting standards. The foundation tier supplies atomic perception supervision. The compositional tier supplies chain-of-thought data and verifiable rewards for reinforcement-learning recipes such as DeepSeek-R1 and OpenAI o1. RadThinking enables systematic training and evaluation of whether AI systems can reason about cancer, not merely detect it.

analysis.tldr: 首个按推理深度分层、基于临床报告标准构建的放射学纵向推理VQA数据集，支持从原子感知到多步链式推理的训练与评估。
analysis.research_motivation: 癌症筛查本质是推理任务，但现有VQA数据集缺乏按推理深度分层且基于临床标准的结构化数据，难以训练和评估AI的临床推理能力。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个能够显式建模放射学临床推理过程、支持从感知到多步推理训练与评估的VQA数据集。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建RadThinking数据集，包含三个难度层级（Foundation、Single-step reasoning、Compositional）的VQA对，并为每个Compositional VQA提供基于临床报告标准的链式Foundation VQA序列。
contributions: 首个按推理深度分层、基于临床报告标准的癌症筛查VQA数据集。
提供原子感知监督、单步推理和多步链式推理数据，支持强化学习训练（如DeepSeek-R1）。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 数据集仅覆盖CT模态，未涉及其他影像类型。
链式推理的构建依赖临床报告标准，可能无法覆盖所有临床变体。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个按推理深度分层、基于临床报告标准构建的放射学纵向推理VQA数据集，支持从原子感知到多步链式推理的训练与评估。

papers.title: TINS: Test-time ID-prototype-separated Negative Semantics Learning for OOD Detection
papers.abstract: Vision-language models enable OOD detection by comparing image alignment with ID labels and negative semantics. Existing negative-label-based methods mainly rely on static negative labels constructed before inference, limiting their ability to cover diverse and evolving OOD concepts. Although test-time expansion provides a natural solution, naively learning negative semantics from potential OOD samples may introduce hard ID contamination. To address this issue, we propose a \textbf{T}est-time \textbf{I}D-prototype-separated \textbf{N}egative \textbf{S}emantics learning method, termed \textbf{TINS}. TINS learns sample-specific negative text embeddings via image-to-text modality inversion and introduces ID-prototype-separated regularization to keep them separated from ID semantics. To further stabilize negative semantics expansion, TINS employs group-wise aggregation scoring and a buffer update strategy. Extensive experiments across Four-OOD, OpenOOD, Temporal-shift, and Various ID settings show consistent improvements over strong baselines. Notably, on the Four-OOD benchmark with ImageNet-1K as ID, TINS reduces the average FPR95 from 14.04\% to 6.72\%. Our code is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出测试时ID原型分离的负语义学习（TINS），通过图像到文本模态反转和正则化，提升视觉语言模型在开放集检测中的OOD识别能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于负标签的OOD检测方法依赖推理前构建的静态负标签，难以覆盖多样且演变的OOD概念；测试时扩展虽自然，但直接学习潜在OOD样本的负语义可能引入硬ID污染。
analysis.problem: 如何在测试时动态学习负语义，同时避免硬ID污染，提升视觉语言模型的OOD检测性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: TINS方法包含三个关键组件：1）通过图像到文本模态反转学习样本特定的负文本嵌入；2）引入ID原型分离正则化，使负语义与ID语义保持分离；3）采用分组聚合评分和缓冲区更新策略稳定负语义扩展。
contributions: 提出测试时ID原型分离的负语义学习方法，有效缓解硬ID污染问题。
在多个OOD基准（Four-OOD、OpenOOD、Temporal-shift、Various ID）上取得一致改进，在ImageNet-1K作为ID的Four-OOD上FPR95从14.04%降至6.72%。
analysis.experiments: 在Four-OOD、OpenOOD、Temporal-shift和Various ID设置下进行实验，与强基线相比取得一致改进，代码已开源。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练视觉语言模型的表征质量。
测试时学习可能增加推理计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出测试时ID原型分离的负语义学习（TINS），通过图像到文本模态反转和正则化，提升视觉语言模型在开放集检测中的OOD识别能力。

papers.title: C-CoT: Counterfactual Chain-of-Thought with Vision-Language Models for Safe Autonomous Driving
papers.abstract: Safety-critical planning in complex environments, particularly at urban intersections, remains a fundamental challenge for autonomous driving. Existing methods, whether rule-based or data-driven, frequently struggle to capture complex scene semantics, infer potential risks, and make reliable decisions in rare, high-risk situations. While vision-language models (VLMs) offer promising approaches for safe decision-making in these environments, most current approaches lack reflective and causal reasoning, thereby limiting their overall robustness. To address this, we propose a counterfactual chain-of-thought (C-CoT) framework that leverages VLMs to decompose driving decisions into five sequential stages: scene description, critical object identification, risk prediction, counterfactual risk reasoning, and final action planning. Within the counterfactual reasoning stage, we introduce a structured meta-action evaluation tree to explicitly assess the potential consequences of alternative action combinations. This self-reflective reasoning establishes causal links between action choices and safety outcomes, improving robustness in long-tail and out-of-distribution scenarios. To validate our approach, we construct the DeepAccident-CCoT dataset based on the DeepAccident benchmark and fine-tune a Qwen2.5-VL (7B) model using low-rank adaptation. Our model achieves a risk prediction recall of 81.9%, reduces the collision rate to 3.52%, and lowers L2 error to 1.98 m. Ablation studies further confirm the critical role of counterfactual reasoning and the meta-action evaluation tree in enhancing safety and interpretability.

analysis.tldr: 提出反事实思维链框架，利用VLM分阶段推理提升自动驾驶安全决策。
analysis.research_motivation: 自动驾驶在复杂环境（如城市交叉口）的安全关键规划仍面临挑战，现有方法难以捕捉场景语义、推断潜在风险并在罕见高风险场景中做出可靠决策。
analysis.problem: 现有VLM方法缺乏反思性和因果推理能力，导致在长尾和分布外场景中鲁棒性不足。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出反事实思维链（C-CoT）框架，将驾驶决策分解为场景描述、关键目标识别、风险预测、反事实风险推理和最终动作规划五个阶段，并在反事实推理阶段引入结构化元动作评估树来评估替代动作组合的潜在后果。
contributions: 提出C-CoT框架，将反事实推理与思维链结合用于自动驾驶安全决策。
构建DeepAccident-CCoT数据集并微调Qwen2.5-VL模型，在风险预测、碰撞率和L2误差上取得改进。
analysis.experiments: 在DeepAccident-CCoT数据集上微调Qwen2.5-VL (7B)模型，风险预测召回率81.9%，碰撞率3.52%，L2误差1.98 m，消融实验验证了反事实推理和元动作评估树的作用。
limitations: 可能依赖特定数据集和模型架构，泛化性需进一步验证。
反事实推理的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出反事实思维链框架，利用VLM分阶段推理提升自动驾驶安全决策。

papers.title: iPay: Integrated Payment Action Recognition via Multimodal Networks and Adaptive Spatial Prior Learning
papers.abstract: Automated transit payment analysis is vital for scalable fare auditing and passenger analytics, yet practice still relies on limited manual inspection. Prior vision- and skeleton-based methods remain brittle under noisy onboard surveillance and often depend on poorly generalizable handcrafted features. Building on the success of graph convolutional networks in human action recognition, we observe that skeleton features excel at modeling global spatiotemporal dependencies but tend to underemphasize the subtle local relative motions that distinguish payment actions. In contrast, RGB features preserve fine-grained spatial details yet often lack reliable temporal continuity in surveillance footage. To bridge both system-level deployment needs and model-level design challenges, we present iPay, an integrated payment action recognition framework for onboard transit surveillance system. iPay adopts a multimodal mixture-of-experts architecture with four tightly coupled streams: (1) an RGB expert stream emphasizing local evidence via region-focused computation; (2) a skeleton expert stream modeling articulated motion with a graph convolutional backbone; (3) a dual-attention fusion stream enabling skeleton-to-RGB temporal transfer and RGB-to-skeleton spatial enhancement; and (4) a prior-driven Spatial Difference Discriminator (SDD) that explicitly models hand-to-anchor relative motion to improve task-specific discriminability. We also collaborate with local transit agencies to collect over 55 hours of real onboard surveillance footage, yielding 500+ payment clips. Experiments show that iPay outperforms prior methods and achieves 83.45\% recognition accuracy with competitive computational efficiency, making it suitable for edge deployment. Code is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: iPay 提出多模态混合专家架构，结合 RGB 和骨架流及自适应空间先验学习，实现车载监控中的支付动作识别。
analysis.research_motivation: 自动公交支付分析对票价审计和乘客分析至关重要，但现有方法依赖人工检查，且视觉/骨架方法在噪声监控下鲁棒性差、手工特征泛化弱。
analysis.problem: 在车载监控噪声环境下，如何准确识别支付动作，同时兼顾局部细节和全局时空依赖。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出：骨架特征擅长全局时空依赖但忽略局部相对运动，RGB 特征保留细节但缺乏时间连续性。
analysis.method: iPay 采用多模态混合专家架构，包含 RGB 专家流、骨架专家流、双注意力融合流和空间差异判别器 (SDD)，通过手部-锚点相对运动建模提升判别性。
contributions: 提出多模态混合专家架构，融合 RGB 和骨架信息进行支付动作识别
设计空间差异判别器 (SDD) 显式建模手部-锚点相对运动
收集 55 小时真实车载监控数据，含 500+ 支付片段
analysis.experiments: 在自收集数据集上，iPay 达到 83.45% 识别准确率，具有竞争性计算效率，适合边缘部署。
limitations: 仅针对支付动作，泛化到其他动作类型未验证
数据集规模有限，可能影响模型泛化性
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: iPay 提出多模态混合专家架构，结合 RGB 和骨架流及自适应空间先验学习，实现车载监控中的支付动作识别。

papers.title: Qwen-Image-2.0 Technical Report
papers.abstract: We present Qwen-Image-2.0, an omni-capable image generation foundation model that unifies high-fidelity generation and precise image editing within a single framework. Despite recent progress, existing models still struggle with ultra-long text rendering, multilingual typography, high-resolution photorealism, robust instruction following, and efficient deployment, especially in text-rich and compositionally complex scenarios. Qwen-Image-2.0 addresses these challenges by coupling Qwen3-VL as the condition encoder with a Multimodal Diffusion Transformer for joint condition-target modeling, supported by large-scale data curation and a customized multi-stage training pipeline. This enables strong multimodal understanding while preserving flexible generation and editing capabilities. The model supports instructions of up to 1K tokens for generating text-rich content such as slides, posters, infographics, and comics, while significantly improving multilingual text fidelity and typography. It also enhances photorealistic generation with richer details, more realistic textures, and coherent lighting, and follows complex prompts more reliably across diverse styles. Extensive human evaluations show that Qwen-Image-2.0 substantially outperforms previous Qwen-Image models in both generation and editing, marking a step toward more general, reliable, and practical image generation foundation models.

analysis.tldr: Qwen-Image-2.0 是一个统一高保真生成与精确编辑的图像基础模型，通过 Qwen3-VL 编码器与多模态扩散 Transformer 联合建模，显著提升了多语言文本渲染、高分辨率真实感和指令跟随能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有图像生成模型在超长文本渲染、多语言排版、高分辨率真实感、鲁棒指令跟随和高效部署方面仍存在困难，尤其是在文本丰富和组合复杂的场景中，限制了实际应用。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个统一的图像生成基础模型，同时实现高保真生成和精确编辑，并解决多语言文本渲染、高分辨率真实感和复杂指令跟随等挑战。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体的现象分析或失败模式。
analysis.method: 将 Qwen3-VL 作为条件编码器，与多模态扩散 Transformer 结合进行联合条件-目标建模，并采用大规模数据整理和定制化多阶段训练流程。
contributions: 提出了 Qwen-Image-2.0，一个统一高保真生成与精确编辑的图像基础模型。
通过 Qwen3-VL 编码器与多模态扩散 Transformer 的耦合，实现了强大的多模态理解和灵活的生成编辑能力。
在超长文本渲染、多语言排版、高分辨率真实感和复杂指令跟随方面取得显著改进。
analysis.experiments: 摘要提到进行了广泛的人工评估，显示 Qwen-Image-2.0 在生成和编辑任务上显著优于之前的 Qwen-Image 模型，但未提供具体数值或基准。
limitations: 摘要未提及模型在极端复杂场景或低资源语言上的表现。
可能仍存在计算资源需求高、部署成本大的问题。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Qwen-Image-2.0 是一个统一高保真生成与精确编辑的图像基础模型，通过 Qwen3-VL 编码器与多模态扩散 Transformer 联合建模，显著提升了多语言文本渲染、高分辨率真实感和指令跟随能力。

papers.title: AllocMV: Optimal Resource Allocation for Music Video Generation via Structured Persistent State
papers.abstract: Generating long-horizon music videos (MVs) is frequently constrained by prohibitive computational costs and difficulty maintaining cross-shot consistency. We propose AllocMV, a hierarchical framework formulating music video synthesis as a Multiple-Choice Knapsack Problem (MCKP). AllocMV represents the video's persistent state as a compact, structured object comprising character entities, scene priors, and sharing graphs, produced by a global planner prior to realization. By estimating segment saliency from multimodal cues, a group-level MCKP solver based on dynamic programming optimally allocates resources across High-Gen, Mid-Gen, and Reuse branches. For repetitive musical motifs, we implement a divergence-based forking strategy that reuses visual prefixes to reduce costs while ensuring motif-level continuity. Evaluated via the Cost-Quality Ratio (CQR), AllocMV achieves an optimal trade-off between perceived quality and resource expenditure under strict budgetary and rhythmic constraints.

analysis.tldr: 将音乐视频生成建模为多选背包问题，通过结构化持久状态和动态规划实现资源最优分配。
analysis.research_motivation: 长时音乐视频生成面临高昂计算成本和跨镜头一致性难以保持的挑战，现有方法缺乏系统性的资源分配策略。
analysis.problem: 如何在有限计算预算下，为音乐视频生成分配不同质量的生成分支（高/中/复用），以在保证跨镜头一致性和节奏约束的同时优化感知质量与资源消耗的权衡。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出AllocMV层次框架：1) 全局规划器生成紧凑的结构化持久状态（角色实体、场景先验、共享图）；2) 基于多模态线索估计片段显著性；3) 使用动态规划求解组级多选背包问题，在High-Gen、Mid-Gen和Reuse分支间最优分配资源；4) 对重复音乐动机采用基于散度的分叉策略复用视觉前缀。
contributions: 将音乐视频生成形式化为多选背包问题，实现资源最优分配。
提出结构化持久状态表示，保证跨镜头一致性。
设计基于动态规划的组级求解器和分叉复用策略，在预算和节奏约束下优化成本-质量比。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖准确的显著性估计，在复杂场景下鲁棒性待验证。
框架复杂度较高，实时应用可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将音乐视频生成建模为多选背包问题，通过结构化持久状态和动态规划实现资源最优分配。

papers.title: UAV-Assisted Scan-to-Simulation for Landslides Using Physics-Informed Gaussian Splatting
papers.abstract: Landslide monitoring and simulation play an important role in urban safety assessment and disaster prevention. Existing landslide simulation pipelines typically rely on digital elevation model and mesh-based representations, which are suitable for geometric analysis, but often lack visual realism. This limitation reduces their effectiveness in interactive applications, hazard communication, and public education. In this paper, we propose a UAV-based scan-to-simulation framework that bridges photorealistic scene capture and physics-based landslide simulation through 3DGS. Specifically, our pipeline includes four stages: (1) UAV-based acquisition of slope imagery, (2) reconstruction of a low-anisotropy 3DGS scene representation, (3) volumetric conversion of the target simulation region by filling the interior of the surface-based model, and (4) integration with the Material Point Method (MPM) for landslide simulation. We validate the proposed framework on a real landslide site in Hong Kong that experienced a severe landslide event. The results show that our method supports both realistic visual reconstruction and effective simulation.

analysis.tldr: 提出无人机辅助的扫描到仿真框架，结合物理信息3DGS实现滑坡场景的逼真重建与物理模拟。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有滑坡模拟依赖数字高程模型和网格表示，缺乏视觉真实感，限制了在交互应用、灾害沟通和公众教育中的效果。
analysis.problem: 如何将无人机采集的斜坡影像转化为既具有视觉真实感又能支持物理仿真的场景表示。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 四阶段框架：无人机采集斜坡影像、低各向异性3DGS场景重建、目标仿真区域体积转换（填充表面模型内部）、集成物质点法进行滑坡模拟。
contributions: 提出无人机辅助的扫描到仿真框架，结合3DGS实现逼真重建与物理模拟的桥梁。
在真实滑坡场地验证了框架的有效性，支持视觉重建和仿真。
analysis.experiments: 在香港真实滑坡场地进行验证，结果表明方法支持逼真视觉重建和有效仿真。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量无人机影像和计算资源。
体积转换和MPM集成的精度可能受限于3DGS重建质量。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无人机辅助的扫描到仿真框架，结合物理信息3DGS实现滑坡场景的逼真重建与物理模拟。

papers.title: TransmissiveGS: Residual-Guided Disentangled Gaussian Splatting for Transmissive Scene Reconstruction and Rendering
papers.abstract: Transmissive scenes are ubiquitous in daily life, yet reconstructing and rendering them remains highly challenging due to the inherent entanglement between near-field reflections from the surrounding environment on the transmissive surface, and the transmitted content of the scene behind it. This coupling gives rise to dual surface geometries and dual radiance components within each observation, posing ambiguities for standard methods. We present TransmissiveGS, a novel framework for disentangled reconstruction and rendering of transmissive scenes. Specifically, we model the scene with a dual-Gaussian representation and introduce a deferred shading function to jointly render the two Gaussian components. To separate reflection and transmission, we exploit the inherent multi-view inconsistency of reflections and leverage the residuals from reconstructing multi-view consistent content as cues for disentangled geometry and appearance modeling. We further propose a reflection light field that enables high-fidelity estimation of near-field reflections. During training, we introduce a high-frequency regularization to preserve fine details. We also contribute a new synthetic dataset for evaluating transmissive surface reconstruction. Experiments on both synthetic and real-world scenes demonstrate that TransmissiveGS consistently outperforms prior Gaussian Splatting-based methods in both reconstruction and rendering quality for transmissive scenes.

analysis.tldr: 提出TransmissiveGS，利用残差引导解耦高斯泼溅实现透射场景的高质量重建与渲染。
analysis.research_motivation: 透射场景在现实中普遍存在，但标准方法难以处理透射表面反射与透射内容的固有纠缠，导致重建和渲染质量差。
analysis.problem: 透射场景中反射和透射成分的几何与外观解耦重建与渲染。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 透射场景中反射和透射内容在观测中耦合，产生双重表面几何和辐射分量，造成歧义。
analysis.method: 采用双高斯表示和延迟着色函数联合渲染两个高斯分量；利用多视图不一致性通过残差引导解耦几何和外观；提出反射光场估计近场反射；引入高频正则化保留细节。
contributions: 提出TransmissiveGS框架，实现透射场景的解耦重建与渲染。
利用多视图不一致性和残差引导解耦反射与透射。
提出反射光场和高频正则化提升近场反射估计和细节保留。
贡献新的合成数据集用于评估透射表面重建。
analysis.experiments: 在合成和真实场景上实验，TransmissiveGS在重建和渲染质量上持续优于先前基于高斯泼溅的方法。
limitations: 可能依赖多视图输入，单视图场景适用性未知。
反射光场可能对复杂光照条件敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出TransmissiveGS，利用残差引导解耦高斯泼溅实现透射场景的高质量重建与渲染。

papers.title: Not Blind but Silenced: Rebalancing Vision and Language via Adversarial Counter-Commonsense Equilibrium
papers.abstract: During MLLM decoding, attention often abnormally concentrates on irrelevant image tokens. While existing research dismisses this as invalid noise and forcibly redirects attention to compel focusing on key image information, we argue these tokens are critical carriers of visual and narrative logic, and such coercive corrections exacerbate visual-language imbalance. Adopting a "decoding-as-game" perspective, we reveal that hallucinations stem from an equilibrium imbalance between linguistic priors and visual information. We propose Adversarial Counter-Commonsense Equilibrium (ACE), a training-free framework that perturbs visual context via counter-commonsense patches. Leveraging the fact that authentic visual features remain stable under perturbation while hallucinations fluctuate, ACE implements a dynamic game decoding strategy. This approach precisely suppresses perturbation-sensitive priors while compensating for stable visual signals to restore balance. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ACE, as a plug-and-play strategy, enhances model trustworthiness with negligible inference overhead.

analysis.tldr: 提出对抗性反常识均衡（ACE）框架，通过扰动视觉上下文来重新平衡多模态大模型中的视觉-语言注意力，减少幻觉。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态大模型解码时注意力异常集中在无关图像token上，现有研究将其视为噪声并强制重定向，反而加剧了视觉-语言不平衡，导致幻觉。
analysis.problem: 多模态大模型解码过程中视觉与语言信息的不平衡导致幻觉。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 注意力异常集中在无关图像token上，这些token实际上是视觉和叙事逻辑的关键载体，强制纠正会加剧不平衡。
analysis.method: 提出对抗性反常识均衡（ACE），一种无需训练的解码框架，通过反常识补丁扰动视觉上下文，利用真实视觉特征在扰动下稳定而幻觉特征波动的特性，动态调整解码策略以抑制扰动敏感的先验并补偿稳定视觉信号。
contributions: 从“解码即博弈”视角揭示幻觉源于语言先验与视觉信息的均衡失衡。
提出ACE框架，通过对抗性反常识扰动实现视觉-语言平衡，无需额外训练。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能对特定类型的幻觉或模型架构效果有限。
反常识补丁的设计可能依赖先验知识。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出对抗性反常识均衡（ACE）框架，通过扰动视觉上下文来重新平衡多模态大模型中的视觉-语言注意力，减少幻觉。

papers.title: Neuromorphic Monocular Depth Estimation with Uncertainty Modeling
papers.abstract: Event cameras offer distinct advantages over conventional frame-based sensors, including microsecond-level temporal resolution, high dynamic range, and low bandwidth. In this paper, we predict per-pixel depth distributions from monocular event streams using deep neural networks. We estimate uncertainty using Gaussian, log-normal, and evidential learning frameworks.
