In the reverse direction, samples from the high-density regions of these learned priors are mapped back to the feature space to produce appearance-aware anchors that reflect intra-category variation. These anchors supervise a prior-driven alignment objective that aligns retrieval embeddings with category-specific appearance distributions, thereby improving generalization to unseen categories. Evaluations demonstrate that our GAPan achieves state-of-the-art performance on both widely-used fine- and coarse-grained benchmarks.

analysis.tldr: 提出生成式外观先验对齐网络GAPan，通过可逆流模型将检索特征映射到密度空间并学习类别条件高斯先验，提升细粒度图像检索的泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 细粒度图像检索中，基于可见类别语义的监督会引入偏见，使模型偏向类别语义而非跨类别泛化的外观特征，限制了对未见类别的检索性能。
analysis.problem: 如何让细粒度图像检索模型学习到泛化性更强的外观特征，而非仅依赖可见类别的语义标签。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，传统监督方式使模型偏向可见类别的语义，忽略了跨类别共享的外观特征，导致对未见类别检索性能受限。
analysis.method: 提出GAPan，利用可逆流模型将检索特征映射到潜在密度空间，为每个可见类别学习类别条件高斯先验，并通过精确似然估计优化；反向过程从高密度区域采样生成外观感知锚点，用于先验驱动的对齐目标，使嵌入与类别外观分布对齐。
contributions: 提出GAPan，将细粒度检索目标从类别预测重新定义为外观建模，利用可逆流保留丰富外观细节。
设计先验驱动的对齐目标，通过生成的外观感知锚点提升对未见类别的泛化能力。
analysis.experiments: 在多个细粒度和粗粒度基准上达到最先进性能。
limitations: 可能依赖流模型的计算效率，在大规模数据集上训练成本较高。
类别条件高斯先验假设可能无法完全覆盖复杂外观分布。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出生成式外观先验对齐网络GAPan，通过可逆流模型将检索特征映射到密度空间并学习类别条件高斯先验，提升细粒度图像检索的泛化能力。

papers.title: Clip-level Uncertainty and Temporal-aware Active Learning for End-to-End Multi-Object Tracking
papers.abstract: Multi-Object Tracking (MOT) in dynamic environments relies on robust temporal reasoning to maintain consistent object identities over time. Transformer-based end-to-end MOT models achieve strong performance by explicitly modeling temporal dependencies, yet training them requires extensive bounding-box and identity annotations. Given the high labeling cost and strong redundancy in videos, Active Learning (AL) is an effective approach to improve annotation efficiency. However, existing AL methods for MOT primarily operate at the frame level, which is structurally misaligned with modern end-to-end trackers whose inference and training rely on multi-frame clips. To bridge this gap, we formulate clip-level active learning and propose Clip-level Uncertainty and Temporal-aware Active Learning (CUTAL). In contrast to frame-based approaches, CUTAL scores each clip using uncertainty metrics derived from multi-frame predictions to capture inter-frame correspondence ambiguities, while enforcing temporal diversity to select an informative and non-redundant subset. Experiments show that CUTAL achieves stronger overall performance than baselines at the same label budgets across MeMOTR and SambaMOTR. Notably, CUTAL achieves performance comparable to full supervision for MeMOTR on both datasets using only 50% of the labeled training data.

analysis.tldr: 提出面向端到端多目标跟踪的片段级主动学习方法，利用多帧不确定性与时序多样性选择标注样本，仅用50%标注数据即可达到全监督性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 多目标跟踪标注成本高，视频帧间冗余大，现有帧级主动学习方法与端到端跟踪器的多片段推理结构不匹配，导致标注效率低。
analysis.problem: 如何设计片段级主动学习策略，使其与基于多帧片段的端到端跟踪器结构对齐，从而高效选择信息量大的标注样本。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出CUTAL方法，对每个片段计算基于多帧预测的不确定性指标以捕捉帧间对应歧义，同时引入时序多样性约束，选择信息丰富且不冗余的片段进行标注。
contributions: 首次将主动学习从帧级扩展到片段级，与端到端多目标跟踪器的推理和训练结构对齐。
提出结合多帧不确定性与时序多样性的片段评分策略，有效提升标注效率。
analysis.experiments: 在MeMOTR和SambaMOTR上验证，CUTAL在相同标注预算下性能优于基线，且MeMOTR仅用50%标注数据即可达到全监督性能。
limitations: 可能仅适用于Transformer-based端到端跟踪器，对其他类型跟踪器效果未知。
未讨论片段长度选择对性能的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出面向端到端多目标跟踪的片段级主动学习方法，利用多帧不确定性与时序多样性选择标注样本，仅用50%标注数据即可达到全监督性能。

papers.title: MoPO: Incorporating Motion Prior for Occluded Human Mesh Recovery
papers.abstract: Although recent studies have made remarkable progress in human mesh recovery, they still exhibit limited robustness to occlusions and often produce inaccurate poses and severe motion jitter due to the insufficient spatial features for occluded body parts. Inspired by the rapid advancements in human motion prediction, we discover that compared to occluded image features, pose sequence inherently contains reliable motion prior for estimating occluded body parts. In this paper, we incorporate Motion Prior for Occluded human mesh recovery, called MoPO. Our MoPO mainly consists of two components: 1) The motion de-occlusion module, where we propose a spatial-temporal occlusion detector to detect joint visibility, and then we propose a lightweight motion predictor to complete the occluded body parts by predicting the most plausible joint positions based on history poses. 2) The motion-aware fusion and refinement module, which fuses the completed joint sequence with image features to estimate human shape and initial human pose. Moreover, the completed joint sequence is further used to refine the final human pose through inverse kinematics, which provides the occlusion-free motion prior for regressing human poses. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MoPO achieves state-of-the-art performance on both occlusion-specific and standard benchmarks, significantly enhancing the accuracy and temporal consistency of occluded human mesh recovery. Our code and demo can be found in the supplementary material.

analysis.tldr: 提出MoPO，利用运动先验通过运动去遮挡和运动感知融合模块提升遮挡下人体网格恢复的准确性和时间一致性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法在遮挡场景下鲁棒性不足，因空间特征缺失导致姿态不准确和运动抖动，而人体运动预测领域的发展表明姿态序列本身包含可靠的运动先验。
analysis.problem: 解决遮挡条件下人体网格恢复中姿态估计不准确和运动抖动问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 遮挡导致图像特征不足以估计被遮挡部位，而历史姿态序列蕴含可靠的运动先验可用于补全。
analysis.method: 提出MoPO，包含运动去遮挡模块（时空遮挡检测器+轻量运动预测器补全关节位置）和运动感知融合与细化模块（融合补全序列与图像特征，并通过逆运动学细化最终姿态）。
contributions: 提出利用运动先验进行遮挡人体网格恢复的框架MoPO。
设计运动去遮挡模块和运动感知融合细化模块，有效提升遮挡下的准确性和时间一致性。
analysis.experiments: 在遮挡特定和标准基准上达到SOTA，显著提升准确性和时间一致性。
limitations: 可能依赖历史姿态质量，极端遮挡下运动预测可能不准确。
计算开销可能因运动预测和逆运动学而增加。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MoPO，利用运动先验通过运动去遮挡和运动感知融合模块提升遮挡下人体网格恢复的准确性和时间一致性。

papers.title: Probing Routing-Conditional Calibration in Attention-Residual Transformers
papers.abstract: Post-hoc calibration is usually evaluated as a function of logits or softmax confidence alone, even as routing-augmented architectures increasingly accompany predictions with sample-specific internal routing traces and pair them with claims of calibration-relevant uncertainty. We ask a basic question: do these traces provide stable routing-specific evidence for post-hoc calibration beyond confidence? We study this in Attention-Residual transformers (Kimi Team, 2026) through a matched-confidence diagnostic suite that stratifies examples by routing-derived state, compares subgroup gaps against within-bin routing-permutation nulls, and evaluates matched post-hoc probes differing only in their auxiliary feature. Across our completed AR runs, scalar routing summaries do not provide stable evidence of routing-conditional miscalibration: weighted gaps remain small or seed-sensitive, and only $1$ of $30$ within-bin permutation tests rejects the conditional-null at $\alpha=0.05$ (only on one seed; not stable across seeds in that cell). AR-CondCal, a minimal $2$-D Nadaraya--Watson probe on confidence and routing-depth variance, lies within the seed-variance band of matched confidence-only and predictive-entropy controls and does not reliably improve worst-routing-tertile ECE; bandwidth-sensitivity checks (Scott multiples, CV-NLL, global-ECE oracle) do not change this. A full-vector MLP over $(c, H_1, \ldots, H_L)$ can appear to improve over a linear confidence baseline, but the apparent gain disappears once a capacity-matched confidence-only MLP is included as a control, and shuffled routing profiles achieve comparable performance. Apparent routing-aware calibration gains in this AR setting should not be read as internal-state calibration until matched-confidence, bandwidth, capacity, and permutation controls rule out common confounds.

analysis.tldr: 路由增强的注意力残差Transformer中，路由信息并未提供超越置信度的稳定校准证据。
analysis.research_motivation: 后验校准通常仅基于logits或softmax置信度评估，但路由增强架构声称其内部路由迹能提供校准相关的不确定性信息，需要验证这些路由特征是否真正有助于校准。
analysis.problem: 验证路由增强的注意力残差Transformer中，路由信息是否为后验校准提供稳定且超越置信度的证据。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但描述了诊断方法：通过匹配置信度、分层比较、置换检验等，发现路由摘要的校准增益不稳定，且易受种子、带宽、容量等混淆因素影响。
analysis.method: 提出匹配置信度诊断套件，包括分层比较、组内路由置换检验、匹配后验探针（如AR-CondCal的2D Nadaraya-Watson探针和全向量MLP），并通过控制实验排除混淆因素。
contributions: 系统评估了路由增强Transformer中路由信息对后验校准的贡献，发现其不提供稳定证据。
提出了一套诊断方法（匹配置信度、置换检验、容量控制等）用于检验内部状态校准。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但描述了在完成的AR运行中，仅1/30的组内置换检验在α=0.05下拒绝条件零假设（且不稳定），AR-CondCal未可靠改善最差路由三分位ECE。
limitations: 仅针对Attention-Residual Transformer架构，结论可能不泛化到其他路由增强模型。
诊断方法依赖特定统计检验，可能对某些路由特征不敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 路由增强的注意力残差Transformer中，路由信息并未提供超越置信度的稳定校准证据。

papers.title: Fashion Florence: Fine-Tuning Florence-2 for Structured Fashion Attribute Extraction
papers.abstract: We present Fashion Florence, a Florence-2 vision-language model fine-tuned with LoRA to extract structured fashion attributes from clothing images. Given a single photograph, the model generates a JSON object containing category, color, material, style tags, and occasion tags, structured output suitable for direct programmatic consumption by downstream recommendation and retrieval systems. Fine-tuning data is derived from the iMaterialist Fashion dataset (228 labels), where we collapse fine-grained annotations into a compact 6-category, 16-color, 19-style schema via rule-based label engineering. We apply LoRA (r=16, alpha=32) to all decoder linear layers, training for 3 epochs on 3,688 examples. On a held-out test set of 461 images, Fashion Florence achieves 94.6% category accuracy and 63.0% material accuracy, compared to 89.3% / 43.3% for GPT-4o-mini and 87.4% for Gemini 2.5 Flash. Fashion Florence produces valid JSON in 99.8% of outputs while running at 0.77B parameters on a single GPU at zero marginal inference cost. Style tag F1 reaches 0.753 vs. 0.612 (Gemini) and 0.398 (GPT-4o-mini). The model is deployed as a Hugging Face Space and integrated into Loom, an open-source outfit recommendation system.

analysis.tldr: 通过LoRA微调Florence-2，从服装图像中提取结构化时尚属性，在少量数据上超越GPT-4o-mini和Gemini。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有通用VLM在结构化时尚属性提取任务上精度不足且输出格式不统一，难以直接用于下游推荐系统。
analysis.problem: 如何从单张服装图像中高效、准确地提取类别、颜色、材质、风格和场合等结构化属性，并生成可直接程序消费的JSON输出。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于Florence-2视觉语言模型，使用LoRA（r=16, alpha=32）微调所有解码器线性层，在iMaterialist Fashion数据集上通过规则标签工程将细粒度标注压缩为6类别、16颜色、19风格的紧凑模式，训练3个epoch共3688个样本。
contributions: 提出Fashion Florence，一个轻量级（0.77B参数）的时尚属性提取模型，在单GPU上实现零边际推理成本。
在461张测试集上，类别准确率94.6%，材质准确率63.0%，JSON有效输出率99.8%，均优于GPT-4o-mini和Gemini 2.5 Flash。
模型已部署为Hugging Face Space并集成到开源服装推荐系统Loom中。
analysis.experiments: 在iMaterialist Fashion数据集上，使用3688个训练样本和461个测试样本，对比GPT-4o-mini和Gemini 2.5 Flash，报告了类别准确率、材质准确率、风格标签F1和JSON有效输出率。
limitations: 训练数据规模较小（3688样本），可能限制泛化能力。
仅针对时尚属性提取，未验证在其他领域结构化提取任务上的效果。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过LoRA微调Florence-2，从服装图像中提取结构化时尚属性，在少量数据上超越GPT-4o-mini和Gemini。

papers.title: CrossVL: Complexity-Aware Feature Routing and Paired Curriculum for Cross-View Vision-Language Detection
papers.abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) enable text-guided object detection but degrade severely under cross-view scenarios where ground and aerial viewpoints differ in altitude, scale, and spatial layout. These geometric changes introduce systematic complexity variations between viewpoints, e.g., ground view images contain dense and highly occluded structures, while aerial images are sparse and globally organized. Fixed VLM fusion mechanisms cannot handle this discrepancy. We propose CrossVL, a framework combining Complexity-Aware Pathway Aggregation (CPA) and Paired Curriculum Learning (PCL) for enhanced cross-view detection for VLM. CPA estimates scene complexity from multimodal statistics and routes visual features through multiple pathways to obtain view-specific representations. PCL leverages semantic consistency of synchronized ground-aerial pairs to provide stable early supervision and then gradually shifts toward randomized sampling. On MAVREC, CrossVL improves Florence-2's aerial mAP from 58.66% to 61.03% and reduces the ground-aerial performance gap from 8.63pp to 6.65pp, while also achieving a 3.3x reduction in variance across random seeds. CPA provides stable complexity-aware feature aggregation, and PCL enhances optimization dynamics. Together, they demonstrate that coordinated architectural and training adaptations are crucial for robust cross-view VLM detection.

analysis.tldr: 提出CrossVL框架，通过复杂度感知特征路由和配对课程学习提升跨视角VLM检测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 视觉语言模型在跨视角场景（地面与航拍）下性能严重下降，因为视角变化导致场景复杂度系统性差异，固定融合机制无法处理。
analysis.problem: 解决VLM在跨视角目标检测中因视角差异（高度、尺度、空间布局）导致的性能退化问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 地面视角图像密集且遮挡严重，航拍图像稀疏且全局组织，固定VLM融合机制无法处理这种复杂度差异。
analysis.method: 提出CrossVL框架，包含复杂度感知路径聚合（CPA）和配对课程学习（PCL）。CPA从多模态统计估计场景复杂度并通过多条路径路由视觉特征；PCL利用同步地面-航拍对的语义一致性提供早期稳定监督并逐步过渡到随机采样。
contributions: 提出复杂度感知路径聚合（CPA）实现视图特定特征表示
提出配对课程学习（PCL）利用语义一致性优化训练动态
在MAVREC上显著提升Florence-2的跨视角检测性能并降低视角间差距
analysis.experiments: 在MAVREC数据集上，CrossVL将Florence-2的航拍mAP从58.66%提升至61.03%，地面-航拍性能差距从8.63pp降至6.65pp，随机种子方差降低3.3倍。
limitations: 可能依赖同步地面-航拍对的数据可用性
复杂度估计模块可能增加计算开销
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CrossVL框架，通过复杂度感知特征路由和配对课程学习提升跨视角VLM检测性能。

papers.title: DRIVE-C: A Controlled Corruption Dataset for Autonomous Driving
papers.abstract: DRIVE-C is a controlled corruption dataset designed to evaluate visual perception robustness in autonomous driving systems. It is built from real-world forward-facing driving videos collected across daytime, nighttime, urban, rural, freeway, and parking environments. Clean clips are anonymized via localized face and license plate blurring, then transformed with physics-inspired synthetic degradations. The dataset contains 10 clean clips and 600 corrupted clips spanning 12 camera degradation types across five severity levels, with per-clip metadata and Global Sensor Health Index (GSHI) annotations. DRIVE-C supports robustness benchmarking, degradation-aware modeling, uncertainty estimation, out-of-distribution (OOD) detection, and sensor health monitoring for Advanced Driver Assistance Systems (ADAS). By providing pixel-aligned clean and degraded video clips with fully reproducible corruption parameters, DRIVE-C offers a structured testbed for studying perception reliability under controlled camera degradation.

analysis.tldr: DRIVE-C是一个为自动驾驶视觉感知鲁棒性评估设计的受控退化数据集，包含10个干净片段和600个退化片段。
analysis.research_motivation: 自动驾驶系统在实际部署中常面临相机退化（如模糊、噪声、遮挡等），但缺乏系统化、可复现的受控退化数据集来评估感知模型的鲁棒性。
analysis.problem: 现有数据集缺乏对相机退化类型和严重程度的精细控制，且退化参数不可复现，难以进行鲁棒性基准测试和退化感知建模。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 从真实驾驶视频中收集干净片段，进行人脸和车牌匿名化，然后应用物理启发的合成退化（12种类型，5个严重级别），生成像素对齐的干净-退化视频对，并提供元数据和全局传感器健康指数（GSHI）标注。
contributions: 构建了首个包含12种相机退化类型、5个严重级别的受控退化自动驾驶数据集，共600个退化片段。
提供像素对齐的干净-退化视频对和完全可复现的退化参数，支持鲁棒性基准测试、退化感知建模、不确定性估计、OOD检测和传感器健康监测。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 数据集规模较小（仅10个干净片段），可能不足以覆盖所有驾驶场景。
合成退化可能无法完全模拟真实世界退化的复杂性和交互效应。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: DRIVE-C是一个为自动驾驶视觉感知鲁棒性评估设计的受控退化数据集，包含10个干净片段和600个退化片段。

papers.title: Fetal Brain Imaging: A Composite Neural Network Approach for Keyframe Detection in Ultrasound Videos
papers.abstract: This article presents a novel approach to keyframe detection in ultrasound videos, with a particular focus on fetal brain imaging. The proposed model is a composite neural network architecture that combines a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) with a Recurrent Neural Network (RNN). The CNN extracts spatial features from individual video frames, while the RNN captures temporal dependencies between consecutive frames within each video sequence. The proposed model may improve the efficiency and accuracy of fetal brain ultrasound analysis, thereby supporting earlier detection, diagnosis, and treatment planning for selected fetal brain conditions.

analysis.tldr: 提出CNN+RNN复合网络用于超声视频关键帧检测，聚焦胎儿脑成像。
analysis.research_motivation: 胎儿脑超声视频分析中关键帧检测依赖人工，效率低且主观性强，自动化方法可提升诊断效率与准确性。
analysis.problem: 如何从胎儿脑超声视频中自动、准确地检测关键帧。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 复合神经网络：CNN提取单帧空间特征，RNN捕获帧间时序依赖，联合进行关键帧检测。
contributions: 提出一种结合CNN和RNN的复合架构用于超声视频关键帧检测
聚焦胎儿脑成像领域，可能提升早期诊断效率
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 未在摘要中报告定量实验结果或对比基线
可能缺乏对模型泛化能力的验证
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CNN+RNN复合网络用于超声视频关键帧检测，聚焦胎儿脑成像。

papers.title: On-Policy Distillation with Best-of-N Teacher Rollout Selection
papers.abstract: On-policy distillation (OPD), which supervises a student on its own sampled trajectories, has emerged as a data-efficient post-training method for improving reasoning while avoiding the reward dependence of reinforcement learning and the catastrophic forgetting often observed in standard supervised fine-tuning. However, standard OPD typically computes teacher supervision under noisy student-generated contexts and often relies on a single stochastic teacher rollout per prompt. As a result, the supervision signal can be high-variance: the sampled teacher trajectory can be incorrect, uninformative, or poorly matched to the student's current reasoning behavior. To address this limitation, we propose BRTS, a Best-of-N Rollout Teacher Selection framework for on-policy distillation. BRTS augments standard student-context OPD with a teacher-context supervision branch constructed from the curated teacher trajectory. Rather than distilling from the first sampled teacher rollout, BRTS samples a small pool of teacher trajectories and selects the auxiliary trajectory using a simple priority rule: correctness first, student alignment second. When multiple correct teacher trajectories are available, BRTS chooses the one most aligned with the student's current behavior; when unconditioned teacher samples fail on harder prompts, it invokes a ground-truth-conditioned recovery step to elicit a natural derivation. The selected trajectory is then used to provide reliable teacher-context supervision inside the OPD loop, augmented with an auxiliary loss on the teacher trajectory. Experiments on AIME 2024, AIME 2025, and AMC 2023 show that BRTS improves over standard OPD on challenging reasoning benchmarks, with the largest gains on harder datasets. Our code is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出BRTS框架，通过从多个教师轨迹中选择最佳轨迹来改进同策略蒸馏，提升推理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 同策略蒸馏（OPD）在提升推理能力方面有效，但标准方法依赖单次随机教师轨迹，导致监督信号高方差，可能包含错误或无信息。
analysis.problem: 标准OPD中教师监督信号方差高，轨迹可能不正确、无信息或与学生行为不匹配。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准OPD使用学生生成的上下文和单次随机教师轨迹，导致监督信号质量不稳定。
analysis.method: 提出BRTS框架，采样多个教师轨迹，根据正确性和学生对齐度选择最佳轨迹，并引入教师上下文监督分支和辅助损失。
contributions: 提出BRTS，一种基于最佳N选1的教师轨迹选择方法，用于同策略蒸馏。
在AIME 2024、AIME 2025和AMC 2023上验证了BRTS优于标准OPD，尤其在更难的数据集上提升显著。
analysis.experiments: 在AIME 2024、AIME 2025和AMC 2023推理基准上评估，BRTS优于标准OPD，在更难的数据集上提升最大。
limitations: 可能依赖教师模型的质量和多样性。
额外采样多个轨迹增加了计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出BRTS框架，通过从多个教师轨迹中选择最佳轨迹来改进同策略蒸馏，提升推理能力。

papers.title: Distilling 3D Spatial Reasoning into a Lightweight Vision-Language Model with CoT
papers.abstract: Large-scale 3D vision-language models (VLMs) like LLaVA-3D offer strong spatial reasoning but are difficult to deploy due to high computational costs. We propose a knowledge distillation framework that transfers spatial reasoning from a 7B teacher to a 2.29B student model. Our approach achieves 8.7x lower inference latency and a 3x reduction in model size while retaining 54-72% of the teacher's performance. The framework utilizes VGGT as the vision encoder and a multi-task distillation pipeline with uncertainty-aware loss weighting. To improve reasoning without chain-of-thought (CoT) data, we introduce "Hidden CoT": learnable latent tokens that serve as an internal scratchpad before answer generation. This is the first use of latent scratchpad reasoning in distilled 3D VLMs. The student model jointly performs spatial description, depth estimation, and object detection. Experiments on ScanNet and 3D-FRONT show strong spatial understanding, reaching 68-72% accuracy on proximity and contact tasks. Our framework enables efficient 3D scene QA on resource-constrained platforms.

analysis.tldr: 通过知识蒸馏将3D空间推理能力从大模型迁移至轻量级VLM，并引入隐式思维链提升效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 大型3D VLM（如LLaVA-3D）空间推理能力强但计算成本高，难以在资源受限平台部署。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持3D空间推理能力的同时，显著降低模型计算开销和推理延迟。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 知识蒸馏框架：以7B教师模型蒸馏至2.29B学生模型，使用VGGT视觉编码器、多任务蒸馏（空间描述、深度估计、目标检测）及不确定性感知损失加权；引入隐式思维链（Hidden CoT）作为可学习潜变量，在答案生成前进行内部推理。
contributions: 首次在蒸馏3D VLM中使用隐式思维链（Hidden CoT）作为内部草稿板。
提出多任务蒸馏框架，实现8.7倍推理加速和3倍模型压缩，同时保留教师模型54-72%的性能。
analysis.experiments: 在ScanNet和3D-FRONT数据集上评估，在邻近和接触任务上达到68-72%准确率。
limitations: 性能保留比例（54-72%）仍有提升空间。
隐式思维链的可解释性可能不足。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过知识蒸馏将3D空间推理能力从大模型迁移至轻量级VLM，并引入隐式思维链提升效率。

papers.title: MOTOR-Bench: A Real-world Dataset and Multi-agent Framework for Zero-shot Human Mental State Understanding
papers.abstract: Understanding human mental states from natural behavior is crucial for intelligent systems in the real world. However, most current research focuses on predicting isolated mental state labels, lacking structured annotations of complex interpersonal interactions. To support structured analysis, we introduce MOTOR-Bench, a carefully-designed benchmark with a real-world dataset MOTOR-dataset, containing 1,440 multimodal video clips in collaborative learning scenarios, reflecting key real-world data challenges including natural class imbalance, visual noise, and domain-specific language. Each sample is labeled by educational experts based on self-regulated learning theory. We further evaluate several state-of-the-art multimodal large language models and multi-agent systems in a zero-shot setting on our MOTOR-Bench. However, their performance on this task remains limited, suggesting that existing methods still struggle with structured reasoning from observable behavior to deeper mental states. To address this challenge, we propose a reasoning multi-agent framework, named MOTOR-MAS. It coordinates multiple agents through a structured agent coordination mechanism to infer explicit behaviors, internal cognitions, and psychological emotions. Experimental results show that our MOTOR-MAS outperforms the best single-model benchmark by 15.93 points in Macro-F1 scores for the three labels of behavior, cognition, and emotion, and outperforms the general multi-agent benchmark by 10.2 points in internal cognition prediction.

analysis.tldr: 提出MOTOR-Bench数据集和MOTOR-MAS多智能体框架，用于零样本人类心理状态理解，在协作学习场景中超越单模型和通用多智能体方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有研究多关注孤立心理状态标签预测，缺乏对复杂人际交互的结构化标注，且真实场景存在类别不平衡、视觉噪声和领域特定语言等挑战。
analysis.problem: 如何从自然行为中零样本地结构化推理出人类心理状态（行为、认知、情感）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有MLLM和多智能体系统在零样本设置下性能有限，难以从可观察行为推理深层心理状态。
analysis.method: 提出MOTOR-MAS，一种推理多智能体框架，通过结构化智能体协调机制协调多个智能体，分别推断显式行为、内部认知和心理情感。
contributions: 构建了MOTOR-Bench基准和MOTOR-dataset数据集，包含1,440个多模态视频片段，由教育专家基于自我调节学习理论标注。
提出MOTOR-MAS多智能体框架，在零样本设置下显著优于单模型和通用多智能体方法。
analysis.experiments: 在MOTOR-Bench上评估多个SOTA多模态大语言模型和多智能体系统，MOTOR-MAS在行为、认知、情感三标签的Macro-F1上比最佳单模型高15.93分，在内部认知预测上比通用多智能体基准高10.2分。
limitations: 数据集仅涵盖协作学习场景，泛化性有待验证。
零样本设置可能无法完全适应其他领域心理状态理解。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MOTOR-Bench数据集和MOTOR-MAS多智能体框架，用于零样本人类心理状态理解，在协作学习场景中超越单模型和通用多智能体方法。

papers.title: DriveFuture: Future-Aware Latent World Models for Autonomous Driving
papers.abstract: Existing latent world models for autonomous driving have opened a promising path toward future-aware driving intelligence. However, they typically treat future latent states as prediction targets or auxiliary signals, rather than directly conditioning trajectory planning. This can entangle current and future features in latent space. In this work, we propose DriveFuture, a future-aware latent world modeling framework for autonomous driving that explicitly learns planning-oriented foresight by conditioning the current latent state modeling process on future world states. Specifically, during training, the model first predicts future latent world states from the current latent state and ego action, and then refines the prediction against the ground-truth future latent state via cross-attention. The resulting future-aware latent serves as an explicit condition for a diffusion-based trajectory planner. During inference, DriveFuture conditions on the predicted future latent state instead of the ground-truth future state. DriveFuture achieves SOTA performance on the public NAVSIM benchmarks, reaching \textbf{55.5} EPDMS on NAVSIM-v2 {\textcolor{blue}{\textit{navhard}}}, \textbf{89.9} EPDMS on NAVSIM-v2 {\textcolor{blue}{\textit{navtest}}}, and \textbf{90.7} PDMS on NAVSIM-v1 {\textcolor{blue}{\textit{navtest}}}, respectively. These results suggest that the key to latent world modeling lies not merely in simulating future states, but more importantly in conditioning current decision-making on future states. Notably, as of April 2026, DriveFuture ranks \textbf{1st} on the \href{ this https URL }{NAVSIM-v2 {\textcolor{blue}{\textit{navhard}}}} leaderboard and achieves SOTA performance on \href{ this https URL }{NAVSIM-v1 {\textcolor{blue}{\textit{navtest}}}}.

analysis.tldr: DriveFuture通过将未来潜状态显式条件化到当前决策中，实现规划导向的潜世界模型，在NAVSIM基准上达到SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有潜世界模型将未来潜状态视为预测目标或辅助信号，而非直接条件化轨迹规划，导致当前与未来特征在潜空间中纠缠，限制了驾驶智能的前瞻性。
analysis.problem: 如何显式地将未来世界状态作为条件融入当前潜状态建模，以提升自动驾驶轨迹规划的远期感知能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出DriveFuture框架：训练时先预测未来潜状态，再通过交叉注意力用真实未来潜状态精炼，得到未来感知潜状态作为扩散轨迹规划器的显式条件；推理时使用预测的未来潜状态。
contributions: 提出一种规划导向的未来感知潜世界建模方法，显式将未来状态条件化到当前决策。
在NAVSIM-v1和v2多个子集上取得SOTA结果，并在NAVSIM-v2 navhard排行榜上排名第一。
analysis.experiments: 在NAVSIM基准上评估，DriveFuture在NAVSIM-v2 navhard上EPDMS为55.5，NAVSIM-v2 navtest上EPDMS为89.9，NAVSIM-v1 navtest上PDMS为90.7，均达到SOTA。
limitations: 依赖未来潜状态预测的准确性，预测误差可能影响规划性能。
仅在仿真基准上验证，真实世界泛化性未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: DriveFuture通过将未来潜状态显式条件化到当前决策中，实现规划导向的潜世界模型，在NAVSIM基准上达到SOTA。

papers.title: Discriminative Span as a Predictor of Synthetic Data Utility via Classifier Reconstruction
papers.abstract: In many real-world computer vision applications, including medical imaging and industrial inspection, binary classification tasks are characterized by a severe scarcity of positive samples. A widely adopted solution is to generate synthetic positive data using image-to-image transformations applied to negative samples. However, a fundamental challenge remains: how can we reliably assess whether such synthetic data will improve downstream model performance? In this work, we propose a geometry-driven metric that predicts the utility of synthetic data without requiring model training. Our approach operates in the embedding space of a pre-trained foundation model and represents the dataset through difference vectors between samples. We evaluate whether the weight vector of a linear classifier can be expressed within the subspace spanned by these variations by measuring the relative projection error. Intuitively, if the variations induced by synthetic data capture task-relevant directions, their span can approximate the classifier, resulting in low projection error. Conversely, poor synthetic data fails to span these directions, leading to higher error. Across multiple datasets and architectures, we show that this metric exhibits strong correlation with downstream classification performance of CNNs trained on mixtures of real negative and synthetic positive data. These findings suggest that the proposed metric serves as a practical and informative tool for evaluating synthetic data quality in data-scarce settings.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于分类器重构的判别跨度指标，无需训练即可预测合成数据对下游二分类任务的效用。
analysis.research_motivation: 在医学影像、工业检测等真实场景中，正样本极度稀缺，常用方法是通过图像到图像变换从负样本生成合成正样本，但缺乏可靠指标预测合成数据能否提升下游模型性能。
analysis.problem: 如何在不进行模型训练的情况下，评估合成数据对下游二分类模型性能的效用。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 合成数据若捕捉到任务相关方向，其变化张成的子空间能近似线性分类器权重向量，投影误差低；反之则误差高。
analysis.method: 在预训练基础模型的嵌入空间中，用样本间差向量表示数据集，通过测量线性分类器权重向量在差向量张成子空间上的相对投影误差来预测合成数据效用。
contributions: 提出一种几何驱动的度量，无需训练即可预测合成数据对下游二分类任务的效用。
在多个数据集和架构上验证了该度量与下游分类性能的强相关性。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集和架构上，度量与使用混合数据训练的CNN的下游分类性能表现出强相关性。
limitations: 仅针对二分类任务，未扩展到多类或更复杂任务。
依赖预训练基础模型的嵌入空间，可能受模型选择影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于分类器重构的判别跨度指标，无需训练即可预测合成数据对下游二分类任务的效用。

papers.title: Do multimodal models imagine electric sheep?
papers.abstract: Yes. We find that large multimodal models develop mental imagery when solving spatial puzzles, and they do imagine sheep when solving sheep puzzles. We fine-tune a Qwen3.5 VLM to solve twelve diverse visual reasoning tasks -- including tangram, jigsaw, sokoban, 3D mental rotation, and rush hour -- that require understanding geometry, spatial relationships, and the consequences of actions. By supervising the model to predict the open-loop sequence of actions to solve a puzzle from an initial state, we show that the model's activations after each action encode meaningful visual information about the intermediate state. This finding suggests that an imperfect visual world model begins to form as a byproduct of learning to select correct actions, in the absence of any explicit visual supervision. Building on this observation, we propose two ways to sharpen and use the mental images formed by the model. We find that integrating as few as sixteen visual tokens per step into the chain of thought improves the average solve rate from 83% to 89%, with particularly strong gains on reasoning-heavy tasks such as jigsaw and 3D mental rotation.

analysis.tldr: 大视觉语言模型在解决空间谜题时会自发形成内部视觉表征（心理意象），且注入少量视觉token可提升推理性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 理解多模态模型是否具备类似人类的心理意象能力，以及这种能力如何影响空间推理，有助于揭示模型内部工作机制并提升推理性能。
analysis.problem: 探究大视觉语言模型在解决空间谜题时是否形成内部视觉世界模型，并利用该模型提升推理能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型在预测动作序列时，其激活编码了中间状态的视觉信息，表明在无显式视觉监督下形成了不完美的视觉世界模型。
analysis.method: 微调Qwen3.5 VLM在12种视觉推理任务上预测开环动作序列，分析中间激活的视觉信息，并提出在思维链中注入少量视觉token（每步16个）以锐化心理意象。
contributions: 发现多模态模型在解决空间谜题时会自发形成内部视觉表征（心理意象）。
提出在思维链中注入少量视觉token的方法，将平均解决率从83%提升至89%，尤其在推理密集型任务上效果显著。
analysis.experiments: 在12种视觉推理任务（包括七巧板、拼图、推箱子、3D心理旋转、rush hour等）上微调Qwen3.5 VLM，评估解决率。
limitations: 仅针对特定VLM和任务集，泛化性未知。
心理意象的精确性和可解释性有待进一步分析。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 大视觉语言模型在解决空间谜题时会自发形成内部视觉表征（心理意象），且注入少量视觉token可提升推理性能。

papers.title: ConFixGS: Learning to Fix Feedforward 3D Gaussian Splatting with Confidence-Aware Diffusion Priors in Driving Scenes
papers.abstract: Feedforward 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) often struggles in trajectory-based sparse-view driving scenes. Existing Gaussian repair methods mainly target optimization-based 3DGS, while diffusion-based repair is typically restricted to iterative refinement near observed viewpoints, leaving feedforward 3DGS repair underexplored. We propose ConFixGS, a plug-and-play method that learns to fix feedforward 3DGS with confidence-aware diffusion priors. Starting from a pretrained feedforward model, ConFixGS generates diffusion-enhanced local pseudo-targets and validates them through reprojection-based cross-checking against support views. The resulting dense confidence maps guide refinement, enhancing reliable details while suppressing hallucinated or inconsistent evidence. On Waymo, nuScenes, and KITTI, ConFixGS improves challenging novel view synthesis, with PSNR gains of up to 3.68 dB and FID reduced by nearly half. Our results highlight confidence-aware fusion of generative priors and support-view consistency as a key principle for robust feedforward 3D driving scene reconstruction.

analysis.tldr: ConFixGS通过置信度感知的扩散先验修复前馈3D高斯泼溅，显著提升驾驶场景新视角合成质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 前馈3DGS在轨迹稀疏的驾驶场景中表现不佳，现有修复方法多针对优化型3DGS或局限于观测视角附近的迭代细化，前馈3DGS修复问题尚未充分探索。
analysis.problem: 如何利用扩散先验和置信度感知机制修复前馈3DGS在稀疏视图驾驶场景中的重建缺陷。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 前馈3DGS在轨迹稀疏的驾驶场景中常出现重建质量下降，扩散先验可增强细节但可能引入幻觉或不一致信息。
analysis.method: 提出ConFixGS，一种即插即用方法，利用预训练前馈模型生成扩散增强的局部伪目标，通过重投影交叉验证生成密集置信度图，指导细化过程，增强可靠细节并抑制幻觉。
contributions: 提出首个针对前馈3DGS的修复方法ConFixGS，利用置信度感知扩散先验。
设计重投影交叉验证机制生成密集置信度图，平衡生成先验与支持视图一致性。
在Waymo、nuScenes和KITTI上验证，PSNR提升高达3.68 dB，FID降低近一半。
analysis.experiments: 在Waymo、nuScenes和KITTI数据集上进行新视角合成实验，PSNR提升高达3.68 dB，FID降低近一半。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练前馈模型的质量。
重投影交叉验证的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ConFixGS通过置信度感知的扩散先验修复前馈3D高斯泼溅，显著提升驾驶场景新视角合成质量。

papers.title: Spatial-Frequency Gated Swin Transformer for Remote Sensing Single-Image Super-Resolution
papers.abstract: Remote Sensing (RS) single-image super-resolution aims to reconstruct high-resolution imagery from low-resolution observations while preserving fine spatial structures. Recent Swin Transformer-based models, including Swin2SR, provide strong spatial context modeling throughshifted-window self-attention, but their feed-forward networks remain generic channel-mixing modules and do not separate low-frequency structural content from high-frequency residual detail. To address this limitation, we propose SFG-SwinSR, a Spatial-Frequency Gated Swin Transformer for single-image super-resolution in remote sensing. SFG-SwinSR modifies the original Swin2SR attention block by replacing each transformer block's standard feed-forward network with a lightweight Spatial-Frequency Gated Feed-Forward Network (SFG-FFN). The module estimates low-frequency content via a depthwise-blur branch, extracts high-frequency residuals by subtraction, refines them with a lightweight spatial branch, and adaptively injects detail through a bottleneck gate. Experiments on SpaceNet and SEN2VEN{\mu}S show that SFG-SwinSR improves reconstruction quality under the evaluated settings. On SpaceNet, it achieves 45.19 dB PSNR and 0.9852 SSIM, indicating effective enhancement of high-frequency details. This demonstrates that spatial-frequency transformation within the transformer feed-forward network improves detail reconstruction in RS super-resolution.

analysis.tldr: 提出SFG-SwinSR，在Swin Transformer的前馈网络中引入空间-频率门控机制，提升遥感图像超分辨率的高频细节重建。
analysis.research_motivation: 遥感单图像超分辨率需要从低分辨率观测中重建高分辨率图像并保留精细空间结构，现有Swin Transformer模型的前馈网络仅做通用通道混合，无法分离低频结构和高频细节，限制了细节重建质量。
analysis.problem: Swin Transformer前馈网络缺乏对低频结构和高频残差的分开处理，导致高频细节重建不足。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出SFG-SwinSR，用轻量级空间-频率门控前馈网络（SFG-FFN）替换标准前馈网络，通过深度模糊分支估计低频内容、减法提取高频残差、轻量空间分支细化高频残差、瓶颈门控自适应注入细节。
contributions: 提出SFG-FFN模块，在Swin Transformer前馈网络中显式分离并增强高频细节。
在SpaceNet和SEN2VENμS数据集上验证了SFG-SwinSR的有效性，PSNR达45.19 dB，SSIM达0.9852。
analysis.experiments: 在SpaceNet和SEN2VENμS数据集上进行实验，SpaceNet上PSNR 45.19 dB，SSIM 0.9852。
limitations: 可能仅在遥感图像上验证，泛化性未知。
计算开销和推理速度未与基线详细比较。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SFG-SwinSR，在Swin Transformer的前馈网络中引入空间-频率门控机制，提升遥感图像超分辨率的高频细节重建。

papers.title: Forcing-KV: Hybrid KV Cache Compression for Efficient Autoregressive Video Diffusion Models
papers.abstract: Autoregressive (AR) video diffusion models adopt a streaming generation framework, enabling long-horizon video generation with real-time responsiveness, as exemplified by the Self Forcing training paradigm. However, existing AR video diffusion models still suffer from significant attention complexity and severe memory overhead due to the redundant key-value (KV) caches across historical frames, which limits scalability. In this paper, we tackle this challenge by introducing KV cache compression into autoregressive video diffusion. We observe that attention heads in mainstream AR diffusion models exhibit markedly distinct attention patterns and functional roles that remain stable across samples and denoising steps. Building on our empirical study of head-wise functional specialization, we divide the attention heads into two categories: static heads, which focus on transitions across autoregressive chunks and intra-frame fidelity, and dynamic heads, which govern inter-frame motion and consistency. We then propose Forcing-KV, a hybrid KV cache compression strategy that performs structured static pruning for static heads and dynamic pruning based on segment-wise similarity for dynamic heads. While maintaining output quality, our method achieves a generation speed of over 29 frames per second on a single NVIDIA H200 GPU along with 30% cache memory reduction, delivering up to 1.35x and 1.50x speedups on LongLive and Self Forcing at 480P resolution, and further scaling to 2.82x speedup at 1080P resolution. Code and demo videos are provided at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出Forcing-KV混合KV缓存压缩策略，在自回归视频扩散模型中实现30%缓存减少和2.82倍加速。
analysis.research_motivation: 自回归视频扩散模型因历史帧的冗余KV缓存导致注意力复杂度和内存开销大，限制了可扩展性和实时生成能力。
analysis.problem: 如何高效压缩自回归视频扩散模型中的KV缓存，以降低内存占用并加速生成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到主流自回归扩散模型中注意力头表现出稳定的功能特化：静态头关注跨块转换和帧内保真度，动态头控制帧间运动和一致性。
analysis.method: 提出Forcing-KV混合压缩策略：对静态头进行结构化静态剪枝，对动态头基于段间相似性进行动态剪枝。
contributions: 首次将KV缓存压缩引入自回归视频扩散模型，并基于注意力头功能特化提出混合剪枝策略。
在保持输出质量的同时，实现30%缓存减少，在480P分辨率下获得1.35x-1.50x加速，在1080P下达2.82x加速。
analysis.experiments: 在LongLive和Self Forcing框架上评估，480P分辨率下速度超过29 FPS（单H200 GPU），并提供了代码和演示视频。
limitations: 方法依赖对注意力头功能特化的先验观察，可能不适用于所有架构。
动态剪枝的段间相似性计算可能引入额外开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Forcing-KV混合KV缓存压缩策略，在自回归视频扩散模型中实现30%缓存减少和2.82倍加速。

papers.title: DeepTumorVQA: A Hierarchical 3D CT Benchmark for Stage-Wise Evaluation of Medical VLMs and Tool-Augmented Agents
papers.abstract: Medical vision-language models (VLMs) and AI agents have made significant progress in learning to analyze and reason about clinical images. However, existing medical visual question answering (VQA) benchmarks collapse model capabilities into a single accuracy score, obscuring where and why models fail. We propose DeepTumorVQA, a hierarchical benchmark that follows the multi-stage evidence chain in tumor diagnosis and decomposes 3D CT reasoning into four stages: recognition, measurement, visual reasoning, and medical reasoning. Higher-level questions remain independently scorable, while their ground-truth evidence chains are defined over lower-level primitives. The benchmark contains 476K questions across 42 clinical subtypes on 9,262 3D CT volumes. In addition to a direct reasoning mode for VLMs, DeepTumorVQA provides tool-interaction environments for agent evaluation, where a model can call external tools, including segmentation models, measurement programs, and medical knowledge modules, before answering the question. Evaluating over 30 model configurations, we find that reliable quantitative measurement is the primary bottleneck, making later-stage visual and medical reasoning harder for VLMs, while tool augmentation substantially mitigates this issue. When tools are available, leveraging medical knowledge and tools to reason about medical images becomes a new challenge. We further show that ground-truth step-by-step tool-use traces from DeepTumorVQA can supervise agents and reduce tool-use and reasoning failures. This stage-wise progression from recognition to measurement to visual and medical reasoning provides a concrete roadmap for future medical VLM and AI agent studies. All data and code are released at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出一个分阶段评估医学VLM和AI智能体的3D CT肿瘤VQA基准，发现定量测量是主要瓶颈，工具增强可缓解问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有医学VQA基准将模型能力压缩为单一准确率分数，无法揭示模型在何处及为何失败，缺乏对诊断推理链的细粒度评估。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个分阶段、可分解的3D CT肿瘤VQA基准，以系统评估VLM和工具增强智能体在肿瘤诊断各环节的能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 可靠定量测量是主要瓶颈，使后期视觉和医学推理对VLM更困难；工具增强可显著缓解该问题；当工具可用时，利用医学知识和工具推理医学图像成为新挑战。
analysis.method: 提出DeepTumorVQA基准，将3D CT推理分解为识别、测量、视觉推理、医学推理四个阶段，包含476K问题，并提供工具交互环境用于智能体评估。
contributions: 提出一个分阶段、层次化的3D CT肿瘤VQA基准，支持细粒度评估和证据链追踪。
通过大规模实验揭示定量测量是VLM的主要瓶颈，并验证工具增强的有效性。
提供真实工具使用轨迹用于监督智能体，减少工具使用和推理失败。
analysis.experiments: 在30多个模型配置上评估，发现定量测量是主要瓶颈，工具增强可缓解；摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 仅针对肿瘤诊断场景，可能不适用于其他医学领域。
工具增强依赖外部模块，可能引入额外复杂性和依赖。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个分阶段评估医学VLM和AI智能体的3D CT肿瘤VQA基准，发现定量测量是主要瓶颈，工具增强可缓解问题。

papers.title: VFM-SDM: A vision foundation model-based framework for training-free, marker-free, and calibration-free structural displacement measurement
papers.abstract: Reliable displacement measurement is fundamental for structural health monitoring and digital engineering workflows, as it provides direct structural response information. Vision-based measurement has emerged as a promising approach for low-cost, non-contact displacement monitoring. However, its deployment often remains constrained by task-specific model training or on-site preparation, such as marker installation or manual camera calibration. This study presents a Vision Foundation Model-based framework for Structural Displacement Measurement (VFM-SDM) that integrates VFM-inferred camera parameter estimation and point tracking to reconstruct multi-directional structural displacements via triangulation without task-specific training or on-site preparation, enabling efficient non-contact deployment in real-world applications. Structural geometry constraints are incorporated to suppress physically implausible deviations and improve estimation consistency. A multi-modal field dataset collected from an in-service pedestrian bridge is introduced alongside a unified benchmarking protocol to support reproducible evaluation. Representative results show low amplitude errors (NRMSE$_{\text{range}}$: 0.11/0.12), strong temporal agreement (correlation coefficient: 0.86/0.88), and small peak-to-peak amplitude errors (RPPAE: 0.01/0.02) for vertical and lateral displacements, indicating robust performance under real-world conditions. The proposed framework advances automated, scalable displacement monitoring and lays the groundwork for VFM-enabled structural response measurements in digital twin and data-centric construction workflows.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种无需训练、无标记、无标定的视觉基础模型框架，用于结构位移测量。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统位移测量依赖接触式传感器或视觉方法需要任务特定训练、标记安装或手动相机标定，限制了实际部署的便捷性和可扩展性。
analysis.problem: 如何在不进行任务特定训练、无需现场标记和相机标定的情况下，实现多方向结构位移的可靠测量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 集成视觉基础模型推断的相机参数估计和点跟踪，通过三角测量重建多方向位移，并引入结构几何约束抑制不合理偏差。
contributions: 提出VFM-SDM框架，实现无训练、无标记、无标定的结构位移测量。
引入多模态现场数据集和统一基准测试协议，支持可重复评估。
analysis.experiments: 在真实人行桥数据集上评估，垂直和横向位移的NRMSE_range分别为0.11/0.12，相关系数0.86/0.88，RPPAE为0.01/0.02。
limitations: 可能依赖视觉基础模型在特定场景下的泛化能力。
未提及对极端环境（如强光照变化、遮挡）的鲁棒性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种无需训练、无标记、无标定的视觉基础模型框架，用于结构位移测量。

papers.title: S2P-Net: A Spectral-Spatial Polar Network for Rotation-Invariant Object Recognition in Low-Data Regimes
papers.abstract: We present S2P-Net (Spectral-Spatial Polar Network), a compact deep learning architecture that achieves mathematically guaranteed rotation invariance without data augmentation. In this Paper, we also made a comparison to other neural network architectures (CNN`s). Have a look at the results and feel free to contact me for any questions. This is my first paper:) Made by Hackbert

analysis.tldr: 提出S2P-Net，一种在低数据场景下实现数学上保证旋转不变性的紧凑深度学习架构。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法依赖数据增强实现旋转不变性，在低数据场景下效果有限，且缺乏理论保证。
analysis.problem: 在低数据场景下实现旋转不变的目标识别。

analysis.method: 提出S2P-Net，一种结合光谱-空间极坐标变换的紧凑网络，从架构设计上保证旋转不变性。
contributions: 提出S2P-Net，实现数学上保证的旋转不变性，无需数据增强。
在低数据场景下验证了方法的有效性。

papers.title: Rethinking Evaluation of Multiple Sclerosis (MS) Lesion Segmentation Models
papers.abstract: Multiple Sclerosis (MS) is a chronic autoimmune disease that can significantly reduce the quality of life of a patient. Existing treatment options can only help slow down the progression of the disease. Therefore, early detection and precise monitoring of disease progression are important. Deep learning offers state-of-the-art models for detecting and segmenting MS lesions in brain MRI scans. However, most of these models are evaluated using the Dice score, without accounting for lesion-wise detection and segmentation performance or other metrics that quantify model performance in cases that are complex or confusing for human annotators, or in cases that are essential for disease detection and progression monitoring. In this paper, we highlight the need to rethink the evaluation of MS lesion segmentation models. In this context, we first present problem fingerprinting in detail to highlight what neurologists look for in brain MRI scans for MS detection and progression monitoring, and which metrics are required to properly quantify model performance in these contexts. Additionally, we present an analysis of state-of-the-art models on two open-source datasets using these metrics to highlight their usability for real-world deployment in hospitals.

analysis.tldr: MS病灶分割模型评估不应仅依赖Dice分数，需引入病灶级检测、分割及临床相关指标。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有MS病灶分割模型多仅用Dice分数评估，忽略了病灶级检测性能、复杂病例及临床关键指标，导致模型实际部署效果不明。
analysis.problem: 如何重新设计评估体系，以全面衡量MS病灶分割模型在临床相关场景下的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出当前评估过度依赖Dice分数，未考虑病灶级检测、分割性能及临床关键指标，导致模型在真实部署中表现未知。
analysis.method: 提出问题指纹（problem fingerprinting）方法，明确神经科医生在MRI中关注的病灶特征及所需评估指标，并基于这些指标对现有模型进行重新评估。
contributions: 强调并论证了重新思考MS病灶分割模型评估的必要性
提出问题指纹方法，系统梳理临床相关评估指标
在两个开源数据集上对现有模型进行多指标分析，揭示其实际部署可用性
analysis.experiments: 在两个开源数据集上使用提出的指标对现有模型进行评估，摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 未提出新的分割模型或改进方法
可能未覆盖所有临床场景或数据集

papers.title: BEA-GS: BEyond RAdiance Supervision in 3DGS for Precise Object Extraction
papers.abstract: Most Gaussian Splatting techniques that provide a 3D semantic representation of the scene do not optimize the underlying 3D geometry, making object-level editing or asset extraction challenging. Recent methods, such as COBGS, Trace3D, ObjectGS, acknowledge this limitation and propose approaches that modify the scene's geometry to represent the underlying semantics. We advance this concept further by proposing a novel solution that provides near perfect boundaries in object extraction. We do so by introducing two new losses in the optimization that take care of: 1) a loss that modifies the geometry of visible Gaussians to respect semantic boundaries, and 2) a loss that adjusts the geometry of non-visible Gaussians that appear once the object is extracted. Our first loss propagates gradients directly through the rasterization, allowing for seamless integration within the optimization of the Gaussian parameters. The second loss also propagates gradients to Gaussian parameters but does so without passing through the rasterization, enabling modification of the scene's geometry even when little transmittance reaches a Gaussian (partial or non-visible). Exhaustive comparisons with 12 state of the art methods across 4 datasets, using six metrics, demonstrate that our approach produces overall the best boundary segmentation to date.

analysis.tldr: 提出两种新损失优化3D高斯几何，实现近乎完美的物体提取边界。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有3D高斯泼溅技术优化语义表示时忽略底层几何，导致物体级编辑或资产提取困难。
analysis.problem: 如何优化3D高斯场景的几何结构以精确提取物体边界。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 引入两个新损失：1) 可见高斯几何损失，通过光栅化传播梯度以尊重语义边界；2) 非可见高斯几何损失，不通过光栅化直接调整提取后出现的非可见高斯几何。
contributions: 提出两种新损失函数，分别优化可见和非可见高斯的几何以精确提取物体边界。
在4个数据集上与12种方法比较，使用6个指标，取得最佳边界分割效果。
analysis.experiments: 在4个数据集上与12种最先进方法比较，使用6个指标，结果表明方法整体上产生最佳边界分割。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量语义先验。
非可见高斯损失的计算复杂度可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出两种新损失优化3D高斯几何，实现近乎完美的物体提取边界。

papers.title: Attention Itself Could Retrieve.RetrieveVGGT: Training-Free Long Context Streaming 3D Reconstruction via Query-Key Similarity Retrieval
papers.abstract: Visual Geometry Grounded Transformer (VGGT) advances 3D reconstruction via scalable Transformer architecture, but the quadratic complexity of global attention prevents long context application. StreamVGGT enables streaming with causal attention, yet its KV cache grows linearly with frames, causing memory overflow and quality degradation. We present RetrieveVGGT, a training-free framework, which formulates context construction for VGGT as a retrieval problem. By retrieving a fixed number of relevant frames at each step, VGGT maintains a controllable memory budget, which is close to its training context length. Interestingly, we find that the similarity between current frame queries and cached history frame keys at the first global attention layer of VGGT is already a strong indicator of relevance, eliminating the need for additional learned scoring. To enhance information diversity similar to a recommender system, we propose Segment Sampling so that the retrieval spans distinct relevant segments rather than a single high-similarity region. We design a pose-aware spatial memory mechanism that organizes history frames according to their already estimated camera poses, enabling location-aware retrieval. Extensive experiments demonstrate that RetrieveVGGT achieves state-of-the-art performance, outperforming StreamVGGT, TTT3R, and InfiniteVGGT while maintaining constant memory usage regardless of sequence length. Code is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 通过检索固定数量相关帧实现无训练的长上下文流式3D重建，内存恒定且性能SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: VGGT在3D重建中表现出色，但全局注意力的二次复杂度限制了长上下文应用；流式变体StreamVGGT的KV缓存随帧数线性增长，导致内存溢出和质量下降。
analysis.problem: 如何在不增加训练的情况下，使VGGT支持长序列流式3D重建，同时保持恒定内存预算并避免质量退化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现VGGT第一个全局注意力层中当前帧查询与历史帧键的相似度已能强指示相关性，无需额外学习评分。
analysis.method: 将上下文构建视为检索问题，每步检索固定数量相关帧；提出Segment Sampling增强多样性，以及基于相机姿态的空间记忆机制实现位置感知检索。
contributions: 提出训练无关的检索式框架RetrieveVGGT，实现恒定内存的长上下文流式3D重建。
发现注意力相似度可作为相关性指标，并设计Segment Sampling和姿态感知空间记忆机制提升检索质量。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集上实验，RetrieveVGGT优于StreamVGGT、TTT3R和InfiniteVGGT，且内存使用恒定。
limitations: 依赖VGGT预训练模型，可能不适用于其他架构。
检索策略基于第一层注意力，深层信息可能未被充分利用。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过检索固定数量相关帧实现无训练的长上下文流式3D重建，内存恒定且性能SOTA。

papers.title: Overcoming Catastrophic Forgetting in Visual Continual Learning with Reinforcement Fine-Tuning
papers.abstract: Recent studies suggest that Reinforcement Fine-Tuning (RFT) is inherently more resilient to catastrophic forgetting than Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT). However, whether RFT (e.g., GRPO) can effectively overcome forgetting in challenging visual continual learning settings, such as class-incremental learning (CIL) and domain-incremental learning (DIL), remains an open problem. Through a pilot study, we confirm that while RFT consistently outperforms SFT, it still suffers from non-negligible forgetting. We empirically trace this bottleneck to Trajectory-level Drift Agnosticism: among candidate rollouts achieving identical task rewards, the KL divergence from the preceding-task policy varies substantially, which strongly correlates with catastrophic forgetting across sequential tasks. Motivated by this insight, we propose Retention-aware Policy Optimization (RaPO), a simple yet effective RFT method that explicitly mitigates forgetting through trajectory-level reward shaping. Specifically, RaPO comprises two core components: (1) Retention Reward that converts trajectory-level distribution drift into a continuous reward signal, preferentially reinforcing knowledge-preserving rollouts within each group; (2) Cross-Task Advantage Normalization (CTAN), which maintains a persistent exponential moving average of reward statistics across task boundaries to stabilize the optimization progress during continual learning. Leveraging the free-form textual generalization of MLLMs, we comprehensively evaluate RaPO across five visual continual learning settings. Extensive experiments demonstrate that RaPO achieves leading performance, substantially reducing catastrophic forgetting while preserving strong plasticity. To the best of our knowledge, this work represents the first systematic exploration of RFT in visual continual learning, offering insights that we hope will inspire future research.

analysis.tldr: 提出 Retention-aware Policy Optimization (RaPO)，通过轨迹级奖励塑形缓解视觉持续学习中的灾难性遗忘。
analysis.research_motivation: 强化微调（RFT）被认为比监督微调（SFT）更能抵抗灾难性遗忘，但在视觉持续学习（如类增量、域增量）中是否有效尚不清楚，且现有RFT仍存在不可忽视的遗忘问题。
analysis.problem: 解决RFT在视觉持续学习中因轨迹级漂移导致的灾难性遗忘问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现RFT中候选轨迹即使获得相同任务奖励，其与先前任务策略的KL散度差异显著，且该差异与遗忘强相关，称为“轨迹级漂移不可知性”。
analysis.method: 提出RaPO，包含两个组件：(1) Retention Reward，将轨迹级分布漂移转化为连续奖励信号，优先保留知识保持性轨迹；(2) Cross-Task Advantage Normalization (CTAN)，跨任务边界维护奖励统计的指数移动平均以稳定优化。
contributions: 首次系统探索RFT在视觉持续学习中的应用，并揭示轨迹级漂移不可知性是遗忘的关键瓶颈。
提出RaPO方法，通过奖励塑形有效缓解遗忘，在五个视觉持续学习设置中取得领先性能。
analysis.experiments: 在五个视觉持续学习设置上评估，使用多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）的文本泛化能力，实验表明RaPO显著减少灾难性遗忘并保持强塑性。
limitations: 可能依赖MLLMs的文本泛化能力，在纯视觉任务中适用性待验证。
CTAN的超参数（如衰减率）可能需针对不同任务调整。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 Retention-aware Policy Optimization (RaPO)，通过轨迹级奖励塑形缓解视觉持续学习中的灾难性遗忘。

papers.title: DegBins: Degradation-Driven Binning for Depth Super-Resolution
papers.abstract: Depth super-resolution (DSR) aims to recover a high-resolution (HR) depth map from its low-resolution (LR) counterpart. With color image guidance, this task is typically formulated as learning the residual between HR and LR in a low-dimensional feature space. However, this additive formulation is insufficient to accurately capture the complex relationship between HR and LR, especially under spatially varying degradations. In this paper, we introduce DegBins, a novel DSR framework that leverages degradation-driven binning to adaptively enhance residual modeling. Specifically, DegBins reformulates the regression-based DSR as a hybrid classification-regression problem, where the residual depth is represented as a linear combination of discrete depth bins weighted by their learned probability distribution, yielding more flexible and expressive representations. Furthermore, DegBins models the degradation relationship between HR and LR in a high-dimensional feature space, enabling adaptive bin range adjustment and probability optimization conditioned on local degradation characteristics. To progressively improve reconstruction quality, DegBins adopts a multi-stage refinement scheme, where each stage performs finer-grained bin partitioning and probability updating based on the former estimation. This coarse-to-fine design facilitates more accurate depth recovery, particularly in regions with severe degradations or complex structural variations. Extensive experiments across five benchmarks demonstrate that DegBins consistently outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods in terms of accuracy, robustness, and generalization.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于退化驱动的分箱方法，将深度超分辨率重构为混合分类-回归问题，实现自适应残差建模。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有深度超分辨率方法通常将任务建模为低维特征空间中的残差学习，但加法公式难以准确捕捉HR与LR之间的复杂关系，尤其是在空间变化退化下表现不足。
analysis.problem: 如何更灵活、准确地建模深度超分辨率中HR与LR之间的残差，以应对空间变化的退化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出DegBins框架，将回归任务转化为混合分类-回归问题：用离散深度箱的线性组合表示残差，通过学习概率分布加权；在高维特征空间中建模退化关系，自适应调整箱范围和概率；采用多阶段细化方案，逐步进行更细粒度的箱划分和概率更新。
contributions: 提出退化驱动的分箱方法，将深度超分辨率重构为混合分类-回归问题，增强残差建模的灵活性和表达能力。
设计多阶段粗到细的细化方案，逐步提升重建质量，尤其在严重退化或复杂结构区域。
analysis.experiments: 在五个基准数据集上进行了广泛实验，结果表明DegBins在准确性、鲁棒性和泛化性上持续优于现有最先进方法。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的颜色图像作为引导，在无颜色或颜色退化场景下性能未知。
多阶段细化可能增加计算开销，实时性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于退化驱动的分箱方法，将深度超分辨率重构为混合分类-回归问题，实现自适应残差建模。

papers.title: Any2Any 3D Diffusion Models with Knowledge Transfer: A Radiotherapy Planning Study
papers.abstract: Voxel-wise dose prediction is a critical yet challenging task in practical radiotherapy (RT) planning, as bespoke models trained from scratch often struggle to generalize across diverse clinical settings. Meanwhile, generative models trained on billion-scale datasets from vision domains have achieved impressive performance. Herein, we propose DiffKT3D, a unified Any2Any 3D diffusion framework that leverages prior knowledge from pretrained video diffusion models for efficient and clinically meaningful dose prediction. To enable flexible conditioning across multiple clinical modalities (CT, anatomical structures, body, beam settings, etc.), we introduce an Any2Any conditional paradigm utilizing modality-specific embeddings without cross-attention overhead. Further, we design a novel reinforcement learning (RL) post-training mechanism guided by a clinically-informed Scorecard explicitly tailored to institutional treatment preferences. Compared with winner of GDP-HMM challenge, DiffKT3D sets a new state-of-the-art in dose prediction by reducing voxel-level MAE from 2.07 to 1.93. In addition, DiffKT3D achieves superior image quality and preference match. These results demonstrate that transferring diffusion priors via modality-aware conditioning and clinically aligned RL post-training can provide a robust and generalizable solution for RT planning across various clinical scenarios.

analysis.tldr: 提出DiffKT3D，利用预训练视频扩散模型的知识迁移实现任意模态条件的3D剂量预测，结合RL后训练提升临床一致性。
analysis.research_motivation: 放疗计划中体素级剂量预测任务关键但困难，从头训练的专用模型难以泛化到不同临床场景，而视觉领域的大规模生成模型性能优异，因此探索知识迁移方法。
analysis.problem: 如何利用预训练视频扩散模型的先验知识，实现高效、泛化且符合临床偏好的3D剂量预测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出DiffKT3D框架：1) 利用预训练视频扩散模型进行知识迁移；2) 设计Any2Any条件范式，通过模态特定嵌入实现多模态灵活条件控制，避免交叉注意力开销；3) 引入基于临床评分卡的强化学习后训练机制，对齐机构治疗偏好。
contributions: 提出首个统一Any2Any 3D扩散框架DiffKT3D，利用视频扩散先验进行剂量预测。
设计Any2Any条件范式，支持CT、解剖结构、射束设置等多种模态灵活条件输入。
提出基于临床评分卡的强化学习后训练方法，提升预测与临床偏好的匹配度。
analysis.experiments: 在放疗计划数据集上，与GDP-HMM挑战赛冠军相比，DiffKT3D将体素级MAE从2.07降至1.93，达到新SOTA，并取得更优的图像质量和偏好匹配。
limitations: 可能依赖特定临床评分卡设计，迁移到其他机构需重新调整。
仅验证了剂量预测任务，泛化到其他3D医学图像任务需进一步实验。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出DiffKT3D，利用预训练视频扩散模型的知识迁移实现任意模态条件的3D剂量预测，结合RL后训练提升临床一致性。

papers.title: GSMap: 2D Gaussians for Online HD Mapping
papers.abstract: Accurate High-Definition (HD) map construction is critical for autonomous driving, yet existing methods face a fundamental trade-off: vectorization-based approaches preserve topology but struggle with geometric fidelity, while rasterization-based approaches enable precise geometric supervision but produce unstructured outputs. To bridge this gap, we propose GSMap, a novel framework that unifies both paradigms via a learnable 2D Gaussian representation. Each map element is modeled as an ordered sequence of 2D Gaussians, whose centers correspond to the vertices of the vectorized polyline/polygon. This formulation enables simultaneous optimization through: (1) Differentiable rasterization that enforces pixel-level geometric constraints, and (2) Topology-aware vectorization that maintains structural regularity. Experiments on both nuScenes and Argoverse2 demonstrate that our Gaussian-based representation effectively unifies geometric and topological learning, achieving significant performance improvements and demonstrating strong compatibility with existing HD mapping architectures. Code will be available at this https URL

analysis.tldr: GSMap 通过可学习的 2D 高斯表示统一了矢量化与栅格化 HD 地图构建范式，在 nuScenes 和 Argoverse2 上取得显著性能提升。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 HD 地图构建方法在矢量化（保持拓扑但几何保真度差）与栅格化（几何监督精确但输出非结构化）之间存在根本性权衡，亟需一种能同时兼顾几何与拓扑的统一框架。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种表示方法，既能通过可微栅格化施加像素级几何约束，又能通过拓扑感知矢量化保持结构规整性，从而提升 HD 地图构建的精度与结构化程度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 GSMap 框架，将每个地图元素建模为有序的 2D 高斯序列，高斯中心对应矢量化折线/多边形的顶点；通过可微栅格化施加像素级几何约束，同时结合拓扑感知矢量化保持结构规整性，实现几何与拓扑的联合优化。
contributions: 提出一种基于 2D 高斯表示的统一框架，同时支持可微栅格化与拓扑感知矢量化，弥合了矢量化与栅格化 HD 地图构建的鸿沟。
在 nuScenes 和 Argoverse2 数据集上验证了方法的有效性，显著提升了性能，并展示了与现有 HD 地图架构的强兼容性。
analysis.experiments: 在 nuScenes 和 Argoverse2 数据集上进行了实验，结果表明基于高斯的表示有效统一了几何与拓扑学习，取得了显著性能提升。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能对复杂拓扑结构（如交叉路口）的建模能力有限。
2D 高斯序列的初始化与优化可能对超参数敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: GSMap 通过可学习的 2D 高斯表示统一了矢量化与栅格化 HD 地图构建范式，在 nuScenes 和 Argoverse2 上取得显著性能提升。

papers.title: Reflection Anchors for Propagation-Aware Visual Retention in Long-Chain Multimodal Reasoning
papers.abstract: Long chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning improves large vision--language models, but visual information often fades during generation, limiting long-horizon multimodal reasoning. Existing methods either re-inject vision at inference or train policies for stronger grounding, but where to intervene relies on perception heuristics rather than principled gain analysis, and how local visual influence propagates remains implicit. We study this problem from an information-theoretic standpoint and derive a lower bound on the downstream visual gain of a one-step intervention, which suggests two factors: local branching room (token entropy) and downstream visual propagation potential (suffix divergence from a vision-marginalized reference). Guided by this analysis, we propose reflection-anchor policy optimization (RAPO), a GRPO-based policy optimization method that selects high-entropy reflection anchors and optimizes a chain-masked finite-window KL surrogate for downstream visual dependence. Experiments on reasoning-intensive and general-domain benchmarks show that RAPO delivers substantial gains over strong baselines across multiple LVLM backbones. Mechanism analyses further indicate that reflection anchors are enriched for visually sensitive decision points and that RAPO increases contrastive visual-dependence signals along generated trajectories.

analysis.tldr: 提出反射锚点策略优化（RAPO），通过信息论分析指导视觉信息保持，提升长链多模态推理性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 长链思维推理中视觉信息逐渐衰减，现有方法依赖启发式干预，缺乏理论指导，且局部视觉影响传播机制不明确。
analysis.problem: 如何从信息论角度确定最佳干预位置并优化视觉依赖传播，以缓解长链多模态推理中的视觉信息衰减。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 视觉信息在长链生成中逐渐衰减；现有干预方法基于感知启发式而非增益分析；局部视觉影响传播隐式。
analysis.method: 基于信息论推导单步干预下游视觉增益下界，提出反射锚点策略优化（RAPO），利用GRPO选择高熵反射锚点并优化链式掩码有限窗口KL散度以增强下游视觉依赖。
contributions: 从信息论角度推导了单步干预下游视觉增益的下界，揭示局部分支空间和下游视觉传播潜力两个关键因素。
提出反射锚点策略优化（RAPO），通过选择高熵反射锚点和链式掩码KL散度优化，显著提升长链多模态推理的视觉保持能力。
analysis.experiments: 在推理密集型与通用域基准上，RAPO在多个LVLM骨干上相比强基线取得显著提升；机制分析表明反射锚点富集于视觉敏感决策点，RAPO增加生成轨迹中的对比视觉依赖信号。
limitations: 方法依赖GRPO框架，可能不适用于非策略优化场景。
理论下界推导基于特定假设，实际增益可能受模型架构影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出反射锚点策略优化（RAPO），通过信息论分析指导视觉信息保持，提升长链多模态推理性能。

papers.title: DAP: Doppler-aware Point Network for Heterogeneous mmWave Action Recognition
papers.abstract: Millimeter-wave (mmWave) radar provides privacy-preserving sensing and is valuable for human action recognition (HAR). Existing mmWave point cloud datasets are limited in scale and mostly collected under homogeneous single-source settings, preventing current methods from handling real-world distribution shifts caused by heterogeneous radar sources, such as different devices and frequency bands. To address this, we introduce UniMM-HAR, the largest and first mmWave point cloud HAR dataset for heterogeneous multi-source scenarios, standardizing three distinct radar configurations to realistically evaluate cross-source generalization. We further propose the Doppler-aware Point Cloud Network (DAP-Net) to tackle heterogeneity challenges. DAP-Net enhances intra-modal representations and performs cross-modal alignment to learn source-invariant action semantics. Leveraging action-consistent spatio-temporal Doppler patterns as anchors, the Dual-space Doppler Reparameterization (D2R) module performs sample-adaptive geometric densification and Doppler-guided feature recalibration, while the Text Alignment Module (TAM) provides stable semantic anchors via a pretrained textual space. Experiments show that DAP-Net significantly outperforms existing methods under heterogeneous radar settings, achieving state-of-the-art accuracy and strong cross-source robustness.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个异构毫米波点云动作识别数据集UniMM-HAR和Doppler感知点云网络DAP-Net，通过多普勒重参数化和文本对齐实现跨源鲁棒动作识别。
analysis.research_motivation: 毫米波雷达在隐私保护动作识别中有价值，但现有数据集规模小且多为同构单源设置，无法应对异构雷达源（不同设备、频段）导致的分布偏移，限制了实际部署。
analysis.problem: 异构毫米波雷达源（不同设备、频段）引起的点云分布偏移导致动作识别性能下降，需要跨源泛化的方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Doppler感知点云网络（DAP-Net），包含双空间多普勒重参数化（D2R）模块进行样本自适应几何致密化和多普勒引导特征重校准，以及文本对齐模块（TAM）利用预训练文本空间提供稳定语义锚点，实现跨模态对齐和源不变动作语义学习。
contributions: 构建了首个大规模异构多源毫米波点云动作识别数据集UniMM-HAR，标准化三种雷达配置以评估跨源泛化。
提出DAP-Net，利用多普勒模式作为锚点进行跨模态对齐和特征重校准，显著提升异构设置下的动作识别鲁棒性。
analysis.experiments: 在UniMM-HAR数据集上实验，DAP-Net在异构雷达设置下显著优于现有方法，达到最先进准确率和强跨源鲁棒性。
limitations: 可能依赖特定雷达配置，泛化到更多未知源需验证。
文本对齐模块依赖预训练空间，可能受限于文本语义覆盖范围。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个异构毫米波点云动作识别数据集UniMM-HAR和Doppler感知点云网络DAP-Net，通过多普勒重参数化和文本对齐实现跨源鲁棒动作识别。

papers.title: SoccerLens: Grounded Soccer Video Understanding Beyond Accuracy
papers.abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) have recently shown strong potential in soccer video understanding. However, given the high complexity of soccer videos due to large viewpoint variations, rapid shot transitions, and cluttered scenes, it remains unclear on whether VLMs rely on meaningful visual evidence or exploit spurious correlations and shortcut learning. Existing evaluation protocols focus primarily on classification accuracy and do not assess visual grounding. To address this limitation, we introduce SoccerLens, a benchmark for grounded soccer video understanding. The benchmark contains annotated video segments spanning $13$ common soccer events, with structured visual cues organized into three levels of semantic relevance. We further extend the attribution method of Chefer [ arXiv:2103.15679 ] to jointly model spatial and temporal attention, and introduce evaluation metrics that measure whether model attention aligns with annotated cues or drifts toward spurious regions. Our evaluation of state-of-the-art soccer VLMs shows that, despite strong classification accuracy, current models fail to exceed $50\%$ grounding performance even under the loosest cue definitions and consistently underutilize temporal information. These results reveal a substantial gap between predictive performance and true visual grounding, highlighting the need for grounded evaluation in complex spatio-temporal domains such as soccer.

analysis.tldr: SoccerLens 基准揭示现有足球视频 VLM 在分类准确率高但视觉定位能力弱，存在虚假关联问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 足球视频因视角变化大、镜头切换快、场景杂乱，VLM 可能依赖虚假关联而非有意义视觉证据，现有评估只关注分类准确率，缺乏对视觉定位的评估。
analysis.problem: 现有足球视频理解评估协议仅关注分类准确率，无法衡量模型是否真正基于视觉证据进行推理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，当前最先进的足球 VLM 在分类准确率上表现良好，但定位性能在最宽松的线索定义下也不超过 50%，且一致性地未充分利用时间信息，表明预测性能与真实视觉定位之间存在显著差距。
analysis.method: 构建 SoccerLens 基准，包含 13 种常见足球事件的带注释视频片段，提供三级语义相关性的结构化视觉线索；扩展 Chefer 的归因方法以联合建模空间和时间注意力，并引入评估指标衡量模型注意力是否与注释线索对齐。
contributions: 提出 SoccerLens 基准，用于评估足球视频理解的视觉定位能力。
扩展归因方法以联合建模空间和时间注意力，并引入新的评估指标。
实验揭示当前足球 VLM 在分类准确率高但定位性能差，存在虚假关联问题。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅说明评估了最先进的足球 VLM，定位性能不超过 50%。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖 13 种事件，可能无法代表所有足球场景。
归因方法扩展可能引入额外计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SoccerLens 基准揭示现有足球视频 VLM 在分类准确率高但视觉定位能力弱，存在虚假关联问题。

papers.title: From Pixels to Concepts: Do Segmentation Models Understand What They Segment?
papers.abstract: Segmentation is a fundamental vision task underlying numerous downstream applications. Recent promptable segmentation models, such as Segment Anything Model 3 (SAM3), extend segmentation from category-agnostic mask prediction to concept-guided localization conditioned on high-level textual prompts. However, existing benchmarks primarily evaluate mask accuracy or object presence, leaving unclear whether these models faithfully ground the queried concept or instead rely on visually salient but semantically misleading cues. We introduce CAFE: \textbf{C}ounterfactual \textbf{A}ttribute \textbf{F}actuality \textbf{E}valuation, a novel benchmark for evaluating concept-faithful segmentation in promptable segmentation models. Our \textbf{CAFE} is built on attribute-level counterfactual manipulation: the target region and ground-truth mask are preserved, while attributes such as surface appearance, context, or material composition are modified to introduce misleading semantic cues. The benchmark contains 2,146 paired test samples, each consisting of a target image, a ground-truth mask, a positive prompt, and a misleading negative prompt. These samples cover three counterfactual categories: Superficial Mimicry (\textbf{SM}), Context Conflict (\textbf{CC}), and Ontological Conflict (\textbf{OC}). We evaluate various model types and sizes on our CAFE. Experiments reveal a systematic gap between localization quality and concept discrimination: models often generate accurate masks even for misleading prompts, suggesting that strong mask prediction does not necessarily imply faithful semantic grounding. Our CAFE provides a controlled benchmark for diagnosing whether promptable segmentation models perform concept-faithful grounding rather than shortcut-driven mask retrieval.

analysis.tldr: 提出CAFE基准测试，揭示可提示分割模型在概念忠实性上的系统性缺陷。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有分割模型评估主要关注掩码准确性，忽略了模型是否真正理解查询概念，可能依赖视觉显著性而非语义正确性。
analysis.problem: 评估可提示分割模型是否忠实于查询概念，而非依赖误导性语义线索。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验发现模型即使面对误导性提示也能生成准确掩码，表明强掩码预测能力并不等同于语义忠实性。
analysis.method: 构建CAFE基准，通过属性级反事实操作（修改表面外观、上下文、材料组成）生成正负提示对，测试模型的概念区分能力。
contributions: 提出CAFE基准，包含2146个反事实测试样本，覆盖三种误导类型。
系统揭示可提示分割模型在概念忠实性上的系统性缺陷。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖三种反事实类型，可能无法涵盖所有误导场景。
未提供模型改进方法。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CAFE基准测试，揭示可提示分割模型在概念忠实性上的系统性缺陷。

papers.title: DeformMaster: An Interactive Physics-Neural World Model for Deformable Objects from Videos
papers.abstract: World models for deformable objects should recover not only geometry and appearance, but also underlying physical dynamics, interaction grounding, and material behavior. Learning such a model from real videos is challenging because deformable linear, planar, and volumetric objects evolve under high-dimensional deformation, noisy interactions, and complex material response. The model must therefore infer a physical state from visual observations, roll it forward under new interactions, and render the resulting dynamics with high visual fidelity. We present DeformMaster, a video-derived interactive physics--neural world model that turns real interaction videos into an online interactive model of deformable objects within a unified dynamics-and-appearance framework. DeformMaster preserves structured physical rollout while using a neural residual to compensate for unmodeled effects, grounds sparse hand motion as distributed compliant actuator for hand--continuum interaction, represents material response with spatially varying constitutive experts, and drives high-fidelity 4D appearance from the predicted physical evolution. Experiments on real-world deformable-object sequences demonstrate DeformMaster's ability to roll out future dynamics and render dynamic appearance, outperforming state-of-the-art baselines while supporting novel action rollout, material-parameter variation, and dynamic novel-view synthesis.

analysis.tldr: DeformMaster从视频中学习可变形物体的物理-神经世界模型，支持交互式动力学预测与高保真渲染。
analysis.research_motivation: 可变形物体的世界模型需要同时恢复几何、外观、物理动力学和材料行为，但现有方法难以从真实视频中学习高维变形、噪声交互和复杂材料响应。
analysis.problem: 从真实视频中构建可变形物体的交互式物理-神经世界模型，实现动力学预测、交互响应和高保真渲染。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 可变形物体（线性、平面、体积）在视频中呈现高维变形、噪声交互和复杂材料响应，导致纯物理或纯神经方法难以兼顾精度与泛化。
analysis.method: DeformMaster结合结构化物理滚动与神经残差补偿，利用稀疏手部运动作为分布式柔顺执行器建模交互，采用空间变化的本构专家表示材料响应，并通过预测的物理演化驱动高保真4D外观。
contributions: 提出统一动力学-外观框架的视频衍生交互式物理-神经世界模型
引入神经残差补偿未建模效应，稀疏手部运动作为分布式柔顺执行器
空间变化本构专家表示材料响应，实现材料参数变化和新动作滚动
analysis.experiments: 在真实世界可变形物体序列上评估，DeformMaster在动力学预测和动态外观渲染上优于现有基线，并支持新动作滚动、材料参数变化和动态新视角合成。
limitations: 可能依赖特定类型视频数据，泛化到极端变形或未知材料需验证
神经残差补偿可能引入过拟合，需更多场景测试
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: DeformMaster从视频中学习可变形物体的物理-神经世界模型，支持交互式动力学预测与高保真渲染。

papers.title: FPGA-Based Hardware Architecture for Contrast Maximization in Event-Based Vision
papers.abstract: This paper presents a hardware architecture that implements the Contrast Maximization (CM) algorithm in Field-Programmable Gate Array (FPGA) resources for event-based vision systems. CM estimates motion parameters by maximizing the contrast of an Image of Warped Events (IWE) reconstructed from asynchronous event streams. Event-based vision sensors generate sparse data with high temporal resolution and low spatial redundancy, which makes them well suited for hardware processing. The deterministic, massively parallel structure of the FPGA is leveraged to design a deeply pipelined architecture capable of high-throughput, energy-efficient processing suitable for real-time embedded applications. This paper details the hardware modules responsible for event warping, contrast computation, and iterative optimization, discusses key implementation decisions, and presents the hardware-aware optimization method used in the design. Experimental results demonstrate a substantial speed and efficiency improvement over CPU- and GPU-based implementations, with motion parameter estimation executing over 200 times faster. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first hardware architecture enabling acceleration of CM algorithm computations. Its performance is evaluated in terms of processing speed, energy efficiency, and hardware resource utilization. The proposed design is validated using an event-based object tracking application. The results confirm that the architecture provides a solid foundation for real-time motion estimation in high-speed, low-power embedded systems.

analysis.tldr: 首个FPGA硬件架构实现事件相机对比度最大化算法，速度比CPU/GPU快200倍以上。
analysis.research_motivation: 事件相机产生稀疏、高时间分辨率的数据流，传统CPU/GPU处理对比度最大化算法速度慢、功耗高，难以满足实时嵌入式应用需求。
analysis.problem: 如何设计高效的硬件架构，在FPGA上加速事件相机运动参数估计中的对比度最大化算法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 利用FPGA的确定性、大规模并行结构，设计深度流水线架构，包含事件扭曲、对比度计算和迭代优化等硬件模块，并采用硬件感知优化方法。
contributions: 首次提出加速对比度最大化算法计算的FPGA硬件架构。
在运动参数估计上实现超过200倍的速度提升，并评估了处理速度、能效和资源利用率。
analysis.experiments: 在事件目标跟踪应用中验证，与CPU和GPU实现相比，速度提升超过200倍，并评估了能效和硬件资源利用率。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定的事件相机分辨率和场景。
硬件架构的通用性和可扩展性有待进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个FPGA硬件架构实现事件相机对比度最大化算法，速度比CPU/GPU快200倍以上。

papers.title: KAN Text to Vision? The Exploration of Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks for Multi-Scale Sequence-Based Pose Animation from Sign Language Notation
papers.abstract: Sign language production from symbolic notation offers a scalable route to accessible sign animation. We present KANMultiSign, a multi-scale sequence generator that translates HamNoSys notation into two-dimensional human pose sequences. Our framework makes two complementary contributions. First, we introduce a coarse-to-fine generation strategy with multi-scale supervision: the model is first guided by an intermediate body--hand--face scaffold to encourage global structural coherence, and then refines fine-grained hand articulation to improve finger-level detail. Second, we investigate integrating Kolmogorov--Arnold Network modules into a Transformer backbone, using learnable univariate function primitives to model the highly non-linear mapping from discrete phonological symbols to continuous body kinematics with a compact parameterization. Experiments on multiple public corpora spanning Polish, German, Greek, and French sign languages show consistent reductions in dynamic time warping based joint error compared with a strong notation-to-pose baseline, while using substantially fewer parameters. Controlled ablations further indicate that KAN-based variants substantially reduce parameter count while maintaining competitive performance when coupled with multi-scale supervision, rather than serving as the main driver of accuracy gains. These findings position multi-scale supervision as the key mechanism for improving notation-conditioned pose generation, with KAN offering a compact alternative for efficient modeling. Our code will be publicly available.

analysis.tldr: 提出KANMultiSign，用多尺度监督和KAN模块从符号标注生成手语姿态序列，发现多尺度监督是精度提升的关键。
analysis.research_motivation: 手语生成从符号标注到姿态的映射高度非线性，现有方法参数效率低且手指细节不足。
analysis.problem: 如何高效地从HamNoSys符号标注生成精细且结构连贯的二维人体姿态序列。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 多尺度监督是精度提升的主要机制，KAN模块主要贡献在于参数效率而非精度。
analysis.method: 粗到细生成策略：先预测身体-手-脸骨架，再细化手指关节；在Transformer中集成KAN模块建模非线性映射。
contributions: 提出粗到细的多尺度监督生成策略，提升全局结构和手指细节。
探索KAN模块在符号到姿态生成中的有效性，实现紧凑参数化。
analysis.experiments: 在波兰、德国、希腊、法语手语多个公开语料库上，相比强基线，DTW关节误差一致降低，且参数更少。
limitations: 仅验证二维姿态，未扩展到三维。
KAN模块对精度提升有限，主要贡献在参数效率。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出KANMultiSign，用多尺度监督和KAN模块从符号标注生成手语姿态序列，发现多尺度监督是精度提升的关键。

papers.title: Dual-Path Hyperprior Informed Deep Unfolding Network for Image Compressive Sensing
papers.abstract: Recent Deep Unfolding Networks (DUNs) have significantly advanced Compressive Sensing (CS) by integrating iterative optimization with deep networks. However, existing DUNs still suffer from two challenges: 1) Reliance on a single measurement stream, which limits effective information interaction across distinct measurement subsets. 2) Uniform processing of all image regions, which overlooks varying reconstruction difficulties induced by diverse textures. To address these limitations, a novel Dual-Path Hyperprior Informed Deep Unfolding Network (DPH-DUN) is proposed, which partitions measurements into double subsets to enable hyperprior-guided reconstruction via a dual-path architecture. In the Deep Hyperprior Learning branch, a series of lightweight neural modules are designed to efficiently generate hyperprior knowledge of different domains, enabling collaborative guidance for the CS reconstruction. In the Hyperprior Informed Reconstruction branch, a deep unfolding framework with hyperprior guidance is constructed to iteratively refine reconstruction. Specifically, i) in the gradient descent step, a Hyperprior Informed Step Size Generation network is designed to dynamically generate spatially varying step maps, enabling adaptive fine-grained gradient updates. ii) In the proximal mapping step, two well-designed hyperprior informed attention mechanisms are introduced to dynamically focus on challenging regions via gradient-based hard and soft attentions, facilitating CS reconstruction accuracy. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed DPH-DUN outperforms existing CS methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出双路径超先验引导深度展开网络，通过分割测量子集和自适应步长/注意力机制提升图像压缩感知重建质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有深度展开网络（DUNs）在图像压缩感知中依赖单一测量流，限制了不同测量子集间的信息交互，且对所有图像区域统一处理，忽略了纹理差异导致的重建难度变化。
analysis.problem: 解决现有DUNs中单一测量流信息交互不足和区域重建难度差异被忽视的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
