在 ScanQA 和组合空间推理基准 Compose3D 上展示竞争性能，并揭示推理时空间操作合成的重要性。
analysis.experiments: 在 ScanQA 上展示与微调 3D-LMM 方法竞争的性能，并在自建组合空间推理基准 Compose3D 上评估多跳 3D 推理能力。
limitations: 依赖现成 MLLM 的能力，可能受限于基础模型。
组合空间推理基准 Compose3D 为自建，可能缺乏广泛验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Flame3D 通过可编辑的视觉-文本 3D 记忆和组合空间工具，无需训练即可实现零样本 3D 场景组合推理。

papers.title: RigidFormer: Learning Rigid Dynamics using Transformers
papers.abstract: Learning-based simulation of multi-object rigid-body dynamics remains difficult because contact is discontinuous and errors compound over long horizons. Most existing methods remain tied to mesh connectivity and vertex-level message passing, which limits their applicability to mesh-free inputs such as point clouds and leads to high computational cost. Efficiently modeling high-fidelity rigid-body dynamics from mesh-free representations, therefore, remains challenging. We introduce RigidFormer, an object-centric Transformer-based model that learns mesh-free rigid-body dynamics with controllable integration step sizes. RigidFormer reasons at the object level and advances each object through compact anchors; Anchor-Vertex Pooling enriches these anchors with local vertex features, retaining contact-relevant geometry without dense vertex-level interaction. We propose Anchor-based RoPE to inject anchor geometry into attention while respecting the unordered nature of objects and anchors: object-token processing is permutation-equivariant, and the mean-pooled anchor descriptor is invariant to anchor reindexing while preserving shape extent. RigidFormer further enforces rigidity by projecting updates onto the rigid-body manifold using differentiable Kabsch alignment. On standard benchmarks, RigidFormer outperforms or matches mesh-based baselines using point inputs, runs faster, generalizes to unseen point resolutions and across datasets, and scales to 200+ objects; we also show a preliminary extension to command-conditioned articulated bodies by treating body parts as interacting object-level components.

analysis.tldr: RigidFormer 是一种基于 Transformer 的物体级刚体动力学模型，支持无网格输入和可控积分步长。
analysis.research_motivation: 基于学习的多物体刚体动力学仿真因接触不连续和长期误差累积而困难，现有方法依赖网格连通性和顶点级消息传递，限制了无网格输入（如点云）的适用性且计算成本高。
analysis.problem: 如何从无网格表示高效建模高保真刚体动力学。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 RigidFormer，采用物体级 Transformer，通过 Anchor-Vertex Pooling 丰富锚点特征，Anchor-based RoPE 注入几何信息并保持置换等变性，利用可微 Kabsch 对齐将更新投影到刚体流形以强制执行刚性约束。
contributions: 提出 RigidFormer，首个基于 Transformer 的物体级无网格刚体动力学模型，支持可控积分步长。
设计 Anchor-Vertex Pooling 和 Anchor-based RoPE，实现高效几何特征提取与置换等变注意力。
通过可微 Kabsch 对齐强制执行刚性约束，提升物理一致性。
analysis.experiments: 在标准基准上，RigidFormer 使用点输入优于或匹配基于网格的基线，运行更快，泛化到未见点分辨率和跨数据集，并扩展到 200+ 物体；还展示了命令条件化铰接体的初步扩展。
limitations: 可能对复杂铰接体或非刚性变形场景的适用性有限。
长期仿真中的误差累积可能仍需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: RigidFormer 是一种基于 Transformer 的物体级刚体动力学模型，支持无网格输入和可控积分步长。

papers.title: AQMP: Image compression through Adaptive Quadtree Refinement and Matching Pursuit with Hyperparameter Optimization
papers.abstract: We present AQMP, a novel image codec combining Adaptive Quadtree Refinement with Matching Pursuit. Unlike conventional Matching Pursuit methods that operate on fixed-size sub-images, AQMP dynamically adapts block sizes to local image structure, allocating finer partitions where the image is complex and coarser ones where it is smooth. This adaptivity yields superior compression ratios compared to fixed-size block Matching Pursuit at equivalent image quality, while offering significant parallelization opportunities at both the tree-leaf level and during compression of individual nodes. The algorithm is governed by user-specified accuracy and sparsity parameters alongside a small set of additional hyperparameters. To navigate the trade-off between compression efficiency and visual quality, we perform multi-objective hyperparameter optimization using the Tree-Structured Parzen Estimator, producing comprehensive Pareto fronts. Experimental results show that AQMP achieves up to $4\times$ higher compression rates than JPEG at comparable SSIM values, while maintaining competitive quality across a broad range of compression regimes. Performance evaluation is provided using a representative set of test images. To ensure reproducibility and promote adoption, we have made our implementation publicly available on GitHub under the MIT license.

analysis.tldr: 提出自适应四叉树细化与匹配追踪的图像压缩方法，结合超参数优化，相比JPEG实现高达4倍压缩率提升。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统匹配追踪方法使用固定大小子图像块，无法适应图像局部结构差异，导致压缩效率受限。
analysis.problem: 如何设计自适应块大小的图像压缩算法，在保持视觉质量的同时提升压缩比。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 结合自适应四叉树细化与匹配追踪，动态调整块大小以适应图像复杂度，并使用树结构Parzen估计器进行多目标超参数优化。
contributions: 提出AQMP图像编解码器，通过自适应四叉树细化提升压缩比。
采用多目标超参数优化生成Pareto前沿，平衡压缩效率与视觉质量。
开源实现（MIT许可）以促进可重复性和采用。
analysis.experiments: 在代表性测试图像上评估，与JPEG相比在相似SSIM下压缩率提升高达4倍。
limitations: 可能未与最新学习型编解码器（如基于CNN的）比较。
超参数优化计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出自适应四叉树细化与匹配追踪的图像压缩方法，结合超参数优化，相比JPEG实现高达4倍压缩率提升。

papers.title: Establishing Robust Retinal Eye Tracking: A Weakly Supervised Algorithmic Framework
papers.abstract: Retinal image-based eye tracking is widely used in ophthalmic imaging and vision science, and is a promising path to deliver higher gaze accuracy than the pupil- and cornea-based approaches commonly used in modern AR/VR devices. Nevertheless, existing retinal tracking algorithms still primarily rely on classical template-matching registration, which can be insufficiently robust to retinal feature variability and real-world imaging conditions. In this work, we propose a novel weakly-supervised, learning-based framework for robust retinal eye tracking. Initial studies demonstrate high accuracy, achieving the 95th-percentile gaze error < 0.45 deg across a cohort of 6 participants.

analysis.tldr: 提出弱监督学习框架实现鲁棒视网膜眼动追踪，精度优于传统模板匹配。
analysis.research_motivation: 视网膜眼动追踪在眼科成像和AR/VR中具有高精度潜力，但现有模板匹配方法对特征变化和真实成像条件鲁棒性不足。
analysis.problem: 解决传统视网膜追踪算法在视网膜特征变异和真实成像条件下鲁棒性差的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出弱监督学习框架，利用弱标注数据训练模型进行鲁棒视网膜眼动追踪。
contributions: 首次将弱监督学习应用于视网膜眼动追踪任务
在6名参与者上实现95百分位注视误差<0.45度的高精度
analysis.experiments: 在6名参与者上进行初步研究，报告95百分位注视误差<0.45度。
limitations: 参与者数量较少（仅6人），泛化性待验证
未与多种基线方法对比
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出弱监督学习框架实现鲁棒视网膜眼动追踪，精度优于传统模板匹配。

papers.title: MultiMedVision: Multi-Modal Medical Vision Framework
papers.abstract: Multi-modal medical imaging enables comprehensive diagnostics, yet current foundation models process 2D (e.g. X-ray) and 3D (e.g. CT) data with separate, dimensionality-specific architectures. We present MultiMedVision, a unified framework for joint 2D/3D representation learning built on a Sparse Vision Transformer. Our model uses 3D Rotary Positional Embeddings and variable-length sequence packing to process mixed-modality batches natively within a shared latent space, without modality-specific adapters or treating 3D volumes as 2D slice sequences. Trained with a self-supervised objective on chest X-rays (MIMIC-CXR) and CT scans (CT-RATE), and using a single shared encoder with 5x less data, MultiMedVision achieves competitive performance on both 2D benchmarks (Macro AUROC 0.82 on MIMIC, 0.84 on CheXpert) and 3D tasks (0.85 on CT-RATE). Analysis of the learned representations reveals coexisting modality-specific and shared feature subspaces, demonstrating that unified cross-dimensional representation learning is feasible without sacrificing modality-specific performance.

analysis.tldr: 提出统一2D/3D医学影像的稀疏视觉Transformer框架，无需模态专用适配器，在减少5倍数据下达到竞争性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有医学影像基础模型对2D和3D数据使用分离的架构，无法共享表示，导致效率低下且难以跨模态泛化。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个统一的框架，能够同时处理2D和3D医学影像，并在共享潜在空间中学习跨维度的表示。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于稀疏视觉Transformer，使用3D旋转位置编码和可变长度序列打包，在共享编码器中原生处理混合模态批次，无需模态专用适配器。
contributions: 提出MultiMedVision，首个统一2D/3D医学影像的稀疏ViT框架。
引入3D旋转位置编码和可变长度序列打包，实现混合模态批次的原生处理。
在2D和3D基准上以5倍更少数据达到竞争性能，并揭示模态特定与共享特征子空间共存。
analysis.experiments: 在MIMIC-CXR、CheXpert和CT-RATE上评估，2D任务Macro AUROC 0.82/0.84，3D任务0.85。
limitations: 仅验证了胸部X光和CT，其他模态（如MRI）未测试。
自监督训练可能未充分利用所有可用数据。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出统一2D/3D医学影像的稀疏视觉Transformer框架，无需模态专用适配器，在减少5倍数据下达到竞争性能。

papers.title: Beyond Thinking: Imagining in 360$^\circ$ for Humanoid Visual Search
papers.abstract: Humanoid Visual Search (HVS) requires agents to actively explore immersive 360$^\circ$ environments. While prior methods treat this as a monolithic task relying on cumulative, multi-turn Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning, they impose heavy cognitive burdens and require expensive trajectory-level annotations. In this paper, we propose Imagining in 360$^\circ$, a novel framework that decouples the exploration process into a specialized Imaginator and an Actor. The Imaginator functions as a probabilistic predictor of spatial priors; instead of maintaining a cumulative reasoning chain, it infers the semantic layout of both observed and unobserved regions in a single step. By sampling multiple hypotheses within this semantic space, we provide the Actor with a distribution of effective spatial information, offering robust guidance that hedges against uncertainty during active search. This decoupled architecture significantly lowers data engineering costs by eliminating the need for full-trajectory CoT annotations, enabling the generation of over 1.96 million curated training samples. Extensive experiments demonstrate that explicitly modeling semantic spatial priors drastically improves search efficiency and success rates in complex, in-the-wild environments.

analysis.tldr: 将360°人形视觉搜索解耦为空间先验预测与动作执行，大幅提升效率并降低标注成本。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法将人形视觉搜索视为单一任务，依赖累积的多轮思维链推理，导致认知负担重且需要昂贵的轨迹级标注，限制了实际应用。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖完整轨迹思维链标注的情况下，高效引导智能体在360°沉浸式环境中主动搜索目标。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Imagining in 360°框架，将探索过程解耦为Imaginator（单步预测观测与未观测区域的语义布局，生成多个假设）和Actor（基于空间先验分布进行鲁棒动作决策）。
contributions: 提出解耦式人形视觉搜索框架，将空间先验预测与动作执行分离，降低认知负担。
通过单步语义布局预测和多重假设采样，无需完整轨迹思维链标注，生成超过196万训练样本。
analysis.experiments: 在复杂真实环境中进行大量实验，表明显式建模语义空间先验显著提升搜索效率和成功率。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量语义布局预测器，在极端未知场景下先验准确性受限。
框架在动态环境中的适应性尚未明确讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将360°人形视觉搜索解耦为空间先验预测与动作执行，大幅提升效率并降低标注成本。

papers.title: KEPIL: Knowledge-Enhanced Prompt-Image Learning for Prompt-Robust Disease Detection
papers.abstract: Vision--language models (VLMs) show promise for clinical decision support in radiology because they enable joint reasoning over radiological images and clinical text, thereby leveraging complementary clinical information. However, radiological findings are long-tailed in practice, leaving some conditions underrepresented and making zero-shot inference essential. Yet current CLIP-style medical VLMs are sensitive to prompt variations and often lack trustworthy external knowledge at inference time, which hinders reliable clinical deployment. We present \textit{KEPIL}, a prompt-robust framework that integrates curated medical knowledge to stabilize zero-shot generalization. KEPIL comprises: (i) \emph{dynamic prompt enrichment} using ontologies with LLM assistance, (ii) a \emph{semantic-aware contrastive loss} aligning embeddings of equivalent prompt variants via a dual-embedding objective, and (iii) \emph{entity-centric report standardization} to yield ontology-aligned representations. Across seven benchmarks, KEPIL achieves state-of-the-art zero-shot inference performance; under prompt-variation tests, it improves AUC by \(6.37\%\) on \textit{CheXpert} and by \(4.11\%\) on average. These results suggest that structured knowledge and robust prompt design are key to clinically reliable radiology-facing VLMs. Code will be released at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: KEPIL通过知识增强和对比学习提升医学VLM对提示变化的鲁棒性，在零样本疾病检测中达到SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 放射学中的长尾分布使零样本推理至关重要，但现有CLIP式医学VLM对提示变化敏感且缺乏外部知识，阻碍临床部署。
analysis.problem: 如何提升医学VLM在零样本疾病检测中对提示变化的鲁棒性并融入结构化知识。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出CLIP式医学VLM对提示变化敏感，且缺乏可信的外部知识，导致零样本泛化不稳定。
analysis.method: KEPIL框架包括：(i) 利用本体和LLM进行动态提示丰富，(ii) 通过双嵌入目标使用语义感知对比损失对齐等价提示变体的嵌入，(iii) 实体中心报告标准化以生成本体对齐表示。
contributions: 提出KEPIL框架，结合动态提示丰富、语义感知对比损失和实体中心报告标准化，提升零样本鲁棒性。
在七个基准上实现零样本SOTA，在CheXpert上AUC提升6.37%，平均提升4.11%。
analysis.experiments: 在七个基准上进行零样本推理和提示变化测试，CheXpert上AUC提升6.37%，平均提升4.11%。
limitations: 依赖外部本体和LLM辅助，可能引入额外计算开销。
仅在放射学领域验证，泛化到其他医学模态需进一步研究。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: KEPIL通过知识增强和对比学习提升医学VLM对提示变化的鲁棒性，在零样本疾病检测中达到SOTA。

papers.title: Investigating Anisotropy in Visual Grounding under Controlled Counterfactual Perturbations
papers.abstract: Visual Grounding benchmarks assume that the object described by a referring expression is always present in the image, and grounding models are therefore rarely evaluated under semantically mismatched captions. In such cases, models frequently exhibit approximation behavior, producing a plausible bounding box that satisfies only part of the expression (\eg, preserving the original object while ignoring modified contextual cues). Because mismatched captions represent realistic edge cases, this behavior compromises reliability and raises concerns from an explainability perspective. Identifying its underlying causes is thus essential for improving model faithfulness and interpretability. Adopting a mechanistic interpretability viewpoint, this work examines whether embedding anisotropy contributes to counterfactual failures. A similarity-controlled counterfactual caption generation protocol is introduced to systematically perturb object or contextual components within predefined embedding similarity intervals, enabling a fine-grained analysis of grounding behavior as a function of alignment. Experiments on two Transformer-based models with markedly different embedding geometries (BERT-based TransVG and CLIP-based SwimVG) reveal no meaningful correlation between cosine similarity and approximation. These findings suggest that anisotropy alone does not account for counterfactual errors, and that robustness requires investigating finer-grained geometric properties of the embedding space.

analysis.tldr: 视觉定位模型在语义不匹配描述下常出现近似行为，但嵌入各向异性并非主要原因。
analysis.research_motivation: 视觉定位模型在真实场景中常遇到语义不匹配的描述，但现有基准很少评估这种情况，导致模型可靠性存疑。理解其失败原因对提升模型忠实性和可解释性至关重要。
analysis.problem: 探究嵌入各向异性是否导致视觉定位模型在反事实扰动下产生近似行为。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型在语义不匹配描述下常产生近似边界框，仅满足部分描述（如保留原物体而忽略修改的上下文线索），且嵌入各向异性与近似行为无显著相关性。
analysis.method: 提出一种相似度控制的反事实描述生成协议，在预定义嵌入相似度区间内系统扰动物体或上下文组件，分析定位行为与对齐度的关系。
contributions: 揭示了视觉定位模型在反事实描述下的近似行为模式
通过实验证明嵌入各向异性并非导致反事实错误的主要原因
analysis.experiments: 在两种不同嵌入几何的Transformer模型（BERT-based TransVG和CLIP-based SwimVG）上进行实验，发现余弦相似度与近似行为无有意义的相关性。
limitations: 仅研究了两种特定模型，泛化性有限
未深入探索其他可能的几何属性
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 视觉定位模型在语义不匹配描述下常出现近似行为，但嵌入各向异性并非主要原因。

papers.title: Field-Localized Forgery Detection for Digital Identity Documents
papers.abstract: Digital identity verification systems used in remote onboarding rely on document images to authenticate users, making them vulnerable to localized manipulations of key identity fields such as facial photographs and textual information. Existing forgery detection methods, developed primarily for natural-image forensics, show limited transferability to structured identity documents. We propose FLiD, a lightweight field-localized framework that targets critical identity regions rather than processing full-document images. A fine-tuned object detector first localizes face and text fields; a frozen MobileNetV3-Small backbone then extracts compact field-level embeddings, which are classified by lightweight neural network with only 191K trainable parameters. FLiD achieves AUC scores of 0.880 (face), 0.954 (text), and 0.923 (both-field attacks), with corresponding EERs of 18.05%, 11.61%, and 15.16%, representing absolute reductions of 29-35 percentage points over a full-document baseline trained from scratch. FLiD also consistently outperforms general-purpose manipulation detectors (TruFor, MMFusion, UniVAD) across all attack scenarios while requiring 13x fewer parameters and 21x fewer FLOPs

analysis.tldr: 提出轻量级字段定位伪造检测框架FLiD，针对身份证件关键字段实现高效高精度检测。
analysis.research_motivation: 远程身份验证系统依赖证件图像，但关键字段（如人脸、文本）易被局部篡改，现有自然图像伪造检测方法在结构化证件上迁移性差。
analysis.problem: 如何针对数字身份证件中的局部字段伪造进行高效、准确的检测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: FLiD框架：先使用微调目标检测器定位人脸和文本字段，再用冻结的MobileNetV3-Small提取紧凑字段级嵌入，最后用仅191K可训练参数的轻量神经网络分类。
contributions: 提出字段局部化伪造检测框架FLiD，仅处理关键身份区域而非全图。
在多个攻击场景下显著优于全图基线（AUC提升29-35个百分点）和通用检测器（TruFor等），且参数量减少13倍、FLOPs减少21倍。
analysis.experiments: 在数字身份证件数据集上评估，FLiD在人脸、文本及双字段攻击场景下AUC分别为0.880、0.954、0.923，EER分别为18.05%、11.61%、15.16%。
limitations: 依赖目标检测器的定位精度，可能影响后续分类。
仅针对身份证件，泛化到其他文档类型需验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出轻量级字段定位伪造检测框架FLiD，针对身份证件关键字段实现高效高精度检测。

papers.title: Probability-Flow Distillation: Exact Wasserstein Gradient Flow for High-Fidelity 3D Generation
papers.abstract: Score Distillation Sampling (SDS) and its variants have been widely used for text-to-3D generation by distilling 2D image diffusion priors. However, the standard SDS objective is prone to severe mode collapse, frequently yielding over-smoothed and over-saturated results. Although recent advancements, such as Score Distillation via Inversion (SDI), mitigate these artifacts and produce visually sharper models, they ultimately fail to faithfully capture the full target distribution. In this work, we show that the bottleneck limiting the sampling capacity of SDI stems from its reliance on the posterior mean estimator, which is mathematically equivalent to a single-step Euler approximation of the deterministic reverse DDIM trajectory. To address this, we propose a naturally motivated extension termed Probability-Flow Distillation (PFD). We establish that PFD corresponds exactly to a Wasserstein gradient flow, thereby inducing principled distribution-matching dynamics. Finally, we show that PFD can synthesize 3D assets with fine-grained, high-fidelity details and achieve improved quality compared to existing methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出概率流蒸馏（PFD），通过精确的Wasserstein梯度流实现高保真3D生成，克服了SDS的模式崩溃和SDI的分布不匹配问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有文本到3D生成方法如SDS易产生过平滑和过饱和结果，而SDI虽能生成更锐利的模型但无法忠实捕获完整目标分布，需要一种能实现精确分布匹配的蒸馏方法。
analysis.problem: 解决Score Distillation Sampling（SDS）及其变体在文本到3D生成中存在的模式崩溃和分布不匹配问题，实现高保真3D资产生成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: SDS目标函数易导致模式崩溃，产生过平滑和过饱和结果；SDI虽缓解了这些伪影，但依赖于后验均值估计器，等价于确定性反向DDIM轨迹的单步欧拉近似，限制了采样能力，无法忠实捕获完整目标分布。
analysis.method: 提出概率流蒸馏（PFD），将其建立为精确的Wasserstein梯度流，从而引入有原则的分布匹配动力学。
contributions: 揭示了SDI的瓶颈在于其后验均值估计器等价于单步欧拉近似，限制了分布匹配能力。
提出了概率流蒸馏（PFD），理论上证明其对应于精确的Wasserstein梯度流，实现了有原则的分布匹配。
实验表明PFD能合成具有细粒度、高保真细节的3D资产，质量优于现有方法。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能计算成本较高，需要进一步优化效率。
可能对初始分布或超参数敏感，需要更多调参分析。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出概率流蒸馏（PFD），通过精确的Wasserstein梯度流实现高保真3D生成，克服了SDS的模式崩溃和SDI的分布不匹配问题。

papers.title: Reducing Annotation Burden for Femoral Cartilage Segmentation in Knee MRI via Cross-Sequence Transfer Learning
papers.abstract: Purpose: To develop and evaluate cross-sequence transfer learning for automatic femoral cartilage segmentation, testing bidirectional transfer between dual-echo steady-state (DESS) and sagittal proton density-weighted 3D fast spin-echo (Cube) sequences. Materials and Methods: We optimized a modified 2D U-Net on 507 DESS images from the Osteoarthritis Initiative (OAI). We then established same-sequence baselines using subject-level cross-validation on a subset of 44 OAI DESS images and 44 Cube images acquired at the Istituto Ortopedico Rizzoli, Bologna, Italy. Each subset included 22 non-lesioned and 22 lesioned subjects. Finally, we performed transfer learning across sequences by fine-tuning the pretrained models on the target sequence with increasing training set sizes to study convergence, while keeping validation and test sets fixed. Segmentations were evaluated using Dice similarity coefficient (DSC) and average surface distance (ASD). Lesion effects were assessed with two-sided Mann-Whitney U tests with Bonferroni correction. Results: Same-sequence training yielded higher accuracy on DESS than Cube (DSC, $0.900$ vs $0.830$; $P < .001$). Cube-to-DESS transfer matched DESS performance (DSC, $0.903 \pm 0.032$ vs $0.900 \pm 0.027$), reaching a performance plateau at 9 training subjects. DESS-to-Cube yielded a lower combined DSC ($0.802 \pm 0.049$ vs $0.830 \pm 0.042$), reaching a plateau at 24 training subjects. Lesions did not affect DESS ($P \ge .39$) but reduced Cube accuracy (DSC, $0.805$ vs $0.856$; $P < .001$). Conclusion: Transfer learning across sequences can substantially reduce target-sequence annotation requirements for femoral cartilage segmentation, but performance is direction- and sequence-dependent, and the effects of lesions on segmentation may vary across MRI sequences.

analysis.tldr: 跨序列迁移学习可大幅减少膝关节MRI股骨软骨分割的标注需求，但效果依赖于迁移方向和序列类型。
analysis.research_motivation: 膝关节MRI中股骨软骨分割需要大量标注数据，不同MRI序列（如DESS和Cube）的标注成本高昂，且现有方法通常针对单一序列，缺乏跨序列泛化能力。
analysis.problem: 如何利用已有序列（DESS）的标注数据，通过迁移学习减少目标序列（Cube）的标注需求，同时保持分割精度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：同序列训练中DESS精度高于Cube；Cube→DESS迁移可匹配DESS性能，而DESS→Cube迁移性能低于Cube基线；病变对DESS分割无显著影响，但降低Cube精度。
analysis.method: 使用改进的2D U-Net在507张DESS图像上预训练，然后在目标序列上微调，逐步增加训练集大小以研究收敛性。
contributions: 提出并评估了跨序列迁移学习用于股骨软骨分割，验证了双向迁移的可行性。
揭示了迁移效果的方向依赖性和序列依赖性，以及病变对不同序列分割的影响差异。
analysis.experiments: 在OAI DESS和Rizzoli Cube数据集上进行了同序列基线实验和跨序列迁移实验，使用DSC和ASD评估，并进行了病变影响的统计检验。
limitations: 仅测试了DESS和Cube两种序列，泛化到其他序列需进一步验证。
迁移学习效果受序列相似性影响，未探讨序列差异较大的情况。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 跨序列迁移学习可大幅减少膝关节MRI股骨软骨分割的标注需求，但效果依赖于迁移方向和序列类型。

papers.title: Dependency-Aware Discrete Diffusion for Scene Graph Generation
papers.abstract: Scene graphs (SGs) represent objects and their relationships as structured graphs, enabling applications in image generation, robotics, and 3D understanding. Recent work suggests that conditioning image generation on scene graphs improves compositional fidelity compared to text-only prompting. However, since users typically provide text rather than structured graphs, a key challenge is to generate scene graphs from natural language. Prior work on discrete diffusion has demonstrated success in generating generic graphs such as molecules and circuits, but fails to account for the hierarchical structure and strong dependencies between objects, edges, and relations in scene graphs. We address this limitation by introducing a dependency-aware, hierarchically constrained discrete diffusion model for scene graph generation. Our approach decouples structure and semantics across the forward and reverse processes, enabling the model to capture conditional dependencies. At inference time, we perform training-free conditioning to sample text-aligned scene graphs. We evaluate our method on standard SG benchmarks and demonstrate improvements over both continuous and discrete graph generation baselines across graph and layout metrics. When fed to downstream image generation, our approach yields improved compositional alignment compared to text-to-image models, particularly in multi-object scenarios.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种依赖感知的层次化离散扩散模型，用于从自然语言生成场景图，提升多目标图像生成的组合对齐性。
analysis.research_motivation: 场景图在图像生成、机器人等领域有重要应用，但用户通常提供文本而非结构化图，因此需要从自然语言生成场景图。现有离散扩散模型在生成通用图（如分子）上成功，但未能处理场景图中对象、边和关系之间的层次结构与强依赖关系。
analysis.problem: 如何从自然语言生成符合场景图层次结构和依赖关系的结构化图。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，先前的离散扩散模型在生成通用图时忽略了场景图中对象、边和关系之间的层次结构与强依赖关系，导致生成质量不佳。
analysis.method: 提出依赖感知的层次化约束离散扩散模型，在正向和反向过程中解耦结构与语义，以捕获条件依赖；推理时通过无训练条件采样生成与文本对齐的场景图。
contributions: 提出一种依赖感知的层次化约束离散扩散模型，专门用于场景图生成。
在标准场景图基准上，该方法在图和布局指标上均优于连续和离散图生成基线。
在下游图像生成中，该方法在多目标场景下比文本到图像模型具有更好的组合对齐性。
analysis.experiments: 在标准场景图基准上评估，并与连续和离散图生成基线比较，同时在下游图像生成任务中验证组合对齐性。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖特定场景图数据集，泛化性有待验证。
无训练条件采样可能在某些复杂文本描述下效果有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种依赖感知的层次化离散扩散模型，用于从自然语言生成场景图，提升多目标图像生成的组合对齐性。

papers.title: LCGNav: Local Candidate-Aware Geometric Enhancement for General Topological Planning in Vision-Language Navigation
papers.abstract: Online topological planning has become an effective paradigm for Vision-Language Navigation in Continuous Environments (VLN-CE), but existing methods still suffer from two limitations: redundant local depth information and weakened focus on current frontier candidates as the topological graph grows. To address this, we propose LCGNav, a modular local geometric enhancement framework for topological VLN. LCGNav explicitly converts candidate depth views into 3D point clouds and applies physical truncation based on the agent's reachable range, enabling more compact local geometric modeling. It further introduces a dimension-preserving local fusion strategy with transient state degradation, so that geometric enhancement is applied only to the currently relevant ghost nodes without changing the original planner interface. Experiments on R2R-CE and RxR-CE show that LCGNav serves as an effective cross-architecture enhancement module, consistently improving multiple key metrics of representative online topological baselines with low additional training cost. When integrated with ETP-R1, LCGNav achieves the best performance among the compared online topological methods on the val-unseen splits of the R2R-CE and RxR-CE benchmarks. The code is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: LCGNav通过局部几何增强和候选点感知机制，提升了连续环境下视觉语言导航的拓扑规划性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有在线拓扑规划方法在VLN-CE中存在局部深度信息冗余和拓扑图增长导致当前候选点关注减弱的问题，限制了导航性能。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个模块化的局部几何增强框架，以紧凑建模局部几何并保持对当前候选点的关注，同时兼容现有拓扑规划器。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出现有方法存在两个现象：1) 局部深度信息冗余；2) 随着拓扑图增长，对当前前沿候选点的关注减弱。
analysis.method: 提出LCGNav框架，将候选深度视图显式转换为3D点云，基于智能体可达范围进行物理截断，实现紧凑局部几何建模；并引入维度保持的局部融合策略与瞬态状态退化，仅对当前相关幽灵节点施加几何增强，不改变原始规划器接口。
contributions: 提出模块化局部几何增强框架LCGNav，可即插即用于多种在线拓扑基线。
通过3D点云转换和物理截断实现紧凑局部几何建模，减少冗余信息。
引入维度保持局部融合与瞬态状态退化，增强当前候选点关注且不干扰原始规划器。
在R2R-CE和RxR-CE基准上验证了跨架构有效性，与ETP-R1集成达到最优性能。
analysis.experiments: 在R2R-CE和RxR-CE基准的val-unseen分割上进行了实验，LCGNav作为增强模块一致提升了多个关键指标，与ETP-R1集成达到在线拓扑方法中的最佳性能。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能仅在连续环境VLN任务上验证，泛化到其他导航任务需进一步测试。
瞬态状态退化策略可能对长距离导航的稳定性有影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LCGNav通过局部几何增强和候选点感知机制，提升了连续环境下视觉语言导航的拓扑规划性能。

papers.title: SeasonScapes: Learning Large-scale Re-lightable 3D Landscapes with Seasonal Variation from Sparse Webcams
papers.abstract: We introduce SeasonScapes framework and a the SeasonScapes dataset: Swiss Sparse-view Mountain Scenes with Seasonal Changes that covers over 50 km x 60 km, composed of more than 85,000 webcam images captured from 32 different locations across 13 timestamps throughout a full year. By projecting these timestamp-specific images onto a 3D mesh, we construct seasonal 3D landscapes that reflect natural appearance changes over time. To address occlusions and missing data, we leverage conditional diffusion models for image-guided inpainting directly on the mesh. The resulting completed meshes can be further relighted using standard physically-based renderer.

analysis.tldr: 从稀疏网络摄像头图像构建大规模、可重光照的季节性3D景观。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有3D场景重建方法难以处理大规模、长时间跨度的自然景观，且缺乏季节性变化和重光照能力。
analysis.problem: 如何从稀疏、多视角的网络摄像头图像中重建大规模、可重光照的3D景观，并捕捉其季节性外观变化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出SeasonScapes框架，将时间戳特定的图像投影到3D网格上，利用条件扩散模型进行图像引导的网格内补全，并使用基于物理的渲染器实现重光照。
contributions: 提出SeasonScapes框架，从稀疏网络摄像头图像重建大规模可重光照的3D景观。
构建SeasonScapes数据集，包含超过85,000张覆盖50km×60km区域的网络摄像头图像，具有季节性变化。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 依赖网络摄像头图像的质量和覆盖密度。
可能无法处理极端天气或光照条件。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 从稀疏网络摄像头图像构建大规模、可重光照的季节性3D景观。

papers.title: When Style Similarity Scores Fail: Diagnosing Raw CSD Cosine in Artist-Style Evaluation
papers.abstract: Raw cosine in the 768-dimensional output space of the Contrastive Style Descriptor (CSD) is now widely read as an absolute, calibrated style-fidelity score for text-to-image and style-imitation evaluation. We introduce the discrimination gap, a corpus-internal, prototype-free and threshold-free diagnostic that tests whether contrastive style cosines admit an absolute same-versus-different interpretation on a candidate artist corpus. On a 1799-artwork, 91-artist public-domain corpus, raw CSD cosine yields negative point-estimate gaps for $23/91$ artists at the pairwise level ($2/91$ robust under bootstrap) and for $15/91$ in the aggregated-pool scoring regime style-fidelity evaluations typically use. CSLS readout on the frozen backbone reduces the aggregated negative-gap count to $4/91$; combined with positional-embedding interpolation to $336$ pixels it raises unsupervised pair-verification AUC from $0.883$ to $0.905$ across $25$ artist-disjoint splits. We refer to this diagnostic-driven readout protocol on the frozen backbone (CSLS as default, pos-interp $336$ as the stronger optional setting) as CSD+, not a new encoder.A cross-backbone check on CLIP-ViT-L/14, SigLIP-large and DINOv2-Large reproduces the same shared-tradition failure pattern, providing evidence that the residual reflects a shared limitation of the four backbones we tested rather than a CSD-specific artefact. Practical implication: before reporting CSD cosine as an absolute style-fidelity score, run the diagnostic on the candidate corpus; CSLS is the minimal correction when it fails.

analysis.tldr: CSD余弦相似度在艺术家风格评估中不可靠，提出诊断方法CSD+并验证其有效性。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前广泛使用CSD余弦作为绝对风格保真度评分，但缺乏对其可靠性的系统诊断，可能导致评估偏差。
analysis.problem: CSD余弦在艺术家风格评估中是否具有绝对的同-异解释能力，以及如何检测和修正其失败情况。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在91位艺术家的1799件作品上，原始CSD余弦在23/91的艺术家对中产生负点估计差距，表明其无法可靠区分相同与不同风格。
analysis.method: 提出诊断指标“判别差距”，并基于CSLS和位置嵌入插值构建改进协议CSD+。
contributions: 引入判别差距作为无原型、无阈值的诊断工具，用于检测对比风格余弦的绝对解释能力。
提出CSD+协议，通过CSLS和位置嵌入插值显著提升风格评估的可靠性。
analysis.experiments: 在1799件作品、91位艺术家的公开数据集上验证，CSD+将无监督配对验证AUC从0.883提升至0.905，并在多个骨干网络上复现失败模式。
limitations: CSD+仅在冻结骨干网络上有效，未探索微调或新编码器。
诊断依赖候选语料库，可能不适用于单一样本评估。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: CSD余弦相似度在艺术家风格评估中不可靠，提出诊断方法CSD+并验证其有效性。

papers.title: MedFL-Stress: A Systematic Robustness Evaluation of Federated Brain Tumor Segmentation under Cross-Hospital MRI Appearance Shift
papers.abstract: Federated learning enables hospitals to collaboratively train segmentation models without sharing patient data. However, current evaluation protocols report only average performance across clients, masking failures at individual sites. In clinical deployment, a model that fails consistently at one hospital is a real safety risk that a good mean score can hide entirely. We introduce MedFL-Stress, a controlled stress-testing framework that exposes exactly this failure mode. Using 2D axial slices from BraTS 2020 distributed across four simulated hospital clients, we apply graded MRI appearance shifts (gamma contrast, scale-shift, and noise-plus-blur) reflecting scanner and acquisition variability in real multi-site deployments. Three federated baselines are evaluated: FedAvg, FedProx, and FedBN. Worst-hospital Dice and inter-hospital disparity are treated as primary metrics, not supplementary observations. FedAvg achieves the highest global mean Dice (0.8159) but conceals a 0.0850 gap between its best and worst-performing hospital. FedBN closes that gap by 41% (0.0850 to 0.0503) while sacrificing less than half a Dice point in mean accuracy (0.8159 to 0.8109), and the weakest hospital gains 3.5 Dice points outright (0.7309 to 0.7656). These findings demonstrate that robustness-oriented evaluation protocols are essential for reliable federated medical imaging deployment.

analysis.tldr: 提出MedFL-Stress压力测试框架，揭示联邦学习脑肿瘤分割模型在跨医院MRI外观偏移下的单点失败风险，并证明FedBN在牺牲极少平均精度下显著缩小医院间性能差距。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有联邦学习评估仅报告客户端平均性能，掩盖了单个医院模型完全失效的安全风险，临床部署需要暴露这种失败模式的鲁棒性评估方法。
analysis.problem: 如何系统评估联邦脑肿瘤分割模型在跨医院MRI外观偏移下的最差医院性能与医院间性能差距。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: FedAvg全局平均Dice最高（0.8159），但最佳与最差医院间差距达0.0850；FedBN将差距缩小41%（至0.0503），平均精度仅下降0.0050，最弱医院Dice提升3.5个点（0.7309→0.7656）。
analysis.method: 构建MedFL-Stress压力测试框架，使用BraTS 2020的2D轴向切片模拟四个医院客户端，施加分级MRI外观偏移（伽马对比度、尺度偏移、噪声加模糊），以最差医院Dice和医院间差异为主要指标评估FedAvg、FedProx、FedBN。
contributions: 提出MedFL-Stress压力测试框架，专门暴露联邦医学图像分割中单点医院失败模式。
通过系统实验证明FedBN在跨医院外观偏移下能有效缩小性能差距，同时保持高平均精度。
analysis.experiments: 在BraTS 2020数据集上模拟四个医院客户端，使用三种MRI外观偏移（gamma contrast、scale-shift、noise-plus-blur），评估FedAvg、FedProx、FedBN。
limitations: 仅使用2D轴向切片，未验证3D分割场景。
仅模拟四种医院客户端，实际多中心场景可能更复杂。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MedFL-Stress压力测试框架，揭示联邦学习脑肿瘤分割模型在跨医院MRI外观偏移下的单点失败风险，并证明FedBN在牺牲极少平均精度下显著缩小医院间性能差距。

papers.title: Relightable Gaussian Splatting for Virtual Production Using Image-Based Illumination
papers.abstract: Virtual production (VP) use LED walls to provide both background imagery and image-based lighting. While this enables on-set compositing, it couples lighting to background and scene appearance, limiting flexibility for downstream editing. In addition, inverse rendering conventionally relies on physically-based rendering to estimates 3D geometry and lighting, using environment maps. However, these maps are typically low-resolution and assume far-field lighting. In VP, with near-field and high-resolution image-based lighting, this can lead to inaccuracies and introduce complexities when editing. Addressing this, we propose a VP-specific framework for 3D reconstruction and relighting using Gaussian Splatting. This uses the known background imagery to condition the relighting process. This avoids relying on environment maps and reduces compositing to a background-image editing task. To realize our framework, we introduce a process (and associated dataset) that captures real VP scenes under varying background content and illumination conditions. This data is used to decompose a 3D scene into fixed appearance and variable lighting components. The variable lighting process simulates light transport by parameterizing each primitive with a UV coordinate, intensity value and resolution modifier. Using mipmaps, these directly sample the background texture in image space - implicitly capturing reflections and refractions without physically-based rendering. Combined with the fixed appearance component, this allows us to render relit scenes using a Gaussian Splatting rasterizer. Compared to baselines, our approach achieves higher-quality 3D reconstruction and controllable relighting. The method is efficient (<3 GB RAM, <5 GB VRAM, <2 hours training, ~35 FPS) and supports rendering useful arbitrary output variables including depth, lighting intensity, lighting color, and unlit renders.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种面向虚拟制作的基于高斯泼溅的可重光照框架，利用已知背景图像实现高效重光照，无需环境贴图。
analysis.research_motivation: 虚拟制作中LED墙提供背景和光照，但将光照与背景耦合，限制了后期编辑灵活性；传统逆渲染依赖低分辨率环境贴图，在近场高分辨率光照下不准确且编辑复杂。
analysis.problem: 如何在虚拟制作场景中实现高质量3D重建和可控重光照，避免环境贴图的局限。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出VP专用框架，使用高斯泼溅，将场景分解为固定外观和可变光照分量；可变光照通过为每个基元分配UV坐标、强度值和分辨率修饰符，利用mipmap直接采样背景纹理，隐式捕获反射和折射。
contributions: 提出面向虚拟制作的3D重建与重光照框架，无需环境贴图，将合成简化为背景图像编辑。
引入捕获真实VP场景的数据集，支持在不同背景内容和光照条件下分解场景。
实现高效渲染（<3GB RAM, <5GB VRAM, <2小时训练, ~35 FPS），支持深度、光照强度、颜色等任意输出变量。
analysis.experiments: 与基线相比，方法在3D重建质量和可控重光照上更优，并报告了资源效率。
limitations: 可能依赖特定虚拟制作场景设置，泛化性需验证。
未讨论动态场景或复杂光照传输效果。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种面向虚拟制作的基于高斯泼溅的可重光照框架，利用已知背景图像实现高效重光照，无需环境贴图。

papers.title: The Direct Integration Theorem: A Rigorous Framework for Consistent Discrete Solutions of the Inverse Radon Problem
papers.abstract: This paper presents a novel Direct Integration Theorem (DIT), derived as a non-trivial corollary of the classical Central Slice Theorem (CST). The DIT provides a mathematically consistent transition from the continuous to the discrete domain - a fundamental challenge in computed tomography - thereby eliminating the need for frequency-domain interpolation without resorting to conventional ramp-filtering. The proposed approach circumvents two principal limitations inherent in traditional methods: (i) the zero-frequency singularity and spectral distortions introduced by the mandatory ramp-filtering step, and (ii) discretization inaccuracies associated with frequency-domain interpolation. Based on the DIT, we develop a rigorous framework for consistent discrete solutions of the inverse Radon problem. Mathematical modeling demonstrates that this approach achieves quasi-exact reconstruction, with errors constrained solely by sampling parameters and grid geometry. Furthermore, while Filtered Back Projection (FBP) inherently distorts the variance of the reconstructed image, the DIT-based algorithm preserves it. Comparative simulations confirm that the proposed method eliminates common artifacts, such as intensity cupping, and consistently outperforms FBP in terms of PSNR, SSIM, and reprojection fidelity, faithfully restoring the original image's statistical characteristics.

analysis.tldr: 提出直接积分定理（DIT），从连续到离散域一致地求解逆拉东问题，无需斜坡滤波和频域插值，实现准精确重建。
analysis.research_motivation: 计算机断层扫描（CT）重建中，传统滤波反投影（FBP）方法存在零频奇异性和频域插值误差，导致重建质量受限。
analysis.problem: 如何在不使用斜坡滤波和频域插值的情况下，从连续到离散域一致地求解逆拉东问题，实现高精度重建。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 传统FBP方法会引入零频奇异性和频谱失真，且频域插值导致离散化误差；此外FBP会扭曲重建图像的方差。
analysis.method: 基于中心切片定理推导直接积分定理（DIT），建立从连续到离散域的一致框架，通过直接积分避免频域操作。
contributions: 提出直接积分定理（DIT），为逆拉东问题提供一致的离散解框架。
消除斜坡滤波和频域插值，避免相关误差和伪影。
理论证明DIT方法实现准精确重建，误差仅受采样参数和网格几何限制。
DIT方法保持重建图像的统计特性（方差不变），优于FBP。
analysis.experiments: 通过对比仿真实验，DIT方法在PSNR、SSIM和重投影保真度上优于FBP，并消除了强度杯状伪影。
limitations: 摘要未讨论计算效率或实时性。
方法可能对采样参数和网格几何敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出直接积分定理（DIT），从连续到离散域一致地求解逆拉东问题，无需斜坡滤波和频域插值，实现准精确重建。

papers.title: FlashClear: Ultra-Fast Image Content Removal via Efficient Step Distillation and Feature Caching
papers.abstract: Recently, diffusion-based object removal models have achieved impressive results in eliminating objects and their associated visual effects. However, they indiscriminately denoise all tokens across all timesteps, ignoring that removal usually involves small foreground regions. This strategy introduces substantial computational overhead and prolonged inference times. To overcome this computational burden, we propose a latent discriminator to implement Region-aware Adversarial Distillation (RAD), yielding a highly efficient few-step model named FlashClear. Furthermore, tailored to few-step diffusion models, we propose FPAC (Foreground-Prioritized Asymmetric Attention and Caching), a training-free acceleration strategy. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our framework provides massive acceleration while maintaining or exceeding the performance of our base model, ObjectClear. Notably, on the OBER benchmark, our FlashClear achieves up to 8.26$\times$ and 122$\times$ speedup over ObjectClear and OmniPaint, respectively, while maintaining high visual quality and fidelity.

analysis.tldr: 提出FlashClear，通过区域感知对抗蒸馏和前景优先缓存实现超快速图像内容去除。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有扩散模型在图像内容去除时对所有token和所有时间步进行无差别去噪，忽略了去除区域通常只占前景小区域，导致大量计算开销和推理时间过长。
analysis.problem: 如何大幅加速扩散模型在图像内容去除任务上的推理速度，同时保持或提升去除质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，现有方法对所有token和所有时间步进行无差别去噪，而移除任务通常只涉及小前景区域，这种策略带来了不必要的计算负担。
analysis.method: 提出FlashClear，包含两个核心组件：1) 区域感知对抗蒸馏（RAD），使用潜在判别器实现高效少步生成；2) 前景优先非对称注意力与缓存（FPAC），一种无需训练的加速策略，针对少步扩散模型设计。
contributions: 提出区域感知对抗蒸馏（RAD），通过潜在判别器实现高效少步扩散模型，大幅减少推理步数。
提出前景优先非对称注意力与缓存（FPAC），一种无需训练的加速策略，进一步减少计算量。
在OBER基准上实现相对于ObjectClear和OmniPaint分别高达8.26倍和122倍的加速，同时保持高视觉质量和保真度。
analysis.experiments: 在OBER基准上评估，FlashClear相对于ObjectClear和OmniPaint分别实现8.26倍和122倍加速，且保持高视觉质量和保真度。
limitations: 可能对复杂场景或大区域去除的泛化能力有限。
FPAC策略可能依赖于特定模型架构，迁移性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出FlashClear，通过区域感知对抗蒸馏和前景优先缓存实现超快速图像内容去除。

papers.title: CT-IDP: Segmentation-Derived Quantitative Phenotypes for Interpretable Abdominal CT Disease Classification
papers.abstract: In this retrospective multi-institutional study, a quantitative phenotyping framework, CT-IDP (CT Image-Derived Phenotypes) was developed on the MERLIN abdominal CT benchmark (training, validation, and test sets- 15,175, 5,018, and 5,082 studies, respectively) and externally evaluated on two independent dataset: Duke-Abdomen (2,000) and AMOS (1,107). Multi-organ segmentations were generated with TotalSegmentator and used to derive over 900 organ and compartment-level descriptors spanning morphometry, attenuation, and contextual/burden findings. Sparse disease-specific logistic regression with elastic-net regularization was trained on MERLIN and externally validated under a frozen specification. Performance was compared against a DINOv3-based vision-transformer baseline using AUC and average precision (AP), supported by phenotype-stratified audits and coefficient-level inspection. Macro-AUC for CT-IDP versus the baseline was 0.897 versus 0.880 on MERLIN, 0.877 versus 0.857 on the Duke-Abdomen dataset, and 0.780 versus 0.756 on AMOS.

analysis.tldr: 提出CT-IDP框架，利用分割衍生定量表型进行可解释的腹部CT疾病分类，在多个数据集上优于DINOv3基线。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有深度学习模型在医学影像分类中缺乏可解释性，难以提供临床可理解的诊断依据。
analysis.problem: 如何构建可解释的腹部CT疾病分类方法，同时保持高分类性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用TotalSegmentator进行多器官分割，提取超过900个形态、衰减和上下文/负担相关的定量表型特征，然后训练稀疏疾病特异性逻辑回归模型（弹性网络正则化）。
contributions: 提出CT-IDP框架，利用分割衍生定量表型实现可解释的腹部CT疾病分类。
在多机构数据集上验证了该方法优于DINOv3视觉Transformer基线，并提供了表型分层审计和系数检查。
analysis.experiments: 在MERLIN基准（训练、验证、测试集分别15175、5018、5082个研究）上训练，并在Duke-Abdomen（2000）和AMOS（1107）上外部验证，与DINOv3基线比较AUC和平均精度。
limitations: 依赖分割质量，可能受分割误差影响。
仅针对腹部CT，泛化到其他解剖区域需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CT-IDP框架，利用分割衍生定量表型进行可解释的腹部CT疾病分类，在多个数据集上优于DINOv3基线。

papers.title: LLaVA-UHD v4: What Makes Efficient Visual Encoding in MLLMs?
papers.abstract: Visual encoding constitutes a major computational bottleneck in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs), especially for high-resolution image inputs. The prevailing practice typically adopts global encoding followed by post-ViT compression. Global encoding produces massive token sequences, while post-ViT compression incurs the full quadratic attention cost of the ViT before any token reduction takes place. In this work, we revisit this convention along two dimensions: the encoding strategy and visual token compression. First, controlled experiments show that slice-based encoding outperforms global encoding across benchmarks, suggesting that preserving local details through sliced views can be more beneficial than applying global attention for fine-grained perception. Second, we introduce intra-ViT early compression, which reduces tokens in shallow ViT layers and substantially lowers visual-encoding FLOPs while preserving downstream performance. By integrating intra-ViT compression into the slice-based encoding framework, we present LLaVA-UHD v4, an efficient and compute-controllable visual encoding scheme tailored for high-resolution inputs. Across a diverse set of benchmarks covering document understanding, OCR, and general VQA, LLaVA-UHD v4 reduces visual-encoding FLOPs by 55.8% while matching or even surpassing baseline performance. These results suggest that visual-encoding efficiency can be substantially improved without sacrificing downstream performance, providing a practical design direction for efficient high-resolution MLLMs. All model weights and code will be publicly released to support further research.

analysis.tldr: LLaVA-UHD v4通过切片编码和ViT内部早期压缩，在不牺牲性能的前提下大幅降低高分辨率MLLM的视觉编码计算开销。
analysis.research_motivation: 高分辨率图像输入导致MLLM视觉编码成为计算瓶颈，现有全局编码+后压缩策略效率低下，亟需更高效的编码方案。
analysis.problem: 如何设计高效的视觉编码策略，在降低高分辨率MLLM计算成本的同时保持或提升下游任务性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验发现切片编码优于全局编码，表明保留局部细节比全局注意力对细粒度感知更有效；早期压缩可大幅降低FLOPs而不影响性能。
analysis.method: 提出LLaVA-UHD v4，结合切片编码（slice-based encoding）和ViT内部早期压缩（intra-ViT early compression），在浅层ViT中减少token数量，实现计算可控的高效视觉编码。
contributions: 通过控制实验揭示切片编码优于全局编码，为高效视觉编码提供设计指导。
提出intra-ViT早期压缩方法，在浅层减少token，显著降低视觉编码FLOPs。
集成两种策略形成LLaVA-UHD v4，在多个基准上实现55.8% FLOPs降低且性能持平或提升。
analysis.experiments: 在文档理解、OCR和通用VQA等多个基准上评估，LLaVA-UHD v4减少55.8%视觉编码FLOPs，性能匹配或超越基线。
limitations: 可能仅适用于高分辨率输入场景，低分辨率下优势不明显。
早期压缩策略可能对某些细粒度任务有潜在影响，需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLaVA-UHD v4通过切片编码和ViT内部早期压缩，在不牺牲性能的前提下大幅降低高分辨率MLLM的视觉编码计算开销。

papers.title: Tracking the Truth: Object-Centric Spatio-Temporal Monitoring for Video Large Language Models
papers.abstract: While multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have advanced video understanding, they remain highly prone to hallucinations in dynamic scenes. We argue this stems from a failure in spatio-temporal monitoring, the ability to persistently track object identities, states, and relations over time. Existing benchmarks obscure this deficit by relying on single final-answer evaluations for queries that can often be resolved via local visual cues or statistical priors. To rigorously diagnose this, we introduce STEMO-Bench (Spatio-TEmporal MOnitoring), a benchmark of human-verified object-centric facts that evaluates intermediate reasoning by decomposing queries into sub-questions, distinguishing genuine temporal understanding from coincidental correctness. To address failure modes exposed by STEMO, we propose STEMO-Track, a novel object-centric framework that explicitly constructs and reasons over structured object trajectories via chunk-wise state extraction and temporal aggregation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our object-centric framework significantly reduces hallucinated answers and improves spatio-temporal reasoning consistency over state-of-the-art MLLMs.

analysis.tldr: 提出STEMO-Bench基准和STEMO-Track框架，通过对象中心时空监控减少视频MLLM幻觉。
analysis.research_motivation: 视频多模态大模型在动态场景中容易产生幻觉，现有基准依赖单次最终答案评估，无法区分真正的时序理解与偶然正确。
analysis.problem: 视频MLLM缺乏持续跟踪对象身份、状态和关系的时空监控能力，导致幻觉。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有基准的评估方式（单次最终答案）掩盖了模型在时空监控上的缺陷，模型可能通过局部视觉线索或统计先验猜对答案。
analysis.method: 提出STEMO-Bench基准，通过分解查询为子问题评估中间推理；提出STEMO-Track框架，通过分块状态提取和时间聚合构建结构化对象轨迹进行推理。
contributions: 提出STEMO-Bench基准，用于诊断视频MLLM的时空监控缺陷。
提出STEMO-Track框架，通过对象中心轨迹推理减少幻觉并提升时空推理一致性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖对象检测质量。
分块策略的粒度需要手动调整。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出STEMO-Bench基准和STEMO-Track框架，通过对象中心时空监控减少视频MLLM幻觉。

papers.title: Extrusion Segmentation Strategy to improve CAD Reconstruction from Point Cloud
papers.abstract: Computer-Aided Design is ubiquitous in todays world, as almost every manufactured object begins as a digital model across industries. At the same time, advances in 3D sensing have made point clouds a dominant form of raw 3D data. Recovering the CAD model of a physical object from its point cloud scan has two major applications: reverse engineering, where physical or hand-crafted prototypes need to be reconstructed automatically as editable digital models, and quality control, where recovering the CAD description of a manufactured object helps quantify and understand deviations introduced during the production process. Thus, converting unordered point clouds into structured CAD models is increasingly important for modern applications. Deep learning has enabled major progress in computer vision for both 2D and 3D data, and new datasets facilitate data-driven CAD reconstruction. Building on this foundation, we develop an end-to-end model that reconstructs CAD models from point clouds and introduce a segmentation approach that decomposes them into individual extrusions. These partial shapes increase data diversity, improving the generalization and robustness of deep learning models. Our strategy thereby provides a simple, yet effective way to increase reconstruction performance of deep learning models.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种将点云分割为单个拉伸体的策略，以提升CAD模型重建的泛化性和鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 点云到CAD模型重建在逆向工程和质量控制中至关重要，但现有深度学习方法在泛化性和鲁棒性上存在瓶颈，且缺乏有效利用局部形状信息的手段。
analysis.problem: 如何通过分解点云为结构化拉伸体来提升CAD重建模型的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出一种端到端模型，先对点云进行分割，将其分解为多个独立的拉伸体（extrusions），然后分别重建每个拉伸体，最后组合成完整CAD模型。
contributions: 提出一种点云分割策略，将点云分解为单个拉伸体，增加数据多样性。
开发了端到端的CAD重建模型，利用分割策略提升泛化性和鲁棒性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量分割结果，对噪声点云敏感。
仅针对拉伸体特征，可能不适用于其他CAD操作（如旋转、扫掠）。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种将点云分割为单个拉伸体的策略，以提升CAD模型重建的泛化性和鲁棒性。

papers.title: Can MLLMs Reason About Visual Persuasion? Evaluating the Efficacy and Faithfulness of Reasoning
papers.abstract: Despite strong performance of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) on multimodal tasks, predicting whether and why an image is persuasive remains challenging. We first show that prompting MLLMs to reason before prediction does not consistently help, and can even reduce persuasiveness prediction performance, suggesting that naively generated rationales are unreliable signals for this task. Yet, no established methodology exists for training MLLMs to reason about visual persuasion or evaluating whether their rationales faithfully support their decisions. To address this gap, we show empirically and theoretically that diverse teacher-generated rationales, when used for supervised fine-tuning, improve visual persuasiveness prediction. We further introduce a three-dimensional faithfulness evaluation framework covering rationale-to-decision consistency, rationale-to-image groundedness, and rationale-to-decision sensitivity. Applying this framework shows that prediction performance alone does not guarantee faithful rationales, while rationale-to-decision sensitivity is most aligned with human rationale preferences. These findings motivate faithfulness-aware training objectives and scalable rationale supervision for visual persuasiveness evaluation. Our code and dataset will be made publicly available.

analysis.tldr: MLLMs在视觉说服推理中，直接推理会降低性能，而多样化教师理由微调可提升预测，且理由忠实度需三维评估。
analysis.research_motivation: 视觉说服预测具有挑战性，MLLMs虽强但直接推理不可靠，且缺乏训练和评估方法。
analysis.problem: 如何训练MLLMs对视觉说服进行推理，并评估其理由是否忠实支持决策。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 直接提示MLLMs推理反而降低说服力预测性能，表明朴素生成的理由不可靠。
analysis.method: 使用多样化教师生成的理由进行监督微调，并引入三维忠实度评估框架（理由-决策一致性、理由-图像基础、理由-决策敏感性）。
contributions: 发现直接推理会降低MLLMs视觉说服预测性能
提出多样化教师理由微调方法提升预测
引入三维忠实度评估框架，揭示预测性能不保证理由忠实
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提到代码和数据集将公开。
limitations: 可能仅适用于视觉说服任务，泛化性未知
忠实度评估框架可能依赖人工标注
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MLLMs在视觉说服推理中，直接推理会降低性能，而多样化教师理由微调可提升预测，且理由忠实度需三维评估。

papers.title: FugSeg: Fast Uncertainty-aware Ground Segmentation for 3D Point Cloud
papers.abstract: In LiDAR-based environment perception systems, ground segmentation is a key preprocessing step supporting various applications such as mapping and navigation. Although extensively studied, problems such as reflection noise and isolated ground remain challenging. To address these issues, we propose FugSeg, a fast uncertainty-aware ground segmentation method. A polar grid map is adopted as the point cloud representation to ensure generalizability across LiDAR types. Building on that, we develop a within- and cross-segment ground labeling strategy that identifies not only directly visible ground cells but also those that are isolated or occluded. During this process, an adaptive slope is introduced, which incorporates measurement uncertainties to enhance its reliability under complex terrain. Finally, to achieve point-level ground segmentation, a fine-grained ground elevation estimation method is introduced. Throughout the complete workflow, reflection noise is explicitly handled via the proposed noisy ground cells. We conduct comprehensive evaluations on four public datasets covering both structured and unstructured environments. Results show that FugSeg outperforms state-of-the-art non-learning methods, achieving the highest F1, accuracy, and mIoU across all datasets, while maintaining the fastest runtime (135 Hz and 487 Hz for 64- and 32-layer LiDARs) using a single CPU thread, making it suitable for resource-limited systems. The code will be available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: FugSeg 是一种快速、不确定性感知的 3D 点云地面分割方法，通过极坐标网格和自适应坡度处理反射噪声与孤立地面，在多个数据集上达到 SOTA 性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 地面分割是 LiDAR 感知系统的关键预处理步骤，但现有方法难以处理反射噪声和孤立地面等挑战，且需要高效运行以适应资源受限系统。
analysis.problem: 解决 LiDAR 点云地面分割中的反射噪声和孤立地面问题，同时实现高精度和实时性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用极坐标网格表示点云，提出段内和跨段地面标记策略识别可见、孤立或遮挡地面单元，引入自适应坡度融合测量不确定性，并通过细粒度地面高程估计实现逐点分割，显式处理反射噪声。
contributions: 提出 FugSeg，一种快速不确定性感知的地面分割方法，有效处理反射噪声和孤立地面。
在四个公开数据集上达到 SOTA 非学习方法性能，同时实现最高 F1、准确率和 mIoU，以及最快运行速度（单 CPU 线程 135 Hz/487 Hz）。
analysis.experiments: 在四个覆盖结构化与非结构化环境的公开数据集上评估，与 SOTA 非学习方法对比，FugSeg 在所有数据集上取得最高 F1、准确率和 mIoU，且运行速度最快。
limitations: 可能对极稀疏点云或极端地形适应性有限。
未与基于学习的方法进行对比。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: FugSeg 是一种快速、不确定性感知的 3D 点云地面分割方法，通过极坐标网格和自适应坡度处理反射噪声与孤立地面，在多个数据集上达到 SOTA 性能。

papers.title: PIDNet: Progressive Implicit Decouple Network for Multimodal Action Quality Assessment
papers.abstract: Action quality assessment (AQA) aims to automatically quantify the execution quality of human actions in videos and is valuable for applications such as competitive sports judging. In multimodal AQA, quality evidence from different modalities is heterogeneous, and quality cues evolve progressively over time. Existing methods often rely on coarse fusion or unified temporal modeling, which may blur modality-specific cues, preserve cross-modal redundancy, and weaken stage-specific quality evidence. To address these issues, we propose a progressive implicit decoupling and fusion network (PIDNet) that progressively integrates modality-specific information, cross-modal complementary cues, and global quality semantics for accurate assessment. Specifically, we design an iMambaWave module that maps RGB, optical flow, and audio features into a shared latent space and disentangles them with a Bi-Mamba branch and a wavelet-transform branch to capture long-range temporal dependencies and local perturbation details, respectively. A gated aggregation mechanism adaptively fuses temporal and frequency-domain information. We further build a three-stage progressive fusion network using Group3M blocks, where modality complementary attention retrieves cross-modal evidence while suppressing redundancy, and multi-scale convolutions enrich feature representations. Experiments on the Rhythmic Gymnastics and Fis-V datasets show that PIDNet achieves highly competitive score correlation with favorable error control compared with existing unimodal and multimodal methods. Ablation studies verify the effectiveness of each component. Moreover, iMambaWave consistently improves visual representation and temporal modeling across multiple backbones, showing good generalization and plug-and-play capability.

analysis.tldr: 提出渐进式隐式解耦融合网络PIDNet，通过iMambaWave模块和Group3M块实现多模态动作质量评估，在韵律体操和Fis-V数据集上取得优异性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态动作质量评估中，不同模态的质量证据异质且随时间渐进演化，现有方法粗融合或统一时序建模会模糊模态特定线索、保留跨模态冗余并削弱阶段特定证据。
analysis.problem: 如何有效解耦和融合多模态（RGB、光流、音频）的异质质量证据，同时捕捉渐进演化的时序质量线索。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出PIDNet，包含iMambaWave模块（Bi-Mamba分支捕获长程依赖，小波变换分支捕获局部扰动，门控聚合融合时频信息）和三阶段渐进融合网络（Group3M块，含模态互补注意力检索跨模态证据并抑制冗余，多尺度卷积丰富特征）。
contributions: 提出渐进隐式解耦融合网络PIDNet，有效处理多模态异质性和时序渐进性。
设计iMambaWave模块，结合Bi-Mamba和小波变换实现模态解耦与时频融合。
在Rhythmic Gymnastics和Fis-V数据集上达到SOTA，且iMambaWave具有即插即用能力。
analysis.experiments: 在Rhythmic Gymnastics和Fis-V数据集上评估，与单模态和多模态方法对比，取得高相关性和低误差；消融实验验证各组件有效性。
limitations: 可能对音频质量敏感，噪声环境下性能下降。
三阶段渐进结构可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出渐进式隐式解耦融合网络PIDNet，通过iMambaWave模块和Group3M块实现多模态动作质量评估，在韵律体操和Fis-V数据集上取得优异性能。

papers.title: Few-Click-Driven Interactive 3D Segmentation with Semantic Embedding
papers.abstract: Interactive segmentation allows efficient label generation by leveraging user-provided clicks to progressively refine predictions, which is critical when fully supervised labels are costly or generalization to unseen classes is needed. Existing 3D interactive methods are limited: most operate sequentially, predicting only one object per iteration with binary masks, while several recent approaches depend on 2D foundation models and camera alignment to bridge the 2D-3D gap. To address these limitations, we propose a novel interactive segmentation framework that operates directly on sparse, randomly downsampled 3D points and processes multiple object clicks in a single forward pass. Our framework consists of a point Transformer-based encoder and a hierarchical mask decoder, which integrates multi-level crop-and-merge operations conditioned on learnable semantic embeddings. Unlike prior interactive approaches that require repeated model updates after each manually corrective click, our method jointly reasons over all click queries, modeling inter-instance relationships and refining both spatial masks and semantic predictions through spatial and semantic embeddings. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our model improves the mIoU metric by over 20 percent compared to strong baselines and achieves 8-10 percent gains under cross-dataset evaluation for a one-click per instance setting, often requiring only a single click per object. Our approach provides a generalizable and efficient solution for interactive 3D instance segmentation, particularly suitable for real-time applications such as robotic manipulation, navigation, and rapid 3D semantic annotation.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于语义嵌入的少点击交互式3D分割框架，直接在稀疏点云上处理多对象点击，单次前向传播即可预测。
analysis.research_motivation: 全监督标签成本高且难以泛化到未见类别，现有3D交互方法多顺序预测单对象且依赖2D基础模型，效率低且不灵活。
analysis.problem: 如何实现高效、通用的交互式3D实例分割，支持多对象同时点击且无需重复模型更新。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于点Transformer编码器和分层掩码解码器，集成多层级裁剪-合并操作，通过可学习语义嵌入联合推理所有点击查询，建模实例间关系并同时优化空间和语义预测。
contributions: 提出一种直接操作稀疏随机下采样3D点云的交互式分割框架，单次前向传播处理多对象点击。
设计分层掩码解码器与语义嵌入机制，实现空间和语义联合推理，无需重复模型更新。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集上，mIoU相比强基线提升超20%，跨数据集评估单点击每实例设置下提升8-10%，通常每对象仅需一次点击。
limitations: 可能对极端稀疏点云或高度重叠实例效果有限。
语义嵌入的泛化能力在未见类别上需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于语义嵌入的少点击交互式3D分割框架，直接在稀疏点云上处理多对象点击，单次前向传播即可预测。

papers.title: Unified Modeling of Lane and Lane Topology for Driving Scene Reasoning
papers.abstract: Autonomous vehicles need to perceive not only physical elements in the driving scene, such as lane lines and traffic lights, but also logical elements like lane centerlines and their topology. Existing lane topology reasoning methods typically follow a reasoning-by-detection paradigm, where lane topological relationships are primarily derived from lane detection results. In this paper, we propose an innovative method called Unified Modeling of Lane and Lane Topology (UniTopo), which represents the topological relationships between lanes as connected lanes, encompassing predecessor lanes, successor lanes, and their interconnections. This unified representation of lanes and lane topology allows us to simultaneously obtain both the positions and topological information of lanes within a shared perception pipeline, establishing a new paradigm for directly perceiving lane topology from original image features. We validate our method on the driving scene reasoning benchmark OpenLane-V2, which consists of two subsets, built based on Argoverse2 and nuScenes, respectively. Our method achieves TOP_ll of 30.1% and 31.8% on the two subsets, significantly surpassing the existing state-of-the-art method T^2SG by 6.0% and 8.6%.

analysis.tldr: 提出UniTopo统一建模车道及其拓扑，在OpenLane-V2上显著超越SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有车道拓扑推理方法依赖检测结果，未能直接利用图像特征感知拓扑关系，导致性能受限。
analysis.problem: 如何同时从原始图像特征中直接获取车道位置和拓扑信息。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出UniTopo，将车道拓扑关系表示为连接车道（前驱、后继及连接），在共享感知流水线中统一建模车道和车道拓扑。
contributions: 提出UniTopo方法，统一建模车道及其拓扑关系。
在OpenLane-V2两个子集上分别达到30.1%和31.8%的TOP_ll，超越SOTA 6.0%和8.6%。
analysis.experiments: 在OpenLane-V2基准（基于Argoverse2和nuScenes的两个子集）上评估，与T^2SG对比。
limitations: 可能对复杂交通场景的泛化性有待验证。
未提及计算效率或实时性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出UniTopo统一建模车道及其拓扑，在OpenLane-V2上显著超越SOTA。

papers.title: DAPE: Dynamic Non-uniform Alignment and Progressive Detail Enhancement Techniques for Improving the Performance of Efficient Visual Language Models
papers.abstract: In recent years, pre-trained visual-linguistic models have demonstrated tremendous potential, becoming a crucial foundational framework for numerous downstream tasks. However, the information density between text and images is not uniformly distributed. Existing methods often overlook the inherent and dynamic differences in information density and semantic scope between text tags and image blocks. These common uniform alignment strategies result in coarse-grained cross-modal interactions and loss of fine semantic details. Moreover, pursuing finer alignment typically requires substantial computational overhead, limiting practical model deployment. To address this challenge, this paper proposes a novel framework for dynamic cross-modal alignment with continuous detail introduction. First, we design a dynamically adaptive cross-modal matching mechanism that uses a learnable matching function to dynamically assign varying numbers and sizes of image tags to text tags of the same size but different information density, enabling more precise attention interaction. Second, we develop a continuous detail introduction module to progressively incorporate high-resolution visual feature enhancement into the alignment process. Extensive experiments across multiple benchmarks demonstrate significant improvements in the accuracy of various downstream tasks while reducing computational overhead.

analysis.tldr: 提出动态非均匀对齐与渐进细节增强框架，提升高效视觉语言模型性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视觉语言模型采用均匀对齐策略，忽略了文本与图像间信息密度的动态差异，导致粗粒度交互和细节丢失，且细粒度对齐计算开销大。
analysis.problem: 如何实现动态、非均匀的跨模态对齐，在提升细粒度语义交互的同时控制计算开销。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 文本标签与图像块的信息密度和语义范围存在固有动态差异，均匀对齐导致粗粒度交互和细节丢失。
analysis.method: 提出DAPE框架，包含动态自适应跨模态匹配机制（可学习匹配函数动态分配图像标签）和连续细节引入模块（渐进融入高分辨率视觉特征）。
contributions: 提出动态非均匀对齐机制，根据信息密度动态分配图像标签数量与大小。
设计渐进细节增强模块，在保持效率的同时提升视觉细节。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准上验证，显著提升下游任务准确率并降低计算开销。
limitations: 未明确说明动态匹配函数的泛化性。
渐进细节引入的步数可能影响效率。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出动态非均匀对齐与渐进细节增强框架，提升高效视觉语言模型性能。

papers.title: Semantic Alignment in Hyperbolic Space for Open-Vocabulary Semantic Segmentation
papers.abstract: Open-vocabulary semantic segmentation requires adapting image-level vision-language models such as CLIP to dense pixel-level prediction, which is challenging due to the mismatch between hierarchical structure and semantic alignment in the embedding space. While recent works leverage hyperbolic geometry to model hierarchical relationships, they align embeddings across hierarchical levels but overlook semantic misalignment among embeddings within the same level. In this work, we propose HyRo, a hyperbolic fine-tuning framework that decouples hierarchical and semantic alignment in the Poincaré ball model. HyRo aligns hierarchical levels by adjusting the hyperbolic radius and refines semantic relationships through angular alignment using an orthogonal transformation that theoretically preserves the hyperbolic radius. Experiments on standard open-vocabulary semantic segmentation benchmarks demonstrate that HyRo achieves state-of-the-art performance over prior methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出双曲空间中的层次与语义解耦对齐框架HyRo，提升开放词汇语义分割性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 开放词汇语义分割需要将CLIP等图像级视觉-语言模型适配到密集像素预测，但嵌入空间中的层次结构与语义对齐之间存在不匹配，现有双曲方法仅对齐层次而忽略同层语义错位。
analysis.problem: 解决开放词汇语义分割中双曲嵌入空间内同层语义对齐不足的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出现有双曲几何方法仅对齐层次级别，但忽略了同一层次内嵌入之间的语义错位。
analysis.method: 提出HyRo框架，在庞加莱球模型中解耦层次对齐和语义对齐：通过调整双曲半径对齐层次，利用正交变换进行角度对齐以精炼语义关系，且理论上保持双曲半径不变。
contributions: 提出HyRo，首个在双曲空间中解耦层次与语义对齐的微调框架。
通过正交变换实现角度对齐，理论保证双曲半径不变。
在标准开放词汇语义分割基准上达到最先进性能。
analysis.experiments: 在标准开放词汇语义分割基准上评估，HyRo超越先前方法。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练CLIP模型的质量。
双曲空间计算复杂度可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出双曲空间中的层次与语义解耦对齐框架HyRo，提升开放词汇语义分割性能。

papers.title: ProDG: Prototypes for Data-Free Generative Post-Hoc Explainability
papers.abstract: Ante-hoc interpretability methods based on prototypes provide highly accurate explanations by utilizing the intuitive "this looks like that" reasoning paradigm. On the other hand, post-hoc models can explain predictions for a single image without relying on an underlying dataset or requiring costly neural network retraining. Recent approaches successfully solve the retraining problem for prototype-based networks. However, they still face a fundamental limitation: they require access to a subset of data (e.g., a test or validation set) to search for and extract the visual prototypes. In this paper, we address this issue and introduce ProDG: Generative Prototypes for Data-Free Post-Hoc Explainability, a novel framework that leverages generative models to synthesize pure, high-fidelity prototypes directly from the frozen model's weights, completely eliminating the dependency on any external data. By establishing this new frontier in Data-Free XAI, ProDG unlocks robust visual interpretability for privacy-sensitive domains, where original data is strictly restricted or fundamentally inaccessible. Project page: this https URL

analysis.tldr: ProDG 利用生成模型从冻结模型权重中合成原型，实现无需数据的后验可解释性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于原型的后验可解释性方法需要访问测试集或验证集来提取视觉原型，这在隐私敏感领域（如医疗）中数据不可用或受限时无法应用。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖任何外部数据的情况下，从已训练模型的权重中生成高质量的原型用于后验解释。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 ProDG 框架，利用生成模型直接从冻结模型的权重中合成纯净、高保真的原型，完全消除对数据的依赖。
contributions: 首次实现无需数据的后验原型可解释性，适用于隐私敏感领域。
提出利用生成模型从模型权重合成原型的新方法。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 生成原型的保真度和可解释性可能受生成模型能力限制。
方法可能仅适用于特定类型的原型网络。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ProDG 利用生成模型从冻结模型权重中合成原型，实现无需数据的后验可解释性。

papers.title: Restoration-Aligned Generative Flow Models for Blind Motion Deblurring
papers.abstract: Generative flow models offer powerful priors learned from large-scale natural images, but directly adapting them to restoration tasks such as motion deblurring causes severe fidelity degradation, as their training objective is inherently misaligned with restoration. We present DeblurFlow, a framework that resolves this misalignment by reformulating the flow trajectory itself: we replace the noise endpoint with the blur observation, which makes the underlying vector field coincide with the residual error between blur and clean images. Under this formulation, the standard flow matching loss naturally takes the form of a residual loss, allowing pretrained flow models to be optimized under restoration-aligned objectives via LoRA adaptation. This formulation further enables a dual-expert sampling strategy: a fidelity expert provides a high-fidelity initialization, e.g., PSNR 33.69 dB, and DeblurFlow enhances perceptual quality with only a marginal fidelity reduction to 33.05 dB, whereas directly applying a generative model on top of a fidelity expert decreases PSNR to 27.60 dB. To make this practical, we further introduce r-space, a latent space tailored for residual decoding rather than image reconstruction, which reduces encoder-decoder cost by up to 9$\times$over standard VAE latents. Extensive experiments on GoPro, HIDE, RealBlur, and RWBI demonstrate that DeblurFlow achieves strong restoration fidelity and perceptual realism, while remaining computationally practical.

analysis.tldr: 提出DeblurFlow框架，通过将流模型的噪声端点替换为模糊观测，使生成流模型与运动去模糊任务对齐，实现高保真恢复。
analysis.research_motivation: 生成流模型虽能从大规模自然图像中学习强大先验，但直接用于运动去模糊等恢复任务时，因其训练目标与恢复任务固有偏差，导致保真度严重下降。
analysis.problem: 解决生成流模型在盲运动去模糊中训练目标与恢复任务不对齐导致的保真度退化问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 直接应用生成模型于保真专家输出会导致PSNR从33.69 dB骤降至27.60 dB，而DeblurFlow仅以微小保真度损失（降至33.05 dB）显著提升感知质量。
analysis.method: 将流模型的噪声端点替换为模糊观测，使向量场对应模糊与清晰图像的残差；通过LoRA适配实现恢复对齐优化；提出双专家采样策略（保真专家+生成专家）和r-space潜在空间（专为残差解码设计，降低编解码成本9倍）。
contributions: 提出DeblurFlow框架，通过重新设计流轨迹解决生成流模型与恢复任务的对齐问题。
引入双专家采样策略和r-space潜在空间，在保持高保真度的同时提升感知质量并降低计算成本。
analysis.experiments: 在GoPro、HIDE、RealBlur和RWBI数据集上进行实验，结果表明DeblurFlow在恢复保真度和感知真实性上均表现优异，且计算高效。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练流模型的质量和泛化能力。
r-space的设计可能对特定类型模糊或噪声敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出DeblurFlow框架，通过将流模型的噪声端点替换为模糊观测，使生成流模型与运动去模糊任务对齐，实现高保真恢复。

papers.title: Geometrically Constrained Stenosis Editing in Coronary Angiography via Entropic Optimal Transport
papers.abstract: The scarcity of high-quality imaging data for coronary angiography (CAG) stenosis limits the clinical translation of automated stenosis detection. Synthetic stenosis data provides a practical avenue to augment training sets, improving data quality, diversity, and distributional coverage, and enhancing detection precision and generalization. However, diffusion-based editing commonly relies on soft guidance in a noise-initialized reverse process, offering limited pixel-level precision and structure preservation. We propose the OT-Bridge Editor, which reframes localized editing as a constrained entropic optimal transport (OT) problem and leverages geometric information to steer the generation path, enabling stronger geometric control. Extensive experiments show that our synthesized angiograms consistently improve downstream stenosis detection, yielding substantial relative gains of 27.8% on the public ARCADE benchmark and 23.0% on our multi-center dataset, supported by consistent qualitative results.

analysis.tldr: 提出OT-Bridge Editor，利用熵最优传输实现冠状动脉造影中几何约束的狭窄编辑，提升下游检测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 冠状动脉造影（CAG）狭窄检测的临床转化受限于高质量成像数据的稀缺，合成数据可扩充训练集，但现有扩散编辑方法像素级精度和结构保持有限。
analysis.problem: 如何生成几何精确、结构保持的合成狭窄血管造影图像，以增强下游狭窄检测性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 扩散编辑依赖噪声初始化的反向过程中的软引导，导致像素级精度和结构保持不足。
analysis.method: 将局部编辑建模为约束熵最优传输（OT）问题，利用几何信息引导生成路径，实现更强的几何控制。
contributions: 提出OT-Bridge Editor，将局部编辑重新定义为约束熵最优传输问题，利用几何信息引导生成。
在公共ARCADE基准和多中心数据集上，合成图像使下游狭窄检测分别获得27.8%和23.0%的相对增益。
analysis.experiments: 在公共ARCADE基准和多中心数据集上评估，下游狭窄检测相对增益分别为27.8%和23.0%，并有定性结果支持。
limitations: 可能依赖特定几何约束的获取方式，泛化性需进一步验证。
仅针对狭窄编辑，其他病变类型未涉及。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出OT-Bridge Editor，利用熵最优传输实现冠状动脉造影中几何约束的狭窄编辑，提升下游检测性能。

papers.title: Illusion-Aware Visual Preprocessing and Anti-Illusion Prompting for Classic Illusion Understanding in Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) exhibit systematic bias toward visual illusions, recalling memorized facts rather than perceiving actual visual differences. This paper presents a training-free framework for the 5th DataCV Challenge Task 1 at CVPR 2026, addressing this perception-versus-memory conflict through three complementary strategies:(1) illusion-aware image preprocessing that weakens illusion-inducing context via type-specific transformations (edge extraction, color isolation, morphological processing, and reference-line overlay), (2) anti-illusion prompt engineering guiding VLMs toward qualitative visual comparison, and (3) multi-vote ensemble that further improves robustness. Our method achieves 90.48% accuracy on the official 630-image test set using Claude (claude-opus-4-6) with 5-vote majority ensemble, and 98.41% on a human-verified subset. The approach requires no finetuning, relying solely on visual manipulation and prompt design. Our solution secured 2nd place in the challenge, only 0.47% behind the 1st-place solution. Code is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出无需微调的幻觉感知预处理与反幻觉提示框架，在CVPR 2026挑战赛中获得第二名。
analysis.research_motivation: VLM对视觉幻觉存在系统性偏见，倾向于回忆记忆事实而非感知实际视觉差异，需要解决感知与记忆冲突问题。
analysis.problem: VLM在经典视觉幻觉理解任务中无法准确感知真实视觉差异，受幻觉诱导上下文影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: VLM对视觉幻觉存在系统性偏见，倾向于依赖记忆事实而非实际视觉感知。
analysis.method: 三种互补策略：幻觉感知图像预处理（边缘提取、颜色隔离、形态学处理、参考线叠加）、反幻觉提示工程、多投票集成。
contributions: 提出无需微调的幻觉感知预处理与反幻觉提示框架
在CVPR 2026挑战赛中获得第二名，准确率90.48%
analysis.experiments: 在官方630张图像测试集上使用Claude（claude-opus-4-6）和5票多数集成达到90.48%准确率，在人工验证子集上达到98.41%。
limitations: 仅针对特定类型幻觉，泛化性未知
依赖特定VLM模型，可能不适用于其他架构
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无需微调的幻觉感知预处理与反幻觉提示框架，在CVPR 2026挑战赛中获得第二名。

papers.title: Cross-Sample Relational Fusion: Unifying Domain Generalization and Class-Incremental Learning
papers.abstract: Class-Incremental Learning (CIL) requires a learning system to learn new classes while retaining previously learned knowledge. However, in real-world scenarios such as autonomous driving, a system trained on urban roads in sunny weather may later need to operate in rural or highway environments with different traffic patterns and weather conditions. This requires the model not only to overcome catastrophic forgetting, but also to effectively handle domain shifts. In this paper, we propose CrOss-sample Relational Fusion (CORF), a unified framework to address domain shift and catastrophic forgetting simultaneously. To enhance generalizability, we perform selective refinement of training samples by leveraging spatial contribution maps to highlight semantically informative regions. Furthermore, we incorporate predictive confidence to adaptively weigh samples, thereby facilitating the learning of domain-agnostic representations. To alleviate forgetting, we propose a cascaded distillation framework that captures cross-sample relational dependencies across multiple feature hierarchies, enabling multi-grained knowledge transfer from previous tasks. CORF can be seamlessly integrated into existing CIL algorithms to enhance their generalizability, achieving competitive performance across various benchmark datasets. Code is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出跨样本关系融合框架CORF，统一解决域泛化和类增量学习中的域偏移与灾难性遗忘问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现实场景（如自动驾驶）中，模型不仅需克服灾难性遗忘，还需处理域偏移，现有方法通常分别处理这两个问题，缺乏统一框架。
analysis.problem: 如何同时解决类增量学习中的域偏移和灾难性遗忘。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出CORF框架：利用空间贡献图选择性精炼训练样本以增强泛化性；结合预测置信度自适应加权样本学习域无关表示；提出级联蒸馏框架捕获跨样本关系依赖实现多粒度知识迁移。
contributions: 提出统一框架CORF同时处理域偏移和灾难性遗忘
设计空间贡献图精炼和自适应加权机制增强泛化性
提出级联蒸馏框架实现多粒度知识迁移
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准数据集上取得有竞争力的性能，代码已开源。
limitations: 可能依赖空间贡献图的质量
级联蒸馏的计算开销可能较大
analysis.primary_area_en: transfer learning, meta learning, and lifelong learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出跨样本关系融合框架CORF，统一解决域泛化和类增量学习中的域偏移与灾难性遗忘问题。

papers.title: VECTOR-Drive: Tightly Coupled Vision-Language and Trajectory Expert Routing for End-to-End Autonomous Driving
papers.abstract: End-to-end autonomous driving requires models to understand traffic scenes, infer driving intent, and generate executable motion plans. Recent vision-language-action (VLA) models inherit semantic priors from large-scale vision-language pretraining, yet still face a coupling trade-off: fully shared backbones preserve multimodal interaction but may entangle language reasoning and trajectory prediction, whereas decou pled reasoning-action pipelines reduce task conflict but weaken semantic-motion coupling. We propose VECTOR-DRIVE, a tightly coupled VLA framework built on Qwen2.5-VL-3B. VECTOR-DRIVE keeps all tokens coupled through shared self attention and routes feed-forward computation according to token semantics. Vision and language tokens are processed by a Vision-Language Expert to preserve semantic priors, while target-point, ego-state, and noisy action tokens are routed to a Trajectory Expert for motion-specific computation. On the action-token pathway, a flow-matching planner refines noisy action tokens into future waypoints and speed profiles. This design couples semantic reasoning and motion planning within a single multimodal Transformer while separating task-specific FFN computation. On Bench2Drive, VECTOR-DRIVE achieves 88.91 Driving Score and outperforms representative end-to end and VLA-based baselines. Qualitative results and ablations further validate the benefits of shared attention, semantic-aware expert routing, progressive training, and flow-based action de coding.

analysis.tldr: VECTOR-DRIVE 通过共享注意力与语义路由专家网络，在单一多模态 Transformer 中紧密耦合视觉-语言推理与轨迹预测，实现端到端自动驾驶。
analysis.research_motivation: 端到端自动驾驶需要模型同时理解场景、推断驾驶意图并生成可执行轨迹，但现有 VLA 模型面临耦合权衡：完全共享骨干网络会纠缠语言推理与轨迹预测，而解耦的推理-动作流水线则削弱语义-运动耦合。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个既能保持语义推理与运动规划紧密耦合，又能避免任务冲突的端到端自动驾驶框架。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出完全共享骨干与解耦流水线均存在不足。
analysis.method: 基于 Qwen2.5-VL-3B 构建紧密耦合 VLA 框架，通过共享自注意力保持所有 token 耦合，并根据 token 语义路由前馈计算：视觉和语言 token 由视觉-语言专家处理，目标点、自车状态和噪声动作 token 由轨迹专家处理；动作 token 路径上使用流匹配规划器将噪声动作 token 细化为未来路径点和速度曲线。
contributions: 提出 VECTOR-DRIVE，一种紧密耦合的 VLA 框架，通过共享注意力和语义路由专家网络解决耦合权衡问题。
在 Bench2Drive 上达到 88.91 Driving Score，超越代表性端到端和 VLA 基线。
analysis.experiments: 在 Bench2Drive 数据集上评估，报告 Driving Score 为 88.91，并进行了定性结果和消融实验验证共享注意力、语义感知专家路由、渐进式训练和基于流的动作解码的有效性。
limitations: 可能依赖特定预训练模型（Qwen2.5-VL-3B），泛化性需进一步验证。
摘要未提及在复杂或极端场景下的表现。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: VECTOR-DRIVE 通过共享注意力与语义路由专家网络，在单一多模态 Transformer 中紧密耦合视觉-语言推理与轨迹预测，实现端到端自动驾驶。

papers.title: Rethinking Event-Based Object Dtection through Representation-Level Temporal Aggregation and Model-Level Hypergraph Reasoning
papers.abstract: Event cameras provide microsecond-level temporal resolution, low latency, and high dynamic range, offering potential for perception under fast motion and challenging illumination conditions. However, existing Event-based Object Detection (EOD) methods face limitations at both the representation and model levels: prior event representations usually encode temporal information indirectly through redundant structures, while detection models struggle to explicitly aggregate fragmented event responses into coherent high-order object features. To address these limitations, we present Event Dual Temporal-Relational Aggregation Detector (Ev-DTAD), a unified EOD framework that integrates representation-level temporal encoding with model-level temporal-hypergraph reasoning.
