在WildFake、Chameleon、RRDataset等数据集上实现域内和跨域SOTA性能。
通过伪影定位提供可解释性，增强内容验证的可靠性。
analysis.experiments: 在WildFake、Chameleon、RRDataset等数据集上评估，域内和跨域均达到SOTA，但摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖大规模视觉基础模型，计算资源需求较高。
跨域泛化能力可能受限于训练数据分布。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SPECTRA-Net通过多视图特征融合实现跨域AI生成图像检测，兼具高精度与可解释性。

papers.title: From Historical Tabular Image to Knowledge Graphs: A Provenance-Aware Modular Pipeline
papers.abstract: Handwritten archival tables contain rich historical information, yet transforming them into structured representations, such as Knowledge Graphs, requires integrating table structure recognition, handwriting recognition, and semantic interpretation - a complex multimodal process. End-to-end AI implementations can obscure these steps, resulting in opaque algorithmic operations that hinder human oversight, critical assessment, and trust. To address this, we present a modular, provenance-aware pipeline to convert handwritten tabular images into KGs supporting human-AI collaboration. The pipeline decomposes the workflow into three stages - table reconstruction, information extraction, and KG construction - while exposing intermediate representations for inspection, evaluation, and correction. A key contribution of our approach is the systematic integration of data provenance at every stage, ensuring that all extracted entities and literals remain traceable to their visual and textual origins. The proposed pipeline is demonstrated through a number of experiments on real-world archival material concerning military careers. The results across three different table reconstruction variants highlight the importance of modularisation. By coupling modularity with data provenance, our work advances transparent and collaboratively controllable image-to-KG pipelines for complex historical data.

analysis.tldr: 提出模块化、可溯源流水线，将手写表格图像转换为知识图谱，支持人机协作与透明审查。
analysis.research_motivation: 手写档案表格蕴含丰富历史信息，但端到端AI实现会模糊处理步骤，阻碍人工监督、评估和信任。
analysis.problem: 如何将手写表格图像透明、可溯源、可人工干预地转换为知识图谱。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将流水线分解为表格重建、信息提取和知识图谱构建三个阶段，每阶段暴露中间表示供检查、评估和修正，并系统集成数据溯源。
contributions: 提出模块化、可溯源的流水线，将手写表格图像转换为知识图谱。
在每阶段集成数据溯源，确保实体和字面量可追溯到视觉和文本来源。
analysis.experiments: 在真实军事生涯档案材料上实验，对比三种表格重建变体，结果强调模块化的重要性。
limitations: 可能依赖特定表格结构假设，泛化性待验证。
未提及大规模或多样化数据集上的性能。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出模块化、可溯源流水线，将手写表格图像转换为知识图谱，支持人机协作与透明审查。

papers.title: Test-Time Training for Visual Foresight Vision-Language-Action Models
papers.abstract: Visual Foresight VLA (VF-VLA) has become a prominent architectural choice in the recent VLA due to its impressive performance. Nevertheless, the inherent design of VF-VLA makes it particularly vulnerable to out-of-distribution (OOD) shifts. Because the quality of action directly depends on the accuracy of the predicted future visual information, OOD conditions affect both stages at once. To address this vulnerability, we propose Test-Time Training Visual Foresight VLA ($T^3$VF), a test-time training approach motivated by the observation that the predicted future image and its subsequent observation form a natural supervision pair. To further address the practical challenges that arise from indiscriminate test-time updates, we introduce an adaptive update filtering mechanism. Empirically, $T^3$VF mitigates the OOD vulnerability of VF-VLA at a modest additional inference cost, without requiring any architectural modification or auxiliary modules.

analysis.tldr: 提出测试时训练方法缓解视觉预见VLA模型在分布外场景下的脆弱性。
analysis.research_motivation: 视觉预见VLA模型因依赖未来视觉预测质量，在分布外场景下性能严重下降，现有方法缺乏针对性解决方案。
analysis.problem: VF-VLA模型在分布外条件下，预测未来图像与动作质量同时退化的问题。

contributions: 首次将测试时训练应用于视觉预见VLA模型以缓解分布外脆弱性

papers.title: Low-Cost Stereo Vision for Robust 3D Positioning of Thin Radiata Pine Branches in Autonomous Drone Pruning
papers.abstract: Manual pruning of radiata pine, a species of major economic importance to New Zealand forestry, is hazardous, labour-intensive, and increasingly constrained by workforce shortages. Existing autonomous pruning platforms typically rely on expensive sensors such as LiDAR and are limited to thick branches, which restricts their wider adoption. This paper investigates whether a single low-cost stereo camera mounted on a drone can provide sufficiently accurate branch detection and three-dimensional positioning to support autonomous pruning of branches as thin as 10 mm, thereby removing the need for auxiliary depth sensors. The proposed pipeline comprises two stages: branch segmentation and depth estimation. For segmentation, Mask R-CNN variants and the YOLOv8 and YOLOv9 families are compared on a custom dataset of 71 stereo image pairs captured with a ZED Mini camera; YOLOv8 and YOLOv9 are selected as representative state-of-the-art real-time segmentors at the time of data collection, and the framework is designed to remain compatible with newer YOLO releases. For depth estimation, a traditional method (SGBM with WLS filtering) and deep-learning-based methods (PSMNet, ACVNet, GWCNet, MobileStereoNet, RAFT-Stereo, and NeRF-Supervised Deep Stereo) are evaluated, including cross-dataset fine-tuning experiments that expose the domain gap between urban driving benchmarks and natural forestry scenes. The main novelty of this work lies in coupling stereo segmentation with a centroid-based triangulation algorithm and Median-Absolute-Deviation outlier rejection that converts a segmentation mask and disparity map into a single robust branch-to-camera distance, addressing the challenges of sparse texture, thin structures, and noisy disparity values typical of forest scenes. Qualitative evaluations at distances of 1-2 m show that the learning-based stereo methods produce more coherent depth es...

analysis.tldr: 低成本立体视觉实现无人机自主修剪辐射松细枝的3D定位。
analysis.research_motivation: 人工修剪辐射松危险、劳动密集且劳动力短缺，现有自主修剪平台依赖昂贵LiDAR传感器且仅适用于粗枝，限制了推广。
analysis.problem: 如何仅用低成本立体相机实现无人机上细至10mm树枝的精确检测与3D定位，以替代辅助深度传感器。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 城市驾驶基准与自然林业场景之间存在域差距；森林场景中纹理稀疏、结构细薄、视差值噪声大。
analysis.method: 两阶段流水线：分支分割（比较Mask R-CNN、YOLOv8/9）和深度估计（比较SGBM+WLS、PSMNet等），结合基于质心的三角测量算法和中位数绝对偏差异常值剔除，将分割掩码和视差图转换为鲁棒的枝到相机距离。
contributions: 提出一种仅用低成本立体相机即可实现细枝（10mm）检测与3D定位的无人机修剪框架。
系统比较了多种分割和深度估计方法，并揭示了城市驾驶与林业场景的域差距。
设计了质心三角测量与MAD异常值剔除方法，有效应对稀疏纹理和噪声视差。
analysis.experiments: 在71对ZED Mini相机拍摄的立体图像上评估分割和深度估计方法，定性评估1-2米距离下的深度一致性。摘要未提供定量实验结果。
limitations: 数据集规模较小（71对图像），可能限制泛化性。
仅定性评估深度一致性，缺乏定量精度指标。

papers.title: Harmonized Feature Conditioning and Frequency-Prompt Personalization for Multi-Rater Medical Segmentation
papers.abstract: Multi-rater medical image segmentation captures the inherent ambiguity of clinical interpretation, where diagnostic boundaries vary across experts and imaging devices. Existing approaches often reduce this diversity to consensus labels or treat rater differences as noise, resulting in overconfident and poorly calibrated models. We propose a harmonized probabilistic framework that disentangles acquisition artifacts from genuine annotator variability through adaptive feature conditioning and frequency-domain personalization. A lightweight Harmonizer Network implicitly models scanner-specific artifacts and performs dynamic feature modulation to standardize latent representations, ensuring that uncertainty reflects anatomy rather than noise. To represent rater-specific styles, we introduce a novel High-Frequency Prompt Modules that operate in the spectral domain to encode annotator-dependent boundary precision and textural sensitivity. These prompts adaptively modulate harmonized features to produce personalized yet anatomically consistent segmentations. Furthermore, a Generalized Energy Distance based regularization aligns the generative distribution with empirical annotation variability, promoting diversity where experts disagree and consensus where they converge. Experiments on LIDC-IDRI and NPC-170 show SOTA aggregated and individualized segmentation, with notable GED reductions and improved Dice scores, especially on noisy cases. Beyond accuracy, the model exhibits clinically meaningful uncertainty. Confidence rises in agreement regions and declines in ambiguous areas, supporting its use as a reliable and interpretable tool for multi-expert clinical workflows.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种概率框架，通过特征条件化和频域提示实现多专家医学图像分割，兼顾共识与个体差异。
analysis.research_motivation: 多专家标注的医学图像分割中，现有方法常将专家差异视为噪声或强制共识，导致模型过自信且校准差，无法反映临床解释的固有歧义。
analysis.problem: 如何同时建模采集伪影和标注者变异，生成既个性化又解剖一致的分割结果，并输出有意义的置信度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出调和概率框架：1) Harmonizer Network 隐式建模设备伪影并动态调制特征；2) 高频提示模块在频域编码标注者边界精度和纹理敏感性；3) 广义能量距离正则化对齐生成分布与经验标注变异。
contributions: 提出调和特征条件化和频域个性化框架，分离采集伪影与标注者变异。
引入高频提示模块在频域编码标注者风格，实现个性化分割。
采用广义能量距离正则化促进专家分歧处多样性、共识处一致性。
analysis.experiments: 在 LIDC-IDRI 和 NPC-170 数据集上达到 SOTA 聚合与个体分割性能，GED 显著降低，Dice 提升，尤其在噪声病例上；模型置信度在共识区域高、歧义区域低。
limitations: 可能依赖特定频域变换，泛化性待验证。
Harmonizer Network 需额外训练，可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities

papers.title: A Breast Vision Pathology Foundation Model for Real-world Clinical Utility
papers.abstract: Pathology foundation models have shown strong retrospective performance, but whether such systems can support clinically relevant use remains unclear. This challenge is particularly important in breast cancer, where pathological assessment serves as the gold standard for diagnosis and guides treatment planning, surgical decision-making and risk stratification across pre-, intra- and post-operative stages. Here we present \textbf{BRAVE}, a breast-adaptive pathology foundation model developed and evaluated using a total resource of 101,638 breast whole-slide images from 32 sources across Asia, Europe and North America. We assessed BRAVE across 34 tasks in 82 cohorts spanning pre-operative biopsy, intra-operative frozen section and post-operative resection, using an evidence chain comprising retrospective benchmarking, clinically challenging scenarios, workflow-oriented clinical impact simulations, prospective observational validation with the thresholds locked in the retrospective cohorts and crossover pathologist-AI interaction studies. Across these settings, BRAVE supported practical roles in the clinical workflow, including safe exclusion of low-risk cases from routine review, AI-assisted second-review rescue of initially missed positives and prioritization of cases for further assessment. In prospective validation across three centres, BRAVE excluded 76.9% of negative biopsy cases (NPV 0.953) and 70.1% of negative frozen-section cases (NPV 0.973), and triaged 78.8% of post-operative subtyping cases as high-confidence clear-cut cases (NPV 1.000). In reader studies, AI assistance improved balanced accuracy from 88.5% to 95.1% (OR 3.14, P<0.001), with better efficiency, confidence and inter-rater agreement. BRAVE-derived scores also independently predicted disease-free survival (adjusted HR 4.79, P<0.001) and overall survival (adjusted HR 8.14, P<0.001).

analysis.tldr: BRAVE是一个乳腺病理基础模型，在34项任务中验证了临床实用性，包括前瞻性验证和交叉研究。
analysis.research_motivation: 病理基础模型在回顾性研究中表现良好，但能否支持临床实际应用尚不清楚，尤其在乳腺癌中，病理评估是诊断金标准，指导治疗决策。
analysis.problem: 验证病理基础模型在真实临床工作流中的实用性和有效性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建乳腺自适应病理基础模型BRAVE，使用来自32个来源的101,638张全切片图像，通过回顾性基准测试、临床挑战场景、工作流模拟、前瞻性验证和交叉研究进行评估。
contributions: 提出并评估了乳腺病理基础模型BRAVE，覆盖术前活检、术中冰冻切片和术后切除等阶段。
通过前瞻性验证和交叉研究证明了模型在临床工作流中的实用价值，如安全排除低风险病例、辅助二次审查和病例优先级排序。
analysis.experiments: 在82个队列的34项任务中评估，包括回顾性基准、临床挑战场景、工作流模拟、前瞻性验证（三个中心）和病理学家-AI交叉研究。前瞻性验证中，BRAVE排除了76.9%的阴性活检病例（NPV 0.953）和70.1%的阴性冰冻切片病例（NPV 0.973），并分类了78.8%的术后亚型病例（NPV 1.000）。AI辅助将平衡准确率从88.5%提升至95.1%（OR 3.14, P<0.001）。BRAVE评分独立预测无病生存期（调整HR 4.79, P<0.001）和总生存期（调整HR 8.14, P<0.001）。
limitations: 可能仅针对乳腺癌，泛化到其他癌症类型需进一步验证。
前瞻性验证的样本量和中心数量有限，可能影响结论的普适性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities

papers.title: Survey on Disaster Management Datasets for Remote Sensing Based Emergency Applications
papers.abstract: Recent natural disasters have highlighted the urgent need for efficient data-driven approaches to disaster management. Machine learning (ML) and deep learning (DL) techniques have shown considerable promise in enhancing the key phases of disaster management including mitigation, preparedness, detection, response, and recovery. A critical enabler of successful ML or DL based applications in remote sensing, however, is the accessibility and quality of annotated datasets. With the growing availability of high-resolution imagery from unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) and satellites, computer vision and remote sensing algorithms have become essential tools for rapid detection, situational assessment, and decision-making in disaster scenarios. This survey provides a comprehensive overview of publicly available image-based datasets relevant to ML/DL-based disaster management pipelines. Emphasis is placed on datasets that support computer vision and remote sensing tasks across all phases of disaster events including pre-disaster, during, and post-disaster. The goal of this work is to serve as a centralized reference for researchers and practitioners seeking high-quality datasets for rapid development and deployment of remote sensing-driven disaster response solutions.

analysis.tldr: 综述遥感灾害管理数据集，为ML/DL应急应用提供集中参考。

papers.title: Normalization Equivariance for Arbitrary Backbones, with Application to Image Denoising
papers.abstract: Normalization Equivariance (NE), equivariance to global contrast and brightness transforms, improves robustness to distribution shift in image-to-image prediction. Existing methods enforce this prior by constraining internal layers to NE-compatible families, limiting compatibility with standard components such as attention and LayerNorm, and adding runtime cost. We characterize the full NE function class: a function is NE if and only if it admits a normalize-process-denormalize factorization. This turns exact NE enforcement, for the ideal wrapper, from an internal architectural constraint into an input-output parameterization problem, allowing a parameter-free wrapper (WNE) to enforce NE around any backbone, including transformers. In a single-noise mismatch diagnostic for blind denoising, the wrapper improves CNN and transformer robustness with no measurable GPU overhead; architectural NE baselines incur up to a 1.6x slowdown.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种与骨干网络无关的归一化等变包装器（WNE），通过输入-输出参数化实现精确的归一化等变，在图像去噪中提升鲁棒性且无额外计算开销。
analysis.research_motivation: 归一化等变（NE）能提升图像到图像预测对分布偏移的鲁棒性，但现有方法通过约束内部层实现，限制了与标准组件（如注意力、LayerNorm）的兼容性，并增加了运行时开销。
analysis.problem: 如何在不修改骨干网络内部结构的前提下，精确且高效地强制实现归一化等变。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出WNE包装器，基于归一化-处理-反归一化的分解，将NE强制从内部架构约束转化为输入-输出参数化问题，可应用于任意骨干网络（包括Transformer）。
contributions: 完整刻画了归一化等变函数类，证明函数是NE当且仅当可分解为归一化-处理-反归一化形式。
提出无参数包装器WNE，可在任意骨干网络上强制NE，无需修改内部结构，且无GPU开销。
analysis.experiments: 在单噪声失配诊断任务（盲去噪）上，WNE提升了CNN和Transformer的鲁棒性，无额外GPU开销；而架构级NE基线最多导致1.6倍减速。
limitations: 仅针对图像去噪任务验证，其他图像到图像预测任务效果未知。
可能对某些极端分布偏移的鲁棒性提升有限。

papers.title: A Robust Out-of-Distribution Detection Framework via Synergistic Smoothing
papers.abstract: Reliable out-of-distribution (OOD) detection is a critical requirement for the safe deployment of machine learning systems. Despite recent progress, state-of-the-art OOD detectors are highly susceptible to adversarial attacks, which undermines their trustworthiness in automated systems. To address this vulnerability, we apply median smoothing to baseline OOD detection scores, balancing clean and adversarial accuracies. Our key insight is that the noisy samples generated for median smoothing can be repurposed to quantify the local instability of the base score. We observe that OOD samples exhibit higher instability under perturbation. Based on this, we propose ROSS, a novel and robust post-hoc OOD detector that leverages the instability of baseline scores to further distinguish between in-distribution (ID) and OOD samples. ROSS achieves symmetric robustness, performing strongly against both score-minimising and score-maximising attacks, unlike prior work. This symmetric defence leads to state-of-the-art robustness, outperforming prior methods by up to 40 AUROC points. We demonstrate ROSS's effectiveness on extensive experiments across CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and ImageNet. Code is available at: this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于中值平滑和局部不稳定性量化的鲁棒OOD检测方法，在对抗攻击下性能显著提升。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有OOD检测器在对抗攻击下脆弱，威胁系统安全性，需要鲁棒的检测方法。
analysis.problem: 如何设计对对抗攻击（包括分数最小化和最大化攻击）具有对称鲁棒性的OOD检测方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: OOD样本在扰动下表现出更高的局部不稳定性，可用于区分ID和OOD。
analysis.method: 对基线OOD检测分数应用中值平滑，并利用平滑过程中生成的噪声样本量化局部不稳定性，提出ROSS检测器。
contributions: 提出一种基于中值平滑和局部不稳定性量化的鲁棒OOD检测框架ROSS
实现对称鲁棒性，同时抵御分数最小化和最大化攻击，在多个基准上达到SOTA

limitations: 可能依赖基线检测器的质量

papers.title: Neuroscience-Inspired Analyses of Visual Interestingness in Multimodal Transformers
papers.abstract: Human attention is the gateway to conscious perception, memory and decision-making. However, its role in modern transformer models remains largely unexplored. As these systems increasingly influence what people see, prefer and buy, the question arises as to whether they encode principles of human interest or merely exploit large-scale correlations. Addressing this issue is crucial for understanding cognition and ensuring the responsible use of AI in communication and marketing. In order to address this issue, the concept of visual interest was examined within the multimodal vision-language-model Qwen3-VL-8B, using a pre-defined Common Interestingness (CI) score derived from large-scale human engagement data on the photo-sharing platform Flickr. Here, we analyzed internal representations across vision and language components using methods from the neurosciences. Our analyses revealed that CI information is linearly decodable from final-layer embeddings, indicating that it is aligned with human-derived measures of visual interestingness. Dimensionality reduction and Generalized Discrimination Value (GDV) analyses demonstrate that CI-related hidden representations emerge in intermediate vision transformer layers and becomes progressively more distinguishable across language model layers. Concept vectors derived using geometric, probe, and Sparse Auto-Encoder based methods converge in higher layers, as confirmed by representational similarity analysis. This indicates a robust and structured encoding of visual interestingness without explicit supervision. Future work will seek to identify shared computational principles linking human brain dynamics and transformer architectures, with the ultimate goal of uncovering the organizing mechanisms that give rise to attention and interest in both biological and artificial systems.

analysis.tldr: 受神经科学启发，分析多模态Transformer中视觉趣味性的内部表征，发现其编码与人类兴趣对齐。
analysis.research_motivation: 人类注意力是感知、记忆和决策的关键，但现代Transformer模型是否编码人类兴趣原则尚不清楚，这对理解认知和确保AI在通信与营销中的负责任使用至关重要。
analysis.problem: 探究多模态视觉-语言模型Qwen3-VL-8B是否以及如何编码视觉趣味性（visual interestingness）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验现象，但指出CI信息可从最终层嵌入线性解码，且CI相关隐藏表征在中间视觉Transformer层出现，并在语言模型层中逐渐更可区分。
analysis.method: 使用神经科学方法（线性解码、降维、GDV分析、概念向量、表征相似性分析）分析多模态Transformer内部表征。
contributions: 发现视觉趣味性信息可从最终层嵌入线性解码，与人类兴趣对齐。
揭示CI相关表征在中间视觉层出现并在语言层逐渐可区分，且多种概念向量方法在高层次收敛。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅分析单一模型Qwen3-VL-8B，泛化性未知。
未涉及因果干预或行为实验验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 受神经科学启发，分析多模态Transformer中视觉趣味性的内部表征，发现其编码与人类兴趣对齐。

papers.title: Sparsity Hurts: Simple Linear Adapter Can Boost Generalized Category Discovery
papers.abstract: Generalized Category Discovery (GCD) seeks to identify novel categories from unlabeled data while retaining the classification ability of seen categories. Prior GCD methods commonly leverage transferable representations from pre-trained models, adapting to downstream datasets via partial fine-tuning (updating only the final ViT block) and visual prompt tuning (appending learnable vectors to inputs). However, conventional partial fine-tuning offers limited flexibility, as it fails to adapt the entire model; meanwhile, visual prompt tuning is prone to overfitting, due to its sensitivity to initialization and inherently constrained capacity. To address these limitations, we propose LAGCD, a simple yet effective GCD approach that embeds a residual linear adapter into each ViT block. From the perspective of feature sparsity, we systematically show that non-linearity in conventional adapters impairs performance, whereas our linear adapter enhances it by enabling more flexible model capacity. We further introduce an auxiliary distribution alignment loss to mitigate the negative impact of biased predictions between seen and novel categories. Extensive experiments on both generic and fine-grained datasets confirm that LAGCD consistently improves performance over many sophisticated baselines. The source code is available at this https URL

analysis.tldr: 提出LAGCD，通过在ViT块中嵌入残差线性适配器提升广义类别发现性能，并揭示非线性适配器因特征稀疏性而损害性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有GCD方法中，部分微调灵活性不足，视觉提示调优易过拟合且容量受限，亟需更有效的适配策略。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种简单有效的适配方法，既能灵活调整整个模型，又能避免过拟合，从而提升广义类别发现性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 从特征稀疏性角度系统证明，传统适配器中的非线性会损害性能，而线性适配器通过更灵活的模型容量提升性能。
analysis.method: 在每个ViT块中嵌入残差线性适配器，并引入辅助分布对齐损失以缓解已见和未见类别之间的预测偏差。
contributions: 提出LAGCD，一种简单有效的GCD方法，通过残差线性适配器实现全模型适应。
从特征稀疏性角度揭示非线性适配器损害性能、线性适配器提升性能的机理。
引入辅助分布对齐损失缓解类别预测偏差，在多个数据集上超越复杂基线。
analysis.experiments: 在通用和细粒度数据集上进行大量实验，LAGCD一致优于多个复杂基线。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能对适配器插入位置和数量敏感，需进一步探索最优配置。
分布对齐损失可能在某些极端不平衡数据下效果有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出LAGCD，通过在ViT块中嵌入残差线性适配器提升广义类别发现性能，并揭示非线性适配器因特征稀疏性而损害性能。

papers.title: Text-Guided Multi-Scale Frequency Representation Adaptation
papers.abstract: Parameter-efficient fine-tuning methods introduce a small number of training parameters, enabling pre-trained models to adapt rapidly to new data distributions. While these methods have shown promising results, they exhibit notable limitations. First, most existing methods operate in the signal space domain, which results in substantial information redundancy. Second, most existing methods utilize fixed prompts or adaptation layers, failing to fully account for the multi-scale characteristics of signals. To address these challenges, we propose the Multi-Scale Frequency Adapter (FreqAdapter), which integrates textual information and performs multi-scale fine-tuning of signals in the frequency domain. Additionally, we introduce a multi-scale adaptation strategy to optimize receptive fields across different frequency ranges, further enhancing the model's representational capacity. Extensive experiments on multimodal models, including CLIP and LLaVA, demonstrate that FreqAdapter significantly improves both performance and efficiency. FreqAdapter improves performance with minimal cost and fast convergence within one epoch. Code is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出FreqAdapter，在频域进行多尺度微调，提升多模态模型参数高效微调的性能与效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有参数高效微调方法在信号空间域操作导致信息冗余，且使用固定提示或适配层，未充分利用信号的多尺度特性。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种参数高效微调方法，在频域进行多尺度适应，减少冗余并提升模型表征能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出多尺度频率适配器（FreqAdapter），在频域集成文本信息并进行多尺度微调，通过多尺度适应策略优化不同频率范围的感受野。
contributions: 提出FreqAdapter，在频域进行多尺度参数高效微调，减少信息冗余。
引入多尺度适应策略，优化不同频率范围的感受野，增强模型表征能力。
在CLIP和LLaVA上实验证明，FreqAdapter以最小成本提升性能，且在一轮内快速收敛。
analysis.experiments: 在CLIP和LLaVA等多模态模型上进行实验，显示性能提升和效率改进，代码已开源。
limitations: 可能仅在特定多模态模型上验证，泛化性需进一步探索。
频域变换可能引入额外计算开销，尽管声称高效。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出FreqAdapter，在频域进行多尺度微调，提升多模态模型参数高效微调的性能与效率。

papers.title: KARMA-MV: A Benchmark for Causal Question Answering on Music Videos
papers.abstract: While significant progress has been made in Video Question Answering and cross-modal understanding, causal reasoning about how visual dynamics drive musical structure in music videos remains under-explored. We introduce KARMA-MV, a large-scale multiple-choice QA dataset derived from 2,682 YouTube music videos, designed to test models' ability to integrate temporal audio-visual cues and reason about visual-to-musical influence across reasoning, prediction, and counterfactual questions. Unlike traditional datasets requiring manual annotation, KARMA-MV leverages LLM reasoning for scalable generation and validation, yielding 37,737 MCQs. We propose a causal knowledge graph (CKG) approach that augments vision-language models (VLMs) with structured retrieval of cross-modal dependencies. Experiments on state-of-the-art VLMs and LLMs show consistent gains from CKG grounding -- especially for smaller models -- establishing the value of explicit causal structure for music-video reasoning. KARMA-MV provides a new benchmark for advancing causal audio-visual understanding beyond correlation.

analysis.tldr: KARMA-MV 是一个用于音乐视频中因果问答的大规模基准数据集，通过因果知识图谱增强视觉-语言模型，显著提升因果推理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频问答和跨模态理解研究主要关注相关性，而音乐视频中视觉动态如何驱动音乐结构的因果推理尚未被充分探索。
analysis.problem: 缺乏专门评估音乐视频中视觉-音乐因果推理能力的数据集和方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建大规模多选题问答数据集 KARMA-MV（来自 2,682 个 YouTube 音乐视频，含 37,737 道题），并设计因果知识图谱（CKG）方法增强视觉-语言模型的结构化检索能力。
contributions: 提出 KARMA-MV，首个大规模音乐视频因果问答基准数据集。
提出因果知识图谱（CKG）方法，通过结构化跨模态依赖检索提升 VLM 的因果推理能力。
analysis.experiments: 在多个 SOTA VLM 和 LLM 上实验，CKG 方法持续带来性能提升，尤其对小模型效果显著。
limitations: 数据集仅涵盖音乐视频领域，泛化性未知。
CKG 方法依赖外部知识图谱构建，可能引入额外开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: KARMA-MV 是一个用于音乐视频中因果问答的大规模基准数据集，通过因果知识图谱增强视觉-语言模型，显著提升因果推理能力。

papers.title: CASISR: Circular Arbitrary-Scale Image Super-Resolution
papers.abstract: The generalization performance (GP) of deep learning-based arbitrary-scale image super-resolution (ASISR) methods is subject to limited training datasets and unlimited testing datasets. It is vitally significant to enhance the GP of the pretrained ASISR models by making full use of the testing samples. The ASISR models usually employ an open-loop architecture from low-resolution (LR) images to super-resolution (SR) images. The degradation model from SR samples to LR samples is known bicubic down-sampling for the classical ASISR, is supposed down-sampling with additive random noise for the blind ASISR, and is learnable for the real-world ASISR. Combining the ASISR and degradation models, it is potentially possible to adopt a closed-loop architecture based on the automatic control theory for strengthening the GP of the ASISR methods. Therefore, this paper proposes a closed-loop architecture, circular ASISR (CASISR), to lift the capability of image reconstruction. A mathematical nonlinear loop equation is established to describe the CASISR, the reasonability of the CASISR is proven by conditional probability theory, and the stability of the CASISR is proven by Taylor series approximation. The first-order and second-order absolute difference images are defined to compare the image reconstruction performance of the ASISR and the CASISR methods. Comprehensive simulation experiments show that the proposed CASISR approach outperforms the eight state-of-the-art ASISR approaches in the quality of image reconstruction. Especially, the proposed CASISR is extraordinarily suitable for fractional SR scale factors and is extremely effective for text and stripe images with drastically changed edges.

analysis.tldr: 提出闭环架构CASISR，通过循环反馈提升任意尺度超分模型的泛化性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有任意尺度超分模型因训练数据有限而泛化性能不足，且采用开环架构无法利用测试样本信息。
analysis.problem: 如何通过闭环反馈机制增强预训练任意尺度超分模型在测试时的图像重建能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出闭环架构CASISR，结合超分模型与退化模型形成反馈回路，用非线性环路方程描述，并用条件概率和泰勒级数证明合理性与稳定性。
contributions: 提出闭环任意尺度超分架构CASISR，提升泛化性能
建立数学环路方程并证明其合理性与稳定性
定义一阶和二阶绝对差分图像用于性能比较
analysis.experiments: 在仿真实验中，CASISR在图像重建质量上优于八种最先进方法，尤其适用于分数缩放因子和边缘剧烈变化的文本/条纹图像。
limitations: 可能依赖已知退化模型（如双三次下采样）
闭环架构可能增加计算开销
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出闭环架构CASISR，通过循环反馈提升任意尺度超分模型的泛化性能。

papers.title: Augmented Equivariant Mesh Networks for Anatomical Segmentation
papers.abstract: Anatomical mesh segmentation requires models that operate directly on irregular surface geometry while remaining robust to arbitrary patient pose and mesh resolution variation. Existing task-specific mesh and point-cloud methods are not equivariant, and can degrade sharply under test-time perturbation, for example dropping by 25-26 IoU points on intraoral scan segmentation at $40^\circ$ tilt. We present EAMS, an Equivariant Anatomical Mesh Segmentor built on Equivariant Mesh Neural Networks (EMNN), and evaluate it across four clinically distinct tasks spanning edge-, vertex-, and face-level supervision. We combine intrinsic mesh descriptors with anatomy-aware priors, including PCA-derived frames for dental arches and liver surfaces, and augment message passing to provide lightweight global context. Across intracranial aneurysm and intraoral segmentation, EAMS variants are competitive with specialized baselines on unperturbed inputs while remaining stable under geometric perturbations, and on liver surfaces they expose a favorable trade-off between canonical-pose accuracy and rotation robustness. These results show that a lightweight ($<2$M parameters) equivariant framework can deliver robust anatomical mesh segmentation across diverse supervision types without task-specific architectures.

analysis.tldr: 提出轻量级等变网格网络EAMS，在解剖分割中实现旋转鲁棒性且无需任务特定架构。
analysis.research_motivation: 解剖网格分割需要直接处理不规则表面几何的模型，同时要对任意患者姿态和网格分辨率变化保持鲁棒。现有方法缺乏等变性，在测试时扰动下性能急剧下降（如口内扫描分割在40°倾斜时IoU下降25-26点）。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个轻量级、等变且鲁棒的网格分割模型，能在多种解剖任务（边缘、顶点、面级监督）下保持性能稳定。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有非等变方法在几何扰动下性能严重退化（如40°倾斜导致IoU下降25-26点），而等变框架能保持稳定。
analysis.method: 基于等变网格神经网络（EMNN），结合内在网格描述子与解剖先验（如PCA导出的牙弓/肝脏表面坐标系），并通过增强消息传递提供轻量级全局上下文。
contributions: 提出EAMS，首个轻量级（<2M参数）等变解剖网格分割框架，适用于多种监督类型。
在颅内动脉瘤、口内扫描和肝脏表面三个临床任务上验证，在无扰动输入下与专用基线竞争，并在几何扰动下保持鲁棒。
analysis.experiments: 在四个临床任务（颅内动脉瘤、口内扫描、肝脏表面）上评估，涵盖边缘、顶点、面级监督。与专用基线比较，在无扰动输入上表现相当，在几何扰动下保持稳定。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能仅在特定解剖结构（牙弓、肝脏）上验证了PCA先验的有效性。
轻量级设计可能在大规模或高分辨率网格上性能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出轻量级等变网格网络EAMS，在解剖分割中实现旋转鲁棒性且无需任务特定架构。

papers.title: Optimized Culprit Identification Using Mobilenet and Attention Mechanisms
papers.abstract: Automated culprit identification in surveillance systems is a critical task that requires high accuracy along with computational efficiency for real-time deployment. In this paper, an optimized deep learning framework is proposed using a lightweight MobileNet architecture integrated with channel and spatial attention mechanisms. The proposed model enhances feature representation by selectively focusing on the most discriminative regions while suppressing irrelevant background information, thereby improving identification performance. The framework incorporates efficient preprocessing, attention based feature refinement, and a robust classification strategy optimized using the Adam Optimizer. Experiments were conducted on benchmark face recognition datasets, including Labelled Faces in the Wild (LFW), CASIA-WebFace, and a subset of VGGFace2, under realistic conditions with variations in illumination, pose, and occlusion. The results demonstrate that the proposed model achieves a high classification accuracy of 97.8%, outperforming conventional models such as baseline CNN, ResNet, and standard MobileNet. The confusion matrix analysis indicates strong class-wise discrimination with minimal misclassification, while ROC-AUC evaluation confirms robust performance across all classes. Additionally, the proposed approach maintains low computational complexity and reduced inference time, making it suitable for real-time surveillance and edge-based applications.

analysis.tldr: 提出结合MobileNet与注意力机制的轻量级框架，在监控嫌疑人识别中达到97.8%准确率，兼顾实时性。
analysis.research_motivation: 监控系统中嫌疑人自动识别需要高精度与计算效率，现有方法在复杂条件下（光照、姿态、遮挡）性能不足，且难以部署于边缘设备。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持低计算复杂度的同时，提升监控场景下嫌疑人识别的准确性和鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于MobileNet轻量架构，集成通道注意力和空间注意力机制，通过Adam优化器训练，结合高效预处理和注意力特征精炼。
contributions: 提出轻量级MobileNet与注意力机制结合的框架，在多个基准数据集上达到97.8%准确率。
在保持低计算复杂度和推理时间的同时，优于基线CNN、ResNet和标准MobileNet。
analysis.experiments: 在LFW、CASIA-WebFace和VGGFace2子集上实验，包含光照、姿态、遮挡变化，报告了准确率、混淆矩阵和ROC-AUC。
limitations: 仅在公开人脸数据集上验证，未在真实监控场景中测试。
未讨论注意力机制引入的额外计算开销对极端边缘设备的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出结合MobileNet与注意力机制的轻量级框架，在监控嫌疑人识别中达到97.8%准确率，兼顾实时性。

papers.title: Digital Image Forgery Detection Using Transfer Learning
papers.abstract: The increasing availability of advanced image editing tools has led to a significant rise in manipulated digital content, posing serious challenges for digital forensics and information security. This study presents a transfer learning-based framework for digital image forgery detection that integrates compression-aware feature enhancement with deep convolutional neural network (CNN) architectures. The proposed approach introduces a hybrid input representation that combines RGB images with compression difference-based features (FDIFF), explicitly highlighting subtle manipulation artifacts that are often difficult to detect. In addition, a model-specific adaptive threshold optimization strategy based on the Youden Index is employed to improve classification reliability by achieving a better balance between true positive and false positive rates. Experiments conducted on the CASIA v2.0 dataset using multiple pretrained CNN architectures, including DenseNet121, VGG16, ResNet50, EfficientNetB0, MobileNet, and InceptionV3, demonstrate the effectiveness and robustness of the proposed framework. The models are evaluated using comprehensive performance metrics such as accuracy, precision, recall, F1-score, Matthews correlation coefficient (MCC), and area under the ROC curve (AUC). The results show that DenseNet121 achieves the highest accuracy and AUC, while ResNet50 provides the most balanced and reliable predictions with the highest MCC. The findings emphasize that relying solely on accuracy is insufficient for forensic applications, where minimizing false negatives is critical. Overall, the proposed framework improves the visibility of manipulation artifacts and enhances classification robustness, making it suitable for real-world digital image forgery detection scenarios.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种结合压缩感知特征增强与迁移学习的数字图像伪造检测框架，在CASIA v2.0上验证了多种CNN架构，DenseNet121准确率最高，ResNet50平衡性最佳。
analysis.research_motivation: 高级图像编辑工具导致数字内容篡改泛滥，对数字取证和信息安全构成严重威胁，现有方法难以检测细微伪造痕迹。
analysis.problem: 如何有效检测数字图像中的伪造痕迹，特别是利用压缩差异特征增强和自适应阈值优化来提高检测鲁棒性和可靠性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 仅依赖准确率不足以评估取证应用，需平衡真阳性率和假阳性率；不同预训练CNN架构在伪造检测中表现各异，DenseNet121准确率最高，ResNet50的MCC最高。
analysis.method: 结合RGB图像与压缩差异特征（FDIFF）的混合输入表示，使用预训练CNN进行迁移学习，并采用基于Youden指数的自适应阈值优化策略。
contributions: 提出一种融合压缩感知特征增强的混合输入表示，突出细微伪造痕迹。
引入基于Youden指数的模型自适应阈值优化，提升分类可靠性。
在CASIA v2.0上系统评估多种CNN架构，揭示准确率在取证中的局限性。
analysis.experiments: 在CASIA v2.0数据集上使用DenseNet121、VGG16、ResNet50、EfficientNetB0、MobileNet、InceptionV3进行实验，评估指标包括准确率、精确率、召回率、F1、MCC、AUC。
limitations: 仅在单一数据集CASIA v2.0上验证，泛化性未知。
未讨论计算开销或实时性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种结合压缩感知特征增强与迁移学习的数字图像伪造检测框架，在CASIA v2.0上验证了多种CNN架构，DenseNet121准确率最高，ResNet50平衡性最佳。

papers.title: MULTITEXTEDIT: Benchmarking Cross-Lingual Degradation in Text-in-Image Editing
papers.abstract: Text-in-image editing has become a key capability for visual content creation, yet existing benchmarks remain overwhelmingly English-centric and often conflate visual plausibility with semantic correctness. We introduce MULTITEXTEDIT, a controlled benchmark of 3,600 instances spanning 12 typologically diverse languages, 5 visual domains, and 7 editing operations. Language variants of each instance share a common visual base and are paired with a human-edited reference and region masks, isolating the language variable for cross-lingual comparison. To capture script-level errors that coarse text-matching metrics miss, such as missing diacritics, reversed RTL order, and mixed-script renderings, we introduce a language fidelity (LSF) metric scored by a two-stage LVM protocol that first traces the edited target text and then judges it in isolation, reaching a quadratic-weighted \k{appa} of 0.76 against native-speaker annotators. Evaluating 12 open-source and proprietary systems with LSF alongside standard semantic and mask-aware pixel metrics, we find pronounced cross-lingual degradation for every model, largest on Hebrew and Arabic and smallest on Dutch and Spanish, and concentrated in text accuracy and script fidelity rather than in coarse structural dimensions. We also uncover a pervasive semantic and pixel mismatch, where outputs preserve global layout and background fidelity yet distort script-specific forms.

analysis.tldr: 提出跨语言文本图像编辑基准MULTITEXTEDIT，发现所有模型在非英语语言上存在显著性能下降。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有文本图像编辑基准以英语为中心，且常混淆视觉合理性与语义正确性，缺乏对跨语言退化现象的系统评估。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个能够隔离语言变量、精确衡量跨语言文本图像编辑中语义和脚本层面退化的标准化基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 所有模型在非英语语言上均出现显著退化，希伯来语和阿拉伯语退化最严重，荷兰语和德语退化最小；退化集中在文本准确性和脚本保真度，而非粗粒度结构维度；存在全局布局和背景保真度保持但脚本特定形式失真的语义与像素不匹配。
analysis.method: 构建包含12种语言、5个视觉域、7种编辑操作的3600实例基准，引入语言保真度（LSF）指标，通过两阶段LVM协议评估脚本级错误。
contributions: 提出首个跨语言文本图像编辑基准MULTITEXTEDIT，覆盖12种语言和多种编辑操作。
引入语言保真度（LSF）指标，有效捕捉脚本级错误，与人工标注一致性高。
系统评估12个开源和商业系统，揭示跨语言退化的普遍性和模式。
analysis.experiments: 在12个开源和商业系统上评估，使用LSF、语义和掩码感知像素指标，发现所有模型存在跨语言退化。
limitations: 基准实例数量有限，可能无法覆盖所有语言变体。
LSF指标依赖LVM，可能受模型偏见影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出跨语言文本图像编辑基准MULTITEXTEDIT，发现所有模型在非英语语言上存在显著性能下降。

papers.title: Advanced Tumor Segmentation in PET/CT Imaging: A Training Strategy Study with nnU-Net for AutoPET III
papers.abstract: Tumor segmentation in whole-body PET/CT imaging is crucial for precise disease evaluation and treatment planning. However, it remains challenging due to variability in lesion size, contrast, and anatomical distribution. Relying on manual segmentation makes the process time-consuming and prone to intra- and inter-observer variability. This work presents a whole-body tumor segmentation method developed for the AutoPET III challenge, where the goal is to build models that generalize across tracers and multi-center data. We employ the nnU-Net framework with a ResNet-based encoder as our baseline and systematically investigate the impact of training strategies, including intensity normalization, batch dice optimization, and data augmentation using CraveMix. Our experiments show that these strategies significantly influence model performance, particularly in reducing false positives and improving robustness to lesion variability. The best-performing configuration achieves a Dice score of up to 0.80 on the preliminary test phase, and our method ranked third in the AutoPET III challenge. The code is publicly available here.

analysis.tldr: 基于nnU-Net框架，通过系统研究训练策略（强度归一化、批量Dice优化、CraveMix数据增强）提升PET/CT肿瘤分割性能，在AutoPET III挑战赛中获得第三名。
analysis.research_motivation: 全身PET/CT肿瘤分割对精准诊疗至关重要，但病灶大小、对比度和解剖分布差异大，手动分割耗时且存在观察者间变异，现有方法泛化性不足。
analysis.problem: 如何通过训练策略优化提升nnU-Net在跨示踪剂、多中心PET/CT数据上的肿瘤分割性能，特别是减少假阳性并增强对病灶变异性的鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出强度归一化、批量Dice优化和CraveMix数据增强等训练策略显著影响模型性能，尤其在减少假阳性和提升鲁棒性方面。
analysis.method: 采用基于ResNet编码器的nnU-Net框架，系统研究强度归一化、批量Dice优化和CraveMix数据增强三种训练策略的影响。
contributions: 系统评估了多种训练策略对PET/CT肿瘤分割的影响，并确定了最佳配置。
在AutoPET III挑战赛中获得第三名，Dice分数达0.80，代码开源。
analysis.experiments: 在AutoPET III挑战赛的初步测试阶段进行实验，最佳配置Dice分数达0.80，排名第三。摘要未提供详细实验设置。
limitations: 仅基于nnU-Net框架，未探索其他架构或更复杂的模型。
Dice分数0.80仍有提升空间，可能对极小或低对比度病灶分割效果有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 基于nnU-Net框架，通过系统研究训练策略（强度归一化、批量Dice优化、CraveMix数据增强）提升PET/CT肿瘤分割性能，在AutoPET III挑战赛中获得第三名。

papers.title: WATCH: Wide-Area Archaeological Site Tracking for Change Detection
papers.abstract: Monitoring archaeological sites at scale is vital for protecting cultural heritage, yet pinpointing when disturbances occur remains difficult because visual cues are subtle and ground-truth data are sparse. We introduce WATCH, a framework for month-level change-event localization over PlanetScope satellite mosaics (2017-2024, 4.7 m/px) that supports three complementary scoring approaches: (i) Temporal Embedding Distance (TED), a training-free method that scores month-to-month deviations from a local temporal reference; (ii) Self-Supervised Change Detection (SSCD), an ensemble of reconstruction, forecasting, and latent-novelty signals; and (iii) a Weakly Supervised (WS) temporal localization model trained with sparse event-month labels. We benchmark WATCH on 1,943 archaeological sites in Afghanistan using embeddings from six foundation models (CLIP, GeoRSCLIP, SatMAE, Prithvi-EO-2.0, DINOv3, and Satlas-Pretrain) alongside a handcrafted spectral and texture baseline, and assess cross-regional generalization on sites in Syria, Turkey, Pakistan, and Egypt. The unsupervised approaches (TED, SSCD) consistently outperform the weakly supervised alternative. TED with SatMAE achieves the highest exact-month recall (55% at m=0), while TED with GeoRSCLIP, CLIP, or Satlas-Pretrain reaches 92.5% within a three-month tolerance (m=3). Handcrafted features remain competitive for exact-month detection under weak supervision. Our directional margin analysis reveals systematic temporal biases: SSCD paired with GeoRSCLIP or Prithvi-EO-2.0 exhibits the strongest early-warning profile, detecting anomalies before the recorded event, while TED favors confirmation-oriented detection after a change has materialized. These results show that satellite imagery combined with foundation-model embeddings enables scalable, decision-relevant heritage monitoring. Code: this https URL

analysis.tldr: WATCH 利用卫星影像和基础模型嵌入实现大规模考古遗址月度变化检测，无监督方法优于弱监督方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 大规模监测考古遗址对保护文化遗产至关重要，但视觉线索细微、真实数据稀疏，难以精确定位干扰发生时间。
analysis.problem: 实现月度级别的考古遗址变化事件定位，克服卫星影像中细微变化和稀疏标注的挑战。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 无监督方法（TED、SSCD）一致优于弱监督方法；不同嵌入模型和评分方法表现出系统性的时间偏差：SSCD 倾向于提前检测，TED 倾向于事后确认。
analysis.method: 提出 WATCH 框架，包含三种评分方法：无训练的时间嵌入距离（TED）、自监督变化检测（SSCD）和弱监督时间定位（WS），结合六种基础模型嵌入和手工特征。
contributions: 提出 WATCH 框架，支持三种互补的月度变化检测方法。
在阿富汗 1,943 个考古遗址上系统评估六种基础模型嵌入，并验证跨区域泛化能力。
揭示无监督方法优于弱监督方法，以及不同方法的时间偏差特性。
analysis.experiments: 在阿富汗 1,943 个考古遗址上使用六种基础模型嵌入和手工特征进行基准测试，并在叙利亚、土耳其、巴基斯坦和埃及评估跨区域泛化。
limitations: 弱监督方法性能有限，可能受限于稀疏标注。
跨区域泛化评估范围有限，未涵盖所有地理区域。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: WATCH 利用卫星影像和基础模型嵌入实现大规模考古遗址月度变化检测，无监督方法优于弱监督方法。

papers.title: HY-Himmel Technical Report: Hierarchical Interleaved Multi-stream Motion Encoding for Long Video Understanding
papers.abstract: Long-video understanding with multimodal language models suffers from three compounding bottlenecks: heavy decode cost to obtain dense RGB frames, quadratic token growth with frame count, and weak motion perception under sparse keyframe sampling. We present HY-Himmel, a hierarchical video-language framework that allocates semantic and motion capacity separately. A small set of sparse anchor I-frames is routed to the expensive host ViT to ground object identity and scene layout, while the far denser inter-frame intervals are encoded by a lightweight compressed-domain tri-stream adapter that distils motion evidence from motion-vector maps, residual maps, and I-frame context into aligned motion tokens. These tokens are injected into the LLM via a differentiable placeholder mechanism after a dedicated Stage-1 contrastive alignment that places the motion representation in a geometry compatible with the frozen visual backbone. On Video-MME, HY-Himmel surpasses the dense 32-frame baseline by +2.3 pp (61.2 to 63.5%) while using 3.6x fewer context tokens. Extensive ablations over stream composition, motion encoder family, fusion mode, alignment objective, anchor count, LoRA rank, and video duration confirm that the full tri-stream is necessary and sufficient for the observed gains.

analysis.tldr: HY-Himmel通过分层交织多流运动编码，在长视频理解中实现高效且准确的运动感知。
analysis.research_motivation: 长视频理解面临解码成本高、token数量随帧数二次增长以及稀疏关键帧下运动感知弱等瓶颈，现有方法难以兼顾效率与性能。
analysis.problem: 如何在不增加过多计算和token开销的前提下，有效编码长视频中的运动信息以提升多模态语言模型的理解能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要通过消融实验表明，完整的三流运动编码器（运动矢量、残差图、I帧上下文）对于性能提升是必要且充分的。
analysis.method: 提出HY-Himmel框架，采用分层设计：稀疏锚点I帧由昂贵的ViT处理以获取语义，密集帧间间隔由轻量级压缩域三流适配器编码运动信息，并通过可微占位符机制注入LLM，第一阶段进行对比对齐。
contributions: 提出分层交织多流运动编码框架，分离语义和运动处理。
设计轻量级压缩域三流适配器，高效编码运动信息。
在Video-MME上超越密集32帧基线，同时减少3.6倍上下文token。
analysis.experiments: 在Video-MME基准上，HY-Himmel达到63.5%准确率，比密集32帧基线高2.3个百分点，且token数减少3.6倍。进行了广泛的消融实验，包括流组成、运动编码器家族、融合模式、对齐目标、锚点数量、LoRA秩和视频时长。
limitations: 可能依赖特定压缩域特征，通用性待验证。
未在更多长视频基准上评估。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: HY-Himmel通过分层交织多流运动编码，在长视频理解中实现高效且准确的运动感知。

papers.title: LAGO: Language-Guided Adaptive Object-Region Focus for Zero-Shot Visual-Text Alignment
papers.abstract: Zero-shot recognition aims to classify an image by selecting the most compatible label description from a set of candidate classes without any task-specific supervision. In fine-grained settings, however, the relevant evidence often lies in localized parts, attributes, or textures rather than in the full image, making whole-image alignment suboptimal. Recent localized visual-text alignment methods address this by comparing class descriptions with multiple image regions, but they typically rely on large sets of random or redundant crops, increasing inference cost and introducing many highly redundant or weakly relevant candidates. Moreover, introducing semantic guidance too early can create an error-amplifying feedback process in which inaccurate intermediate predictions bias later localization and reinforce subsequent mistakes; we refer to this failure mode as the prediction loop. We propose LAGO (LAnguage-Guided adaptive Object-region focus), a framework for efficient and robust zero-shot localized visual-text alignment. LAGO first performs class-agnostic object-centric candidate discovery to obtain a stable visual initialization, and then applies adaptive language-guided refinement with the strength of semantic guidance controlled by intermediate confidence. It further combines object-level, contextual, and full-image evidence through an effective object-context dual-channel aggregation strategy. Extensive experiments show that LAGO consistently achieves state-of-the-art performance on standard zero-shot benchmarks and challenging distribution-shift settings, while requiring substantially fewer candidate regions at inference time.

analysis.tldr: LAGO通过类无关目标发现和自适应语言引导，实现高效零样本视觉-文本对齐。
analysis.research_motivation: 零样本识别中，全图对齐在细粒度场景下效果不佳，而现有局部对齐方法依赖大量随机裁剪，推理成本高且易引入冗余候选；同时，过早引入语义引导会导致预测循环错误放大。
analysis.problem: 如何高效且鲁棒地实现零样本局部视觉-文本对齐，避免冗余候选和预测循环问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，现有方法使用大量随机或冗余裁剪增加推理成本，且过早引入语义引导会形成预测循环，即不准确的中间预测偏差后续定位并强化错误。
analysis.method: LAGO先进行类无关的目标候选发现获得稳定视觉初始化，再根据中间置信度自适应控制语言引导强度进行细化，最后通过对象-上下文双通道聚合策略融合目标级、上下文和全图证据。
contributions: 提出类无关目标候选发现策略，避免语义引导过早引入导致的预测循环。
设计自适应语言引导细化机制，根据中间置信度动态调整语义引导强度。
提出对象-上下文双通道聚合策略，有效融合多层级证据。
analysis.experiments: 在标准零样本基准和分布偏移设置上达到最先进性能，且推理时所需候选区域数量显著减少。
limitations: 可能依赖目标检测器的质量，在无边界框监督下性能可能受限。
自适应置信度阈值可能需要针对不同数据集调整。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LAGO通过类无关目标发现和自适应语言引导，实现高效零样本视觉-文本对齐。

papers.title: VT-Bench: A Unified Benchmark for Visual-Tabular Multi-Modal Learning
papers.abstract: Multi-model learning has attracted great attention in visual-text tasks. However, visual-tabular data, which plays a pivotal role in high-stakes domains like healthcare and industry, remains underexplored. In this paper, we introduce \textit{VT-Bench}, the first unified benchmark for standardizing vision-tabular discriminative prediction and generative reasoning tasks. VT-Bench aggregates 14 datasets across 9 domains (medical-centric, while covering pets, media, and transportation) with over 756K samples. We evaluate 23 representative models, including unimodal experts, specialized visual-tabular models, general-purpose vision-language models (VLMs), and tool-augmented methods, highlighting substantial challenges of visual-tabular learning. We believe VT-Bench will stimulate the community to build more powerful multi-modal vision-tabular foundation models. Benchmark: this https URL

analysis.tldr: 首个统一视觉-表格多模态基准VT-Bench，覆盖14个数据集和23个模型，揭示该领域挑战。
analysis.research_motivation: 视觉-表格数据在医疗、工业等高风险领域至关重要，但缺乏统一基准来标准化评估和推动研究。
analysis.problem: 现有基准多聚焦视觉-文本任务，视觉-表格多模态学习缺乏标准化评测平台。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建包含14个数据集、9个领域、超75.6万样本的统一基准，并评估23个代表性模型（单模态专家、专用视觉-表格模型、通用VLM及工具增强方法）。
contributions: 首次提出视觉-表格多模态学习的统一基准VT-Bench。
系统评估23个模型，揭示视觉-表格学习的显著挑战。
analysis.experiments: 在14个数据集上评估23个模型，涵盖判别预测和生成推理任务。
limitations: 数据集主要来自医疗领域，其他领域覆盖有限。
未提供模型性能的具体数值或对比结果。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个统一视觉-表格多模态基准VT-Bench，覆盖14个数据集和23个模型，揭示该领域挑战。

papers.title: Self-Captioning Multimodal Interaction Tuning: Amplifying Exploitable Redundancies for Robust Vision Language Models
papers.abstract: Current vision language models face hallucination and robustness issues against ambiguous or corrupted modalities. We hypothesize that these issues can be addressed by exploiting the shared information between modalities to compensate for the impaired one. To this end, we analyze multimodal interactions -- redundant (shared), unique (exclusive), and synergistic (emergent) task-relevant information provided by the modalities -- to determine their impacts on model reliability. Specifically, amplifying redundant interactions would increase this exploitable shared information to resolve these issues; yet, modern instruction datasets often eliminate redundancies to prioritize visual grounding. We bridge this gap through a self-captioning workflow featuring a \textsc{Multimodal Interaction Gate}: a mechanism to convert unique interactions into redundant interactions. Our findings suggest that increasing redundancy can reduce visual induced errors by 38.3\% and improve consistency by 16.8\%.

analysis.tldr: 通过自标注流程放大多模态冗余交互，显著减少视觉语言模型的幻觉并提升鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前视觉语言模型在面对模糊或损坏的模态时存在幻觉和鲁棒性问题，而现有指令数据集往往消除冗余以优先视觉定位，导致模型缺乏补偿受损模态的共享信息。
analysis.problem: 如何通过放大多模态间的冗余交互来提升视觉语言模型在模态受损或模糊情况下的可靠性和一致性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 多模态交互包含冗余、独特和协同信息，其中冗余信息可用于补偿受损模态；但现代指令数据集通常消除冗余，限制了模型利用共享信息的能力。
analysis.method: 提出自标注流程，包含多模态交互门（Multimodal Interaction Gate），将独特交互转换为冗余交互，从而放大可被利用的共享信息。
contributions: 提出自标注多模态交互调优方法，通过放大冗余交互提升模型鲁棒性。
设计多模态交互门机制，将独特交互转换为冗余交互。
实验表明该方法可减少38.3%的视觉诱导错误并提升16.8%的一致性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验设置，仅报告了视觉诱导错误减少38.3%和一致性提升16.8%的结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的模态损坏或模糊场景。
自标注流程的计算开销和泛化性未在摘要中讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过自标注流程放大多模态冗余交互，显著减少视觉语言模型的幻觉并提升鲁棒性。

papers.title: Benchmarking ResNet Backbones in RT-DETR: Impact of Depth and Regularization under environmental conditions
papers.abstract: Visual perception plays a central role in competitive robotics, where environmental variations can directly affect real-time detection performance. The related literature on transformer-based detectors lack information regarding the impact of backbone scale and environmental settings on model performance. This work presents a comparative evaluation of RT-DETR for detecting round objects under environmental and hyperparameter variations relevant to competitive robotics. Four ResNet backbones (ResNet18, ResNet34, ResNet50, and ResNet101) were compared using dropout rates, analyzing their effect on confidence and accuracy. All models were trained under the same configuration and evaluated under changes in lighting and background contrast. Environmental conditions primarily impact prediction confidence, while inference latency remains largely unaffected and classification accuracy stays consistently high, approaching or above 1.00 in most cases. Two distinct behaviors were observed. Under illumination variation, ResNet50 achieves the best trade-off, combining near-perfect accuracy, confidence values up to approximately 0.869 and latency around 0.058-0.059 ms. Under background variation, ResNet34 provides the most balanced performance, reaching near-perfect accuracy and higher confidence values up to approximately 0.887. These results indicate that the optimal architecture depends on the type of environmental variation, with intermediate-depth models offering the best balance between performance and efficiency.

analysis.tldr: 在RT-DETR中对比不同深度ResNet骨干网络，发现环境变化主要影响预测置信度，中等深度模型（ResNet50/34）在不同环境下表现最佳。
analysis.research_motivation: 竞争性机器人中视觉感知受环境变化影响，但现有基于Transformer的检测器缺乏关于骨干网络规模和环境设置对性能影响的系统研究。
analysis.problem: 评估RT-DETR在不同环境条件（光照、背景对比度）和超参数（dropout率）下，使用不同深度ResNet骨干网络检测圆形物体的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 环境条件主要影响预测置信度，推理延迟几乎不受影响，分类准确率始终很高（接近或超过1.00）。光照变化下ResNet50最佳，背景变化下ResNet34最佳。
analysis.method: 在RT-DETR框架下，使用四种ResNet骨干网络（18/34/50/101），在相同配置下训练，并改变dropout率，在光照和背景变化下评估。
contributions: 系统比较了不同深度ResNet骨干在RT-DETR中受环境变化的影响
发现环境变化主要影响置信度而非延迟或准确率，并确定了不同环境下的最优骨干网络
analysis.experiments: 在光照和背景对比度变化下评估，报告了准确率、置信度和延迟指标。摘要未提供具体数据集或完整实验细节。
limitations: 仅针对圆形物体检测，泛化性未知
未涉及更复杂的环境变化或真实机器人场景
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 在RT-DETR中对比不同深度ResNet骨干网络，发现环境变化主要影响预测置信度，中等深度模型（ResNet50/34）在不同环境下表现最佳。

papers.title: VLADriver-RAG: Retrieval-Augmented Vision-Language-Action Models for Autonomous Driving
papers.abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have emerged as a promising paradigm for end-to-end autonomous driving, yet their reliance on implicit parametric knowledge limits generalization in long-tail scenarios. While Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) offers a solution by accessing external expert priors, standard visual retrieval suffers from high latency and semantic ambiguity. To address these challenges, we propose \textbf{VLADriver-RAG}, a framework that grounds planning in explicit, structure-aware historical knowledge. Specifically, we abstract sensory inputs into spatiotemporal semantic graphs via a \textit{Visual-to-Scenario} mechanism, effectively filtering visual noise. To ensure retrieval relevance, we employ a \textit{Scenario-Aligned Embedding Model} that utilizes Graph-DTW metric alignment to prioritize intrinsic topological consistency over superficial visual similarity. These retrieved priors are then fused within a query-based VLA backbone to synthesize precise, disentangled trajectories. Extensive experiments on the Bench2Drive benchmark establish a new state-of-the-art, achieving a Driving Score of 89.12.

analysis.tldr: 提出VLADriver-RAG框架，通过检索增强的视觉-语言-动作模型提升自动驾驶长尾场景泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有VLA模型依赖隐式参数知识，在长尾场景中泛化能力有限；标准视觉检索存在高延迟和语义模糊问题。
analysis.problem: 如何利用结构化的历史知识进行高效、准确的检索增强，以提升自动驾驶规划的泛化性和鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将感官输入通过Visual-to-Scenario机制抽象为时空语义图，使用Scenario-Aligned Embedding Model结合Graph-DTW度量对齐进行检索，并将检索先验融合到基于查询的VLA骨干中生成轨迹。
contributions: 提出VLADriver-RAG框架，将规划建立在显式、结构感知的历史知识上。
设计Visual-to-Scenario机制和Scenario-Aligned Embedding Model，提升检索效率和相关性。
在Bench2Drive基准上取得新SOTA，驾驶得分为89.12。
analysis.experiments: 在Bench2Drive基准上进行实验，达到89.12的驾驶得分，实现新SOTA。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的历史场景图构建。
Graph-DTW度量对齐的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出VLADriver-RAG框架，通过检索增强的视觉-语言-动作模型提升自动驾驶长尾场景泛化能力。

papers.title: Variational Inference for Lévy Process-Driven SDEs via Neural Tilting
papers.abstract: Modelling extreme events and heavy-tailed phenomena is central to building reliable predictive systems in domains such as finance, climate science, and safety-critical AI. While Lévy processes provide a natural mathematical framework for capturing jumps and heavy tails, Bayesian inference for Lévy-driven stochastic differential equations (SDEs) remains intractable with existing methods: Monte Carlo approaches are rigorous but lack scalability, whereas neural variational inference methods are efficient but rely on Gaussian assumptions that fail to capture discontinuities. We address this tension by introducing a neural exponential tilting framework for variational inference in Lévy-driven SDEs. Our approach constructs a flexible variational family by exponentially reweighting the Lévy measure using neural networks. This parametrization preserves the jump structure of the underlying process while remaining computationally tractable. To enable efficient inference, we develop a quadratic neural parametrization that yields closed-form normalization of the tilted measure, a conditional Gaussian representation for stable processes that facilitates simulation, and symmetry-aware Monte Carlo estimators for scalable optimization. Empirically, we demonstrate that the method accurately captures jump dynamics and yields reliable posterior inference in regimes where Gaussian-based variational approaches fail, on both synthetic and real-world datasets.

analysis.tldr: 提出神经指数倾斜框架，实现Lévy过程驱动SDE的变分推断，有效捕捉跳跃和重尾现象。
analysis.research_motivation: 在金融、气候科学和安全关键AI等领域，极端事件和重尾现象的建模至关重要。Lévy过程虽能自然描述跳跃和重尾，但现有贝叶斯推断方法存在瓶颈：蒙特卡洛方法严格但可扩展性差，神经变分推断高效但依赖高斯假设，无法捕捉不连续性。
analysis.problem: 解决Lévy驱动SDE中贝叶斯推断的不可解问题，即如何在保持计算可处理性的同时，准确捕捉跳跃和重尾结构。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出神经指数倾斜框架：通过神经网络对Lévy测度进行指数重加权，构建灵活变分族；开发二次神经参数化实现倾斜测度的闭式归一化，稳定过程的条件高斯表示便于模拟，以及对称感知蒙特卡洛估计器用于可扩展优化。
contributions: 提出神经指数倾斜框架，首次实现Lévy驱动SDE的高效变分推断，同时保留跳跃结构。
开发二次神经参数化、条件高斯表示和对称感知蒙特卡洛估计器，确保计算可处理性和可扩展性。
analysis.experiments: 在合成和真实数据集上，该方法在基于高斯变分方法失效的区域准确捕捉跳跃动力学，并提供可靠的后验推断。
limitations: 可能对高维Lévy过程的可扩展性有限。
二次神经参数化可能限制变分族的表达能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: probabilistic methods (Bayesian methods, variational inference, sampling, UQ, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出神经指数倾斜框架，实现Lévy过程驱动SDE的变分推断，有效捕捉跳跃和重尾现象。

papers.title: BEACON: A Multimodal Dataset for Learning Behavioral Fingerprints from Gameplay Data
papers.abstract: Continuous authentication in high-stakes digital environments requires datasets with fine-grained behavioral signals under realistic cognitive and motor demands. But current benchmarks are often limited by small scale, unimodal sensing or lack of synchronised environmental context. To address this gap, this paper introduces BEACON ( Behavioral Engine for Authentication \& Continuous Monitoring), a large-scale multimodal dataset that captures diverse skill tiers in competitive \textit{Valorant} gameplay. BEACON contains approximately 430 GB of synchronised modality data (461 GB total on-disk including auxiliary \textit{Valorant} configuration captures) from 79 sessions across 28 distinct players, estimated at 102.51 hours of active gameplay, including high-frequency mouse dynamics, keystroke events, network packet captures, screen recordings, hardware metadata, and in-game configuration context. BEACON leverages the high precision motor skills and high cognitive load that are inherent to tactical shooters, making it a rigorous stress test for the robustness of behavioral biometrics. The dataset allows for the study of continuous authentication, behavioral profiling, user drift and multimodal representation learning in a high-fidelity esports setting. The authors release the dataset and code on Hugging Face and GitHub to create a reproducible benchmark for evaluating next-generation behavioral fingerprinting and security models

analysis.tldr: BEACON是一个大规模多模态游戏行为数据集，用于连续身份认证研究。
analysis.research_motivation: 高安全性数字环境需要细粒度行为信号进行连续认证，但现有基准受限于规模小、单模态或缺乏同步环境上下文。
analysis.problem: 缺乏大规模、多模态、同步环境上下文的游戏行为数据集以支持连续身份认证研究。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 收集79个会话、28名玩家的Valorant游戏数据，包括鼠标动态、键盘事件、网络包、屏幕录制、硬件元数据和游戏配置，总计约430GB同步多模态数据。
contributions: 构建了大规模多模态游戏行为数据集BEACON，包含约430GB同步数据。
提供了高精度运动技能和高认知负荷场景下的行为生物特征基准。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 数据集仅来自单一游戏Valorant，泛化性可能有限。
玩家数量较少（28人），可能影响用户多样性。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: BEACON是一个大规模多模态游戏行为数据集，用于连续身份认证研究。

papers.title: BenchCAD: A Comprehensive, Industry-Standard Benchmark for Programmatic CAD
papers.abstract: Industrial Computer-Aided Design (CAD) code generation requires models to produce executable parametric programs from visual or textual inputs. Beyond recognizing the outer shape of a part, this task involves understanding its 3D structure, inferring engineering parameters, and choosing CAD operations that reflect how the part would be designed and manufactured. Despite the promise of Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) for this task, they are rarely evaluated on whether these capabilities jointly hold in realistic industrial CAD settings. We present BenchCAD, a unified benchmark for industrial CAD reasoning. BenchCAD contains 17,900 execution-verified CadQuery programs across 106 industrial part families, including bevel gears, compression springs, twist drills, and other reusable engineering designs. It evaluates models through visual question answering, code question answering, image-to-code generation, and instruction-guided code editing, enabling fine-grained analysis across perception, parametric abstraction, and executable program synthesis. Across 10+ frontier models, BenchCAD shows that current systems often recover coarse outer geometry but fail to produce faithful parametric CAD programs. Common failures include missing fine 3D structure, misinterpreting industrial design parameters, and replacing essential operations such as sweeps, lofts, and twist-extrudes with simpler sketch-and-extrude patterns. Fine-tuning and reinforcement learning improve in-distribution performance, but generalization to unseen part families remains limited. These results position BenchCAD as a benchmark for measuring and improving the industrial readiness of multimodal CAD automation.

analysis.tldr: BenchCAD 是一个面向工业级程序化 CAD 代码生成的综合基准，揭示了当前多模态大模型在感知、参数抽象和可执行程序合成方面的不足。
analysis.research_motivation: 工业 CAD 代码生成需要模型从视觉或文本输入生成可执行的参数化程序，但现有评估很少在真实工业场景中联合测试这些能力，缺乏统一基准。
analysis.problem: 当前多模态大模型在工业 CAD 任务中缺乏系统评估，无法衡量其在感知、参数推断和程序合成方面的联合能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，当前模型常能恢复粗略外部几何形状，但无法生成忠实参数化 CAD 程序，常见失败包括缺失精细 3D 结构、误解工业设计参数、用简单拉伸替代扫掠/放样/扭转等关键操作。
analysis.method: 构建包含 17,900 个执行验证的 CadQuery 程序（覆盖 106 个工业零件族）的基准，通过视觉问答、代码问答、图像到代码生成和指令引导代码编辑四个任务进行细粒度评估。
contributions: 提出了 BenchCAD，一个包含 17,900 个可执行 CadQuery 程序、覆盖 106 个工业零件族的统一基准。
设计了四个评估任务（VQA、CQA、图像到代码、指令编辑），支持对感知、参数抽象和程序合成的细粒度分析。
在 10+ 前沿模型上实验，揭示了当前模型在工业 CAD 任务中的常见失败模式，并验证了微调和强化学习可提升分布内性能但泛化有限。
analysis.experiments: 在 10+ 前沿模型上评估，包括视觉问答、代码问答、图像到代码生成和指令引导代码编辑任务，并进行了微调和强化学习实验。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖 106 个零件族，可能无法完全代表所有工业 CAD 场景。
微调和强化学习在分布内性能提升但泛化到未见零件族有限，提示基准难度较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: BenchCAD 是一个面向工业级程序化 CAD 代码生成的综合基准，揭示了当前多模态大模型在感知、参数抽象和可执行程序合成方面的不足。

papers.title: ALAM: Algebraically Consistent Latent Transitions for Vision-Language-Action Models
papers.abstract: Vision-language-action (VLA) models remain constrained by the scarcity of action-labeled robot data, whereas action-free videos provide abundant evidence of how the physical world changes. Latent action models offer a promising way to extract such priors from videos, but reconstruction-trained latent codes are not necessarily suitable for policy generation: they may predict future observations while lacking the structure needed to be reused or generated coherently with robot actions. We introduce ALAM (Algebraic Latent Action Model), an Algebraically Consistent Latent Action Model that turns temporal relations in action-free video into structural supervision. Given frame triplets, ALAM learns latent transitions that are grounded by reconstruction while being regularized by composition and reversal consistency, encouraging a locally additive transition space. For downstream VLA learning, we freeze the pretrained encoder and use its latent transition sequences as auxiliary generative targets, co-generated with robot actions under a joint flow-matching objective. This couples structured latent transitions with flow-based policy generation, allowing the policy to exploit ALAM's locally consistent transition geometry without requiring latent-to-action decoding. Representation probes show that ALAM reduces additivity and reversibility errors by 25-85 times over unstructured latent-action baselines and improves long-horizon cumulative reconstruction. When transferred to VLA policies, ALAM raises the average success rate from 47.9% to 85.0% on MetaWorld MT50 and from 94.1% to 98.1% on LIBERO, with consistent gains on real-world manipulation tasks. Ablations further confirm that the strongest improvements arise from the synergy between algebraically structured latent transitions and joint flow matching.

analysis.tldr: 提出代数一致潜在动作模型ALAM，利用无动作视频中的时间关系学习结构化潜在转移，显著提升VLA策略成功率。
analysis.research_motivation: VLA模型受限于动作标注机器人数据稀缺，而无动作视频蕴含丰富物理世界变化信息，但现有潜在动作模型提取的潜在编码缺乏策略生成所需的结构化特性。
analysis.problem: 如何从无动作视频中学习具有代数一致性的潜在转移表示，使其既能预测未来观测又能与机器人动作协同生成，从而提升VLA策略性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出ALAM，通过帧三元组学习潜在转移，利用重建损失和组合一致性、反转一致性正则化，鼓励局部可加转移空间；下游VLA学习中冻结编码器，将潜在转移序列作为辅助生成目标，与机器人动作联合流匹配生成。
contributions: 提出代数一致潜在动作模型ALAM，通过组合和反转一致性正则化从无动作视频中学习结构化潜在转移。
设计联合流匹配框架，将结构化潜在转移与策略生成耦合，无需潜在到动作解码。
在MetaWorld MT50和LIBERO基准上分别将成功率从47.9%提升至85.0%和从94.1%提升至98.1%，并在真实操作任务上取得一致增益。
analysis.experiments: 在MetaWorld MT50、LIBERO和真实世界操作任务上评估，ALAM将成功率从47.9%提升至85.0%（MetaWorld）和从94.1%提升至98.1%（LIBERO），可加性和可逆性误差降低25-85倍。
limitations: 可能依赖帧三元组数据的质量与多样性。
潜在转移的局部可加性假设在复杂动态场景中可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出代数一致潜在动作模型ALAM，利用无动作视频中的时间关系学习结构化潜在转移，显著提升VLA策略成功率。

papers.title: Reinforce Adjoint Matching: Scaling RL Post-Training of Diffusion and Flow-Matching Models
papers.abstract: Diffusion and flow-matching models scale because pretraining is supervised regression: a clean sample is noised analytically, and a model regresses against a closed-form target. RL post-training aligns the model with a reward. In image generation, this makes samples compose objects correctly, render text legibly, and match human preferences. Existing methods rely on costly SDE rollouts, reward gradients, or surrogate losses, sacrificing pretraining's regression structure. We show that the structure extends to RL post-training. Under KL-regularized reward maximization, the optimal generative process tilts the clean-endpoint distribution towards samples with higher reward and leaves the noising law unchanged. Combining this with the adjoint-matching optimality condition and a REINFORCE identity, we derive Reinforce Adjoint Matching (RAM): a consistency loss that corrects the pretraining target with the reward. At each step, we draw a clean endpoint from the current model, evaluate its reward, noise it as in pretraining, and regress. No SDE rollouts, backward adjoint sweeps, or reward gradients are required. Like the pretraining objective, RAM is simple and scales. On Stable Diffusion 3.5M, RAM achieves the highest reward on composability, text rendering, and human preference, reaching Flow-GRPO's peak reward in up to $50\times$ fewer training steps.

analysis.tldr: 提出Reinforce Adjoint Matching (RAM)，一种无需SDE rollout或奖励梯度的扩散/流匹配模型RL后训练方法，在Stable Diffusion 3.5M上以高达50倍更少训练步数达到Flow-GRPO的峰值奖励。
analysis.research_motivation: 扩散和流匹配模型在预训练阶段通过监督回归有效扩展，但RL后训练通常依赖昂贵的SDE rollout、奖励梯度或代理损失，破坏了预训练的回归结构，限制了扩展性和效率。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持预训练回归结构的前提下，高效地对扩散/流匹配模型进行RL后训练，以最大化奖励（如可组合性、文本渲染、人类偏好）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在KL正则化奖励最大化下，最优生成过程仅倾斜干净端点的分布，而不改变加噪规律。
analysis.method: Reinforce Adjoint Matching (RAM)：结合伴随匹配最优性条件和REINFORCE恒等式，推导出一个一致性损失，用奖励校正预训练目标。每一步从当前模型采样干净端点，评估其奖励，按预训练方式加噪，然后回归。无需SDE rollout、反向伴随扫描或奖励梯度。
contributions: 理论证明了KL正则化奖励最大化下最优生成过程仅改变干净端点分布，加噪规律不变。
提出RAM方法，将预训练的回归结构扩展到RL后训练，简单且可扩展。
在Stable Diffusion 3.5M上实验表明，RAM在可组合性、文本渲染和人类偏好上达到最高奖励，且训练步数比Flow-GRPO减少高达50倍。
analysis.experiments: 在Stable Diffusion 3.5M上评估，对比Flow-GRPO等基线，RAM在可组合性、文本渲染和人类偏好奖励上达到最高，且训练效率显著提升。
limitations: 摘要未提及对模型架构或奖励函数的限制，可能对复杂奖励函数需要调整。
仅在一个模型上验证，泛化性需更多实验。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Reinforce Adjoint Matching (RAM)，一种无需SDE rollout或奖励梯度的扩散/流匹配模型RL后训练方法，在Stable Diffusion 3.5M上以高达50倍更少训练步数达到Flow-GRPO的峰值奖励。

papers.title: Geospatial-Temporal Sensemaking of Remote Sensing Activity Detections with Multimodal Large Language Model
papers.abstract: We introduce SMART-HC-VQA, a Sentinel-2-based visual question answering dataset derived from the IARPA SMART Heavy Construction dataset, designed for spatiotemporal analysis of human activity. The dataset transforms construction-site annotations, construction-type labels, temporal-phase labels, geographic metadata, and observation relationships into natural language question-answer triplets. This approach redefines the existing dataset as a temporally extended automatic target recognition and visual question answering (VQA) challenge, considering a fixed geospatial site as a target whose attributes and activity states evolve across sparse satellite observations. Currently, SMART-HC-VQA comprises 21,837 accessible Sentinel-2 image chips, 65,511 single-image VQA examples, and approximately 2.3 million two-image temporal comparison examples generated via our novel Image-Pairwise Combinatorial Augmentation. We detail the workflow for retrieving and processing Sentinel-2 imagery, segmenting large satellite tiles into site-centered images, maintaining traceability to SMART-HC annotations, and analyzing the distributions of site size, observation count, temporal coverage, construction type, and phase labels. Additionally, we describe an implemented multi-image MLLM training framework based on LLaVA-NeXT Mistral-7B, adapted to accept multiple dated image inputs and train on metadata-derived VQA examples. This work offers a reproducible foundation for understanding language-guided remote sensing activities, aiming not only to detect change but also to reason about the ongoing processes, their progression, and potential future developments.

analysis.tldr: 提出SMART-HC-VQA数据集，将遥感施工活动检测转化为时空VQA任务，并基于LLaVA-NeXT构建多图像MLLM训练框架。
analysis.research_motivation: 遥感图像中人类活动的时空理解（如施工进展）需要超越简单变化检测，进行语义推理和过程分析，但缺乏相应的标注数据集和模型框架。
analysis.problem: 如何将稀疏卫星观测中的施工活动检测转化为可推理的时空VQA任务，并构建支持多图像输入的多模态大语言模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 从IARPA SMART Heavy Construction数据集出发，将施工标注、类型、时间阶段、地理元数据等转化为自然语言问答三元组，构建SMART-HC-VQA数据集；并基于LLaVA-NeXT Mistral-7B设计多图像输入训练框架。
contributions: 构建了SMART-HC-VQA数据集，包含21,837个Sentinel-2图像块、65,511个单图像VQA示例和约230万个两图像时间比较示例。
提出了Image-Pairwise Combinatorial Augmentation方法生成大量时间比较样本。
实现了基于LLaVA-NeXT的多图像MLLM训练框架，用于遥感活动理解。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 数据集仅基于Sentinel-2图像，分辨率有限。
MLLM框架仅在单一模型上验证，泛化性未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SMART-HC-VQA数据集，将遥感施工活动检测转化为时空VQA任务，并基于LLaVA-NeXT构建多图像MLLM训练框架。

papers.title: Heteroscedastic Diffusion for Multi-Agent Trajectory Modeling
papers.abstract: Multi-agent trajectory modeling traditionally focuses on forecasting, often neglecting more general tasks like trajectory completion, which is essential for real-world applications such as correcting tracking data. Existing methods also generally predict agents' states without offering any state-wise measure of heteroscedastic uncertainty. Moreover, popular multi-modal sampling methods lack error probability estimates for each generated scene under the same prior observations, which makes it difficult to rank the predictions at inference time. We introduce U2Diffine, a unified diffusion model built to perform trajectory completion while simultaneously offering state-wise heteroscedastic uncertainty estimates. This is achieved by augmenting the standard denoising loss with the negative log-likelihood of the predicted noise, and then propagating the latent space uncertainty to the real state space using a first-order Taylor approximation. We also propose U2Diff, a faster baseline that avoids gradient computation during sampling. This approach significantly increases inference speed, making it as efficient as a standard generative-only diffusion model. For post-processing, we integrate a Rank Neural Network (RankNN) that enables error probability estimation for each generated mode, demonstrating strong correlation with ground truth errors. Our method outperforms state-of-the-art solutions in both trajectory completion and forecasting across four challenging sports datasets (NBA, Basketball-U, Football-U, Soccer-U), underscoring the effectiveness of our uncertainty and error probability estimation.

analysis.tldr: 提出U2Diffine扩散模型，统一多智能体轨迹补全与异方差不确定性估计，并引入RankNN进行误差概率排序。
analysis.research_motivation: 多智能体轨迹建模传统上聚焦于预测，忽略了轨迹补全等更通用任务；现有方法缺乏状态级异方差不确定性估计，且多模态采样无法提供各生成场景的误差概率估计，导致推理时难以排序预测结果。
analysis.problem: 如何实现多智能体轨迹补全的同时，提供状态级异方差不确定性估计和生成模式的误差概率排序。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在标准去噪损失中加入预测噪声的负对数似然，通过一阶泰勒近似将潜在空间不确定性传播到真实状态空间，得到U2Diffine；另提出避免梯度计算的快速基线U2Diff；集成排序神经网络RankNN估计各生成模式的误差概率。
contributions: 提出U2Diffine，首个统一轨迹补全与异方差不确定性估计的扩散模型。
提出U2Diff快速基线，推理速度与标准生成扩散模型相当。
引入RankNN实现生成模式的误差概率估计，与真实误差强相关。
analysis.experiments: 在NBA、Basketball-U、Football-U、Soccer-U四个体育数据集上，轨迹补全和预测任务均超越现有最优方法。
limitations: 可能依赖特定体育场景，泛化到其他多智能体场景需验证。
一阶泰勒近似可能在高非线性情况下精度有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出U2Diffine扩散模型，统一多智能体轨迹补全与异方差不确定性估计，并引入RankNN进行误差概率排序。

papers.title: Vocabulary Hijacking in LVLMs: Unveiling Critical Attention Heads by Excluding Inert Tokens to Mitigate Hallucination
papers.abstract: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) have achieved remarkable progress in multimodal tasks, yet their reliability is persistently undermined by hallucinations-generating text that contradicts visual input. Recent studies often attribute these errors to inadequate visual attention. In this work, we analyze the attention mechanisms via the logit lens, uncovering a distinct anomaly we term Vocabulary Hijacking. We discover that specific visual tokens, defined as Inert Tokens, disproportionately attract attention. Crucially, when their intermediate hidden states are projected into the vocabulary space, they consistently decode to a fixed set of unrelated words (termed Hijacking Anchors) across layers, revealing a rigid semantic collapse. Leveraging this semantic rigidity, we propose Hijacking Anchor-Based Identification (HABI), a robust strategy to accurately localize these Inert Tokens. To quantify the impact of this phenomenon, we introduce the Non-Hijacked Visual Attention Ratio (NHAR), a novel metric designed to identify attention heads that remain resilient to hijacking and are critical for factual accuracy. Building on these insights, we propose Hijacking-Aware Visual Attention Enhancement (HAVAE), a training-free intervention that selectively strengthens the focus of these identified heads on salient visual content. Extensive experiments across multiple benchmarks demonstrate that HAVAE significantly mitigates hallucinations with no additional computational overhead, while preserving the model's general capabilities. Our code is publicly available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 通过识别惰性标记和劫持锚点，提出无训练干预方法增强视觉注意力，有效缓解LVLM幻觉。
analysis.research_motivation: LVLM在生成文本时经常出现与视觉输入矛盾的幻觉，现有研究多归因于视觉注意力不足，但缺乏对注意力异常模式的深入分析。
analysis.problem: LVLM中视觉注意力被特定无关标记劫持导致幻觉的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现特定视觉标记（惰性标记）吸引过多注意力，其隐藏状态在词汇空间中一致解码为固定无关词（劫持锚点），形成语义坍缩。
analysis.method: 提出HABI方法定位惰性标记，定义NHAR指标识别对劫持鲁棒的关键注意力头，并设计HAVAE无训练干预增强这些头对显著视觉内容的关注。
contributions: 揭示LVLM中词汇劫持现象，发现惰性标记和劫持锚点。
提出HABI定位惰性标记和NHAR指标识别关键注意力头。
提出HAVAE无训练干预方法，有效缓解幻觉且不增加计算开销。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准上实验，HAVAE显著缓解幻觉，保持模型通用能力，无额外计算开销。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定架构的LVLM。
NHAR指标的有效性可能依赖基准选择。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过识别惰性标记和劫持锚点，提出无训练干预方法增强视觉注意力，有效缓解LVLM幻觉。

papers.title: MulTaBench: Benchmarking Multimodal Tabular Learning with Text and Image
papers.abstract: Tabular Foundation Models have recently established the state of the art in supervised tabular learning, by leveraging pretraining to learn generalizable representations of numerical and categorical structured data. However, they lack native support for unstructured modalities such as text and image, and rely on frozen, pretrained embeddings to process them. On established Multimodal Tabular Learning benchmarks, we show that tuning the embeddings to the task improves performance. Existing benchmarks, however, often focus on the mere co-occurrence of modalities; this leads to high variance across datasets and masks the benefits of task-specific tuning. To address this gap, we introduce MulTaBench, a benchmark of 40 datasets, split equally between image-tabular and text-tabular tasks. We focus on predictive tasks where the modalities provide complementary predictive signal, and where generic embeddings lose critical information, necessitating Target-Aware Representations that are aligned with the task. Our experimental results demonstrate that the gains from target-aware representation tuning generalize across both text and image modalities, several tabular learners, encoder scales, and embedding dimensions. MulTaBench constitutes the largest image-tabular benchmarking effort to date, spanning high-impact domains such as healthcare and e-commerce. It is designed to enable the research of novel architectures which incorporate joint modeling and target-aware representations, paving the way for the development of novel Multimodal Tabular Foundation Models.

analysis.tldr: 提出MulTaBench基准，证明多模态表格学习中任务感知表示调优优于固定嵌入。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有表格基础模型不支持文本和图像等非结构化模态，依赖固定预训练嵌入，而现有基准仅关注模态共现，掩盖了任务特定调优的收益。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个能评估多模态表格学习中任务感知表示调优效果的标准化基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 固定嵌入在多模态表格任务中丢失关键信息，而任务感知表示调优能提升性能，且该增益在文本和图像模态、多种表格学习器、编码器尺度和嵌入维度上泛化。
analysis.method: 构建包含40个数据集（图像-表格和文本-表格各20个）的基准MulTaBench，聚焦模态提供互补预测信号的任务，并采用任务感知表示调优。
contributions: 提出MulTaBench，目前最大的图像-表格基准，覆盖医疗和电商等领域。
实验证明任务感知表示调优在多模态表格学习中的泛化有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在40个数据集上测试多种表格学习器、编码器尺度和嵌入维度，显示任务感知调优优于固定嵌入。
limitations: 基准仅包含图像和文本模态，未涉及其他非结构化数据。
未提供具体性能数值或与现有方法的详细对比。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MulTaBench基准，证明多模态表格学习中任务感知表示调优优于固定嵌入。

papers.title: Set-Based Groupwise Registration for Variable-Length, Variable-Contrast Cardiac MRI
papers.abstract: Quantitative cardiac magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) enables non-invasive myocardial tissue characterization but relies on robust motion correction within these variable-length, variable-contrast image sequences. Groupwise registration, which simultaneously aligns all images, has shown greater robustness than pairwise registration for motion correction.
