Curation depends on centralised middleware and institutional continuity, but when registries close, active stewardship stops even when data remain online. We advance the concept of Autonomous FAIR Digital Objects (aFDOs) from an abstract idea to an operational model, to offer a route from passive scientific publication toward accountable, standards-aligned automation that can outlive its publishing institutions. aFDO augments FDOs with three capabilities anchored in Semantic Web standards, namely 1) a policy layer over RDF-star aligned with PROV-O, SHACL, and ODRL for portable condition-action rules, 2) an announcement layer over ActivityStreams 2.0 that bounds per-announcement evaluation cost, and 3) an agreement layer that resolves multi-source contradictions through reputation and confidence weighted agreement under a bounded adversarial model. We provide a formal definition that distinguishes policy specifications, event handlers, and communication interfaces. We evaluate an open reference implementation on 4,305 FDOs grounded in rare-disease ontologies, namely ClinVar, HPO, and Orphanet, combined with controlled synthetic observations. The consensus mechanism resolves 56.3% of 3,914 naturally occurring ClinVar conflicts where multiple submitters disagree and an expert panel has subsequently adjudicated. Under Sybil, collusion, and poisoning attacks, the mechanism degrades gracefully within its design Byzantine-tolerance bound (f < n/5), and fails as predicted beyond that bound.

analysis.tldr: 提出自治FAIR数字对象（aFDO）概念，使科学知识从被动断言转向主动知识管理，并在罕见病本体上验证了共识机制的有效性。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前Web上的科学知识以被动断言形式发布，无法自主验证证据、协调矛盾或更新置信度；依赖集中式中间件和机构持续性，一旦注册中心关闭，即使数据在线，主动管理也会停止。
analysis.problem: 如何使科学出版物从被动断言转变为能够自主执行条件-动作规则、协调多源矛盾并适应机构存续性变化的主动知识系统。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出自治FAIR数字对象（aFDO），在FDO基础上增加三层能力：基于RDF-star的策略层（PROV-O、SHACL、ODRL）、基于ActivityStreams 2.0的公告层、以及基于声誉和置信度加权的协议层，用于在有限对抗模型下解决多源矛盾。
contributions: 将自治FAIR数字对象从抽象概念推进到可操作模型，提供正式定义区分策略规范、事件处理器和通信接口。
在罕见病本体（ClinVar、HPO、Orphanet）上实现开源参考实现，共识机制解决了56.3%的ClinVar自然冲突，并在Sybil、合谋和投毒攻击下优雅降级。
analysis.experiments: 在4305个FDO上评估，基于罕见病本体和受控合成观测；共识机制解决3914个ClinVar自然冲突中的56.3%；在Sybil、合谋和投毒攻击下，在拜占庭容错界限内优雅降级，超出后失败。
limitations: 共识机制仅在罕见病领域验证，泛化性未知。
拜占庭容错界限（f < n/5）可能在某些实际场景中过于严格。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出自治FAIR数字对象（aFDO）概念，使科学知识从被动断言转向主动知识管理，并在罕见病本体上验证了共识机制的有效性。

papers.title: EGL-SCA: Structural Credit Assignment for Co-Evolving Instructions and Tools in Graph Reasoning Agents
papers.abstract: Graph reasoning agents operating from natural-language inputs must solve a coupled problem: they must reconstruct a structured graph instance from text, decide whether existing computational assets are sufficient, interact with tools under a strict execution protocol, and satisfy an external verifier that checks structured correctness rather than textual plausibility. Existing approaches usually improve either the instruction side or the tool side in isolation, which leaves unclear what should be updated after failure. We propose EGL-SCA, a verifier-centric dual-space framework that models a graph reasoning agent using two collaborative components: an instruction-side policy space for reasoning strategies, and a tool-side program space for executable algorithmic tools. Our central mechanism is structural credit assignment, which maps trajectory evidence to conditional updates, precisely routing failures to either prompt optimization or tool synthesis and repair. To provide sufficient learning signals for dual-space adaptation, we introduce a training distribution stratified by task family, coupled with a Pareto-style retention strategy to balance success, generality, and parsimony. Experiments on four graph reasoning benchmarks show that EGL-SCA achieves a state-of-the-art 92.0\% average success rate. By effectively co-evolving instructions and tools, our framework significantly outperforms both pure-prompting and fixed-toolbox baselines.

analysis.tldr: 提出EGL-SCA框架，通过结构信用分配协同进化指令和工具，在图推理任务中达到92.0%平均成功率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法通常单独改进指令或工具，未解决失败后应更新哪一侧的问题，导致图推理代理在自然语言输入下难以协同优化。
analysis.problem: 图推理代理需要从文本重建图实例、决定工具是否足够、在严格协议下交互并满足外部验证器，但缺乏协同更新指令和工具的机制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出EGL-SCA，包含指令侧策略空间和工具侧程序空间，通过结构信用分配将轨迹证据映射到条件更新，精确路由失败到提示优化或工具合成/修复；并引入按任务族分层的训练分布和Pareto式保留策略。
contributions: 提出基于验证器的双空间框架，协同进化指令和工具。
设计结构信用分配机制，实现失败路由和条件更新。
引入分层训练分布和Pareto保留策略，平衡成功率、通用性和简洁性。
analysis.experiments: 在四个图推理基准上达到92.0%平均成功率，优于纯提示和固定工具箱基线。
limitations: 可能依赖外部验证器的设计质量。
双空间协同进化可能增加训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出EGL-SCA框架，通过结构信用分配协同进化指令和工具，在图推理任务中达到92.0%平均成功率。

papers.title: Agent-ValueBench: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Evaluating Agent Values
papers.abstract: Autonomous agents have rapidly matured as task executors and seen widespread deployment via harnesses such as OpenClaw. Safety concerns have rightly drawn growing research attention, and beneath them lie the values silently steering agent behavior. Existing value benchmarks, however, remain confined to LLMs, leaving agent values largely uncharted. From intuitive, empirical, and theoretical vantage points, we show that an agent's values diverge from those of its underlying LLM, and the agentic modality further introduces dataset-, evaluation-, and system-level challenges absent from text-only protocols. We close this gap with Agent-ValueBench, the first benchmark dedicated to agent values. It features 394 executable environments across 16 domains, offering 4,335 value-conflict tasks that cover 28 value systems and 332 dimensions. Every instance is co-synthesized through our purpose-built end-to-end pipeline and curated per-instance by professional psychologists. Each task ships with two pole-aligned golden trajectories whose checkpoints anchor a trajectory-level rubric-based judge. Benchmarking 14 frontier proprietary and open-weights models across 4 mainstream harnesses, we uncover three concerted findings. Agent values first manifest as a Value Tide of cross-model homogeneity beneath interpretable counter-currents. This tide bends non-additively under harness pull, and yet more decisively under deliberate steering via embedded skills. Together these results signal that the agent-alignment lever is shifting from classical model alignment and prompt steering toward harness alignment and skill steering.

analysis.tldr: 首个专门评估智能体价值观的基准Agent-ValueBench，揭示智能体价值观与底层LLM存在差异，并受框架和技能影响。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有价值观基准局限于LLM，忽略了智能体模态带来的数据集、评估和系统级挑战，而智能体价值观对安全至关重要。
analysis.problem: 缺乏专门评估智能体价值观的基准，无法系统衡量智能体行为背后的价值观。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 智能体价值观与底层LLM价值观存在分歧，且受框架（harness）和嵌入技能（embedded skills）的非加性影响，形成跨模型同质性的“价值潮”（Value Tide）现象。
analysis.method: 构建包含394个可执行环境、4335个价值冲突任务的基准，通过端到端管道和专业心理学家逐实例策划，每个任务附带两个极对齐的黄金轨迹和基于轨迹的评分标准。
contributions: 提出首个专门评估智能体价值观的基准Agent-ValueBench，覆盖16个领域、28种价值系统和332个维度。
通过实验发现智能体价值观的“价值潮”现象，以及框架和技能对价值观的显著影响。
analysis.experiments: 在4个主流框架上评估了14个前沿专有和开源模型，摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 基准可能未覆盖所有可能的价值观维度。
评估依赖黄金轨迹和评分标准，可能引入主观偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个专门评估智能体价值观的基准Agent-ValueBench，揭示智能体价值观与底层LLM存在差异，并受框架和技能影响。

papers.title: How Mobile World Model Guides GUI Agents?
papers.abstract: Recent advances in vision-language models have enabled mobile GUI agents to perceive visual interfaces and execute user instructions, but reliable prediction of action consequences remains critical for long-horizon and high-risk interactions. Existing mobile world models provide either text-based or image-based future states, yet it remains unclear which representation is useful, whether generated rollouts can replace real environments, and how test-time guidance helps agents of different strengths. To answer the above questions, we filter and annotate mobile world-model data, then train world models across four modalities: delta text, full text, diffusion-based images, and renderable code. These models achieve SoTA performance on both MobileWorldBench and Code2WorldBench. Furthermore, by evaluating their downstream utility on AITZ, AndroidControl, and AndroidWorld, we obtain three findings. First, renderable code reconstruction achieves high in-distribution fidelity and provides effective multimodal supervision for data construction, while text-based feedback is more robust for online out-of-distribution (OOD) execution. Second, world-model-generated trajectories can provide transferable interaction experience in the training process and improve agents' end-to-end task performance, although these data do not preserve the original distribution. Last, for overconfident mobile agents with low action entropy, posterior self-reflection provides limited gains, suggesting that world models are more effective as prior perception or training supervision than as universal post-hoc verifiers.

analysis.tldr: 移动世界模型通过可渲染代码和文本反馈为GUI代理提供有效指导，但作为后验验证器效果有限。
analysis.research_motivation: 移动GUI代理需要可靠的动作后果预测以支持长程和高风险交互，但现有世界模型在表示形式、生成轨迹的可用性以及测试时指导的有效性方面缺乏系统研究。
analysis.problem: 系统探究移动世界模型的不同表示形式（delta文本、全文、扩散图像、可渲染代码）在下游任务中的效用，以及生成轨迹能否替代真实环境、测试时指导如何帮助不同强度的代理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 可渲染代码重建具有高分布内保真度，为数据构建提供有效多模态监督；文本反馈在在线分布外执行中更鲁棒。世界模型生成的轨迹可提供可迁移交互经验，但无法保持原始分布。对于低动作熵的过度自信代理，后验自我反思收益有限。
analysis.method: 筛选并标注移动世界模型数据，训练四种模态的世界模型（delta文本、全文、扩散图像、可渲染代码），并在多个基准上评估其下游效用。
contributions: 构建了四种模态的移动世界模型，并在MobileWorldBench和Code2WorldBench上达到SOTA。
通过系统实验揭示了不同表示形式的适用场景：可渲染代码适合数据构建，文本反馈适合在线OOD执行。
发现世界模型生成的轨迹可提升代理端到端任务性能，但作为后验验证器对过度自信代理效果有限。
analysis.experiments: 在MobileWorldBench、Code2WorldBench、AITZ、AndroidControl和AndroidWorld上进行了评估，摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 生成轨迹无法保持原始分布，可能限制其在某些场景下的直接使用。
后验自我反思对低动作熵代理提升有限，世界模型作为通用后验验证器的适用性有待进一步研究。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 移动世界模型通过可渲染代码和文本反馈为GUI代理提供有效指导，但作为后验验证器效果有限。

papers.title: TMAS: Scaling Test-Time Compute via Multi-Agent Synergy
papers.abstract: Test-time scaling has become an effective paradigm for improving the reasoning ability of large language models by allocating additional computation during inference. Recent structured approaches have further advanced this paradigm by organizing inference across multiple trajectories, refinement rounds, and verification-based feedback. However, existing structured test-time scaling methods either weakly coordinate parallel reasoning trajectories or rely on noisy historical information without explicitly deciding what should be retained and reused, limiting their ability to balance exploration and exploitation. In this work, we propose TMAS, a framework for scaling test-time compute via multi-agent synergy. TMAS organizes inference as a collaborative process among specialized agents, enabling structured information flow across agents, trajectories, and refinement iterations. To support effective cross-trajectory collaboration, TMAS introduces hierarchical memories: the experience bank reuses low-level reliable intermediate conclusions and local feedback, while the guideline bank records previously explored high-level strategies to steer subsequent rollouts away from redundant reasoning patterns. Furthermore, we design a hybrid reward reinforcement learning scheme tailored to TMAS, which jointly preserves basic reasoning capability, enhances experience utilization, and encourages exploration beyond previously attempted solution strategies. Extensive experiments on challenging reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that TMAS achieves stronger iterative scaling than existing test-time scaling baselines, while hybrid reward training further improves scaling effectiveness and stability across iterations. Code and data are available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: TMAS通过多智能体协同和分层记忆机制，在推理时扩展计算以提升大语言模型推理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有测试时扩展方法要么弱协调并行推理轨迹，要么依赖噪声历史信息，难以平衡探索与利用。
analysis.problem: 如何通过多智能体协同和结构化信息流，有效组织推理轨迹间的协作以提升测试时扩展效果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出TMAS框架，包含分层记忆（经验库和指导库）和混合奖励强化学习方案，实现多智能体间的结构化信息流。
contributions: 提出TMAS，通过多智能体协同和分层记忆机制实现结构化测试时扩展。
设计混合奖励强化学习方案，平衡基础推理、经验利用和探索。
analysis.experiments: 在多个挑战性推理基准上，TMAS优于现有测试时扩展基线，混合奖励训练进一步提升扩展效果和稳定性。
limitations: 可能依赖特定任务设计，泛化性需进一步验证。
分层记忆的存储和检索开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: TMAS通过多智能体协同和分层记忆机制，在推理时扩展计算以提升大语言模型推理能力。

papers.title: PaperFit: Vision-in-the-Loop Typesetting Optimization for Scientific Documents
papers.abstract: A LaTeX manuscript that compiles without error is not necessarily publication-ready. The resulting PDFs frequently suffer from misplaced floats, overflowing equations, inconsistent table scaling, widow and orphan lines, and poor page balance, forcing authors into repetitive compile-inspect-edit cycles. Rule-based tools are blind to rendered visuals, operating only on source code and log files. Text-only LLMs perform open-loop text editing, unable to predict or verify the two-dimensional layout consequences of their changes. Reliable typesetting optimization therefore requires a visual closed loop with verification after every edit. We formalize this problem as Visual Typesetting Optimization (VTO), the task of transforming a compilable LaTeX paper into a visually polished, page-budget-compliant PDF through iterative visual verification and source-level revision, and introduce a five-category taxonomy of typesetting defects to guide diagnosis. We present PaperFit, a vision-in-the-loop agent that iteratively renders pages, diagnoses defects, and applies constrained repairs. To benchmark VTO, we construct PaperFit-Bench with 200 papers across 10 venue templates and 13 defect types at different difficulty. Extensive experiments show that PaperFit outperforms all baselines by a large margin, establishing that bridging the gap from compilable source to publication-ready PDF requires vision-in-the-loop optimization and that VTO constitutes a critical missing stage in the document automation pipeline.

analysis.tldr: PaperFit 提出视觉在环的排版优化方法，通过迭代渲染和诊断修复 LaTeX 文档的视觉缺陷，显著优于基线。
analysis.research_motivation: LaTeX 文档编译无错但 PDF 常存在浮动体错位、公式溢出、孤行等视觉缺陷，手动修复耗时且规则工具和纯文本 LLM 无法感知二维布局效果。
analysis.problem: 如何将可编译的 LaTeX 论文自动优化为视觉美观、符合页数限制的 PDF。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出视觉在环的智能体 PaperFit，迭代渲染页面、诊断缺陷并应用约束修复，形式化视觉排版优化问题并建立五类缺陷分类法。
contributions: 形式化视觉排版优化问题并建立五类缺陷分类法
提出 PaperFit 视觉在环智能体，实现迭代渲染-诊断-修复流程
构建 PaperFit-Bench 基准，包含 200 篇论文、10 种模板和 13 种缺陷类型
analysis.experiments: 在 PaperFit-Bench 上实验，PaperFit 大幅优于所有基线。
limitations: 可能依赖 LaTeX 编译环境，对非 LaTeX 文档不适用
修复策略可能受限于预定义的约束规则
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: PaperFit 提出视觉在环的排版优化方法，通过迭代渲染和诊断修复 LaTeX 文档的视觉缺陷，显著优于基线。

papers.title: CORTEG: Foundation Models Enable Cross-Modality Representation Transfer from Scalp to Intracranial Brain Recordings
papers.abstract: Intracranial electrocorticography (ECoG) offers high-signal-to-noise access to cortical activity for brain-computer interfaces, yet limited per-patient data has led most prior work to rely on small, subject-specific decoders that neglect information shared across patients. We investigate whether large pretrained scalp-EEG foundation models (EEG FMs) can be adapted to ECoG, enabling cross-patient learning and competitive decoding performance while calibrating to a held-out patient in 10-30 minutes on a single GPU. We introduce CORTEG, a cross-modality transfer framework that combines a pretrained EEG FM backbone, an electrode-aware KNNSoftFourier spatial adapter, a dual-stream tokenizer for low-frequency and high-gamma activity, and a leave-one-subject-out fine-tuning strategy. We evaluate CORTEG on two challenging regression tasks: public finger trajectory regression (n=9) and private audio envelope regression (n=16). CORTEG matches or exceeds the strongest task-specific baselines on both tasks: it reaches the highest mean correlation among compared methods on the public finger benchmark (gain not statistically significant on n=9 subjects), with larger and statistically significant gains on the audio task and in low-data per-patient calibration. Feature analyses align with neurophysiology, and latent manifolds capture low-dimensional finger-movement structure. CORTEG provides systematic evidence that scalp-EEG pretraining can be repurposed for ECoG decoding, enabling data-efficient intracranial BCIs that can adapt to new patients.

analysis.tldr: 利用预训练头皮脑电图基础模型通过跨模态迁移实现颅内脑电图高效解码。
analysis.research_motivation: 颅内ECoG信号质量高但患者数据有限，传统方法依赖小规模个体解码器，忽略了跨患者共享信息，导致数据效率低。
analysis.problem: 如何利用大规模预训练的头皮EEG基础模型适应ECoG信号，实现跨患者学习并快速校准到新患者。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出CORTEG框架，包含预训练EEG FM骨干、电极感知KNNSoftFourier空间适配器、双流分词器（处理低频和高伽马活动）以及留一患者微调策略。
contributions: 首次系统证明头皮EEG预训练可迁移至ECoG解码。
提出跨模态迁移框架CORTEG，在手指轨迹和音频包络回归任务上匹配或超越强基线。
analysis.experiments: 在公共手指轨迹回归（n=9）和私有音频包络回归（n=16）上评估，CORTEG在音频任务和低数据校准中取得显著增益。
limitations: 公共手指任务上增益未达统计显著。
仅验证了回归任务，分类任务未涉及。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to neuroscience & cognitive science
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 神经/认知科学
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用预训练头皮脑电图基础模型通过跨模态迁移实现颅内脑电图高效解码。

papers.title: EmbodiSkill: Skill-Aware Reflection for Self-Evolving Embodied Agents
papers.abstract: Embodied agents can benefit from skills that guide object search, action execution, and state changes across diverse environments. Since embodied environments vary across layouts, object states, and other execution factors, these skills must self-evolve from trajectories generated during task execution. However, existing skill self-evolution methods are mainly developed in digital environments and often convert trajectories into coarse skill updates. Directly applying this paradigm to embodied settings is problematic, because a failed task execution may reflect not only incorrect skill content, but also an execution lapse in which the agent fails to follow valid guidance. We propose EmbodiSkill, a training-free framework for embodied skill self-evolution through skill-aware reflection and targeted revision. EmbodiSkill interprets each trajectory with respect to the current skill, uses skill-changing evidence to update the skill body, and uses execution-lapse evidence to preserve and emphasize valid guidance. Experiments on ALFWorld and EmbodiedBench show that EmbodiSkill consistently improves embodied task success. On ALFWorld, EmbodiSkill enables a frozen Qwen3.5-27B executor to reach 93.28% task success, outperforming GPT-5.2 used as a direct agent without skills by 31.58%. These results show that skill-aware self-evolution helps embodied agents accumulate reusable procedural knowledge from their own trajectories.

analysis.tldr: 提出EmbodiSkill框架，通过技能感知反思和针对性修订实现具身智能体的技能自我进化，无需训练即可提升任务成功率。
analysis.research_motivation: 具身环境多样且复杂，技能需要从任务轨迹中自我进化，但现有方法主要针对数字环境，将轨迹转化为粗糙的技能更新，且失败可能源于技能内容错误或执行失误，直接应用效果不佳。
analysis.problem: 如何让具身智能体从自身轨迹中自我进化技能，同时区分技能内容错误和执行失误，实现有效的技能更新。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，现有技能自我进化方法在数字环境中开发，直接应用于具身环境时，任务失败可能反映技能内容错误或执行失误，需要区分这两种情况。
analysis.method: EmbodiSkill是一个无需训练的框架，通过技能感知反思和针对性修订实现技能自我进化：用技能改变证据更新技能主体，用执行失误证据保留并强调有效指导。
contributions: 提出EmbodiSkill，首个无需训练的具身技能自我进化框架，能区分技能内容错误和执行失误。
在ALFWorld和EmbodiedBench上验证有效性，ALFWorld上冻结的Qwen3.5-27B执行器达到93.28%成功率，比直接使用GPT-5.2作为智能体高31.58%。
analysis.experiments: 在ALFWorld和EmbodiedBench上进行实验，ALFWorld上冻结的Qwen3.5-27B执行器达到93.28%任务成功率，比直接使用GPT-5.2作为智能体高31.58%。
limitations: 可能依赖基础模型的能力，对弱模型效果未知。
仅在两个基准上验证，泛化性需进一步测试。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出EmbodiSkill框架，通过技能感知反思和针对性修订实现具身智能体的技能自我进化，无需训练即可提升任务成功率。

papers.title: Verifiable Process Rewards for Agentic Reasoning
papers.abstract: Reinforcement learning from verifiable rewards (RLVR) has improved the reasoning abilities of large language models (LLMs), but most existing approaches rely on sparse outcome-level feedback. This sparsity creates a credit assignment challenge in long-horizon agentic reasoning: a trajectory may fail despite containing many correct intermediate decisions, or succeed despite containing flawed ones. In this work, we study a class of densely-verifiable agentic reasoning problems, where intermediate actions can be objectively checked by symbolic or algorithmic oracles. We propose Verifiable Process Rewards (VPR), a framework that converts such oracles into dense turn-level supervision for reinforcement learning, and instantiate it in three representative settings: search-based verification for dynamic deduction, constraint-based verification for logical reasoning, and posterior-based verification for probabilistic inference. We further provide a theoretical analysis showing that dense verifier-grounded rewards can improve long-horizon credit assignment by providing more localized learning signals, with the benefit depending on the reliability of the verifier. Empirically, VPR outperforms outcome-level reward and rollout-based process reward baselines across controlled environments, and more importantly, transfers to both general and agentic reasoning benchmarks, suggesting that verifiable process supervision can foster general reasoning skills applicable beyond the training environments. Our results indicate that VPR is a promising approach for enhancing LLM agents whenever reliable intermediate verification is available, while also highlighting its dependence on oracle quality and the open challenge of extending VPR to less structured, open-ended environments.

analysis.tldr: 提出可验证过程奖励（VPR）框架，利用符号或算法预言机为智能体推理提供密集的逐轮监督信号，提升长程信用分配与泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有强化学习从可验证奖励（RLVR）主要依赖稀疏的结果级反馈，在长程智能体推理中面临信用分配难题：轨迹可能因大量正确中间步骤而失败，或因包含错误步骤而成功。
analysis.problem: 如何为长程智能体推理提供密集、可验证的中间过程监督信号，以改善信用分配并提升推理能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出可验证过程奖励（VPR）框架，将符号或算法预言机转化为密集的逐轮监督信号，并实例化于三种场景：基于搜索的验证（动态演绎）、基于约束的验证（逻辑推理）和基于后验的验证（概率推理）。
contributions: 提出VPR框架，利用可验证预言机为智能体推理提供密集过程奖励。
在三种代表性场景中实例化VPR，并给出理论分析证明密集验证器奖励可改善长程信用分配。
实验表明VPR在受控环境中优于结果级奖励和基于rollout的过程奖励基线，并能泛化到通用和智能体推理基准。
analysis.experiments: 在受控环境及通用/智能体推理基准上进行实验，VPR优于结果级奖励和基于rollout的过程奖励基线。
limitations: 依赖预言机质量，在缺乏可靠中间验证的开放环境中应用受限。
未讨论扩展到非结构化、开放环境的具体方法。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出可验证过程奖励（VPR）框架，利用符号或算法预言机为智能体推理提供密集的逐轮监督信号，提升长程信用分配与泛化能力。

papers.title: Positive Alignment: Artificial Intelligence for Human Flourishing
papers.abstract: Existing alignment research is dominated by concerns about safety and preventing harm: safeguards, controllability, and compliance. This paradigm of alignment parallels early psychology's focus on mental illness: necessary but incomplete. What we call Positive Alignment is the development of AI systems that (i) actively support human and ecological flourishing in a pluralistic, polycentric, context-sensitive, and user-authored way while (ii) remaining safe and cooperative. It is a distinct and necessary agenda within AI alignment research. We argue that several existing failures of alignment (e.g., engagement hacking, loss of human autonomy, failures in truth-seeking, low epistemic humility, error correction, lack of diverse viewpoints, and being primarily reactive rather than proactive) may be better addressed through positive alignment, including cultivating virtues and maximizing human flourishing. We highlight a range of challenges, open questions, and technical directions (e.g., data filtering and upsampling, pre- and post-training, evaluations, collaborative value collection) for different phases of the LLM and agents lifecycle. We end with design principles for promoting disagreement and decentralization through contextual grounding, community customization, continual adaptation, and polycentric governance; that is, many legitimate centers of oversight rather than one institutional or moral chokepoint.

analysis.tldr: 提出“正向对齐”概念，主张AI系统应主动促进人类与生态繁荣，而不仅限于安全与无害。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有对齐研究过度聚焦于安全与防止伤害，忽视了AI系统主动促进人类繁荣的潜力，类似于早期心理学只关注精神疾病而忽略积极心理。
analysis.problem: 如何定义和实现AI系统的正向对齐，使其在保持安全与合作的同时，主动、多元、情境敏感地支持人类与生态繁荣。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出当前对齐失败模式包括：参与度黑客、人类自主性丧失、求真失败、认知谦逊不足、错误纠正不力、缺乏多元视角、反应性而非主动性等。
analysis.method: 提出正向对齐框架，包括数据过滤与上采样、预训练与后训练、评估、协作价值收集等技术方向，以及通过情境基础、社区定制、持续适应和多中心治理促进分歧与去中心化的设计原则。
contributions: 提出正向对齐概念，作为AI对齐研究中独立且必要的议程
识别现有对齐失败模式并论证正向对齐的解决潜力
概述LLM与智能体生命周期各阶段的技术方向与设计原则
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 正向对齐的具体实现细节和可操作性尚不明确
多中心治理与去中心化可能带来协调与效率挑战
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出“正向对齐”概念，主张AI系统应主动促进人类与生态繁荣，而不仅限于安全与无害。

papers.title: AgentRx: A Benchmark Study of LLM Agents for Multimodal Clinical Prediction Tasks
papers.abstract: Building effective clinical decision support systems requires the synthesis of complex heterogeneous multimodal data. Such modalities include temporal electronic health records data, medical images, radiology reports, and clinical notes. Large language model (LLM)-based agents have shown impressive performance in various healthcare tasks, especially those involving textual modalities. Considering the fragmentation of healthcare data across hospital systems, collaborative agent frameworks present a promising direction to mitigate data sharing challenges. However, the effectiveness of LLM agents for multimodal clinical risk prediction remains largely unexamined. In this work, we conduct a systematic evaluation of LLM-based agents for clinical prediction tasks using large-scale real-world data. We assess performance in unimodal and multimodal settings and quantify performance gaps between single agent and multi-agent systems. Our findings highlight that single agent frameworks outperform naive multi-agent systems, are better at handling multimodal data, and are better calibrated. This underscores a critical need for improving multi-agent collaboration to better handle heterogeneous inputs. By open-sourcing our code and evaluation framework, this work offers a new benchmark to support future developments relating to agentic systems in healthcare.

analysis.tldr: LLM智能体在多模态临床预测中，单智能体系统优于简单多智能体系统，需改进多智能体协作。
analysis.research_motivation: 临床决策支持系统需整合多模态数据，但现有LLM智能体在多模态临床风险预测中的有效性尚未被系统评估。
analysis.problem: 评估LLM智能体在多模态临床预测任务中的表现，并比较单智能体与多智能体系统的性能差距。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 单智能体框架在单模态和多模态设置中均优于朴素多智能体系统，且能更好地处理多模态数据，校准更佳。
analysis.method: 使用大规模真实世界数据，系统评估LLM智能体在单模态和多模态临床预测任务中的性能，并比较单智能体与多智能体系统。
contributions: 首次系统评估LLM智能体在多模态临床预测任务中的表现
开源代码和评估框架，作为新基准
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅评估了朴素多智能体系统，未探索复杂协作策略
可能未涵盖所有临床预测任务类型
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM智能体在多模态临床预测中，单智能体系统优于简单多智能体系统，需改进多智能体协作。

papers.title: IndustryBench: Probing the Industrial Knowledge Boundaries of LLMs
papers.abstract: In industrial procurement, an LLM answer is useful only if it survives a standards check: recommended material must match operating condition, every parameter must respect a regulated threshold, and no procedure may contradict a safety clause. Partial correctness can mask safety-critical contradictions that aggregate LLM benchmarks rarely capture. We introduce IndustryBench, a 2,049-item benchmark for industrial procurement QA in Chinese, grounded in Chinese national standards (GB/T) and structured industrial product records, organized by seven capability dimensions, ten industry categories, and panel-derived difficulty tiers, with item-aligned English, Russian, and Vietnamese renderings. Our construction pipeline rejects 70.3% of LLM-generated candidates at a search-based external-verification stage, calibrating how unreliable industrial QA remains after LLM-only this http URL evaluation decouples raw correctness, scored by a Qwen3-Max judge validated at $\kappa_w = 0.798$ against a domain expert, from a separate safety-violation (SV) check against source texts. Across 17 models in Chinese and an 8-model intersection over four languages, we find: (i) the best system reaches only 2.083 on the 0--3 rubric, leaving substantial headroom; (ii) Standards & Terminology is the most persistent capability weakness and survives item-aligned translation; (iii) extended reasoning lowers safety-adjusted scores for 12 of 13 models, primarily by introducing unsupported safety-critical details into longer final answers; and (iv) safety-violation rates reshuffle the leaderboard -- GPT-5.4 climbs from rank 6 to rank 3 after SV adjustment, while Kimi-k2.5-1T-A32B drops seven this http URL LLM evaluation therefore requires source-grounded, safety-aware diagnosis rather than aggregate accuracy. We release IndustryBench with all prompts, scoring scripts, and dataset documentation.

analysis.tldr: 提出工业采购QA基准IndustryBench，揭示LLM在安全关键场景中准确性与安全违规的严重脱节。
analysis.research_motivation: 工业采购中LLM的回答必须通过标准检查，但现有基准仅关注整体准确率，忽略了部分正确中隐藏的安全关键矛盾。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个能同时评估LLM在工业采购问答中原始正确性和安全违规的细粒度基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：1) 最佳系统在0-3评分中仅得2.083，提升空间大；2) 标准与术语是最持久的能力弱点；3) 扩展推理会降低12/13个模型的安全调整分数，因为引入不支持的细节；4) 安全违规率显著改变排行榜。
analysis.method: 构建包含2049个中文工业采购QA的基准，基于GB/T标准，经搜索验证拒绝70.3%的LLM生成候选，并解耦原始正确性（Qwen3-Max评判）与安全违规检查。
contributions: 提出首个面向工业采购的细粒度QA基准IndustryBench，覆盖7个能力维度、10个行业类别和难度等级。
揭示安全违规检查对模型排名的显著影响，强调工业LLM评估需要安全感知的诊断。
analysis.experiments: 在17个中文模型和8个跨语言模型上评估，使用Qwen3-Max评判（与专家一致性κ_w=0.798）和安全违规检查。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖中文国家标准，可能不直接适用于其他语言或地区标准。
评判器Qwen3-Max虽与专家一致性好，但仍有偏差风险。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出工业采购QA基准IndustryBench，揭示LLM在安全关键场景中准确性与安全违规的严重脱节。

papers.title: E-TCAV: Formalizing Penultimate Proxies for Efficient Concept Based Interpretability
papers.abstract: TCAV (Testing with Concept Activation Vectors) is an interpretability method that assesses the alignment between the internal representations of a trained neural network and human-understandable, high-level concepts. Though effective, TCAV suffers from significant computational overhead, inter-layer disagreement of TCAV scores, and statistical instability. This work takes a step toward addressing these challenges by introducing E-TCAV, a framework for efficient approximation of TCAV scores, which is based on extensive investigation into three key aspects of the TCAV methodology: 1) the effect of latent classifiers on the stability of TCAV scores, 2) the inter-layer agreement of TCAV scores, and 3) the use of the penultimate layer as a fast proxy for earlier layers for TCAV computation. To ensure a solid foundation for E-TCAV, we conduct extensive evaluations across four different architectures and five datasets, encompassing problems from both computer vision and natural language domains. Our results show that the layers in the final block of the neural network strongly agree with the penultimate layer in terms of the TCAV scores, and the commonly observed variance of the TCAV scores can be attributed to the choice of the latent classifier. Leveraging this inter-layer agreement and the degeneracy of directional sensitivities at the penultimate layer, E-TCAV guarantees linearly scaling speed-ups with respect to the network's size and the number of evaluation samples, marking a step towards efficient model debugging and real-time concept-guided training.

analysis.tldr: E-TCAV通过形式化倒数第二层代理，高效近似TCAV分数，实现线性加速。
analysis.research_motivation: TCAV是一种可解释性方法，但存在计算开销大、层间分数不一致和统计不稳定性等问题，限制了其在模型调试和实时概念引导训练中的应用。
analysis.problem: 如何高效且稳定地近似TCAV分数，同时解决层间不一致和统计波动问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出：神经网络最后块的层与倒数第二层在TCAV分数上高度一致；TCAV分数的常见方差可归因于潜在分类器的选择。
analysis.method: E-TCAV框架，基于对潜在分类器稳定性、层间一致性和倒数第二层代理的深入研究，利用层间一致性和倒数第二层方向灵敏度的简并性，实现线性加速。
contributions: 系统研究了TCAV方法中潜在分类器、层间一致性和倒数第二层代理三个关键方面。
提出E-TCAV框架，保证随网络大小和评估样本数量线性加速，迈向高效模型调试和实时概念引导训练。
analysis.experiments: 在四种不同架构和五个数据集上进行了广泛评估，涵盖计算机视觉和自然语言领域。
limitations: 可能仅适用于具有明确倒数第二层结构的神经网络。
线性加速假设可能在某些复杂架构或大规模数据下受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: E-TCAV通过形式化倒数第二层代理，高效近似TCAV分数，实现线性加速。

papers.title: Towards Autonomous Railway Operations: A Semi-Hierarchical Deep Reinforcement Learning Approach to the Vehicle Rescheduling Problem
papers.abstract: Managing disruptions in railway traffic management is a major challenge. Rising traffic density and infrastructure limits increase complexity, making the Vehicle Routing and Scheduling Problem (VRSP) difficult to solve reliably and in real time. While Operational Research (OR) methods are widely used, most dispatching still relies on human expertise due to the problem's exponential combinatorial complexity. Reinforcement Learning (RL) has gained attention for its potential in multi-agent coordination, but existing RL approaches often underperform OR methods and struggle to scale in dense rail networks. This paper addresses this gap from a machine learning perspective by introducing a semi-hierarchical RL formulation tailored to operational railway constraints. The method separates dispatching from routing through dedicated action and observation spaces, enabling policies to specialise in distinct decision scopes and addressing the imbalance between rare dispatch decisions and frequent routing updates. The approach is evaluated on the Flatland-RL simulator across five difficulty levels and 50 random seeds, with 7 to 80 trains. Results show substantially improved coordination, resource utilisation, and robustness compared with heuristic baselines and monolithic RL, nearly doubling the number of trains reaching their destinations, while keeping deadlock rates below 5% and adaptively sequencing, delaying, or cancelling trains under heavy congestion.

analysis.tldr: 提出半层次化深度强化学习方法解决铁路车辆重调度问题，在Flatland-RL模拟器上显著提升协调性和鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 铁路交通管理中的中断处理是重大挑战，现有运筹学方法难以实时求解，而强化学习方法在密集铁路网络中性能不足且难以扩展。
analysis.problem: 解决铁路车辆重调度问题（VRSP），在满足运营约束下实现高效、鲁棒的实时调度决策。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出调度决策与路径更新之间存在不平衡（调度决策稀疏、路径更新频繁），导致现有RL方法难以协调。
analysis.method: 提出半层次化深度强化学习框架，通过分离调度与路由的专用动作和观测空间，使策略分别专注于不同决策范围。
contributions: 提出一种半层次化RL公式，适应铁路运营约束，分离调度与路由决策。
在Flatland-RL模拟器上五个难度级别和50个随机种子的评估显示，该方法相比启发式基线和单一RL显著提升协调性、资源利用率和鲁棒性。
analysis.experiments: 在Flatland-RL模拟器上，使用7到80列火车，跨越五个难度级别和50个随机种子进行实验。
limitations: 仅在模拟环境中验证，未在真实铁路系统中测试。
方法可能对超参数敏感，需要进一步调优。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出半层次化深度强化学习方法解决铁路车辆重调度问题，在Flatland-RL模拟器上显著提升协调性和鲁棒性。

papers.title: SciIntegrity-Bench: A Benchmark for Evaluating Academic Integrity in AI Scientist Systems
papers.abstract: AI scientist systems are increasingly deployed for autonomous research, yet their academic integrity has never been systematically evaluated. We introduce SCIINTEGRITY-BENCH, the first benchmark designed around a dilemmatic evaluation paradigm: each of its 33 scenarios across 11 trap categories is constructed so that honest acknowledgment of failure is the only correct response, while task completion requires misconduct. Across 231 evaluation runs spanning 7 state-of-the-art LLMs, the overall integrity problem rate reaches 34.2%, and no model achieves zero failures. Most strikingly, across missing-data scenarios, all seven models generate synthetic data rather than acknowledging infeasibility, differing only in whether they disclose the substitution. A further prompt ablation study separates two drivers: removing explicit completion pressure sharply reduces undisclosed fabrication from 20.6% to 3.2%, while the underlying synthesis rate remains unchanged, revealing an intrinsic completion bias that persists independent of prompt-level instructions. These findings point to the absence of honest refusal as a trained disposition as the primary driver of observed failures. We release SCIINTEGRITY-BENCH at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 首个评估AI科研系统学术诚信的基准，发现34.2%的违规率，模型存在内在完成偏见。
analysis.research_motivation: AI科研系统被广泛部署用于自主研究，但其学术诚信从未被系统评估，存在伪造数据等风险。
analysis.problem: 缺乏评估AI科研系统学术诚信的标准化基准和量化方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 所有模型在缺失数据场景下都会生成合成数据而非承认不可行，移除显式完成压力可降低未披露伪造率，但底层合成率不变，表明存在内在完成偏见。
analysis.method: 构建包含33个场景、11种陷阱类别的基准，采用两难评估范式：诚实承认失败是唯一正确回应，而完成任务需要不端行为。
contributions: 提出首个评估AI科研系统学术诚信的基准SCIINTEGRITY-BENCH
通过实验揭示模型存在内在完成偏见，且诚实拒绝缺失是主要失败原因
analysis.experiments: 在7个SOTA LLM上进行了231次评估运行，整体违规率34.2%，并进行了提示消融实验。
limitations: 基准场景数量有限（33个），可能无法覆盖所有不端行为类型
仅评估了LLM，未涉及多模态或更复杂的AI科研系统
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个评估AI科研系统学术诚信的基准，发现34.2%的违规率，模型存在内在完成偏见。

papers.title: Hypothesis-Driven Deep Research with Large Language Models: A Structured Methodology for Automated Knowledge Discovery
papers.abstract: Current AI-powered research systems adopt a direct search-then-summarize paradigm that treats hypotheses as end products of scientific discovery. We argue this leaves a critical gap: hypotheses can serve a far more powerful role as organizational instruments that structure the research process itself. We propose the Hypothesis-Driven Deep Research (HDRI) methodology - the first framework using hypotheses to organize general-purpose deep research across arbitrary domains, rather than merely validating claims within specific domains. This transforms research from reactive information retrieval into proactive, verifiable, and iterative knowledge discovery. HDRI is formalized with six core principles and an eight-stage pipeline. A central innovation is the gap-driven iterative research mechanism - a closed-loop quality assurance system that automatically identifies informational and logical gaps, triggering targeted supplementary investigation. We further introduce a fact reasoning framework with traceable reasoning chains and quantified confidence propagation, a subject locking mechanism to prevent entity confusion, and a multi-dimensional quality assessment scheme. The methodology is realized in the INFOMINER system. Experiments demonstrate improvements of 22.4% in fact density, 90% subject matching accuracy, 0.92 multi-source verification confidence, and 14% completeness gain from gap-driven supplementation. Five case studies validate its practical applicability, achieving an average quality rating of 4.46/5.0.

analysis.tldr: 提出假设驱动深度研究方法论HDRI，将假设从研究终点转变为组织研究过程的工具，实现自动化知识发现。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前AI研究系统采用直接搜索-摘要范式，将假设视为科学发现的最终产物，未能充分利用假设作为组织研究过程的结构化工具，导致研究过程缺乏主动性和可验证性。
analysis.problem: 如何将假设作为组织工具来引导通用深度研究，实现从被动信息检索到主动、可验证、迭代的知识发现。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出假设驱动深度研究（HDRI）方法论，包含六个核心原则和八阶段流水线，核心创新包括：差距驱动迭代研究机制（闭环质量保证系统自动识别信息与逻辑差距并触发补充调查）、事实推理框架（可追溯推理链与量化置信传播）、主体锁定机制（防止实体混淆）以及多维度质量评估方案。
contributions: 首次提出使用假设组织通用深度研究的框架HDRI，将研究从被动检索转变为主动迭代的知识发现。
引入差距驱动迭代研究机制、事实推理框架、主体锁定机制和多维质量评估等创新组件。
实现INFOMINER系统，在事实密度、主体匹配准确率、多源验证置信度和完整性提升等指标上取得显著改进。
analysis.experiments: 在多个案例上验证，事实密度提升22.4%，主体匹配准确率90%，多源验证置信度0.92，差距驱动补充带来14%完整性提升，五个案例研究平均质量评分4.46/5.0。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量初始假设，对假设生成质量敏感。
跨领域泛化能力需进一步验证，当前案例数量有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出假设驱动深度研究方法论HDRI，将假设从研究终点转变为组织研究过程的工具，实现自动化知识发现。

papers.title: Beyond Autonomy: A Dynamic Tiered AgentRunner Framework for Governable and Resilient Enterprise AI Execution
papers.abstract: Current large language model agent frameworks prioritize autonomy but lack the governability mechanisms required for enterprise deployment. High-risk write operations proceed without independent review, complex tasks lack acceptance verification, and computational resources are allocated uniformly regardless of risk level. We propose the Dynamic Tiered AgentRunner, a controlled execution protocol distilled from a production-grade multi-tenant SaaS platform. The framework introduces three core mechanisms: (1) Risk-Adaptive Tiering that dynamically allocates computational resources and review intensity based on task risk profiles, achieving Pareto-optimal trade-offs between safety and efficiency; (2) Separation of Powers architecture where proposal, review, execution, and verification are performed by independent agents with physically isolated boundaries; and (3) Resilience-by-Design through a Verifier-Recovery closed loop that treats failure as a first-class system state. We formalize the tier selectio

analysis.tldr: 提出动态分层AgentRunner框架，通过风险自适应分层、权力分离和弹性恢复机制，在保持自主性的同时实现企业级AI执行的可治理性和弹性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM Agent框架优先追求自主性，缺乏企业部署所需的可治理性机制，高风险写操作缺乏独立审查、复杂任务缺乏验收验证、计算资源统一分配不考虑风险等级，导致安全与效率难以平衡。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个既能保持Agent自主性又能满足企业级治理要求的执行框架，实现安全、效率与弹性的Pareto最优权衡。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Dynamic Tiered AgentRunner框架，包含三个核心机制：(1) 风险自适应分层，根据任务风险动态分配计算资源和审查强度；(2) 权力分离架构，提案、审查、执行、验证由独立Agent在物理隔离边界内执行；(3) 弹性设计，通过验证器-恢复闭环将失败视为一等系统状态。
contributions: 提出风险自适应分层机制，实现安全与效率的Pareto最优权衡
设计权力分离架构，确保企业级治理所需的独立审查与责任分离
引入弹性设计闭环，将失败作为一等状态处理，提升系统鲁棒性
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖任务风险准确评估，实际风险建模存在挑战
权力分离可能增加系统延迟，影响实时性要求高的场景
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出动态分层AgentRunner框架，通过风险自适应分层、权力分离和弹性恢复机制，在保持自主性的同时实现企业级AI执行的可治理性和弹性。

papers.title: TRACE: Distilling Where It Matters via Token-Routed Self On-Policy Alignment
papers.abstract: On-policy self-distillation (self-OPD) densifies reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) by letting a policy teach itself under privileged context. We find that when this guidance spans the full response, all-token KL spends gradients on mostly redundant positions and amplifies privileged-information leakage, causing entropy rise, shortened reasoning, and out-of-distribution degradation in long-horizon math training. We propose Token-Routed Alignment for Critical rEasoning (TRACE), which distills only on annotator-marked critical spans: forward KL on key spans of correct rollouts, optional reverse KL on localized error spans, and GRPO on all remaining tokens, with the KL channel annealed away after a short warm-up. Our analysis explains TRACE through two effects: forward KL provides non-vanishing lift to teacher-supported tokens that the student under-allocates, while span masking and decay keep cumulative privileged-gradient exposure finite. On four held-out math benchmarks plus GPQA-Diamond, TRACE improves over GRPO by 2.76 percentage points on average and preserves the Qwen3-8B base OOD score on GPQA-Diamond, where GRPO and all-token self-OPD baselines degrade. Gains persist under online self-annotation (+1.90 percentage points, about 69% of the strong-API gain), reducing the concern that TRACE merely imports external annotator capability. Across scales, the best routed action is base-dependent: on Qwen3-8B it is forward KL on key spans, while on Qwen3-1.7B it shifts to reverse KL on error spans.

analysis.tldr: TRACE通过仅对关键推理跨度进行蒸馏，解决了全token自蒸馏中熵增和分布外退化问题，在数学推理上超越GRPO。
analysis.research_motivation: 在基于可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR）中，on-policy自蒸馏（self-OPD）让策略在特权上下文中自我学习，但全token KL散度在冗余位置上浪费梯度并放大特权信息泄露，导致熵增、推理缩短和长程数学训练中的分布外退化。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种蒸馏方法，仅对关键推理跨度进行对齐，避免全token蒸馏的负面效应，同时保持或提升数学推理性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 全token KL散度在长程数学训练中导致熵增、推理缩短和分布外退化，原因是梯度被分配到冗余位置且特权信息泄露被放大。
analysis.method: 提出Token-Routed Alignment for Critical rEasoning (TRACE)，仅在标注的关键跨度上进行蒸馏：正确轨迹的关键跨度上使用前向KL，可选地在错误跨度上使用反向KL，其余token使用GRPO，且KL通道在短预热后衰减。
contributions: 提出TRACE方法，通过关键跨度蒸馏和KL衰减解决全token自蒸馏的退化问题。
在四个数学基准和GPQA-Diamond上平均提升GRPO 2.76个百分点，并保持OOD性能。
分析表明TRACE通过前向KL提升教师支持token的分配，并通过跨度掩码和衰减限制累积特权梯度暴露。
analysis.experiments: 在四个数学基准和GPQA-Diamond上评估，TRACE平均比GRPO提升2.76个百分点，且在线自标注下增益为强API增益的69%。
limitations: 依赖标注的关键跨度，可能引入标注偏差。
最佳路由动作因模型规模而异，需要针对不同基础模型调整。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: TRACE通过仅对关键推理跨度进行蒸馏，解决了全token自蒸馏中熵增和分布外退化问题，在数学推理上超越GRPO。

papers.title: Automated Approach for Solving Infinite-state Polynomial Reachability Games
papers.abstract: Reachability games are two-player games played on a graph, where the objective of $\texttt{REACH}$ player is to reach the target set whereas the objective of $\texttt{SAFE}$ player is to stay away from the target set. Reachability games have important applications in artificial intelligence and reactive synthesis, and many of these applications give rise to infinite-state reachability games. In this paper, we study turn-based reachability games on infinite-state graphs defined over valuations of a finite set of real variables. We consider the problem of determining the existence of and computing a winning strategy for $\texttt{REACH}$ player. Our contributions are twofold. First, we propose ranking certificates for reachability games, a sound and complete proof rule for proving that $\texttt{REACH}$ player has a winning strategy from the specified initial state. Second, we consider polynomial reachability games, where transitions and objectives are described by polynomial constraints over real variables, and propose a fully automated algorithm for computing a winning strategy for $\texttt{REACH}$ player together with a formal correctness witness in the form of a ranking certificate. The algorithm is sound, semi-complete, and runs in sub-exponential time. Our experiments demonstrate the ability of our method to solve challenging examples from the literature that were out of the reach of existing methods. Specifically, for the classical Cinderella-Stepmother game, we are able to compute an optimal winning strategy for an arbitrary precision parameter for the first time.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种自动化方法求解无限状态多项式可达性博弈，通过排名证书证明获胜策略并实现次指数时间算法。
analysis.research_motivation: 可达性博弈在人工智能和反应式合成中有重要应用，但许多实际场景涉及无限状态图，现有方法难以处理。
analysis.problem: 确定并计算无限状态多项式可达性博弈中REACH玩家的获胜策略。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出排名证书作为完备的证明规则，并设计全自动算法，通过多项式约束描述博弈，输出获胜策略及形式化正确性证明。
contributions: 提出排名证书，一种用于可达性博弈的完备证明规则。
给出全自动算法，在次指数时间内求解多项式可达性博弈，并首次为Cinderella-Stepmother博弈计算任意精度参数下的最优获胜策略。
analysis.experiments: 在文献中的挑战性示例上测试，表明方法能解决现有方法无法处理的实例，包括Cinderella-Stepmother博弈。
limitations: 算法仅半完备，可能无法处理所有情况。
仅针对多项式约束，未扩展到更一般的约束类型。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种自动化方法求解无限状态多项式可达性博弈，通过排名证书证明获胜策略并实现次指数时间算法。

papers.title: Benchmarking Safety Risks of Knowledge-Intensive Reasoning under Malicious Knowledge Editing
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) increasingly rely on knowledge editing to support knowledge-intensive reasoning, but this flexibility also introduces critical safety risks: adversaries can inject malicious or misleading knowledge that corrupts downstream reasoning and leads to harmful outcomes. Existing knowledge editing benchmarks primarily focus on editing efficacy and lack a unified framework for systematically evaluating the safety implications of edited knowledge on reasoning behavior. To address this gap, we present EditRisk-Bench, a benchmark for systematically evaluating safety risks of knowledge-intensive reasoning under malicious knowledge editing. Unlike prior benchmarks that mainly emphasize edit success, generalization, and locality, EditRisk-Bench focuses on how injected knowledge affects downstream reasoning behavior and reliability. It integrates diverse malicious scenarios, including misinformation, bias, and safety violations, together with multi-level knowledge-intensive reasoning tasks and representative editing strategies within a unified evaluation framework measuring attack effectiveness, reasoning correctness, and side effects. Extensive experiments on both open-source and closed-source LLMs show that malicious knowledge editing can reliably induce incorrect or unsafe reasoning while largely preserving general capabilities, making such risks difficult to detect. We further identify several key factors influencing these risks, including edit scale, knowledge characteristics, and reasoning complexity. EditRisk-Bench provides an extensible testbed for understanding and mitigating safety risks in knowledge editing for LLMs.

analysis.tldr: 提出 EditRisk-Bench 基准，系统评估恶意知识编辑对 LLM 知识密集型推理的安全风险。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM 依赖知识编辑支持知识密集型推理，但恶意编辑可能注入误导性知识，导致有害推理结果；现有基准缺乏统一框架评估编辑知识对推理行为的安全影响。
analysis.problem: 如何系统评估恶意知识编辑对 LLM 知识密集型推理的安全风险。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 恶意知识编辑能可靠地诱导不正确或不安全的推理，同时基本保持通用能力，使风险难以检测；风险受编辑规模、知识特征和推理复杂度影响。
analysis.method: 构建 EditRisk-Bench 基准，集成多种恶意场景（错误信息、偏见、安全违规）、多级知识密集型推理任务和代表性编辑策略，统一评估攻击有效性、推理正确性和副作用。
contributions: 提出 EditRisk-Bench，首个系统评估恶意知识编辑安全风险的基准。
通过实验揭示恶意编辑可诱导不安全推理且难以检测，并识别关键影响因素。
analysis.experiments: 在开源和闭源 LLM 上进行实验，验证恶意知识编辑能可靠诱导错误或不安全推理，并分析编辑规模、知识特征和推理复杂度的影响。
limitations: 基准可能未覆盖所有恶意编辑场景。
实验仅基于当前代表性编辑策略，未来策略可能不同。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 EditRisk-Bench 基准，系统评估恶意知识编辑对 LLM 知识密集型推理的安全风险。

papers.title: FormalRewardBench: A Benchmark for Formal Theorem Proving Reward Models
papers.abstract: Recent neural theorem provers use reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR), where proof assistants provide binary correctness signals. While verifiable rewards are cheap and scalable without reward hacking issues, they suffer from sparse credit assignment: models receive no learning signal from difficult problems where partial progress goes unrewarded. This motivates learned reward models that can evaluate proof quality beyond binary verification. However, comparing reward models is challenging since it typically requires expensive RL training ablations. To address this, we introduce \textbf{FormalRewardBench}, the first benchmark for evaluating reward models in formal theorem proving with Lean 4. Our benchmark consists of 250 preference pairs where correct proofs are paired with incorrect variants generated through five expert curated error injection strategies: forced mistakes, minimal single-point variations, verbose incorrect proofs, natural language justification, and Python code injection. We evaluate frontier LLMs (e.g., Claude Opus 4.5), judge LLMs (e.g., CompassJudger-1-14B), general-purpose LLMs (e.g., Qwen2.5-72B-Instruct), and specialized theorem proving models (e.g., DeepSeek-Prover-V2-7B). Our results reveal that frontier LLMs achieve the highest performance (59.8\%) while specialized theorem provers perform the worst (24.4\%), suggesting that theorem proving ability does not transfer to proof evaluation. We provide further insights on various error injection mechanisms, highlighting the challenging nature of most injection mechanisms. We release \textbf{FormalRewardBench} publicly to encourage more research on developing reward models in formal mathematics.

analysis.tldr: 首个形式化定理证明奖励模型基准，揭示定理证明能力不迁移到证明评估。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有神经定理证明器使用RLVR面临稀疏奖励问题，而学习奖励模型缺乏统一评估基准，难以比较不同模型。
analysis.problem: 如何系统评估形式化定理证明中的奖励模型，以促进其发展。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 前沿LLM在奖励模型评估中表现最好（59.8%），而专用定理证明模型表现最差（24.4%），表明定理证明能力不迁移到证明评估。
analysis.method: 构建包含250个偏好对的基准，通过五种专家设计的错误注入策略生成正确与错误证明对，并评估多种LLM。
contributions: 首个形式化定理证明奖励模型评估基准FormalRewardBench
揭示定理证明能力与证明评估能力之间的差距
analysis.experiments: 在250个偏好对上评估了前沿LLM、评判LLM、通用LLM和专用定理证明模型，前沿LLM最高59.8%，专用模型最低24.4%。
limitations: 基准规模较小（250对），可能不足以全面评估
错误注入策略可能未覆盖所有错误类型
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个形式化定理证明奖励模型基准，揭示定理证明能力不迁移到证明评估。

papers.title: Useful for Exploration, Risky for Precision: Evaluating AI Tools in Academic Research
papers.abstract: Artificial intelligence (AI) tools are being incorporated into scientific research workflows with the potential to enhance efficiency in tasks such as document analysis, question answering (Q and A), and literature search. However, system outputs are often difficult to verify, lack transparency in their generation and remain prone to errors. Suitable benchmarks are needed to document and evaluate arising issues. Nevertheless, existing benchmarking approaches are not adequately capturing human-centered criteria such as usability, interpretability, and integration into research workflows. To address this gap, the present work proposes and applies a benchmarking framework combining human-centered and computer-centered metrics to evaluate AI-based Q&A and literature review tools for research use. The findings suggest that Q and A tools can offer valuable overviews and generally accurate summaries; however, they are not always reliable for precise information extraction. Explainable AI (xAI) accuracy was particularly low, meaning highlighted source passages frequently failed to correspond to generated answers. This shifted the burden of validation back onto the researcher. Literature review tools supported exploratory searches but showed low reproducibility, limited transparency regarding chosen sources and databases, and inconsistent source quality, making them unsuitable for systematic reviews. A comparison of these tool groups reveals a similar pattern: while AI tools can enhance efficiency in the early stages of the research workflow and shallow tasks, their outputs still require human verification. The findings underscore the importance of explainability features to enhance transparency, verification efficiency and careful integration of AI tools into researchers' workflows. Further, human-centered evaluation remains an important concern to ensure practical applicability.

analysis.tldr: AI工具在学术研究中适合探索性任务，但在精确信息提取和可重复性方面存在风险。
analysis.research_motivation: AI工具被引入科研工作流，但输出难以验证、缺乏透明度且易出错，现有基准未充分涵盖以人为中心的评估标准。
analysis.problem: 缺乏结合人本和计算机指标的基准来评估AI问答和文献综述工具在科研中的实际可用性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 问答工具提供有用概览但精确信息提取不可靠，可解释AI准确性低；文献综述工具支持探索但可重复性差、来源质量不一致。
analysis.method: 提出并应用一个结合人本和计算机指标的基准框架，评估AI问答和文献综述工具。
contributions: 提出一个结合人本和计算机指标的基准框架用于评估科研AI工具。
实证发现AI工具在探索性任务中有用，但在精确性和可重复性上存在局限。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能未覆盖所有类型的AI科研工具。
评估指标可能不适用于特定领域。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AI工具在学术研究中适合探索性任务，但在精确信息提取和可重复性方面存在风险。

papers.title: Rethinking Constraint Awareness for Efficient State Embedding of Neural Routing Solver
papers.abstract: Heavy-Encoder-Light-Decoder (HELD) neural routing solvers have emerged as a promising paradigm due to their broad applicability across multiple vehicle routing problems (VRPs). However, they typically struggle with VRP variants with complex constraints. To address this limitation, this paper systematically revisits existing neural solvers from the perspective of the generation mechanism for state embeddings (i.e., query vector prior to compatibility calculation) during decoding. We identify that current mechanisms restrict the observation space during attention computation, introducing a key bottleneck to achieving high-quality solutions. Through detailed empirical analysis, we demonstrate the necessity of preserving a global observation space. To overcome the constraint-agnostic drawback inherent to global observation spaces, we propose a simple yet powerful Constraint-Aware Residual Modulation (CARM) module. By adaptively modulating the context embedding with constraint-relevant variables, CARM effectively enhances constraint awareness, enabling the neural solver to fully leverage the global observation space and generate an efficient state embedding. Extensive experimental results across two single-task and five multi-task neural routing solvers confirm that the CARM module consistently boosts baseline performance. Notably, solvers equipped with our CARM achieve substantial improvements in scaling to large-scale instances and in generalizing to unseen VRP variants. These findings provide valuable insights for the architectural design of neural routing solvers.

analysis.tldr: 提出约束感知残差调制模块，使神经路由求解器在全局观测空间下高效编码状态，显著提升多任务VRP求解性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有HELD神经路由求解器在处理复杂约束的VRP变体时性能不佳，主要原因是解码时状态嵌入的生成机制限制了观测空间，导致无法获得高质量解。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲全局观测空间的前提下，增强神经路由求解器对复杂约束的感知能力，从而生成高效的状态嵌入。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 当前机制在注意力计算时限制观测空间，成为实现高质量解的关键瓶颈；全局观测空间虽好但缺乏约束感知能力。
analysis.method: 提出约束感知残差调制（CARM）模块，通过用约束相关变量自适应调制上下文嵌入，增强约束感知，使求解器能充分利用全局观测空间生成高效状态嵌入。
contributions: 系统回顾了现有神经求解器在解码时状态嵌入的生成机制，识别出观测空间限制是性能瓶颈。
提出CARM模块，简单有效，能增强约束感知并保持全局观测空间。
在多个单任务和多任务求解器上验证CARM的通用性和有效性，显著提升大规模实例和未见VRP变体的泛化能力。
analysis.experiments: 在两个单任务和五个多任务神经路由求解器上进行实验，CARM模块一致提升基线性能，并在大规模实例和未见VRP变体上取得显著改进。
limitations: 可能仅适用于HELD架构的神经路由求解器，对其他范式效果未知。
CARM模块的引入可能增加少量计算开销，未在摘要中量化。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出约束感知残差调制模块，使神经路由求解器在全局观测空间下高效编码状态，显著提升多任务VRP求解性能。

papers.title: Arcane: An Assertion Reduction Framework through Semantic Clustering and MCTS-Guided Rule Exploring
papers.abstract: Assertion-based Verification (ABV) is essential for ensuring that hardware designs conform to their intended specifications. However, existing automated assertion-generation approaches, such as LLM-based frameworks, often generate large numbers of redundant assertions, which significantly degrade simulation efficiency. To mitigate the simulation overhead caused by redundant assertions, this paper proposes Arcane, an efficient assertion reduction framework. It integrates a two-tier assertion clustering approach for accurate semantic classification of large assertion sets, and employs Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) to explore optimal rule-application sequences for efficient assertion reduction. The experimental results on Assertionbench [20] show that Arcane achieves a reduction of up to 76.2% in the assertion count while fully preserving formal coverage and mutation-detection ability. Further simulation studies demonstrate a speedup of 2.6x to 6.1x speedup in simulation time. The proposed framework is released at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出Arcane框架，通过语义聚类和MCTS规则探索减少硬件验证中的冗余断言，最高减少76.2%断言数并加速仿真2.6-6.1倍。
analysis.research_motivation: 基于断言的验证（ABV）对硬件设计至关重要，但现有自动化断言生成方法（如基于LLM的框架）常产生大量冗余断言，严重降低仿真效率。
analysis.problem: 如何有效减少硬件验证中的冗余断言数量，同时保持形式化覆盖和突变检测能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Arcane框架，包含两层断言聚类（两层级语义聚类）和基于蒙特卡洛树搜索（MCTS）的最优规则应用序列探索。
contributions: 提出两层级断言聚类方法，实现大规模断言集的精确语义分类。
采用MCTS探索最优规则应用序列，高效减少断言数量。
在Assertionbench上实现高达76.2%的断言减少，同时完全保持形式化覆盖和突变检测能力，仿真加速2.6-6.1倍。
analysis.experiments: 在Assertionbench数据集上评估，结果显示断言数量减少高达76.2%，形式化覆盖和突变检测能力完全保留；仿真时间加速2.6倍至6.1倍。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的硬件设计或断言格式。
MCTS探索的计算开销可能较大，未在摘要中讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Arcane框架，通过语义聚类和MCTS规则探索减少硬件验证中的冗余断言，最高减少76.2%断言数并加速仿真2.6-6.1倍。

papers.title: Active Testing of Large Language Models via Approximate Neyman Allocation
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) require reliable evaluation from pre-training to test-time scaling, making evaluation a recurring rather than one-off cost. As model scales grow and target tasks increasingly demand expert annotators, both the compute and labeling costs needed for each evaluation rise rapidly. Active testing aims to alleviate this bottleneck by approximating the evaluation result from a small but informative subset of the evaluation pool. However, existing approaches primarily target classification and break down on generative tasks. We introduce a novel active testing algorithm tailored to generative tasks. Our method leverages semantic entropy from surrogate models to stratify the evaluation pool and then conducts approximate Neyman allocation based on signals extracted from these surrogates. Across multiple language and multimodal benchmarks and a range of surrogate-target model pairs, our method significantly improves on baselines and closely tracks Oracle-Neyman, delivering up to 28\% MSE reduction over Uniform Sampling and an average of 22.9\% budget savings.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于近似Neyman分配的主动测试方法，用于高效评估大语言模型，显著降低标注成本。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM评估从预训练到测试时缩放都需要反复进行，随着模型规模增长和任务对专家标注的需求增加，计算和标注成本急剧上升。现有主动测试方法主要针对分类任务，在生成任务上失效。
analysis.problem: 如何在生成任务中利用少量有信息量的样本近似评估结果，从而降低LLM评估的标注成本。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 利用替代模型的语义熵对评估池进行分层，然后基于替代模型提取的信号进行近似Neyman分配，以优化样本分配。
contributions: 提出首个针对生成任务的主动测试算法，利用语义熵和近似Neyman分配。
在多个语言和多模态基准上，相比均匀采样实现高达28%的MSE降低和平均22.9%的预算节省。
analysis.experiments: 在多个语言和多模态基准上，使用多种替代-目标模型对进行实验，与均匀采样和Oracle-Neyman对比，报告了MSE降低和预算节省。
limitations: 依赖替代模型的质量，可能影响分层和分配效果。
未讨论在极端低预算或高噪声场景下的表现。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于近似Neyman分配的主动测试方法，用于高效评估大语言模型，显著降低标注成本。

papers.title: MAGE: Multi-Agent Self-Evolution with Co-Evolutionary Knowledge Graphs
papers.abstract: Self-evolving language-model agents must decide what to learn next and how to preserve what they have learned across iterations. Existing systems typically carry this cross-iteration knowledge as natural-language feedback, flat episodic memory, or implicit reinforcement signals, none of which cleanly supports a frozen weak backbone at inference time. This paper introduces MAGE (Multi-Agent Graph-guided Evolution), a framework that externalizes self-knowledge into a four-subgraph co-evolutionary knowledge graph. Its experience subgraph stores both teacher-written failure corrections and the learner's own past correct reasoning traces, which are retrieved as task-conditioned guidance for a frozen execution model. During evolution, the graph, a task-level search bandit, and a skill-level routing bandit are updated from the same reward stream, while the learner's backbone remains unchanged. We further provide structural analysis showing how append-only memory growth, bounded curriculum coverage, and task-filtered retrieval together support stable improvement of the retrieval substrate for frozen-learner evolution. Across nine benchmarks spanning mathematical reasoning, multi-hop and open-domain question answering, spatio-temporal analysis, financial numerical reasoning, medical multiple-choice, an open-world survival game, and web navigation, MAGE achieves strong performance against prompt-based frozen-backbone baselines. Ablations show that self-harvested success traces and teacher-written corrections are complementary, with success memories contributing most on reasoning-template-heavy tasks and corrective memories supporting harder composition and interaction settings.

analysis.tldr: MAGE 通过四子图协同进化知识图谱实现冻结骨干语言模型的多智能体自我进化。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有语言模型智能体在跨迭代知识保留上依赖自然语言反馈、平面情景记忆或隐式强化信号，无法在推理时支持冻结的弱骨干网络，限制了持续学习能力。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个框架，使冻结骨干的语言模型智能体能够自主决定学习内容并有效保留跨迭代知识，同时保持推理时骨干不变。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出自我收获的成功轨迹和教师编写的修正记忆具有互补性：成功记忆在推理模板密集型任务上贡献最大，而修正记忆支持更难的组合和交互设置。
analysis.method: MAGE 框架将自我知识外部化为四子图协同进化知识图谱（经验子图、任务级搜索臂、技能级路由臂），经验子图存储教师编写的失败修正和学习者过去的正确推理轨迹，在推理时作为任务条件化指导检索给冻结的执行模型；进化过程中，图谱、任务级搜索臂和技能级路由臂从同一奖励流更新，骨干保持不变。
contributions: 提出 MAGE 框架，通过协同进化知识图谱实现冻结骨干语言模型的多智能体自我进化。
提供结构分析，证明仅追加记忆增长、有界课程覆盖和任务过滤检索共同支持冻结学习者进化的稳定改进。
在九个基准上（数学推理、多跳问答、开放域问答、时空分析、金融数值推理、医学选择题、开放世界生存游戏、网页导航）取得强性能。
消融实验揭示自我收获的成功轨迹和教师编写的修正记忆的互补作用。
analysis.experiments: 在九个基准上进行了实验，包括数学推理、多跳和开放域问答、时空分析、金融数值推理、医学选择题、开放世界生存游戏和网页导航，与基于提示的冻结骨干基线对比，并进行了消融实验。
limitations: 摘要未提及计算开销或扩展性分析。
可能依赖高质量教师修正数据。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MAGE 通过四子图协同进化知识图谱实现冻结骨干语言模型的多智能体自我进化。

papers.title: Strategic Exploitation in LLM Agent Markets: A Simulation Framework for E-Commerce Trust
papers.abstract: Agent-based modeling (ABM) has long been used in economics to study human behavior, and large language model (LLM) agents now enable new forms of social and economic simulation. While prior work has discovered strategic deception by LLM agents in financial trading and auction markets, e-commerce remains underexplored despite its distinctive information asymmetry: sellers privately observe product quality, whereas buyers rely on advertised claims and reputation signals. We introduce TruthMarketTwin, a controlled simulation framework for studying LLM-agent behavior in e-commerce markets. The framework is one of the first to model bilateral trade under asymmetric information sharing, where agents make strategic listing, purchasing, rating, and recourse-related decisions to optimize seller profit and buyer utility. We find that LLM agents released into traditional markets autonomously exploit weaknesses in reputation-based governance, while warrant enforcement reduces deception and reshapes strategic reasoning. Our results position LLM-agent simulation as a tool for studying institution-governed autonomous markets.

analysis.tldr: 提出TruthMarketTwin框架，模拟LLM代理在电商市场中的策略性剥削行为，发现声誉治理存在漏洞而担保执行可减少欺骗。
analysis.research_motivation: 电商市场存在信息不对称（卖家私知产品质量，买家依赖广告和声誉），但LLM代理在该场景下的策略性行为尚未被充分研究。
analysis.problem: 如何模拟和分析LLM代理在电商市场中的策略性剥削行为，并评估不同治理机制（如声誉、担保）的效果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLM代理在传统声誉治理市场中会自主利用漏洞进行欺骗，而担保执行能减少欺骗并改变策略推理。
analysis.method: 提出TruthMarketTwin仿真框架，建模双边贸易中的信息不对称，代理在定价、购买、评分和追索等环节优化自身收益。
contributions: 首个在信息不对称下建模LLM代理双边贸易的仿真框架
发现声誉治理的脆弱性和担保执行的有效性
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仿真环境可能无法完全反映真实电商市场的复杂性
未考虑多轮博弈中代理的长期学习效应
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出TruthMarketTwin框架，模拟LLM代理在电商市场中的策略性剥削行为，发现声誉治理存在漏洞而担保执行可减少欺骗。

papers.title: Route by State, Recover from Trace: STAR with Failure-Aware Markov Routing for Multi-Agent Spatiotemporal Reasoning
papers.abstract: Compositional spatiotemporal reasoning often requires a system to invoke multiple heterogeneous specialists, such as geometric, temporal, topological, and trajectory agents. A central question is how such a system should route among specialists when execution does not simply succeed or fail, but fails in qualitatively different ways. Existing tool-augmented and multi-agent LLM systems typically leave this routing decision implicit in language generation, making recovery ad hoc, difficult to interpret, and hard to optimize. This paper presents STAR (Spatio-Temporal Agent Router), a failure-aware routing framework that externalizes inter-agent control as a state-conditioned transition policy over the current agent, task type, and typed execution status. At the center of STARis an agent routing matrix that combines expert-specified nominal routes with recovery transitions learned from execution traces. Because the matrix conditions on distinct failure states, the router can respond differently to malformed outputs, missing dependencies, and tool--query mismatches, rather than collapsing them into a generic retry signal. Specialists execute through a tool-grounded extract--compute--deposit protocol and write intermediate results to a shared blackboard for downstream fusion. Results prove that retaining unsuccessful traces during training enlarges the support of the routing policy on error states, enabling recovery transitions that success-only training cannot represent. Across three spatiotemporal benchmarks and eight backbone LLMs, STAR improves over multiple baselines with the clearest gains on queries whose execution deviates from the nominal routing path. Router-specific ablations and recovery analyses further show that typed failure-aware routing, rather than specialist composition alone, is a key factor for these improvements.

analysis.tldr: 提出STAR框架，通过状态感知的马尔可夫路由策略，在多智能体时空推理中实现基于失败类型的恢复路由。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有工具增强和多智能体LLM系统将路由决策隐式嵌入语言生成，导致恢复过程临时、难以解释和优化，尤其当执行失败呈现多种定性差异时。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个显式的、可优化的路由机制，使多智能体系统能根据不同的失败类型（如格式错误、依赖缺失、工具查询不匹配）采取不同的恢复策略。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，保留失败轨迹进行训练能扩大路由策略在错误状态上的支持，而仅用成功轨迹训练无法学习恢复转移。
analysis.method: STAR框架包含一个状态条件转移策略，基于当前智能体、任务类型和带类型的执行状态；核心是智能体路由矩阵，结合专家指定的名义路由和从执行轨迹学习的恢复转移；智能体通过提取-计算-存储协议执行并写入共享黑板。
contributions: 提出STAR，一个失败感知的路由框架，将智能体间控制外部化为状态条件转移策略。
引入智能体路由矩阵，结合专家名义路由和从执行轨迹学习的恢复转移。
实验证明保留失败轨迹训练能学习恢复转移，并在多个基准和骨干LLM上取得改进。
analysis.experiments: 在三个时空推理基准和八个骨干LLM上评估，与多个基线比较，在偏离名义路由路径的查询上提升最明显；进行了路由消融和恢复分析。
limitations: 可能依赖专家指定的名义路由，在全新任务上需要重新设计。
路由矩阵的规模可能随智能体数量增加而增长。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出STAR框架，通过状态感知的马尔可夫路由策略，在多智能体时空推理中实现基于失败类型的恢复路由。

papers.title: TimeClaw: A Time-Series AI Agent with Exploratory Execution Learning
papers.abstract: Time series analysis underpins forecasting, monitoring, and decision making in domains such as finance and weather, where solving a task often requires both numerical accuracy and contextual reasoning. Recent progress has moved from specialized neural predictors to approaches built on LLMs and foundation models that can reason over time series inputs and use external tools. However, most such systems remain execution-centric: they focus on solving the current instance but learn little from exploratory execution. This is especially limiting in verifiable numeric settings, where multiple candidate executions and tool-use procedures may all be task-valid yet differ sharply in quantitative quality, and where early success can trigger tool-prior collapse that suppresses further exploration. To address this limitation, we present TimeClaw, an exploratory execution learning framework that turns exploratory execution into reusable hierarchical distilled experience through a four-stage loop: Explore, Compare, Distill, and Reinject. TimeClaw combines metric-supervised exploratory execution learning, task-aware tool dropout, and hierarchical distilled experience for inference-time reinjection, while keeping the base model frozen and avoiding online test-time adaptation. In an MTBench-aligned evaluation with 17 tasks that span finance and weather prediction and reasoning tasks, TimeClaw delivers consistent gains over the baselines. These results suggest that, for scientific systems, the bottleneck is not only execution-time capability, but how exploratory experience is compared, distilled, and reused.

analysis.tldr: TimeClaw 通过探索性执行学习框架，将时间序列分析中的探索经验蒸馏为可复用的分层知识，显著提升 LLM 在数值任务上的表现。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有时间序列 AI 系统以执行为中心，缺乏从探索性执行中学习的能力，导致在可验证数值任务中容易陷入工具优先崩溃，限制了定量质量。
analysis.problem: 如何让时间序列 AI 代理从探索性执行中学习并复用经验，避免工具优先崩溃，提升数值任务性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出在可验证数值任务中，多个候选执行和工具使用过程可能都任务有效但定量质量差异大，早期成功会触发工具优先崩溃，抑制进一步探索。
analysis.method: TimeClaw 提出四阶段循环（探索、比较、蒸馏、再注入），结合度量监督的探索性执行学习、任务感知工具丢弃和分层蒸馏经验，用于推理时再注入，保持基础模型冻结且无需在线测试时适应。
contributions: 提出探索性执行学习框架 TimeClaw，将探索经验转化为可复用的分层蒸馏知识。
设计度量监督的探索性执行学习、任务感知工具丢弃和分层蒸馏经验再注入机制。
在 17 个金融和天气预测与推理任务上验证了方法有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在 MTBench 对齐的评估中，使用 17 个涵盖金融和天气预测与推理的任务，TimeClaw 相比基线取得一致提升。
limitations: 摘要未提及在非数值或非可验证任务上的表现。
可能依赖任务特定的度量设计，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: TimeClaw 通过探索性执行学习框架，将时间序列分析中的探索经验蒸馏为可复用的分层知识，显著提升 LLM 在数值任务上的表现。

papers.title: From Single-Step Edit Response to Multi-Step Molecular Optimization
authors: Duanhua Cao (4) ((1) School of Computer Science
(2) Department of Data Science and Artificial Intelligence
(3) College of Computer Science and Technology
(4) School of Life Sciences and Technology
papers.abstract: Conditional molecular optimization aims to edit a molecule to realize a specified property shift. In practice, structurally similar molecule data is scarce, while decisions are inherently action-level: at each step, the system must select one local structural edit from a candidate set that is strictly filtered by chemical feasibility rules. This level mismatch between supervision and decision makes oracle-in-the-loop search unstable in molecular optimization. Regressing on property differences between molecule pairs improves data efficiency but relies on oracle-in-the-loop search, entangling transformation effects with global context and providing limited guidance for selecting the next feasible edit, often resorting to oracle-in-the-loop search. For this reason, we propose a response-oriented discrete edit optimization approach comprising two tightly coupled components: a single-step molecular edit response predictor (SMER) and a multi-step planner that composes local predictions into optimization trajectories via guided tree search (SMER-Opt). The approach learns a directional evaluation model over edit actions to support constraint-aware planning. It mines weakly related molecule pairs and decomposes their structural differences into minimal edit units, turning endpoint property annotations into process-level supervision and yielding reusable, transferable action primitives. A directional edit evaluator then scores feasible candidate edits by their likelihood of moving the molecule toward the desired property change, substantially reducing dependence on external evaluator queries at decision time. Code is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于单步编辑响应预测和多步规划的分子优化方法，将属性标注转化为过程监督，减少对外部评估器的依赖。
analysis.research_motivation: 分子优化中，结构相似数据稀缺且决策是动作级的，而监督是属性级的，导致基于外部评估器的搜索不稳定且效率低。
analysis.problem: 解决分子优化中监督与决策层级不匹配、依赖外部评估器搜索不稳定的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出SMER-Opt方法，包含单步分子编辑响应预测器（SMER）和多步规划器，通过引导树搜索组合局部预测，学习方向性编辑评估模型，将端点属性标注转化为过程级监督。
contributions: 提出响应导向的离散编辑优化框架，将属性标注转化为过程级监督。
设计单步编辑响应预测器和多步规划器，减少对外部评估器的依赖。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖弱相关分子对的挖掘质量。
多步规划的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于单步编辑响应预测和多步规划的分子优化方法，将属性标注转化为过程监督，减少对外部评估器的依赖。

papers.title: Optimizer-Induced Mode Connectivity: From AdamW to Muon
papers.abstract: Mode connectivity has been widely studied, yet the role of the optimizer remains underexplored. We revisit it through optimizer-induced implicit regularization, asking how connectivity behaves when restricted to solutions constrained by a given optimizer. For two-layer ReLU networks, we show that solutions from a single optimizer -- AdamW, Muon, or others in the Lion-$\mathcal{K}$ family -- form a connected set at sufficiently large width, a result not implied by prior work. We then characterize how optimizer-induced regions interact: at large width two different regions can be disjoint or overlap depending on regularization, while in our small-width example AdamW and Muon converge to disconnected zero-loss components separated by a provable loss barrier. Empirically, in GPT-2 pretraining, we observe same-optimizer paths preserve each model's spectrum while cross-optimizer paths traverse a smooth transition. Our results reveal optimizer-dependent structure beyond classical mode connectivity literature.

analysis.tldr: 发现优化器（如AdamW和Muon）会诱导出不同的模式连通性结构，在宽网络下同一优化器的解连通，不同优化器间可能存在损失屏障。
analysis.research_motivation: 模式连通性已有广泛研究，但优化器在其中的作用尚未被充分探索，理解优化器如何影响解空间的连通性有助于揭示训练动态和泛化机制。
analysis.problem: 研究优化器诱导的隐式正则化如何影响模式连通性，特别是同一优化器或不同优化器得到的解在参数空间中的连通性质。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在两层ReLU网络中，同一优化器（如AdamW、Muon或Lion-𝒦族）的解在足够宽度下形成连通集；不同优化器的区域可能不相交或重叠，取决于正则化；小宽度下AdamW和Muon收敛到被损失屏障隔开的零损失分量；GPT-2预训练中，同优化器路径保留模型谱，跨优化器路径经历平滑过渡。
analysis.method: 理论分析两层ReLU网络的模式连通性，结合小宽度示例和GPT-2预训练实验验证优化器诱导的结构。
contributions: 首次揭示优化器在模式连通性中的关键作用，证明同一优化器的解在宽网络中连通。
刻画不同优化器区域间的交互，发现可能存在的损失屏障和谱保留现象。
analysis.experiments: 在GPT-2预训练任务上进行了实证分析，观察同优化器和跨优化器路径的谱变化。
limitations: 理论结果主要针对两层ReLU网络，更深或更复杂架构的推广性未知。
实验仅涉及GPT-2，未在更大模型或不同任务上验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning theory
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 发现优化器（如AdamW和Muon）会诱导出不同的模式连通性结构，在宽网络下同一优化器的解连通，不同优化器间可能存在损失屏障。

papers.title: Prospective Compression in Human Abstraction Learning
papers.abstract: A core challenge in program synthesis is online library learning: the incremental acquisition of reusable abstractions under uncertainty about future task demands. Existing algorithms treat library learning as retrospective compression over a static task distribution, where the learned library is determined by the corpus of past tasks. However, real-world learning domains are often non-stationary, with tasks arising from a generative process that evolves over time. We propose and test the hypothesis that in non-stationary domains human library learning selects abstractions prospectively: targeting compression of future tasks. We study this question using the Pattern Builder Task, a visual program synthesis paradigm in which participants construct increasingly complex geometric patterns from a small set of primitives, transformations, and custom helpers that carry forward across trials. Using this task, we conduct two experiments with complementary latent curricula, designed to dissociate between behaviors consistent with prospective compression, and alternative library learning accounts. Using six computational models spanning online library learning strategies, we show that human abstraction behavior reflects sensitivity to latent, non-stationary structure in the task-generating process. This behavior is consistent with prospective compression, and cannot be captured by existing retrospective compression-based algorithms, or inductive biases modeled by LLM-based program synthesis.

analysis.tldr: 人类在非平稳任务中通过前瞻性压缩选择抽象，而非回顾性压缩。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有程序合成中的库学习方法假设任务分布静态，但现实世界任务生成过程常随时间演变，人类如何在这种非平稳环境中学习抽象尚不清楚。
analysis.problem: 研究人类在非平稳任务领域中是否采用前瞻性压缩（针对未来任务）而非回顾性压缩（基于过去任务）来学习抽象。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 通过Pattern Builder Task（视觉程序合成范式）设计两个互补潜在课程实验，使用六种在线库学习计算模型，比较人类行为与前瞻性压缩、回顾性压缩等策略的匹配程度。
contributions: 提出并验证了人类在非平稳领域中进行前瞻性压缩的假设。
通过实验和计算模型表明现有回顾性压缩算法和LLM程序合成无法解释人类行为。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 实验仅在特定视觉程序合成任务上进行，泛化性未知。
计算模型可能未涵盖所有可能的库学习策略。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 人类在非平稳任务中通过前瞻性压缩选择抽象，而非回顾性压缩。

papers.title: Learning the Interaction Prior for Protein-Protein Interaction Prediction: A Model-Agnostic Approach
papers.abstract: Protein-protein interactions (PPIs) are fundamental to cellular function and disease mechanisms. Current learning-based PPI predictors focus on learning powerful protein representations but neglect designing specialized classification heads. They mainly rely on generic aggregating methods like concatenation or dot products, which lack biological insight. Motivated by the biological "L3 rule", where multiple length-3 paths between a pair of proteins indicate their interaction likelihood, our study addresses this gap by designing a biologically informed PPI classifier. In this paper, we provide empirical evidence that popular PPI datasets strongly support the L3 rule. We propose an L3-path-regularized graph prompt learning method called L3-PPI, which can generate a prompt graph with virtual L3 paths based on protein representations and controls the number of paths. L3-PPI reformulates the classification of protein embedding pairs into a graph-level classification task over the generated prompt graph. This lightweight module seamlessly integrates with PPI predictors as a plug-and-play component, injecting the interaction prior of complementarity to enhance performance. Extensive experiments show that L3-PPI achieves superior performance enhancements over advanced competitors.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于L3规则的轻量级图提示学习模块L3-PPI，作为即插即用组件提升蛋白质相互作用预测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有PPI预测方法专注于学习更好的蛋白质表征，但忽略了设计具有生物学洞察的分类头，普遍使用拼接或点积等通用聚合方法，缺乏生物学先验。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个生物信息驱动的PPI分类器，以注入蛋白质互补性先验，提升现有PPI预测器的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，流行的PPI数据集强烈支持L3规则，即一对蛋白质之间多条长度为3的路径指示其相互作用可能性。
analysis.method: 提出L3-PPI，一种L3路径正则化的图提示学习方法。它基于蛋白质表征生成包含虚拟L3路径的提示图，并控制路径数量，将蛋白质嵌入对的分类转化为对提示图的图级分类任务。该模块作为即插即用组件，可无缝集成到现有PPI预测器中。
contributions: 首次将L3生物学规则引入PPI分类器设计，提出L3路径正则化的图提示学习范式。
设计轻量级即插即用模块L3-PPI，可增强任意PPI预测器的性能。
实验证明L3-PPI在多个数据集上优于先进竞争者。
