analysis.experiments: 摘要提到广泛实验表明L3-PPI在性能提升上优于先进竞争者，但未提供具体数据集、指标或数值。
limitations: 依赖L3规则的假设，可能不适用于所有类型的PPI。
提示图的生成和路径控制可能引入额外计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于L3规则的轻量级图提示学习模块L3-PPI，作为即插即用组件提升蛋白质相互作用预测性能。

papers.title: HAGE: Harnessing Agentic Memory via RL-Driven Weighted Graph Evolution
papers.abstract: Memory retrieval in agentic large language model (LLM) systems is often treated as a static lookup problem, relying on flat vector search or fixed binary relational graphs. However, fixed graph structures cannot capture the varying strength, confidence, and query-dependent relevance of relationships between events. In this paper, we propose HAGE, a weighted multi-relational memory framework that reconceptualizes retrieval as sequential, query-conditioned traversal over a unified relational memory graph. Memory is organized as relation-specific graph views over shared memory nodes, where each edge is associated with a trainable relation feature vector encoding multiple relational signals. Given a query, an LLM-based classifier identifies the relational intent, and a routing network dynamically modulates the corresponding dimensions of the edge embedding. Traversal scores are computed via a learned combination of semantic similarity and these query-conditioned edge representations. This allows memory traversal to prioritize high-utility relational paths while softly suppressing noisy or weakly relevant connections. Beyond adaptive traversal, HAGE further introduces a reinforcement learning-based training framework that jointly optimizes routing behavior and edge representations using downstream tasks. Finally, empirical results demonstrate improved long-horizon reasoning accuracy and a favorable accuracy-efficiency trade-off compared to state-of-the-art agentic memory systems. Our code is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: HAGE 提出基于强化学习的加权多关系图记忆框架，通过查询条件遍历提升 LLM 智能体长期推理的准确性与效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有智能体记忆系统将检索视为静态查找，依赖平面向量搜索或固定二元关系图，无法捕捉事件间关系的强度、置信度和查询相关性的动态变化，导致长期推理时记忆利用效率低。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个能根据查询动态调整关系权重、并支持序列化遍历的统一关系记忆图，以提升 LLM 智能体在长期任务中的推理准确性和检索效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 固定图结构无法适应查询依赖的关系相关性，导致弱相关连接干扰检索，高效用路径未被优先利用。
analysis.method: 提出 HAGE 框架：1) 构建多关系加权记忆图，每个边关联可训练的关系特征向量；2) 用 LLM 分类器识别查询的关系意图，路由网络动态调制边嵌入的对应维度；3) 遍历分数由语义相似度和查询条件边表示联合计算；4) 引入强化学习联合优化路由行为和边表示。
contributions: 提出将智能体记忆检索重新定义为查询条件序列遍历的加权多关系图框架。
设计可训练的关系特征向量与路由网络，实现查询自适应的边权重调制。
引入强化学习训练框架，联合优化路由与边表示，提升长期推理准确性与效率。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及在长期推理准确性和准确率-效率权衡上优于现有智能体记忆系统。
limitations: 可能依赖 LLM 分类器的关系意图识别准确性。
强化学习训练框架的收敛性和计算开销未在摘要中讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: HAGE 提出基于强化学习的加权多关系图记忆框架，通过查询条件遍历提升 LLM 智能体长期推理的准确性与效率。

papers.title: expo: Exploration-prioritized policy optimization via adaptive kl regulation and gaussian curriculum sampling
papers.abstract: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has become the standard paradigm for LLM mathematical reasoning, where Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) serves as the mainstream algorithm. We point out two understudied inefficiencies existing in GRPO. First, the fixed KL penalty coefficient overly restricts policy exploration at stages where the model requires significant deviation from the reference policy. Second, uniform sampling of training questions ignores that moderately difficult problems provide the most informative gradient signals for optimization. We propose Exploration-Prioritized Policy Optimization (EXPO) with two lightweight plug-in modules. The Accuracy-Conditioned KL Scaling (AKL) dynamically adjusts KL regularization strength through a smooth nonlinear function of batch average accuracy, relaxing the penalty when the model underperforms and strengthening it when the model achieves good results. The Gaussian Curriculum Sampling (GCS) assigns sampling weights to questions following a Gaussian distribution centered at moderate accuracy around 0.5, focusing training on the model's learning frontier. We conduct extensive experiments on DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-1.5B and Qwen3-8B-Base over six mathematical reasoning benchmarks. The results show EXPO steadily surpasses vanilla GRPO. It obtains an absolute gain of 13.34 on AIME 2025 pass@32, rising from 63.33 percent to 76.67 percent, and achieves an average pass@32 improvement of 2.66 on the 8B model. The much larger performance gains on pass@32 compared with pass@1 demonstrate that EXPO effectively enlarges the model's exploration boundary under a fixed inference cost budget.

analysis.tldr: EXPO通过自适应KL调节和高斯课程采样提升GRPO在数学推理中的探索效率。
analysis.research_motivation: GRPO在LLM数学推理中广泛使用，但存在两个效率问题：固定KL惩罚系数限制探索，以及均匀采样忽略问题难度差异。
analysis.problem: 解决GRPO中KL惩罚系数固定和训练问题均匀采样导致的探索不充分和优化效率低下的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 固定KL惩罚系数在模型需要大幅偏离参考策略时过度限制探索；均匀采样忽略了中等难度问题提供最有效梯度信号的现象。
analysis.method: 提出EXPO，包含两个轻量插件：Accuracy-Conditioned KL Scaling (AKL)根据批次平均准确率动态调整KL正则化强度，以及Gaussian Curriculum Sampling (GCS)根据问题准确率按高斯分布分配采样权重。
contributions: 指出GRPO中KL惩罚系数固定和均匀采样两个效率问题
提出AKL和GCS两个轻量插件，显著提升数学推理性能
analysis.experiments: 在DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-1.5B和Qwen3-8B-Base上，覆盖六个数学推理基准，EXPO在AIME 2025 pass@32上绝对提升13.34%，8B模型平均pass@32提升2.66。
limitations: 仅验证了数学推理任务，其他领域效果未知
GCS依赖准确率估计，可能受噪声影响
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: EXPO通过自适应KL调节和高斯课程采样提升GRPO在数学推理中的探索效率。

papers.title: RADAR: Redundancy-Aware Diffusion for Multi-Agent Communication Structure Generation
papers.abstract: Compared with individual agents, large language model based multi-agent systems have shown great capabilities consistently across diverse tasks, including code generation, mathematical reasoning, and planning, etc. Despite their impressive performance, the effectiveness and robustness of these systems heavily rely on their communication topology, which is often fixed or generated in a single step. This restricts fine-grained structural exploration and flexible composition, resulting in excessive token utilization on simple tasks while limiting capability on complicated tasks. To mitigate this challenge, we introduce RADAR, a redundancy-aware and query-adaptive generative framework that actively reduce communication overhead. Motivated by recent progress in conditional discrete graph diffusion models, we formulate communication topology design as a step-by-step generation process, guided by the effective size of the graph. Comprehensive experiments on six benchmarks demonstrate that RADAR consistently outperforms recent baselines, achieving higher accuracy, lower token consumption, and greater robustness across diverse scenarios. Our code and data are available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出冗余感知扩散框架RADAR，通过逐步生成通信拓扑来降低多智能体系统的通信开销。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM多智能体系统的通信拓扑通常是固定的或单步生成，导致简单任务上token浪费、复杂任务上能力受限，缺乏细粒度结构探索和灵活组合。
analysis.problem: 如何自适应地生成多智能体系统的通信拓扑，以在保持性能的同时减少冗余通信开销。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 固定或单步生成的通信拓扑无法根据任务复杂度动态调整，导致简单任务过度通信、复杂任务通信不足。
analysis.method: 基于条件离散图扩散模型，将通信拓扑设计建模为逐步生成过程，并以图的有效大小作为引导，实现冗余感知和查询自适应的通信结构生成。
contributions: 提出RADAR，一个冗余感知且查询自适应的生成框架，用于多智能体通信结构生成。
将通信拓扑设计形式化为逐步生成过程，利用条件离散图扩散模型和图有效大小引导。
在六个基准上验证了RADAR相比基线方法在准确率、token消耗和鲁棒性上的优势。
analysis.experiments: 在六个基准上进行了综合实验，结果显示RADAR在准确率、token消耗和鲁棒性方面均优于近期基线方法。
limitations: 可能依赖图扩散模型的计算效率，大规模场景下生成速度可能受限。
图有效大小的定义和引导方式可能对特定任务不敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出冗余感知扩散框架RADAR，通过逐步生成通信拓扑来降低多智能体系统的通信开销。

papers.title: Separate First, Fuse Later: Mitigating Cross-Modal Interference in Audio-Visual LLMs Reasoning with Modality-Specific Chain-of-Thought
papers.abstract: Audio and vision provide complementary evidence for audio-visual question answering, yet current audio-visual large language models may suffer from cross-modal interference: information from one modality misguides the interpretation of another, thereby inducing hallucinations. We attribute this issue to uncontrolled cross-modal interactions during intermediate reasoning. To mitigate this, we propose Separate First, Fuse Later (SFFL), an audio-visual reasoning framework designed to reduce cross-modal interference. SFFL enforces modality-specific chain-of-thought reasoning, producing separate audio and visual reasoning traces and integrating evidence for answering. We construct modality-preference labels via a data pipeline under different modality input settings. We use these labels as an auxiliary reward in reinforcement learning to encourage a instance-dependent preference for modality cues when answering. We further introduce a modality-specific reasoning mechanism that preserves modality isolation during the separated reasoning stage while enabling full access to cross-modal information at the evidence fusion stage. Experiments demonstrate consistent improvements in both accuracy and robustness, yielding an average relative gain of 5.16\% on general AVQA benchmarks and 11.17\% on a cross-modal hallucination benchmark.

analysis.tldr: 提出先分离后融合的框架，通过模态特定思维链减少视听大语言模型中的跨模态干扰。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前视听大语言模型在中间推理阶段存在不受控的跨模态交互，导致信息误导和幻觉，影响问答准确性和鲁棒性。
analysis.problem: 如何减少视听大语言模型中的跨模态干扰，避免模态间信息误导导致的幻觉。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出跨模态干扰源于中间推理阶段不受控的跨模态交互，导致幻觉。
analysis.method: 提出SFFL框架，包括：1) 模态特定思维链推理，分别生成音频和视觉推理轨迹；2) 通过数据管道构建模态偏好标签，作为强化学习的辅助奖励；3) 模态特定推理机制在分离阶段保持模态隔离，在证据融合阶段允许跨模态访问。
contributions: 提出SFFL框架，通过先分离后融合的策略减少跨模态干扰。
引入模态偏好标签和强化学习奖励，鼓励实例依赖的模态线索偏好。
在通用AVQA基准和跨模态幻觉基准上取得一致改进。
analysis.experiments: 在通用AVQA基准上平均相对提升5.16%，在跨模态幻觉基准上提升11.17%。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量模态偏好标签的构建。
框架复杂度较高，推理时需维护分离的思维链。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出先分离后融合的框架，通过模态特定思维链减少视听大语言模型中的跨模态干扰。

papers.title: M2A: Synergizing Mathematical and Agentic Reasoning in Large Language Models
papers.abstract: While reasoning has become a central capability of large language models (LLMs), the reasoning patterns required for different scenarios are often misaligned. Mathematical reasoning typically relies on intrinsic logic to solve closed-world problems in a single response, whereas agentic reasoning requires not only internal reasoning but also multi-turn interaction with external environments, interleaving thought and action. This misalignment prevents mathematical and agentic reasoning from effectively benefiting from each other, often yielding unstable reasoning behavior and only limited performance gains under multi-task learning. In this paper, we propose M2A, a novel paradigm that synergizes mathematical and agentic reasoning via model merging. To avoid overfitting to superficial reasoning patterns under joint training, M2A operates directly in parameter space: it identifies the feature subspace critical for agent behavior, and merges the mathematical reasoning task vector only along its null space, thereby injecting reasoning capability along directions that do not perturb agent behavior. Unlike SFT or RL, M2A requires no additional gradient-update and exposes the merging coefficient as a simple knob for controlling reasoning length. Experiments in a challenging real-world coding agent setting show that our method effectively extends agentic reasoning depth and delivers substantial performance improvements. Applied to a fine-tuned Qwen3-8B, M2A improves its SWE-Bench Verified resolved rate from 44.0% to 51.2% without retraining the model. Code is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: M2A通过模型合并协同数学推理与智能体推理，无需额外训练即可提升智能体推理深度和性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 数学推理和智能体推理的推理模式不匹配，导致多任务学习下性能提升有限且推理行为不稳定，需要一种能协同两者优势的方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在不进行联合训练或额外梯度更新的情况下，将数学推理能力注入智能体模型，同时不破坏其原有的智能体行为。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 数学推理和智能体推理的推理模式存在错位：数学推理依赖内在逻辑解决封闭世界问题，而智能体推理需要多轮交互与外部环境。直接多任务学习会导致过拟合浅层推理模式，性能增益有限。
analysis.method: M2A在参数空间操作：识别对智能体行为关键的特征子空间，仅沿其零空间合并数学推理任务向量，从而注入推理能力而不干扰智能体行为。合并系数可控制推理长度。
contributions: 提出M2A范式，通过模型合并协同数学推理与智能体推理，无需额外训练。
在SWE-Bench Verified上，将Qwen3-8B的解决率从44.0%提升至51.2%，验证了方法的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在具有挑战性的真实世界编码智能体设置中进行实验，使用SWE-Bench Verified基准，结果显示M2A显著提升了智能体推理深度和性能。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的数学推理和智能体任务，泛化性需进一步验证。
合并系数的选择可能依赖经验，缺乏自适应机制。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: M2A通过模型合并协同数学推理与智能体推理，无需额外训练即可提升智能体推理深度和性能。

papers.title: Cross-Family Universality of Behavioral Axes via Anchor-Projected Representations
papers.abstract: Large language models from different families use different hidden dimensions, tokenizers, and training procedures, making behavioral directions difficult to compare or transfer across models. We introduce an anchor-projection framework that maps hidden representations from each model into a shared anchor coordinate space (ACS). Behavioral directions extracted from source models are projected into ACS and averaged into a canonical direction. For a new model, the canonical direction is reconstructed into its native hidden space using only anchor activations, without fine-tuning or target-specific direction extraction. We evaluate five instruction-tuned model families and ten behavioral axes. We find that same-axis directions align tightly across the Llama-Qwen-Mistral-Phi (LQMP) cluster in ACS. This shared structure transfers to downstream tasks. For the aligned LQMP cluster, held-out targets achieve (0.83) ten-way detection accuracy and (0.95) mean binary AUROC, while canonical steering induces refusal-rate shifts of up to +0.46% under distribution shift. Sensitivity analyses show that two source models and small anchor pools already suffice to approximate transferable directions. Overall, ACS provides a novel perspective on cross-family interpretability, revealing that representation-level transfer remains robust across model families.

analysis.tldr: 提出锚点投影框架，将不同LLM家族的行为方向映射到共享空间，实现跨家族可迁移的方向提取与操控。
analysis.research_motivation: 不同LLM家族使用不同的隐藏维度、分词器和训练流程，导致行为方向难以跨模型比较或迁移，限制了可解释性工具的通用性。
analysis.problem: 如何将不同LLM家族的行为方向统一到共享空间，实现跨家族的方向提取、对齐与迁移。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在锚点坐标空间中，Llama、Qwen、Mistral、Phi等模型家族的同轴方向紧密对齐，形成LQMP簇；两个源模型和小规模锚点池即可近似可迁移方向。
analysis.method: 锚点投影框架：将各模型的隐藏表示映射到共享锚点坐标空间，从源模型提取行为方向并平均为规范方向，再通过锚点激活重构到目标模型的隐藏空间。
contributions: 提出锚点投影框架，实现跨LLM家族的行为方向统一表示与迁移。
实验证明LQMP簇内方向对齐紧密，且规范方向在检测和操控任务中有效。
analysis.experiments: 在五个指令微调模型家族和十个行为轴上评估，LQMP簇的留出目标达到0.83的十路检测准确率和0.95的平均二元AUROC，规范操控在分布偏移下引起拒绝率变化高达+0.46%。
limitations: 仅验证了LQMP簇内的对齐，其他模型家族（如非指令微调模型）可能不适用。
锚点选择策略对性能的影响未深入探讨。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出锚点投影框架，将不同LLM家族的行为方向映射到共享空间，实现跨家族可迁移的方向提取与操控。

papers.title: When to Re-Commit: Temporal Abstraction Discovery for Long-Horizon Vision-Language Reasoning
papers.abstract: Long-horizon reasoning requires deciding not only what actions to take, but how deeply to commit before the next observation. We formalize this as \emph{commitment depth}: the number of primitive actions executed open-loop between replans. Commitment depth induces a trade-off between replanning cost and compounding execution error, yet most existing long-horizon systems fix it as a hand-designed scalar. In this work, we instead treat commitment depth as a learnable, state-conditioned variable of the policy itself. We instantiate this within a model-native vision--language policy that jointly predicts both what to execute and for how long. Across Sliding Puzzle and Sokoban, the resulting adaptive policy Pareto-dominates every non-degenerate fixed-depth baseline, achieving up to 12.5 percentage points higher solve rate while using approximately 25\% fewer primitive actions per episode. Despite using a 7B backbone, our method outperforms GPT-5.5 and Claude Sonnet on both tasks, while every tested open-weight vision--language model achieves 0\% zero-shot success. We further present a theoretical analysis showing that, under the standard commitment-depth surrogate, state-conditioned commitment strictly dominates any fixed depth whenever the locally optimal depth varies across states.

analysis.tldr: 提出可学习的承诺深度，让VLM在长程推理中自适应决定何时重新规划，显著提升求解率并减少动作数。
analysis.research_motivation: 长程推理中，现有系统通常使用固定的承诺深度（即两次重新规划之间执行的原始动作数），这无法适应不同状态下的最优深度，导致规划成本与执行误差之间的权衡失衡。
analysis.problem: 如何让视觉-语言策略在长程推理中自适应地决定承诺深度，以平衡重新规划成本与累积执行误差。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将承诺深度作为可学习的、状态条件的变量，集成到模型原生的视觉-语言策略中，联合预测要执行的动作和持续步数。
contributions: 形式化承诺深度概念并证明状态条件承诺严格优于固定深度（当局部最优深度随状态变化时）。
提出自适应承诺深度的VLM策略，在Sliding Puzzle和Sokoban上Pareto优于所有固定深度基线。
analysis.experiments: 在Sliding Puzzle和Sokoban任务上评估，自适应策略相比固定深度基线求解率最高提升12.5个百分点，同时每回合原始动作数减少约25%。使用7B骨干网络，性能超过GPT-5.5和Claude Sonnet，而所有开源VLM零样本成功率为0%。
limitations: 仅在两个离散网格任务上验证，泛化到连续控制或更复杂环境有待探索。
承诺深度学习可能增加训练复杂度，摘要未讨论计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出可学习的承诺深度，让VLM在长程推理中自适应决定何时重新规划，显著提升求解率并减少动作数。

papers.title: Fairness of Explanations in Artificial Intelligence (AI): A Unifying Framework, Axioms, and Future Direction toward Responsible AI
papers.abstract: Machine learning algorithms are being used in high-stakes decisions, including those in criminal justice, healthcare, credit, and employment. The research community has responded with two largely independent research fields: \emph{algorithmic fairness}, which targets equitable outcomes, and \emph{explainable AI} (XAI), which targets interpretable reasoning. This survey identifies and maps a novel blind spot at their intersection, which is a model that can satisfy every standard fairness criterion in its outputs while being profoundly unfair in its \emph{reasoning process}. We refer to this as the procedural bias, and mitigating it requires treating the fairness of explanations as a distinct object of scientific study. To our knowledge, we provide the first unified theoretical and literature review of this emerging field and elucidate the drawbacks of post-hoc explainers in certifying explanation fairness. Our central contribution is a \emph{conditional invariance framework} formalizing explanation fairness as the requirement that explanations should be indifferent regardless of the protected attributes $ P(E(X) \in \cdot \mid X_\text{rel} = x_\text{rel},\, A = a) = P(E(X) \in \cdot \mid X_\text{rel} = x_\text{rel},\, A = b)$ for all task-relevant $x$, a single principle from which all existing explanation fairness metrics emerge as partial operationalizations. We introduce a seven-dimensional taxonomy, identify three generative mechanisms of explanation inequity (representation-driven, explanation-model mismatch, actionability-driven), and propose a canonical six-step evaluation workflow for operationalizing explanation fairness audits in practice.

analysis.tldr: 提出解释公平性的条件不变性框架，统一现有度量并识别程序性偏差。
analysis.research_motivation: 算法公平性和可解释AI是独立发展的两个领域，但模型可能在输出上满足公平性标准，却在推理过程中存在偏见，这种程序性偏差尚未被系统研究。
analysis.problem: 缺乏统一的解释公平性理论框架和度量标准，现有后验解释器无法保证解释的公平性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出模型输出公平但推理过程不公平的程序性偏差，并识别了三种解释不公平的生成机制：表征驱动、解释模型不匹配、可行动性驱动。
analysis.method: 提出条件不变性框架，要求解释在给定任务相关特征时，与受保护属性无关；并引入七维分类法和六步评估工作流。
contributions: 首次统一综述解释公平性领域，提出条件不变性框架，统一现有所有解释公平性度量。
识别三种解释不公平的生成机制，并提出六步评估工作流用于实践审计。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 框架可能依赖任务相关特征的准确界定，实际中难以完全指定。
六步工作流可能增加审计成本，且需要领域专家参与。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出解释公平性的条件不变性框架，统一现有度量并识别程序性偏差。

papers.title: The Metacognitive Probe: Five Behavioural Calibration Diagnostics for LLMs
papers.abstract: The Metacognitive Probe is an exploratory five-task, 15-slot diagnostic that decomposes an LLM's confidence behaviour into five behaviourally-distinct dimensions: confidence calibration (T1-CC), epistemic vigilance (T2-EV), knowledge boundary (T3-KB), calibration range (T4-CR), and reasoning-chain validation (T5-RCV). It is evaluated on N=8 frontier models and N=69 humans. The instrument is motivated by Flavell (1979) and Nelson and Narens (1990) but operates on observable confidence-correctness alignment; it is not a validated cross-species metacognition scale, and the pre-specified human developmental hypothesis was falsified. Composite benchmarks (MMLU, BIG-Bench, HELM, GPQA) ask whether a model produces a correct response. They are silent on whether the model knows when its response is wrong. A model can score 80 on a composite calibration benchmark and still be wildly overconfident in narrow pockets the aggregate cannot surface. The Metacognitive Probe surfaces those pockets. Our headline is a 47-point within-model dissociation in Gemini 2.5 Flash: panel-best within-task calibration (T1-CC = 88; Spearman rho = +0.551, 95% CI [+0.14, +0.80], p = 0.005) and panel-worst cross-task difficulty prediction (T4-CR = 41; sigma_conf = 1.4 across twelve factoids).

analysis.tldr: 提出元认知探针，从五个行为维度诊断LLM的置信度校准，发现模型在聚合基准下隐藏的过度自信问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有复合基准（如MMLU）只评估模型回答是否正确，无法揭示模型是否知道自己的回答何时错误，导致模型可能在局部区域过度自信而未被发现。
analysis.problem: 如何系统性地分解和诊断LLM的置信度行为，识别聚合基准无法暴露的校准缺陷。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但指出Gemini 2.5 Flash存在47分的内部解离：任务内校准优秀（T1-CC=88）但跨任务难度预测极差（T4-CR=41）。
analysis.method: 设计五个任务、15个槽位的诊断工具，分别测量置信度校准、认知警觉、知识边界、校准范围和推理链验证五个维度，并在8个前沿模型和69名人类上评估。
contributions: 提出元认知探针，将LLM置信度行为分解为五个可观测维度。
揭示聚合基准无法暴露的模型过度自信问题，并展示模型内部显著解离现象。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 该探针并非经过验证的跨物种元认知量表。
预设的人类发展假设被证伪，工具适用范围可能有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出元认知探针，从五个行为维度诊断LLM的置信度校准，发现模型在聚合基准下隐藏的过度自信问题。

papers.title: Yield Curve Forecasting using Machine Learning and Econometrics: A Comparative Analysis
papers.abstract: While machine learning has revolutionized many fields such as natural language processing (NLP) and computer vision, its impact on time-series forecasting is still widely disputed, especially in the finance domain. This paper compares forecasting performance on U.S. Treasury yield curve data across econometrics/time-series analysis, classical machine learning, and deep learning methods, using daily data over 47 years. The Treasury yield curve is important because it is widely used by every participant in the bond markets, which are larger than equity markets. We examine a variety of methods that have not been tested on yield curve forecasting, especially deep learning algorithms. The algorithms include the Autoregressive Integrated Moving Average (ARIMA) model and its extensions, naive benchmarks, ensemble methods, Recurrent Neural Networks (RNNs), and multiple transformers built for forecasting. ARIMA and naive econometric models outperform other models overall, except in one time block. Of the machine learning methods, TimeGPT, LGBM and RNNs perform the best. Furthermore, the paper explores whether stationary or nonstationary data are more appropriate as input to deep learning models.

analysis.tldr: 在47年美国国债收益率曲线数据上，传统计量经济学模型整体优于机器学习与深度学习方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 机器学习在NLP和CV领域取得巨大成功，但在时间序列预测尤其是金融领域的有效性仍存争议，且收益率曲线预测对债券市场参与者至关重要。
analysis.problem: 系统比较计量经济学、经典机器学习和深度学习方法在收益率曲线预测上的表现，并探索数据平稳性对深度学习模型的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: ARIMA和朴素计量模型整体优于其他模型，仅在一个时间段例外；机器学习中TimeGPT、LGBM和RNN表现最佳。
analysis.method: 对比多种方法：ARIMA及其扩展、朴素基准、集成方法、RNN、多种Transformer（包括TimeGPT），并测试平稳与非平稳数据输入。
contributions: 首次在收益率曲线预测上系统测试多种深度学习方法（包括多个Transformer）。
发现传统计量模型整体优于机器学习/深度学习方法，仅个别时段例外。
探讨了数据平稳性对深度学习模型的影响。
analysis.experiments: 使用47年日度美国国债收益率曲线数据，比较多种模型预测性能。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 仅使用美国国债数据，结论可能不适用于其他市场或资产。
未深入分析为何传统模型更优的理论原因。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on time series and dynamical systems
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 在47年美国国债收益率曲线数据上，传统计量经济学模型整体优于机器学习与深度学习方法。

papers.title: EnactToM: An Evolving Benchmark for Functional Theory of Mind in Embodied Agents
papers.abstract: Theory of Mind (ToM), the ability to track others epistemic state, makes humans efficient collaborators. AI agents need the same capacity in multi agent settings, yet existing benchmarks mostly test literal ToM by asking direct belief questions. The ability act optimally on implicit beliefs in embodied environments, called functional ToM, remains largely untested. We introduce EnactToM, an evolving benchmark of 300 embodied multi-agent tasks set in a 3D household with partial observability, private information, and constrained communication. Each task is formally verified for solvability and required epistemic depth, and new tasks are generated increase difficulty as models improve. On the hard split, all seven evaluated frontier models score 0.0% Pass^3 on functional task completion, while averaging 45.0% on literal belief probes. Manual analysis traces 93% of sampled failures to epistemic coordination breakdowns such as withheld information, ignored partner constraints, and misallocated messages, providing a concrete target for future work.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个演化式基准EnactToM，测试具身智能体在部分可观察3D家庭环境中的功能性心理理论，发现前沿模型在隐式信念任务上得分为0%，而显式信念探测平均45%。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有心理理论基准大多通过直接询问信念来测试字面ToM，但智能体在具身环境中基于隐式信念采取最优行动的功能性ToM能力尚未被充分测试。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个能够评估具身智能体在部分可观察、多智能体环境中基于隐式信念进行功能性任务完成的基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 所有七个前沿模型在功能性任务完成上得分为0%，而字面信念探测平均45%，表明模型缺乏功能性ToM；93%的失败可归因于认知协调故障，如信息隐瞒、忽略伙伴约束和消息分配错误。
analysis.method: 构建一个包含300个具身多智能体任务的演化式基准，任务在3D家庭环境中设置，具有部分可观察性、私有信息和受限通信，每个任务经过形式化验证，并随模型改进自动生成新任务增加难度。
contributions: 提出了EnactToM，首个专门测试具身智能体功能性心理理论的演化式基准。
通过实验揭示了前沿模型在功能性ToM上的严重缺陷，并分析了失败模式。
analysis.experiments: 在七个前沿模型上评估，硬拆分上功能性任务完成Pass^3为0.0%，字面信念探测平均45.0%；手动分析93%的采样失败源于认知协调故障。
limitations: 基准任务数量有限（300个），可能无法覆盖所有功能性ToM场景。
仅评估了七个模型，结论的泛化性有待更多模型验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个演化式基准EnactToM，测试具身智能体在部分可观察3D家庭环境中的功能性心理理论，发现前沿模型在隐式信念任务上得分为0%，而显式信念探测平均45%。

papers.title: Attribution-based Explanations for Markov Decision Processes
papers.abstract: Attribution techniques explain the outcome of an AI model by assigning a numerical score to its inputs. So far, these techniques have mainly focused on attributing importance to static input features at a single point in time, and thus fail to generalize to sequential decision-making settings. This paper fills this gap by introducing techniques to generate attribution-based explanations for Markov Decision Processes (MDPs). We give a formal characterization of what attributions should represent in MDPs, focusing on explanations that assign importance scores to both individual states and execution paths. We show how importance scores can be computed by leveraging techniques for strategy synthesis, enabling the efficient computation of these scores despite the non-determinism inherent in an MDP. We evaluate our approach on five case-studies, demonstrating its utility in providing interpretable insights into the logic of sequential decision-making agents.

analysis.tldr: 将归因解释技术扩展到马尔可夫决策过程，为状态和路径分配重要性分数。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有归因技术主要针对静态输入特征，无法直接应用于序列决策场景，缺乏对MDP中决策逻辑的解释方法。
analysis.problem: 如何为马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）生成基于归因的解释，量化状态和路径的重要性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 利用策略综合技术计算重要性分数，处理MDP中的非确定性，为状态和路径分配归因分数。
contributions: 形式化定义了MDP中归因应表示的内容，聚焦于状态和路径的重要性分数。
提出利用策略综合技术高效计算归因分数的方法。
analysis.experiments: 在五个案例研究上评估，展示了提供可解释洞察的实用性。
limitations: 可能仅适用于有限状态/动作的MDP。
计算复杂度可能随状态空间增大而增加。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将归因解释技术扩展到马尔可夫决策过程，为状态和路径分配重要性分数。

papers.title: Marrying Generative Model of Healthcare Events with Digital Twin of Social Determinants of Health for Disease Reasoning
papers.abstract: Despite the central role of sensor-derived measurements such as imaging traits and plasma biomarkers in biomedical research and clinical practice, existing generative models for disease prediction largely depend on event-level representations from hospital and registry data. Given the multi-factorial nature of human disease, the absence of explicit modeling of social determinants of health (SDoH), even in the limited form of ICD-coded proxies (chapters Z and V--Y in ICD-10), limits the capacity for personalized disease modeling and clinical decision support. To address this limitation, we propose a generative model with ICD-coded proxies of SDoH for \textit{in silico} modeling of disease reasoning, a conditioned latent diffusion framework that establishes the connection between multi-organ sensor data with tokenized healthcare events. Specifically, we introduce a novel geometric diffusion model to characterize the temporal evolution of complex data representation such as brain networks (region-to-region connectivity encoded in a graph), in parallel with diffusion models for tabular data from other organ systems. Together, we integrate the generative model with digitalized SDoH proxies (coined \modelname{}) for simulated intervention and reasoning of future disease trajectories. We conduct extensive experiments on the UK Biobank (UKB) dataset, which contains organ-specific imaging traits, including brain (44,834), heart (23,987), liver (28,722), and kidney (32,155), along with nearly 500k medical history sequences (age range: 25$\sim$89 years). Our \modelname{} achieves significant improvements over state-of-the-art human disease autoregressive models and imaging trait generative baselines.

analysis.tldr: 提出结合社会健康决定因素数字孪生的生成模型，用于疾病推理。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有疾病预测生成模型主要依赖医院和登记数据中的事件级表示，忽略了社会健康决定因素（SDoH）的显式建模，限制了个性化疾病建模和临床决策支持的能力。
analysis.problem: 如何将SDoH的ICD编码代理整合到生成模型中，实现多器官传感器数据与医疗事件令牌的关联，以进行疾病推理和模拟干预。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出一个条件潜扩散框架，包含几何扩散模型（用于脑网络等图结构数据）和表格数据扩散模型（用于其他器官系统），并与数字化SDoH代理集成，实现疾病轨迹的模拟干预和推理。
contributions: 首次将ICD编码的SDoH代理整合到生成模型中用于疾病推理。
提出几何扩散模型与表格扩散模型并行处理多模态器官数据。
在UK Biobank大规模数据集上验证，显著优于现有自回归模型和生成基线。
analysis.experiments: 在UK Biobank数据集上进行实验，包含器官特异性成像特征（脑44834、心脏23987、肝脏28722、肾脏32155）和近50万医疗历史序列，模型在疾病预测和成像特征生成上取得显著改进。
limitations: SDoH代理仅使用ICD编码，可能无法完全捕捉真实社会决定因素。
模型依赖UK Biobank数据，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出结合社会健康决定因素数字孪生的生成模型，用于疾病推理。

papers.title: UTS at PsyDefDetect: Multi-Agent Councils and Absence-Based Reasoning for Defense Mechanism Classification
papers.abstract: This paper describes our system for classifying psychological defense mechanisms in emotional support dialogues using the Defense Mechanism Rating Scales (DMRS), placing second (F1 0.406) among 64 teams.1 A central insight is that defense mechanisms are defined by what is absent: missing affect, blocked cognition, denied reality. We encode this as an affect-cognition integration spectrum in prompt-level clinical rules, which account for the largest single gain (+11.4pp F1). Our architecture is a multi-phase deliberative council of Gemini 2.5 agents where class-specific advocates rate evidence strength rather than voting, achieving F1 0.382 with no fine-tuning - a top-5 result on its own. We find, however, that the council is confidently wrong about minority classes: 59-80% of stable minority predictions are incorrect, driven by a systematic "L7 attractor" in which emotional content defaults to the majority class. A targeted override ensemble from three fine-tuned Qwen3.5 models applies 16 overrides (+2.4pp), selected by a structured multi-agent system (builder, critic, regression guard) that produced a larger F1 gain in one iteration than 8 prior attempts combined.

analysis.tldr: 通过多智能体协商和缺失推理，在心理防御机制分类任务中取得第二名。
analysis.research_motivation: 心理防御机制分类在情感支持对话中具有重要应用价值，但现有方法难以捕捉防御机制中“缺失”的微妙特征，且少数类预测准确率低。
analysis.problem: 如何利用缺失推理和多智能体协商提升心理防御机制分类性能，特别是解决少数类预测偏差问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现防御机制由缺失定义（缺失情感、阻断认知、否认现实）；多智能体协商对少数类自信但错误率高（59-80%稳定预测错误），存在“L7吸引子”使情感内容默认归为多数类。
analysis.method: 提出多阶段协商委员会架构，包含基于情感-认知整合谱的临床规则、类特定倡导者评估证据强度而非投票，以及由三个微调模型组成的针对性覆盖集成。
contributions: 提出缺失推理视角，将防御机制定义为缺失特征，并编码为情感-认知整合谱临床规则。
设计多智能体协商委员会，类特定倡导者评估证据强度，无需微调即达前五性能。
揭示少数类预测的“L7吸引子”偏差，并通过结构化多智能体系统选择覆盖集成有效缓解。
analysis.experiments: 在PsyDefDetect竞赛中排名第二（F1 0.406），共64支队伍；临床规则贡献最大增益（+11.4pp F1）；多智能体委员会无微调F1 0.382（前五）；覆盖集成进一步+2.4pp F1。
limitations: 少数类预测仍存在较高错误率（59-80%）。
方法依赖特定临床规则和模型选择，泛化性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过多智能体协商和缺失推理，在心理防御机制分类任务中取得第二名。

papers.title: Primal-Dual Guided Decoding for Constrained Discrete Diffusion
papers.abstract: Discrete diffusion models generate structured sequences by progressively unmasking tokens, but enforcing global property constraints during generation remains an open challenge. We propose primal-dual guided decoding, an inference-time method that formulates constrained generation as a KL-regularised optimisation problem and solves it online via adaptive Lagrangian multipliers. At each denoising step, the method modifies token logits through an additive, constraint-dependent bias, with multipliers updated by mirror descent based on constraint violation. The bias arises as the optimal KL-regularised projection of the constraint, so the constrained distribution remains as close as possible to the model's unconstrained distribution while still satisfying the constraint. The method requires no retraining and no additional model evaluations beyond standard sampling, supports multiple simultaneous constraints, and provides formal bounds on constraint violation. We evaluate our approach on topical text generation, molecular design, and music playlist generation, showing that a single algorithm instantiated via domain-specific scoring functions improves constraint satisfaction while preserving relevant domain-specific quality metrics.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种无需重训练、通过在线拉格朗日乘子调整logits的推理时约束解码方法，用于离散扩散模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 离散扩散模型在生成结构化序列时难以在推理过程中强制执行全局属性约束，现有方法通常需要重训练或额外模型评估，效率低且灵活性差。
analysis.problem: 如何在不重训练且不增加额外模型评估的前提下，让离散扩散模型在生成时满足多个全局属性约束。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出原对偶引导解码，将约束生成建模为KL正则化优化问题，通过自适应拉格朗日乘子在线求解；每步去噪时用约束依赖的偏置修改token logits，乘子通过镜像下降根据约束违反程度更新。
contributions: 提出一种推理时约束解码方法，无需重训练和额外模型评估，支持多约束。
提供约束违反的形式化界，并在主题文本生成、分子设计和音乐播放列表生成上验证有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在主题文本生成、分子设计和音乐播放列表生成三个任务上评估，使用领域特定评分函数，改进约束满足同时保持领域质量指标。
limitations: 可能对复杂约束的适应性有限，乘子更新可能不稳定。
仅适用于离散扩散模型，未讨论连续扩散或其他生成模型。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种无需重训练、通过在线拉格朗日乘子调整logits的推理时约束解码方法，用于离散扩散模型。

papers.title: Medical Model Synthesis Architectures: A Case Study
papers.abstract: Medicine is rife with high-stakes uncertainty. Doctors routinely make clinical judgments and decisions that juggle many fundamental unknowns, like predictions about what might be causing a patients' symptoms or decisions about what treatment to try next. Despite increasing interest in developing AI systems that aid or even replace doctors in clinical settings, current systems struggle with calibrated reasoning under uncertainty, and are often deeply opaque about their reasoning. We propose a framework for AI systems that can make practically useful but formally transparent clinical predictions under uncertainty. Given a clinical situation, our framework (MedMSA) uses language models to retrieve relevant prior knowledge, but constructs a formal probabilistic model to support calibrated and verifiable inferences under uncertainty. We show how an initial proof-of-concept of this framework can be used for differential diagnosis, producing an uncertainty-weighted list of potential diagnoses that could explain a patients' symptoms, and discuss future applications and directions for applying this framework more generally for safe clinical collaborations.

analysis.tldr: 提出MedMSA框架，结合语言模型检索与概率模型，实现可校准且透明的临床不确定性推理。
analysis.research_motivation: 临床决策充满高风险的未知因素，现有AI系统在不确定性下推理校准能力不足且推理过程不透明，难以安全辅助或替代医生。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个能在临床不确定性下进行实用、透明且可校准推理的AI系统。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: MedMSA框架：给定临床情境，使用语言模型检索相关先验知识，然后构建形式化概率模型以支持校准和可验证的不确定性推理。
contributions: 提出MedMSA框架，结合语言模型检索与概率模型实现透明且校准的临床推理。
通过鉴别诊断的概念验证展示了框架的可行性，并讨论了未来安全临床协作的应用方向。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅进行了概念验证，缺乏大规模临床实验评估。
框架依赖语言模型检索的先验知识质量，可能引入偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MedMSA框架，结合语言模型检索与概率模型，实现可校准且透明的临床不确定性推理。

papers.title: Ambig-DS: A Benchmark for Task-Framing Ambiguity in Data-Science Agents
papers.abstract: As data-science agents shift from co-pilots to auto-pilots, silent misframing becomes a critical failure mode. Agents quietly commit to plausible but unintended task framings, producing clean, executable artifacts that hide their incorrect assessment of the task. Existing benchmarks score whether the pipeline runs, ignoring whether the agent recognized the task was underspecified. We introduce Ambig-DS, two diagnostic suites: one for prediction-target ambiguity (Ambig-DS-Target, 51 tasks built on DSBench, a tabular modeling benchmark) and one for evaluation-objective ambiguity (Ambig-DS-Objective, 61 tasks built on MLE-bench, a Kaggle-style ML competition benchmark), constructed so that scoring uses each source benchmark's original evaluator. For every task we pair the original, fully specified version with an ambiguous variant produced by controlled edits; a human-and-LLM verification pipeline confirms each variant admits multiple plausible interpretations with decision-relevant consequences. The suites are analyzed independently and ambiguity lowers performance in both. Across five agents spanning efficient to frontier-class models, we find in our controlled diagnostic setting: (i) failures are silent commitments: wrong-target submissions on Target, wrong-metric or non-committal baseline submissions on Objective, rather than execution errors; (ii) allowing the agent to ask one clarifying question recovers much of the loss under idealized conditions, suggesting missing framing information drives a substantial part of the observed degradation; but (iii) agents cannot reliably tell when to use it: permissive prompts induce over-asking on clear tasks, while conservative prompts induce silent defaulting on ambiguous ones. Recognizing target and objective underspecification, not pipeline execution, is the bottleneck missing from standard DS-agent evaluations.

analysis.tldr: 提出Ambig-DS基准，揭示数据科学智能体在任务框架模糊时静默失败的关键瓶颈。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有数据科学智能体基准只评估流水线是否运行成功，忽略了智能体是否识别任务描述不充分导致的错误框架，这种静默失败模式在实际应用中危害极大。
analysis.problem: 数据科学智能体在任务描述模糊时，会静默地采用看似合理但错误的解释，生成可执行的错误结果，而现有基准无法检测这种失败。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：1) 模糊性导致性能下降，失败模式是静默承诺（错误目标/错误指标），而非执行错误；2) 允许提问可恢复大部分损失，但智能体无法可靠判断何时提问（过度提问或静默默认）。
analysis.method: 构建两个诊断套件（Ambig-DS-Target和Ambig-DS-Objective），基于DSBench和MLE-bench，为每个任务配对原始明确版本和模糊变体，并通过人机验证确保模糊性。
contributions: 提出Ambig-DS基准，专门评估数据科学智能体处理任务框架模糊性的能力。
通过实验揭示静默承诺是主要失败模式，且提问能力虽有效但智能体无法可靠使用。
analysis.experiments: 在五个从高效到前沿的智能体上进行实验，使用两个诊断套件，分析了模糊性对性能的影响及提问机制的效果。
limitations: 基准基于特定源基准（DSBench和MLE-bench），可能不覆盖所有数据科学任务类型。
提问实验在理想化条件下进行，实际部署中效果可能不同。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Ambig-DS基准，揭示数据科学智能体在任务框架模糊时静默失败的关键瓶颈。

papers.title: Unpredictability dissociates from structured control in language agents
papers.abstract: Unpredictable behavior is often taken as evidence of control, yet stochastic dispersion and structured action control need not coincide. This paper tests whether stochastic sampling can substitute for structured mechanisms that couple reasons, memory, self-state and inhibition to action selection in a language-agent implementation whose control components can be selectively disabled. In a seven-dataset baseline lesion matrix comprising 74,352 calls, the high-stochasticity comparator was more unpredictable than the structured-control variant in 7/7 datasets, whereas targeted reason and veto lesions reduced the expected structured-control profiles in 7/7 datasets each. In a matched-interface control spanning 26,946 generations, the structured agent maintained stronger action-field coupling than all stochastic, post-hoc, scrambled and verbosity controls across every dataset. The primary behavioral test removed free-form trace wording from the evaluation: 57,816 scored records showed the structured-control variant exceeding the high-stochasticity comparator or the reason/veto lesions in 7/7 datasets for all predefined behavioral components. Later open-weight runs extended the no-context controls to Qwen2.5 7B, 14B and 32B and to an independent Mistral-7B family across 20 task families and three agent scaffolds; no-fields, scrambled-context and distribution-matched controls failed to recover structured action control. A three-annotator blinded audit over 1,200 overlap items preserved high agreement. Strict entropy matching, strict token/compute matching and a formal counterfactual-flip stress test did not meet their gates and are treated as limitations. Stochastic unpredictability did not reproduce structured, action-coupled control in this implemented agent family.

analysis.tldr: 语言代理中随机不可预测性无法替代结构化控制机制。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有研究常将不可预测行为视为控制的证据，但随机分散与结构化动作控制可能并不一致，需要明确区分。
analysis.problem: 验证随机采样能否替代语言代理中耦合推理、记忆、自我状态和抑制的结构化控制机制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 高随机性变体在7/7数据集上比结构化控制变体更不可预测，但结构化代理在所有数据集上保持更强的动作-场耦合；随机性无法复现结构化动作控制。
analysis.method: 通过消融实验（禁用推理、否决等组件）和多种控制条件（随机、后处理、打乱、冗长）对比结构化代理与高随机性变体的行为。
contributions: 证明随机不可预测性与结构化动作控制是可分离的。
通过大规模消融和对照实验（74,352次调用、26,946次生成、57,816条记录）系统验证了结构化控制机制的必要性。
analysis.experiments: 在7个数据集上进行了基线消融矩阵（74,352次调用）、匹配接口控制（26,946次生成）、主要行为测试（57,816条记录）以及扩展到Qwen2.5和Mistral-7B系列（20个任务族、3个代理框架），并进行了三标注者盲审（1,200项）。
limitations: 严格的熵匹配、token/计算匹配和反事实翻转压力测试未通过，被视为局限性。
结论仅适用于该实现的代理家族，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 语言代理中随机不可预测性无法替代结构化控制机制。

papers.title: Absurd World: A Simple Yet Powerful Method to Absurdify the Real-world for Probing LLM Reasoning Capabilities
papers.abstract: While extremely powerful and versatile at various tasks, the thinking capabilities of large language models (LLMs) are often put under scrutiny as they sometimes fail to solve problems that humans can systematically solve. However, recent literature focuses on breaking LLM reasoning with increasingly complex problems, and whether an LLM is robust in simple logical reasoning remains underexplored. This paper proposes Absurd World, a benchmarking framework, to test LLMs against altered realism, where scenarios are logically coherent, and humans can easily solve the tasks. Absurd World breaks a real-world model into symbols, actions, sequences, and events, which are automatically altered to create absurd worlds where the logic to solve the tasks remains the same. It evaluates a large collection of models with simple and advanced prompting techniques, and proves that it is an effective tool to determine LLMs' ability to think logically, ignoring the patterns learned from the real world. One can use this framework to extensively test an LLM against a real-world problem to verify whether the LLM's reasoning capability is robust against variations of the task.

analysis.tldr: 提出Absurd World基准，通过改变现实世界场景的逻辑一致性来探测LLM的推理鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有研究多关注复杂问题对LLM推理的挑战，但LLM在简单逻辑推理中的鲁棒性尚未充分探索。
analysis.problem: 如何评估LLM在逻辑一致但现实世界模式被改变的简单推理任务中的表现。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将现实世界模型分解为符号、动作、序列和事件，自动修改以创建逻辑相同但场景荒谬的世界，并测试LLM。
contributions: 提出Absurd World基准框架，用于探测LLM在逻辑推理中的鲁棒性。
通过多种提示技术评估大量模型，证明该框架能有效判断LLM的逻辑推理能力。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于简单逻辑推理场景。
自动修改过程可能引入未预期的偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Absurd World基准，通过改变现实世界场景的逻辑一致性来探测LLM的推理鲁棒性。

papers.title: CodeClinic: Evaluating Automation of Coding Skills for Clinical Reasoning Agents
papers.abstract: Clinical reasoning agents based on large language models (LLMs) aim to automate tasks such as intensive care unit (ICU) monitoring and patient state tracking from electronic health records (EHRs). Existing systems typically rely on manually curated clinical tools or skills for concepts such as sepsis detection and organ failure assessment. However, maintaining these tool libraries requires substantial expert effort, while zero-shot querying or code generation often produces inefficient and unreliable reasoning chains, especially under institution-specific clinical policies. We introduce CodeClinic, a benchmark built on MIMIC-IV for evaluating whether LLM agents can synthesize and compose reusable clinical skills instead of relying on fixed toolboxes. The benchmark contains two complementary tasks: longitudinal ICU surveillance and compositional information seeking. The longitudinal setting simulates monitoring patient trajectories with structured decisions every four hours across 25 findings and eight clinical families, while the compositional setting spans 63k instances across 259 tasks in nine domains and is stratified by compositional dependency depth to evaluate increasingly complex multi-step reasoning. We further propose an offline autoformalization pipeline that converts natural-language clinical guidelines into reusable and verified Python skill libraries through iterative LLM refinement. Compared with zero-shot code generation, the resulting libraries improve consistency while reducing per-query token usage by up to 40%.

analysis.tldr: 提出CodeClinic基准，评估LLM代理在临床推理中自动合成可复用编码技能的能力，并设计离线自动形式化管线提升效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有临床推理系统依赖人工维护的工具库，维护成本高，且零样本查询或代码生成效率低、可靠性差，尤其在不同机构的临床政策下表现不佳。
analysis.problem: 如何评估和提升LLM代理在电子健康记录（EHR）场景中自动合成和组合可复用临床技能的能力，而非依赖固定工具库。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建CodeClinic基准，包含纵向ICU监测和组合信息检索两个任务；提出离线自动形式化管线，通过迭代LLM精炼将自然语言临床指南转换为可复用且经过验证的Python技能库。
contributions: 提出CodeClinic基准，用于评估LLM代理合成和组合可复用临床技能的能力。
设计离线自动形式化管线，将自然语言临床指南转换为可复用的Python技能库，相比零样本代码生成提升一致性并减少40%的每查询token使用量。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 基准仅基于MIMIC-IV数据集，可能无法完全代表其他临床环境。
自动形式化管线的泛化性和对复杂临床政策的适应性有待进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CodeClinic基准，评估LLM代理在临床推理中自动合成可复用编码技能的能力，并设计离线自动形式化管线提升效率。

papers.title: Workspace Optimization: How to Train Your Agent
papers.abstract: Modern agents built on frontier language models often cannot adapt their weights. What, then, remains trainable? We argue it is the agent's \emph{workspace}, the structured external substrate it reads, writes, and tests; we call its evolution workspace optimization. Workspace optimization targets hard multi-turn environments where a frontier model has strong priors but cannot solve the task in a single shot, so the agent must learn through interaction. We propose a principled way to evolve the workspace, mirroring the structure of weight-space training: artifacts in place of parameters, evidence in place of data, counterexamples in place of losses, and textual feedback in place of gradients. We instantiate the idea in DreamTeam, a multi-agent harness for ARC-AGI-3 whose roles build an executable world model, plan, hypothesize, probe, strategize, and route failures. On the current 25-game ARC-AGI-3 public set under the official scoring protocol and averaged over two independent runs, DreamTeam improves the SOTA protocol-matched agent's score from 36% to 38.4%, while using 31% fewer environment actions per game.

analysis.tldr: 提出工作空间优化方法，通过演化外部结构化基板提升多轮环境中的智能体性能，DreamTeam在ARC-AGI-3上以更少动作超越SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 前沿语言模型构建的智能体通常无法调整权重，限制了其在复杂多轮环境中的适应能力，亟需探索其他可训练组件。
analysis.problem: 如何在不调整模型权重的情况下，通过演化智能体的外部工作空间（workspace）来提升其在硬多轮环境中的任务解决能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出工作空间优化框架，将权重空间训练的结构映射到工作空间：工件对应参数、证据对应数据、反例对应损失、文本反馈对应梯度；并实例化为DreamTeam多智能体系统，包含构建可执行世界模型、规划、假设、探测、策略和路由失败等角色。
contributions: 提出工作空间优化概念，为不可调权重的智能体提供了一种新的学习范式。
实现DreamTeam系统，在ARC-AGI-3基准上以更少环境动作超越当前最佳协议匹配智能体。
analysis.experiments: 在ARC-AGI-3公开集上，使用官方评分协议，两次独立运行平均结果：DreamTeam将SOTA协议匹配智能体的得分从36%提升至38.4%，同时每局环境动作减少31%。
limitations: 方法仅在ARC-AGI-3单一基准上验证，泛化性未知。
工作空间演化可能依赖特定任务结构，迁移到其他领域需进一步研究。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出工作空间优化方法，通过演化外部结构化基板提升多轮环境中的智能体性能，DreamTeam在ARC-AGI-3上以更少动作超越SOTA。

papers.title: PDEAgent-Bench: A Multi-Metric, Multi-Library Benchmark for PDE Solver Generation
papers.abstract: PDE-to-solver code generation aims to automatically synthesize executable numerical solvers from partial differential equation (PDE) specifications. This task requires not only understanding the mathematical structure of PDEs, but also selecting appropriate discretization schemes and solver configurations, and correctly implementing the resulting formulations in finite-element method (FEM) libraries. Existing code generation benchmarks mainly evaluate syntactic correctness, or success on predefined test cases. To our knowledge, there is currently no publicly available benchmark specifically for PDE-to-solver code generation, and general-purpose code benchmarks do not fully capture the unique challenges of numerical PDE solution, such as ensuring solver accuracy, efficiency, and compatibility with professional FEM libraries. We introduce PDEAgent-Bench, to the best of our knowledge, the first multi-metric, multi-library benchmark for PDE-to-solver code generation. PDEAgent-Bench contains 645 instances across 6 mathematical categories and 11 PDE families, with common FEM libraries for DOLFINx, Firedrake, and this http URL . Each instance provides an agent-facing problem specification, a reference solution on a prescribed evaluation grid, and case-specific accuracy and runtime targets. PDEAgent-Bench adopts a staged evaluation framework in which generated solvers must sequentially pass executability, numerical accuracy, and computational efficiency checks. Experiments with representative LLMs and code agents show that models can often produce runnable code, but their pass rate drops substantially once accuracy and efficiency requirements are enforced. These results indicate that current agents remain limited in producing numerically reliable and efficient PDE solvers, and that PDEAgent-Bench provides a reproducible testbed grounded in the practical requirements of numerical PDE solving.

analysis.tldr: 首个面向 PDE 求解器代码生成的多指标、多库基准，揭示现有 LLM 在数值精度和效率上的不足。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有代码生成基准主要评估语法正确性或预定义测试用例，缺乏针对 PDE 求解器代码生成的专用基准，无法捕捉数值求解中的独特挑战（如精度、效率、与专业 FEM 库的兼容性）。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个多指标、多库的基准来系统评估 PDE 求解器代码生成的质量，包括可执行性、数值精度和计算效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验表明，现有 LLM 和代码智能体通常能生成可运行代码，但在精度和效率要求下通过率大幅下降，说明当前模型在生成数值可靠且高效的 PDE 求解器方面能力有限。
analysis.method: 构建包含 645 个实例、覆盖 6 个数学类别和 11 个 PDE 族、支持 DOLFINx/Firedrake/deal.II 三个 FEM 库的基准，采用分阶段评估框架（可执行性→数值精度→计算效率）。
contributions: 首个多指标、多库的 PDE 求解器代码生成基准 PDEAgent-Bench，包含 645 个实例和分阶段评估框架。
通过实验揭示当前 LLM 和代码智能体在数值精度和效率上的显著不足，为未来研究提供可复现的测试平台。
analysis.experiments: 使用代表性 LLM 和代码智能体进行实验，结果显示可运行代码通过率较高，但精度和效率要求下通过率大幅下降。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖三个 FEM 库，可能不全面。
未提供具体模型名称和通过率数值，细节有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个面向 PDE 求解器代码生成的多指标、多库基准，揭示现有 LLM 在数值精度和效率上的不足。

papers.title: TIDE-Bench: Task-Aware and Diagnostic Evaluation of Tool-Integrated Reasoning
papers.abstract: Tool-integrated reasoning has emerged as a promising paradigm for enhancing large language models with external computation, retrieval, and execution capabilities. However, the field still lacks a high-quality and unified evaluation benchmark, and existing TIR evaluations remain limited in dataset quality, task diversity, diagnostic comprehensiveness, and evaluation efficiency. In this work, we introduce TIDE-Bench, a holistic and efficient benchmark for evaluating TIR methods, featuring three key advantages. First, it provides diverse task settings, combining widely used mathematical reasoning and knowledge-intensive QA tasks with two newly designed tasks, namely the tool-grounded experimental design task and the dynamic interactive task, to probe models' abilities in complex tool invocation and multi-tool coordination. Second, TIDE-Bench adopts a comprehensive yet task-aware evaluation protocol, jointly measuring final answer quality, process reliability, tool-use efficiency, and inference cost across heterogeneous task settings. Third, TIDE-Bench constructs high-quality and discriminative evaluation sets by filtering low-discrimination instances from existing datasets, substantially reducing evaluation cost while focusing on more challenging samples. Extensive experiments on multiple foundation models and TIR methods reveal persistent bottlenecks in tool grounding, offering insights for future TIR research.

analysis.tldr: TIDE-Bench 是一个面向工具集成推理的全面、高效评测基准，涵盖多样化任务、任务感知评估协议和高判别力数据集。
analysis.research_motivation: 工具集成推理（TIR）虽能增强大模型，但现有评测在数据集质量、任务多样性、诊断全面性和评估效率上存在不足。
analysis.problem: 缺乏高质量、统一且高效的 TIR 评测基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建 TIDE-Bench，包含多样化任务（数学推理、知识密集型 QA、工具接地实验设计、动态交互任务）、任务感知评估协议（综合答案质量、过程可靠性、工具使用效率、推理成本）和高判别力数据集（过滤低区分度实例）。
contributions: 提出 TIDE-Bench，一个涵盖多种任务和全面评估指标的 TIR 评测基准。
设计工具接地实验设计和动态交互任务，以探测复杂工具调用和多工具协调能力。
通过过滤低判别力实例构建高质量、高判别力的评测集，降低评估成本。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基础模型和 TIR 方法上进行实验，揭示了工具接地中的持续瓶颈。
limitations: 可能未覆盖所有 TIR 任务类型。
过滤低判别力实例可能引入偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: TIDE-Bench 是一个面向工具集成推理的全面、高效评测基准，涵盖多样化任务、任务感知评估协议和高判别力数据集。

papers.title: LLM-Guided Monte Carlo Tree Search over Knowledge Graphs: Composing Mechanistic Explanations for Drug-Disease Pairs
papers.abstract: Extracting multi-step explanations from knowledge graphs poses a combinatorial challenge requiring both heuristic guidance (as candidates proliferate with depth) and credit assignment (as path quality emerges over extended sequences). Frontier LLMs, strong on knowledge/reasoning benchmarks, offer a compelling source of such heuristics, yet their knowledge comes sans guarantees and compositional performance degrades as chains lengthen. We thus present TESSERA, a 3-part neuro-symbolic framework that uses LLMs in a circumscribed role: for local discriminative judgement rather than autonomous multi-step generation; the knowledge graph then defines the hypothesis space enforcing hard structural constraints, and MCTS coordinates the long-horizon search with principled credit assignment via backpropagation. LLMs perform dual roles as a prior policy biasing exploration and a comparative state evaluator supplying reward signals. Evaluation on drug mechanism elucidation across two complementary knowledge graphs demonstrates fidelity to curated biology while surfacing coherent alternative mechanisms, with ablations confirming discriminative contribution from both LLM components. Beyond its current application, our framework offers a general paradigm for compositional reasoning over structured knowledge.

analysis.tldr: 提出TESSERA框架，结合LLM局部判别、知识图谱硬约束和MCTS长程搜索，为药物-疾病对生成多步机制解释。
analysis.research_motivation: 从知识图谱中提取多步解释面临组合爆炸和信用分配挑战，现有LLM虽强但缺乏保证且长链生成性能下降。
analysis.problem: 如何利用LLM的启发式能力，同时通过知识图谱的结构约束和MCTS的信用分配，生成忠实且连贯的多步机制解释。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLM在长链生成中性能退化，知识图谱搜索随深度增加候选激增，需要启发式引导和信用分配。
analysis.method: TESSERA框架：LLM作为先验策略（偏置探索）和比较状态评估器（提供奖励信号），知识图谱定义假设空间并施加硬结构约束，MCTS通过反向传播协调长程搜索。
contributions: 提出TESSERA，一种神经符号框架，将LLM用于局部判别而非自主多步生成，结合知识图谱和MCTS进行组合推理。
在药物机制阐明任务上验证，框架能忠实于已知生物学并发现连贯的替代机制，消融实验证实LLM组件的判别贡献。
analysis.experiments: 在两个互补知识图谱上评估药物机制阐明，通过消融实验验证LLM组件的贡献，摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 依赖知识图谱的完整性和质量，可能遗漏未收录的机制。
LLM的判别能力可能受限于其训练数据中的偏见。

papers.title: Cplus2ASP: Computing Action Language C+ in Answer Set Programming
papers.abstract: We present Version 2 of system Cplus2ASP, which implements the definite fragment of action language C+. Its input language is fully compatible with the language of the Causal Calculator Version 2, but the new system is significantly faster thanks to modern answer set solving techniques. The translation implemented in the system is a composition of several recent theoretical results. The system orchestrates a tool chain, consisting of f2lp, clingo, iclingo, and as2transition. Under the incremental execution mode, the system translates a C+ description into the input language of iclingo, exploiting its incremental grounding mechanism. The correctness of this execution is justified by the module theorem extended to programs with nested expressions. In addition, the input language of the system has many useful features, such as external atoms by means of Lua calls and the user interactive mode. The system supports extensible multi-modal translations for other action languages, such as B and BC, as well.

analysis.tldr: Cplus2ASP 2.0 利用现代回答集求解技术，将动作语言 C+ 的确定性子集高效编译为 ASP，显著提升性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 动作语言 C+ 在推理动作与变化方面有广泛应用，但现有实现（如 Causal Calculator 2）性能不足，难以处理复杂问题。
analysis.problem: 如何高效地将动作语言 C+ 的确定性子集翻译为回答集程序，并利用增量求解技术提升性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将 C+ 描述通过一系列理论结果组合翻译为 ASP，利用 f2lp、clingo、iclingo、as2transition 工具链，在增量执行模式下利用 iclingo 的增量接地机制。
contributions: 实现了与 Causal Calculator 2 完全兼容但速度显著更快的 Cplus2ASP 2.0 系统
基于模块定理扩展到嵌套表达式，证明了增量执行模式的正确性
支持外部原子（Lua 调用）、用户交互模式以及可扩展的多模态翻译（如 B 和 BC 语言）

papers.title: Functional Stable Model Semantics and Answer Set Programming Modulo Theories
papers.abstract: Recently there has been an increasing interest in incorporating ``intensional'' functions in answer set programming. Intensional functions are those whose values can be described by other functions and predicates, rather than being pre-defined as in the standard answer set programming. We demonstrate that the functional stable model semantics plays an important role in the framework of ``Answer Set Programming Modulo Theories (ASPMT)'' -- a tight integration of answer set programming and satisfiability modulo theories, under which existing integration approaches can be viewed as special cases where the role of functions is limited. We show that ``tight'' ASPMT programs can be translated into SMT instances, which is similar to the known relationship between ASP and SAT.

analysis.tldr: 本文提出功能稳定模型语义，将回答集编程与可满足性模理论紧密集成，并证明紧程序可转化为SMT实例。
analysis.research_motivation: 回答集编程中函数通常预定义，限制了表达能力；现有集成方法对函数角色限制较多，缺乏统一框架。

contributions: 提出功能稳定模型语义，支持内涵函数。
建立ASPMT框架，统一现有集成方法。

papers.title: Weighted Rules under the Stable Model Semantics
papers.abstract: We introduce the concept of weighted rules under the stable model semantics following the log-linear models of Markov Logic. This provides versatile methods to overcome the deterministic nature of the stable model semantics, such as resolving inconsistencies in answer set programs, ranking stable models, associating probability to stable models, and applying statistical inference to computing weighted stable models. We also present formal comparisons with related formalisms, such as answer set programs, Markov Logic, ProbLog, and P-log.

analysis.tldr: 在稳定模型语义下引入加权规则，结合马尔可夫逻辑的log-linear模型，以处理不一致性、排序、概率关联和统计推理。
analysis.research_motivation: 稳定模型语义具有确定性，难以处理不确定性、不一致性和概率推理，而马尔可夫逻辑等概率方法提供了灵活框架，但尚未在稳定模型语义下系统研究加权规则。
analysis.problem: 如何在稳定模型语义下定义加权规则，并利用其解决不一致性、排序、概率关联和统计推理问题。

contributions: 提出了稳定模型语义下的加权规则概念，扩展了其表达能力。

papers.title: A Game Theoretic Free Energy Analysis of Higher Order Synergy in Attention Heads of Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Large language models rely on multihead attention, but interactions among heads remain poorly understood. We apply the Game Theoretic Free Energy Principle (GTFEP): a framework casting multiagent systems as distributed variational inference to analyze attention heads as bounded rational agents. According to GTFEP, each head minimizes its variational free energy, and collective behavior follows a Gibbs distribution over coalition structures whose energy is decomposed into Harsanyi dividends. Using a tractable approximation (uniform prior, deterministic dynamics), coalition free energy reduces to joint Shannon entropy of discretized head outputs (argmax key index). Pairwise dividends become mutual information (nonnegative), while triple dividends correspond to interaction information and can be negative. On BERT, GPT2, and Llama with GSM8K, triple dividends are consistently negative, revealing higher order redundancy. The Nash FEP correspondence guarantees that stationary points of collective free energy are epsilon Nash equilibria; thus, heads with negligible contribution can be pruned with minimal performance loss. Pruning heads with low marginal contribution reduces computational cost with minimal performance loss: for example, pruning 20% of heads in GPT2 reduces FLOPs by 18%, increases throughput by 22%, and raises perplexity only modestly (from 28.4 to 33.4 on GSM8K). Our work shows GTFEP provides a principled foundation for analyzing and optimizing transformer architectures.

analysis.tldr: 用博弈论自由能原理分析LLM注意力头的高阶协同，发现三元交互信息为负（冗余），并据此剪枝可降低计算成本。
analysis.research_motivation: 多头注意力机制中头间交互复杂，缺乏理论分析框架，现有方法难以解释高阶协同或指导高效剪枝。
analysis.problem: 如何从信息论和博弈论角度量化注意力头之间的高阶协同（三元及以上交互），并利用该分析优化模型效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在BERT、GPT2、Llama上，三元Harsanyi红利（交互信息）一致为负，表明高阶冗余；剪枝低边际贡献的头对性能影响小。
analysis.method: 将注意力头视为有界理性智能体，用博弈论自由能原理（GTFEP）建模，将联合自由能分解为Harsanyi红利，用联合熵近似，并利用Nash FEP对应保证剪枝的合理性。
contributions: 提出GTFEP框架用于分析多头注意力中的高阶协同，将交互信息与Harsanyi红利关联。
发现三元交互信息为负（高阶冗余），并基于边际贡献剪枝，在GPT2上剪枝20%头减少18% FLOPs，提升22%吞吐量，困惑度仅小幅上升。
analysis.experiments: 在BERT、GPT2、Llama模型上使用GSM8K数据集验证，剪枝20%头后FLOPs减少18%，吞吐量提升22%，困惑度从28.4升至33.4。
limitations: 分析依赖离散化（argmax key索引），可能丢失连续信息。
仅验证了剪枝效果，未探索其他优化（如头合并）。

papers.title: WindINR: Latent-State INR for Fast Local Wind Query and Correction in Complex Terrain
papers.abstract: Many downstream decisions in complex terrain require fast wind estimates at a small number of user-specified locations and heights for a given forecast valid time, rather than another dense forecast field on a fixed grid. We present WindINR, a latent-state implicit neural representation framework for continuous high-resolution local wind query and sparse-observation correction. WindINR maps static terrain descriptors, a low-resolution background field, and continuous query coordinates to a high-resolution wind state through a latent-conditioned decoder. To enable rapid inference-time correction, WindINR separates reusable representation learning from sample-specific latent-state correction. During training, a privileged encoder infers a reference latent state from high-resolution supervision, a deployable latent predictor estimates an initial latent state from inference-time inputs alone, and their discrepancies are summarized into a dataset-adaptive Gaussian prior over latent corrections. At inference time, within the WindINR module, network weights remain fixed and only the latent state is updated by minimizing a regularized correction objective using sparse observations and their uncertainty. In controlled OSSEs over the Senja region, including a UAV-aided approach scenario and random-observation robustness tests, WindINR improves local high-resolution wind estimates by updating only a compact latent state rather than the full network. The corrected representation remains continuously queryable at arbitrary coordinates and, in our CPU benchmark, yields about a $2.6\times$ online-correction speedup over full-network fine-tuning, suggesting a practical interface between kilometer-scale background products, sparse local observations, and wind queries in complex terrain.

analysis.tldr: WindINR 提出隐式神经表示框架，通过潜在状态校正实现复杂地形下快速局部风场查询与稀疏观测融合。
analysis.research_motivation: 复杂地形中下游决策需要快速获取用户指定位置和高度的风估计，而非固定网格的稠密预报场，现有方法难以兼顾连续高分辨率查询与稀疏观测的实时校正。
analysis.problem: 如何实现复杂地形下连续高分辨率局部风场的快速查询，并利用稀疏观测进行高效校正。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建潜在状态隐式神经表示（INR）框架，包含可复用表示学习与样本特定潜在状态校正两个阶段：训练时通过特权编码器从高分辨率监督中学习参考潜在状态，部署时用潜在预测器估计初始状态，并构建数据集自适应高斯先验；推理时仅更新潜在状态，网络权重固定，通过正则化校正目标融合稀疏观测。
contributions: 提出 WindINR 框架，实现连续高分辨率局部风场查询与稀疏观测校正。
设计分离式潜在状态校正机制，推理时仅更新紧凑潜在状态，避免全网络微调，提升速度约 2.6 倍。
analysis.experiments: 在 Senja 区域的受控 OSSE 实验中，包括无人机辅助场景和随机观测鲁棒性测试，WindINR 通过更新潜在状态改善局部高分辨率风估计，CPU 基准测试显示在线校正速度比全网络微调快约 2.6 倍。
limitations: 实验仅在特定区域（Senja）进行，泛化性需进一步验证。
依赖低分辨率背景场和静态地形描述符，可能限制极端地形下的表现。

papers.title: EpiGraph: A Knowledge Graph and Benchmark for Evidence-Intensive Reasoning in Epilepsy
papers.abstract: Epilepsy diagnosis and treatment require evidence-intensive reasoning across heterogeneous clinical knowledge, including biosignal patterns, genetic mechanisms, pharmacogenomics, treatment strategies, and patient outcomes. In this work, we present \textsc{EpiGraph}, a large-scale epilepsy knowledge graph and benchmark for evaluating knowledge-augmented clinical reasoning. \textsc{EpiGraph} integrates 48,166 peer-reviewed papers and seven clinical resources into a heterogeneous graph containing 24,324 entities and 32,009 evidence-grounded triplets across five clinical layers. Built upon this graph, \textsc{EpiBench} defines five clinically motivated tasks spanning clinical decision-making, EEG report generation, pharmacogenomic precision medicine, treatment recommendation, and deep research planning. We evaluate six LLMs under both standard and Graph-RAG settings. Results show that integrating \textsc{EpiGraph} consistently improves performance across all tasks, with the largest gains observed in pharmacogenomic reasoning (+30--41\%). Our findings demonstrate that structured epilepsy knowledge substantially enhances evidence-grounded clinical reasoning and provides a practical benchmark framework for evaluating knowledge-augmented LLMs in real-world neurological settings. Our code is available at: this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 构建癫痫知识图谱EpiGraph与基准EpiBench，验证图增强检索对临床推理的显著提升。
analysis.research_motivation: 癫痫诊疗需要跨异构临床知识的证据密集型推理，现有方法缺乏结构化知识整合与评估基准。
analysis.problem: 如何构建癫痫领域知识图谱并评估其对LLM临床推理能力的增强效果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 整合48,166篇论文和7个临床资源构建包含24,324实体和32,009三元组的知识图谱EpiGraph，并设计5个临床任务形成基准EpiBench，在标准与Graph-RAG设置下评估6个LLM。
contributions: 构建了大规模癫痫知识图谱EpiGraph，覆盖5个临床层。
提出EpiBench基准，包含5个临床推理任务。
实验证明图增强检索在药物基因组推理上提升30-41%。

limitations: 知识图谱可能未覆盖所有癫痫亚型。

papers.title: Don't Click That: Teaching Web Agents to Resist Deceptive Interfaces
papers.abstract: Vision-language model (VLM) based web agents demonstrate impressive autonomous GUI interaction but remain vulnerable to deceptive interface elements. Existing approaches either detect deception without task integration or document attacks without proposing defenses. We formalize deception-aware web agent defense and propose DUDE (Deceptive UI Detector & Evaluator), a two-stage framework combining hybrid-reward learning with asymmetric penalties and experience summarization to distill failure patterns into transferable guidance. We introduce RUC (Real UI Clickboxes), a benchmark of 1,407 scenarios spanning four domains and deception categories. Experiments show DUDE reduces deception susceptibility by 53.8% while maintaining task performance, establishing an effective foundation for robust web agent deployment.

analysis.tldr: 提出DUDE框架，通过混合奖励学习和经验总结，使网页代理对欺骗性界面元素的抵抗力提升53.8%。
analysis.research_motivation: 基于VLM的网页代理在自主GUI交互中易受欺骗性界面元素攻击，现有方法要么未与任务集成，要么只记录攻击而不提出防御。
analysis.problem: 如何使网页代理在保持任务性能的同时，有效抵抗欺骗性界面元素。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出DUDE框架，包含两阶段：混合奖励学习（结合不对称惩罚）和经验总结，将失败模式提炼为可迁移的指导。
contributions: 形式化定义了欺骗感知的网页代理防御问题
提出DUDE框架，结合混合奖励学习和经验总结
构建RUC基准，包含1407个场景，覆盖四个领域和欺骗类别
analysis.experiments: 在RUC基准上实验，DUDE将欺骗易感性降低53.8%，同时保持任务性能。
limitations: 可能仅针对特定类型的欺骗界面有效
