papers.title: VulTriage: Triple-Path Context Augmentation for LLM-Based Vulnerability Detection
papers.abstract: Automated vulnerability detection is a fundamental task in software security, yet existing learning-based methods still struggle to capture the structural dependencies, domain-specific vulnerability knowledge, and complex program semantics required for accurate detection. Recent Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown strong code understanding ability, but directly prompting them with raw source code often leads to missed vulnerabilities or false alarms, especially when vulnerable and benign functions differ only in subtle semantic details. To address this, we propose VulTriage, a triple-path context augmentation framework for LLM-based vulnerability detection. VulTriage enhances the LLM input through three complementary paths: a Control Path that extracts and verbalizes AST, CFG, and DFG information to expose control and data dependencies; a Knowledge Path that retrieves relevant CWE-derived vulnerability patterns and examples through hybrid dense--sparse retrieval; and a Semantic Path that summarizes the functional behavior of the code before the final judgment. These contexts are integrated into a unified instruction to guide the LLM toward more reliable vulnerability reasoning. Experiments on the PrimeVul pair test set show that VulTriage achieves state-of-the-art performance, outperforming existing deep learning and LLM-based baselines on key pair-wise and classification metrics. Further ablation studies verify the effectiveness of each path, and additional experiments on the Kotlin dataset demonstrate the generalization ability of VulTriage under low-resource and class-imbalanced settings. Our code is available at this https URL

analysis.tldr: VulTriage通过三路径上下文增强提升LLM漏洞检测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于学习的方法难以捕获结构依赖、领域知识和复杂程序语义，直接使用LLM检测漏洞易漏报或误报。
analysis.problem: 如何增强LLM输入以准确检测代码中细微语义差异导致的漏洞。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出三路径上下文增强框架：控制路径提取AST/CFG/DFG信息，知识路径通过混合检索获取CWE漏洞模式，语义路径总结代码功能行为，统一集成到指令中引导LLM推理。
contributions: 提出VulTriage三路径上下文增强框架，有效提升LLM漏洞检测准确性。
在PrimeVul和Kotlin数据集上达到SOTA，并验证了各路径的有效性和泛化能力。
analysis.experiments: 在PrimeVul对测试集上达到SOTA，优于现有深度学习和LLM基线；消融实验验证各路径有效性；在Kotlin数据集上展示低资源和类别不平衡下的泛化能力。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量CWE知识库和检索效果。
三路径集成可能增加推理开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: VulTriage通过三路径上下文增强提升LLM漏洞检测性能。

papers.title: SimWorld Studio: Automatic Environment Generation with Evolving Coding Agent for Embodied Agent Learning
papers.abstract: LLM/VLM-based digital agents have advanced rapidly thanks to scalable sandboxes for coding, web navigation, and computer use, which provide rich interactive training grounds. In contrast, embodied agents still lack abundant, diverse, and automatically generated 3D environments for interactive learning. Existing embodied simulators rely on manually crafted scenes or procedural templates, while recent LLM-based 3D generation systems mainly produce static scenes rather than deployable environments with verifiable tasks and standard learning interfaces. We introduce SimWorld Studio, an open-source platform built on Unreal Engine 5 for generating evolving embodied learning environments. At its core is SimCoder, a tool/skill-augmented coding agent that writes and executes engine-level code to construct physically grounded 3D worlds from language/image instructions. SimCoder self-evolves by using verifier feedback (e.g., compilation errors, physics checks, VLM critiques) to revise environments and autonomously add reusable tools and skills to its library. Generated worlds are exported as Gym-style environments for embodied agent learning. SimWorld Studio further enables co-evolution between environment generation and embodied learning: agent performance feedback guides SimCoder to generate adaptive curricula near the learner's capability frontier, so that environments become increasingly challenging as the embodied agent improves. Three case studies on embodied navigation show that self-evolution improves generation reliability, generated environments substantially improve embodied agent performance that generalizes to unseen benchmarks, and co-evolution yields an 18-point success-rate gain over fixed-environment learning and a 40-point gain over an untrained agent.

analysis.tldr: 提出SimWorld Studio平台，通过自进化编码智能体SimCoder自动生成可部署的3D环境，用于具身智能体学习，并在导航任务中验证了有效性。
analysis.research_motivation: 具身智能体缺乏丰富、多样且自动生成的3D环境用于交互学习，现有模拟器依赖手工场景或程序化模板，而LLM-based 3D生成系统主要生成静态场景，无法提供可验证任务和标准学习接口。
analysis.problem: 如何自动生成具有可验证任务和标准学习接口的、可演化的3D环境，以支持具身智能体的交互式学习。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建基于Unreal Engine 5的开源平台SimWorld Studio，核心是SimCoder——一个工具/技能增强的编码智能体，它根据语言/图像指令编写并执行引擎级代码来构建物理真实的3D世界；SimCoder通过验证器反馈（编译错误、物理检查、VLM批评）自我进化，并自动将可复用工具和技能加入库；生成的世界导出为Gym风格环境；进一步实现环境生成与具身学习的协同进化，智能体性能反馈引导SimCoder生成自适应课程。
contributions: 提出了SimWorld Studio平台，能够自动生成可部署的3D环境用于具身智能体学习。
设计了自进化编码智能体SimCoder，通过验证反馈和工具库积累提升环境生成可靠性。
实现了环境生成与具身学习的协同进化，动态调整任务难度。
在具身导航任务中验证了方法有效性，协同进化相比固定环境学习提升18个百分点的成功率。
analysis.experiments: 在具身导航任务上进行三个案例研究，结果显示：自进化提高了生成可靠性；生成的环境显著提升了具身智能体性能，并泛化到未见基准；协同进化相比固定环境学习获得18个百分点的成功率提升，相比未训练智能体获得40个百分点的提升。
limitations: 摘要未提及在更复杂任务（如操作、交互）上的验证。
可能依赖Unreal Engine 5，迁移到其他引擎或轻量化场景存在挑战。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SimWorld Studio平台，通过自进化编码智能体SimCoder自动生成可部署的3D环境，用于具身智能体学习，并在导航任务中验证了有效性。

papers.title: From Passive Reuse to Active Reasoning: Grounding Large Language Models for Neuro-Symbolic Experience Replay
papers.abstract: While experience replay is essential for data efficiency in reinforcement learning (RL), standard methods treat the replay buffer as a passive memory system, prioritizing samples based on numerical prediction errors rather than their semantic significance. This approach stands in contrast to human learning, which accelerates mastery by actively abstracting fragmented experiences into behavioral rules. To bridge this gap, we propose Neuro-Symbolic Experience Replay (NSER), a framework that transforms experience replay from a passive sample reuse mechanism into an active engine for knowledge construction. Specifically, NSER addresses the incompatibility between linguistic reasoning and numerical optimization through a novel neuro-symbolic grounding pipeline. It leverages Large Language Models (LLMs) in a zero-shot manner to induce candidate behavioral rules from accumulated trajectories, grounds these insights into differentiable first-order logic representations, and utilizes the resulting symbolic structures to dynamically reweight the replay distribution. By allowing abstract knowledge to directly shape policy optimization, NSER achieves consistent superior sample efficiency and convergence speed across reactive, rule-based, and procedural benchmarks.

analysis.tldr: 提出神经符号经验回放（NSER），将LLM诱导的规则转化为可微逻辑表示，动态重加权回放分布，提升强化学习样本效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 标准经验回放将缓冲区视为被动记忆系统，仅基于数值预测误差排序样本，缺乏语义理解，与人类主动抽象经验为行为规则的学习方式形成对比。
analysis.problem: 如何将经验回放从被动样本复用转变为主动知识构建，使抽象语义规则能直接指导策略优化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出神经符号经验回放（NSER），包含三个步骤：1）零样本使用LLM从累积轨迹中归纳候选行为规则；2）将规则转化为可微一阶逻辑表示；3）利用符号结构动态重加权回放分布，使抽象知识直接塑造策略优化。
contributions: 提出NSER框架，将经验回放从被动复用转变为主动知识构建。
设计神经符号接地管道，解决语言推理与数值优化的不兼容问题。
在反应式、基于规则和程序化基准上验证了样本效率和收敛速度的一致提升。
analysis.experiments: 在反应式、基于规则和程序化基准上评估，NSER在样本效率和收敛速度上持续优于基线。
limitations: 依赖LLM的零样本归纳能力，可能受限于LLM对特定任务的理解。
可微逻辑表示的复杂度可能随规则数量增加而增长。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出神经符号经验回放（NSER），将LLM诱导的规则转化为可微逻辑表示，动态重加权回放分布，提升强化学习样本效率。

papers.title: Strategic commitments shape collective cybersecurity under AI inequality
papers.abstract: The growing integration of AI into cybersecurity is reshaping the balance between attackers and defenders. When access to advanced AI-enabled defence tools is uneven, resource-limited defenders may be unable to adopt effective protection, creating persistent system vulnerabilities. We study the impact of differential AI access using an evolutionary game-theoretic model in a finite population. We first show that when high-capability defence is costly, the population is driven toward low-cost, weak-defence behaviour, sustaining attacks and weakening long-run security. To address this problem, we introduce differential access to AI defence tools by allowing defenders to choose between low- and high-capability protection based on their resources. We then examine the role of a small group of committed defenders who always adopt strong defence and influence others through social learning. Although commitment increases the prevalence of strong defence, it alone cannot stabilise secure outcomes due to high defence costs. We therefore incorporate a targeted subsidy to remove the cost disadvantage from committed defenders. Our analysis shows that subsidised commitment significantly increases strong defence adoption, suppresses successful attacks, and improves overall system resilience. Simulations across a broad parameter space confirm that subsidies consistently outperform commitment alone. In addition, social-welfare analysis shows improved defender outcomes while keeping attacker gains low. These findings suggest that targeted support for key defenders can be an effective mechanism for stabilising cybersecurity in AI-driven environments and provide a theoretical bridge between cybersecurity policy, AI governance, and strategic allocation of defensive AI capabilities.

analysis.tldr: 通过演化博弈模型研究AI能力不平等下战略承诺对集体网络安全的影响，发现补贴承诺可显著提升强防御采用率并抑制攻击。
analysis.research_motivation: AI融入网络安全改变了攻防平衡，但资源有限的防御者无法采用先进AI防御工具，导致系统持续脆弱，亟需研究AI能力不平等下的防御策略。
analysis.problem: 在AI防御工具访问不均的有限群体中，如何通过战略承诺和补贴机制提升集体网络安全水平。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 高能力防御成本高时，群体倾向于低成本弱防御行为，导致攻击持续且长期安全弱化；仅靠承诺无法稳定安全结果，需结合补贴消除成本劣势。
analysis.method: 使用有限群体演化博弈模型，引入差异化AI防御工具访问，分析承诺者（始终采用强防御）和社会学习的影响，并加入针对性补贴机制。
contributions: 揭示了AI能力不平等下群体防御行为的演化动态及脆弱性成因
提出并分析了补贴承诺机制，证明其能显著提升强防御采用率、抑制攻击并增强系统韧性
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提及在广泛参数空间进行仿真，显示补贴始终优于仅承诺。
limitations: 模型假设可能简化真实攻防交互的复杂性
未考虑攻击者策略的动态演化或AI能力提升的长期影响
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过演化博弈模型研究AI能力不平等下战略承诺对集体网络安全的影响，发现补贴承诺可显著提升强防御采用率并抑制攻击。

papers.title: Empowering VLMs for Few-Shot Multimodal Time Series Classification via Tailored Agentic Reasoning
papers.abstract: In this paper, we propose the first VL$\underline{\textbf{M}}$ $\underline{\textbf{a}}$gentic $\underline{\textbf{r}}$easoning framework for few-$\underline{\textbf{s}}$hot multimodal $\underline{\textbf{T}}$ime $\underline{\textbf{S}}$eries $\underline{\textbf{C}}$lassification ($\textbf{MarsTSC}$), which introduces a self-evolving knowledge bank as a dynamic context iteratively refined via reflective agentic reasoning. The framework comprises three collaborative roles: i) Generator conducts reliable classification via reasoning; ii) Reflector diagnoses the root causes of reasoning errors to yield discriminative insights targeting the temporal features overlooked by Generator; iii) Modifier applies verified updates to the knowledge bank to prevent context collapse. We further introduce a test-time update strategy to enable cautious, continuous knowledge bank refinement to mitigate few-shot bias and distribution shift. Extensive experiments across 12 mainstream time series benchmarks demonstrate that $\textbf{MarsTSC}$ delivers substantial and consistent performance gains across 6 VLM backbones, outperforming both classical and foundation model-based time series baselines under few-shot conditions, while producing interpretable rationales that ground each classification decision in human-readable feature evidence.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个VLM智能体推理框架MarsTSC，通过自演化知识库和反思性推理实现少样本多模态时间序列分类。
analysis.research_motivation: 少样本多模态时间序列分类面临标注稀缺和分布偏移挑战，现有方法缺乏可解释性和泛化能力。
analysis.problem: 如何利用视觉语言模型（VLM）在少样本条件下进行多模态时间序列分类，并生成可解释的推理依据。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出MarsTSC框架，包含三个协作角色：Generator进行推理分类，Reflector诊断错误原因并提取时间特征洞察，Modifier更新知识库；并引入测试时更新策略缓解少样本偏差和分布偏移。
contributions: 首个将VLM智能体推理用于少样本多模态时间序列分类的框架。
提出自演化知识库和反思性推理机制，实现动态上下文优化。
在12个基准数据集上验证了显著性能提升和可解释性。
analysis.experiments: 在12个主流时间序列基准上，使用6种VLM骨干网络，与经典和基础模型基线对比，取得一致性能提升。
limitations: 可能依赖VLM的预训练质量，对未见过的模态泛化能力未知。
测试时更新策略可能增加推理计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个VLM智能体推理框架MarsTSC，通过自演化知识库和反思性推理实现少样本多模态时间序列分类。

papers.title: Do Linear Probes Generalize Better in Persona Coordinates?
papers.abstract: It is becoming increasingly necessary to have monitors check for harmful behaviors during language model interactions, but text-only monitoring has not been sufficient. This is because models sometimes exhibit strategic deception and sandbagging, changing their behavior during evaluation. This motivates the use of white-box monitors like linear probes, which can read the model internals directly. Currently, such probes can fail under distribution shift, limiting their usefulness in real settings. We study whether there exists a low-dimensional subspace of the model internals that captures harmful behaviors more robustly, while leaving out spuriously correlative features. Inspired by the Assistant Axis and Persona Selection Model, we construct persona axes for deception and sycophancy using contrastive persona prompts. The first principal components, obtained by unsupervised PCA of the persona-specific vectors, cleanly separate harmful and harmless personas. Across 10 evaluation datasets, we show that persona-derived directions transfer non-trivially and probes trained on persona-PC projections generalize better than probes trained on raw activations. We also find that a unified axis consisting of multiple harmful and harmless behaviors improves generalization across behaviors and datasets. Overall, persona vectors provide a useful inductive bias for building more transferable behavior probes.

analysis.tldr: 通过对比人格提示构建低维子空间，线性探针在人格坐标上比原始激活泛化更好。
analysis.research_motivation: 文本监控不足以检测语言模型中的策略性欺骗和沙袋行为，白盒探针在分布偏移下失效，需要更鲁棒的内部监控方法。
analysis.problem: 线性探针在分布偏移下泛化能力不足，容易受虚假相关特征影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型在评估时可能改变行为（策略性欺骗），导致基于原始激活的探针失效；人格向量通过PCA能清晰分离有害/无害人格。
analysis.method: 使用对比人格提示构建人格轴（欺骗、谄媚），对人格特定向量进行无监督PCA，取第一主成分作为低维子空间，训练线性探针。
contributions: 提出基于人格坐标的低维子空间用于构建鲁棒行为探针
在10个评估数据集上证明人格派生方向具有非平凡迁移性，探针泛化优于原始激活探针
发现统一轴（包含多种有害/无害行为）能提升跨行为和跨数据集的泛化
analysis.experiments: 在10个评估数据集上比较了基于人格PC投影的探针与基于原始激活的探针的泛化性能。
limitations: 仅针对欺骗和谄媚行为，其他有害行为未验证
依赖对比人格提示的构造质量
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过对比人格提示构建低维子空间，线性探针在人格坐标上比原始激活泛化更好。

papers.title: NEXUS: Continual Learning of Symbolic Constraints for Safe and Robust Embodied Planning
papers.abstract: While Large Language Models (LLMs) have catalyzed progress in embodied intelligence, a fundamental gap between their inherent probabilistic uncertainty and the strict determinism and verifiable safety required in the physical world. To mitigate this gap, this paper introduces NEXUS, a modular framework designed for continual learning in embodied agents. Different from prior works that treat symbolic artifacts merely as static interfaces, NEXUS leverages them for symbolic grounding and knowledge evolution. The framework explicitly decouples physical feasibility from safety specifications: capability of agents is improved through closed-loop execution feedback, while probabilistic risk assessments are grounded into deterministic hard constraints to establish a rigorous pre-action defense. Experiments on SafeAgentBench demonstrate that NEXUS achieves superior task success rates while effectively refusing unsafe instructions, exhibiting robust defense against adversarial attacks, and progressively improving planning efficiency through knowledge accumulation.

analysis.tldr: NEXUS通过持续学习符号约束，在具身规划中实现安全与鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在具身智能中取得进展，但其概率不确定性与物理世界所需的严格确定性和可验证安全性之间存在根本差距。
analysis.problem: 如何弥合LLM的概率不确定性与具身规划中安全约束的确定性要求之间的鸿沟。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出模块化框架NEXUS，将物理可行性与安全规范解耦，通过闭环执行反馈提升能力，将概率风险评估转化为确定性硬约束，实现持续学习。
contributions: 提出NEXUS框架，实现具身代理中符号约束的持续学习。
将物理可行性与安全规范解耦，建立严格的行动前防御机制。
analysis.experiments: 在SafeAgentBench上实验，NEXUS实现了更高的任务成功率，有效拒绝不安全指令，对对抗攻击具有鲁棒性，并通过知识积累逐步提高规划效率。
limitations: 可能依赖特定仿真环境，泛化性待验证。
持续学习中的知识遗忘问题未明确讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: NEXUS通过持续学习符号约束，在具身规划中实现安全与鲁棒性。

papers.title: Explainable Knowledge Tracing via Probabilistic Embeddings and Pattern-based Reasoning
papers.abstract: Knowledge Tracing (KT) models students' knowledge states based on learning interactions to predict performance. While deep learning-based KT models have boosted predictive accuracy, most models rely on deterministic vector embeddings and opaque latent state transitions, limiting interpretability regarding how specific past behaviors influence predictions. To address this limitation, we propose Probabilistic Logical Knowledge Tracing (PLKT), an interpretable KT framework that formulates prediction as a goal-conditioned evidence reasoning process over historical learning behaviors. Instead of representing knowledge states as deterministic vector embeddings, PLKT employs robust Beta-distributed probabilistic embeddings to represent student knowledge states. This probabilistic foundation allows us to model the uncertainty of historical behaviors and perform explicit logical operations (e.g., conjunction), constructing transparent reasoning paths that reveal how specific past interactions contribute to the prediction. Extensive experiments show that PLKT outperforms state-of-the-art KT methods while achieving superior interpretability. Our code is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出概率逻辑知识追踪（PLKT），用Beta分布嵌入和显式逻辑推理实现可解释的知识追踪。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有深度学习知识追踪模型预测准确但缺乏可解释性，难以理解历史行为如何影响预测。
analysis.problem: 如何构建既保持高预测精度又具备透明推理过程的知识追踪模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用Beta分布的概率嵌入表示学生知识状态，并通过显式逻辑操作（如合取）构建基于历史行为的推理路径。
contributions: 提出PLKT框架，用概率嵌入替代确定性向量，增强不确定性建模。
引入显式逻辑推理机制，使预测过程可解释。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量历史交互数据。
逻辑操作的可扩展性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出概率逻辑知识追踪（PLKT），用Beta分布嵌入和显式逻辑推理实现可解释的知识追踪。

papers.title: Towards a Virtual Neuroscientist: Autonomous Neuroimaging Analysis via Multi-Agent Collaboration
papers.abstract: Transforming neuroimaging data into clinically actionable biomarkers is a knowledge-intensive and labor-intensive process. Standardized workflows such as fMRIPrep have improved robustness and efficiency, but they are statically configured and cannot reason about downstream objectives, deliberate over alternative strategies, or close the loop between intermediate evidence and subsequent decisions in the way a human researcher would. This lack of closed-loop adaptation often leaves domain experts trapped in a cycle of manual trial-and-error to tune parameters and remediate pipeline failures, severely constraining the scalability of clinical biomarker development. To bridge this gap, we introduce NIAgent, a multi-agent system for autonomous end-to-end neuroimaging analysis. Unlike conventional flat tool-calling agents, NIAgent adopts a code-centric execution paradigm where specialist agents collaboratively synthesize and optimize executable programs over composable domain-specific primitives. This design enables robust, long-horizon workflow construction that adapts dynamically to runtime observations. Furthermore, we propose a hierarchical verification framework for autonomous quality control, integrating cohort-level metric screening with agentic visual inspection to drive evidence-grounded workflow remediation. Experiments on ADHD-200 and ADNI demonstrate that NIAgent outperforms standard workflow-based baselines in predictive performance while exhibiting sophisticated agentic behaviors, including strategy exploration and adaptive refinement.

analysis.tldr: 提出NIAgent多智能体系统，实现自主神经影像分析，通过代码执行和分层验证提升预测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 神经影像数据转化为临床生物标志物过程知识密集且劳动密集，现有标准化工作流静态配置，无法推理下游目标、调整策略或闭环适应，导致领域专家陷入手动试错循环，限制了临床生物标志物开发的可扩展性。
analysis.problem: 现有神经影像分析工作流缺乏闭环适应能力，无法根据中间证据动态调整策略，需要人工干预。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出NIAgent多智能体系统，采用代码中心执行范式，由专业智能体协作合成和优化可执行程序，并引入分层验证框架（队列级指标筛选+智能体视觉检查）实现自主质量控制。
contributions: 提出NIAgent，首个用于自主端到端神经影像分析的多智能体系统。
设计代码中心执行范式和分层验证框架，实现动态自适应工作流构建和质量控制。
analysis.experiments: 在ADHD-200和ADNI数据集上，NIAgent在预测性能上优于标准工作流基线，并展现出策略探索和自适应优化等智能体行为。
limitations: 可能依赖特定领域原语的可组合性。
分层验证框架的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to neuroscience & cognitive science
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 神经/认知科学
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出NIAgent多智能体系统，实现自主神经影像分析，通过代码执行和分层验证提升预测性能。

papers.title: Position: Avoid Overstretching LLMs for every Enterprise Task
papers.abstract: Enterprise workloads are dominated by deterministic, structured, and knowledge-dependent tasks operating under strict cost, latency, and reliability constraints. While these are often addressed through large language model (LLM) deployment or distillation into smaller models, we argue this is inefficient, unreliable, and misaligned with enterprise task structures. Instead, AI systems should treat language models as interfaces rather than monolithic engines, externalizing knowledge and computation into dedicated components for greater reliability, scalability, and transparency. Our theoretical evidences show that finite-capacity models cannot fully capture the breadth of knowledge required for enterprise tasks, creating inherent limits to efficiency and interpretability. Building on this, we take the position that language models should primarily be used for structured extraction in deterministic enterprise workflows, while computation and storage are delegated to knowledge bases and symbolic procedures. We formally demonstrate that such modular architectures are more reliable and maintainable than monolithic frameworks, offering a sustainable foundation for enterprise tasks.

analysis.tldr: 论文主张企业任务应避免过度依赖LLM，提出将语言模型作为接口、外化知识与计算的模块化架构更可靠。
analysis.research_motivation: 企业工作负载以确定性、结构化、知识依赖型任务为主，受成本、延迟和可靠性约束，当前LLM部署或蒸馏方法效率低、不可靠且与任务结构不匹配。
analysis.problem: 如何设计更高效、可靠且可维护的企业AI系统架构，避免LLM在确定性任务中的过度使用。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 有限容量模型无法完全捕获企业任务所需的知识广度，导致效率和可解释性固有局限。
analysis.method: 提出模块化架构：语言模型仅用于结构化提取，计算和存储委托给知识库和符号化过程。
contributions: 理论证明有限容量模型在企业任务中的效率与可解释性瓶颈
形式化论证模块化架构比单体框架更可靠和可维护
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果
limitations: 缺乏实证验证，仅提供理论论证
未讨论模块化架构的具体实现细节和工程挑战
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 论文主张企业任务应避免过度依赖LLM，提出将语言模型作为接口、外化知识与计算的模块化架构更可靠。

papers.title: The Wittgensteinian Representation Hypothesis: Is Language the Attractor of Multimodal Convergence?
papers.abstract: Understanding why independently trained neural networks from different modalities converge toward shared representations, and where this convergence leads, remains an open question in representation learning. All existing evidence relies on symmetric similarity measures, which can detect convergence but are structurally blind to its direction. We introduce directional convergence analysis using cycle-kNN, an asymmetric alignment measure, applied across dozens of independently trained unimodal models spanning point clouds, vision, and language. We uncover a consistent directional asymmetry: non-language modalities move toward the neighborhood structure of language significantly more than the reverse, and this pattern holds across all model families and scales--yet is entirely invisible to symmetric measures. Mechanistic analysis traces the directionality to feature density asymmetry, whereby language representations occupy the most compact regions of representational space. The Information Bottleneck framework provides a principled interpretation: optimization under compression drives representations toward discrete, compositional structures characteristic of language. We formalize this as the Wittgensteinian Representation Hypothesis: the semantic structure of language is the asymptotic attractor of multimodal representation convergence.

analysis.tldr: 多模态表征收敛具有方向性：语言是收敛的吸引子。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有研究仅用对称相似性度量检测多模态表征收敛，无法揭示收敛方向，而理解方向性对表征学习理论至关重要。
analysis.problem: 多模态表征收敛的方向性是什么？语言是否扮演吸引子角色？
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 非语言模态（点云、视觉）的表示向语言邻域结构收敛的程度显著高于反向，且该方向性对所有模型族和规模一致，但对称度量完全无法察觉。
analysis.method: 提出非对称对齐度量cycle-kNN进行方向性收敛分析，结合信息瓶颈理论解释方向性源于特征密度不对称。
contributions: 引入cycle-kNN非对称度量，首次揭示多模态表征收敛的方向性。
提出Wittgensteinian表征假说：语言语义结构是多模态表征收敛的渐近吸引子。
analysis.experiments: 在点云、视觉、语言等多种独立训练的单模态模型上进行实验，验证方向性一致存在。
limitations: 仅分析三种模态，未涵盖更多模态类型。
方向性机制的解释依赖信息瓶颈理论，可能需进一步实证验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: unsupervised, self-supervised, semi-supervised, and supervised representation learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 多模态表征收敛具有方向性：语言是收敛的吸引子。

papers.title: CHAINTRIX: A multi-pipeline LLM-augmented framework for automated smart-contract security auditing
papers.abstract: Smart-contract exploits have caused billions of USD in cumulative losses, yet audits remain expensive and slow. Automated tools have emerged to close this gap, but each class has a characteristic failure mode. Static analyzers report findings that frequently fail manual triage at high rates, while large language models (LLMs) hallucinate findings that contradict the source code. Thus, we propose Chaintrix, an end-to-end auditing framework whose central architectural commitment is that every LLM-generated claim must be discharged against a deterministic structural contract representation. We introduce a Cross-Contract Interaction Model (CCIM) that parses Solidity into a structured map of function-level reads, writes, modifiers and resolved cross-contract calls. CCIM serves as the substrate against which all 12 of Chaintrix's deterministic signal engines and the parallel LLM audit pipelines operate. A staged false-positive-reduction pipeline, terminating in a Structural Verdict Engine (SVE) that applies deterministic structural checks against parsed code, filters the merged finding set, with selected high-confidence findings further validated through symbolic execution and fuzz testing. We evaluate Chaintrix on EVMbench, the smart-contract security benchmark by OpenAI, Paradigm, OtterSec. Chaintrix detects 86 of 120 high-severity vulnerabilities (71.7% recall), with 25 audits scoring 100% recall, placing Chaintrix 26 percentage points above the strongest frontier-model baseline.

analysis.tldr: 提出多管道LLM增强框架Chaintrix，通过确定性结构合约表示消除LLM幻觉，在智能合约安全审计中召回率显著优于前沿模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 智能合约漏洞已造成数十亿美元损失，但人工审计昂贵且缓慢；现有自动化工具（静态分析器误报率高、LLM会幻觉）均存在关键失败模式。
analysis.problem: 如何结合LLM的灵活性与确定性分析，实现高召回、低误报的智能合约安全审计。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 静态分析器报告结果经常无法通过人工分类，而LLM会生成与源代码矛盾的幻觉发现。
analysis.method: 提出Chaintrix框架，核心是每个LLM生成的声明必须通过确定性结构合约表示（CCIM）验证；包含12个确定性信号引擎和并行LLM审计管道，通过结构判决引擎（SVE）进行假阳性缩减，并可选符号执行和模糊测试验证。
contributions: 提出Chaintrix，首个将LLM生成声明与确定性结构合约表示相结合的多管道审计框架。
引入跨合约交互模型（CCIM），将Solidity解析为函数级读写、修饰符和跨合约调用的结构化映射。
在EVMbench基准上达到71.7%的高严重性漏洞召回率，比最强前沿模型基线高26个百分点。
analysis.experiments: 在EVMbench（OpenAI、Paradigm、OtterSec的智能合约安全基准）上评估，检测到120个高严重性漏洞中的86个（71.7%召回率），其中25次审计达到100%召回率。
limitations: 可能仅适用于Solidity语言，未提及对其他智能合约语言的支持。
依赖CCIM的解析准确性，复杂合约可能解析失败。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多管道LLM增强框架Chaintrix，通过确定性结构合约表示消除LLM幻觉，在智能合约安全审计中召回率显著优于前沿模型。

papers.title: Dsat: A Native SAT Solver for Discrete Logic
papers.abstract: Discrete variables are common in many applications, such as probabilistic reasoning, planning and explainable AI. When symbolic reasoning techniques are brought in to bear on these applications, a standard technique for handling discrete variables is to binarize them into Boolean variables to allow the use of Boolean computational machinery such as SAT solvers. This technique can face both computational and semantical challenges though. In this work, we develop a native SAT solver for discrete logic, which is a direct extension of Boolean logic in which variables can take arbitrary values. Our proposed solver has a similar design to Boolean SAT solvers, with ingredients such as unit resolution and clause learning but ones that operate natively on discrete variables. We illustrate the merits of the developed SAT solver by comparing it empirically to CSP solvers applied to discrete CNFs, to Boolean SAT solver applied to binarized CNFs, and to some hybrid solvers.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种原生离散逻辑SAT求解器Dsat，避免二值化带来的计算和语义问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 离散变量在概率推理、规划、可解释AI等应用中常见，传统方法将其二值化为布尔变量后使用SAT求解器，但面临计算开销和语义损失问题。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个直接处理离散变量的SAT求解器，避免二值化带来的效率和语义挑战。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 扩展布尔SAT求解器设计，将单元传播和子句学习等核心机制原生适配到离散变量上，开发离散逻辑SAT求解器Dsat。
contributions: 提出首个原生离散逻辑SAT求解器Dsat，直接处理离散变量。
将布尔SAT中的单元传播和子句学习扩展到离散逻辑。
通过实验与CSP求解器、二值化布尔SAT求解器及混合求解器对比，展示Dsat的优势。
analysis.experiments: 与CSP求解器、二值化布尔SAT求解器及混合求解器进行实证比较，摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于离散CNF形式的问题。
未在更大规模或更复杂问题上验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种原生离散逻辑SAT求解器Dsat，避免二值化带来的计算和语义问题。

papers.title: SKG-VLA: Scene Knowledge Graph Priors for Structured Scene Semantics and Multimodal Reasoning for Decision Making
papers.abstract: Decision making in large-scale complaint handling systems increasingly relies on heterogeneous evidence, including complaint narratives, screenshots, order metadata, historical interactions, and platform policies. Existing complaint understanding systems mainly perform shallow classification or template matching over isolated modalities, while underutilizing explicit scene structure, rule knowledge, and cross-evidence dependencies. To address this limitation, we present SKG-VLA for multimodal complaint decision making. The core idea is to model each case as a structured complaint scene and represent its decision-relevant semantics with a \emph{Scene Knowledge Graph} (SKG), which organizes complaint entities, evidence items, policy clauses, temporal events, transactional states, and action-relevant relations into a unified graph. Based on SKG, we build a data synthesis pipeline that generates complaint scene descriptions, rule-consistent graph generalizations, question-answer supervision, and decision recommendations. We further construct a large-scale complaint scene dataset with both text-only and multimodal in-domain benchmarks. Finally, we adopt a three-stage training strategy -- domain-adaptive pre-training, task-oriented instruction fine-tuning, and end-to-end multimodal alignment -- to inject structured scene priors into a multimodal decision model. Experiments show that SKG-VLA consistently improves policy-grounded reasoning, complaint decision accuracy, long-tail generalization, and robustness under incomplete evidence.

analysis.tldr: SKG-VLA通过场景知识图谱注入结构化场景先验，提升多模态投诉决策的推理准确性和鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有投诉处理系统主要对孤立模态进行浅层分类或模板匹配，未能充分利用显式场景结构、规则知识和跨证据依赖关系，导致决策质量受限。
analysis.problem: 如何利用结构化场景语义和规则知识提升多模态投诉决策的推理能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建场景知识图谱（SKG）统一表示投诉实体、证据、政策条款等；基于SKG的数据合成管道生成场景描述、图泛化、问答监督和决策建议；采用三阶段训练策略（领域自适应预训练、任务导向指令微调、端到端多模态对齐）注入结构化场景先验。
contributions: 提出场景知识图谱（SKG）用于结构化投诉场景语义表示。
构建大规模多模态投诉场景数据集及基准。
提出三阶段训练策略注入结构化场景先验，提升决策准确性和鲁棒性。
analysis.experiments: 实验表明SKG-VLA在基于策略的推理、投诉决策准确性、长尾泛化和不完整证据下的鲁棒性方面持续改进。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的知识图谱构建，泛化到新领域需额外工程。
三阶段训练策略计算成本较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SKG-VLA通过场景知识图谱注入结构化场景先验，提升多模态投诉决策的推理准确性和鲁棒性。

papers.title: Do Self-Evolving Agents Forget? Capability Degradation and Preservation in Lifelong LLM Agent Adaptation
papers.abstract: Recent advances in LLM agents enable systems that autonomously refine workflows, accumulate reusable skills, self-train their underlying models, and maintain persistent memory. However, we show that such self-evolution is often non-monotonic: adapting to new task distributions can progressively degrade previously acquired capabilities across all major evolution channels. We identify this phenomenon as \emph{capability erosion under self-evolution} and show that it consistently emerges across workflow, skill, model, and memory evolution. To mitigate this issue, we propose \emph{Capability-Preserving Evolution} (CPE), a general stabilization principle that constrains destructive capability drift during continual adaptation. Across all four evolution dimensions, CPE consistently improves retained capability stability while preserving adaptation performance. For example, in workflow evolution, CPE improves retained simple-task performance from 41.8\% to 52.8\% under GPT-5.1 optimization while simultaneously achieving stronger complex-task adaptation. Our findings suggest that stable long-horizon self-evolving agents require not only acquiring new capabilities, but also explicitly preserving previously learned ones during continual adaptation.

analysis.tldr: 自进化LLM代理在持续适应新任务时会出现能力退化，CPE方法通过约束破坏性漂移来保留已有能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM代理能够自主进化，但进化过程可能非单调，导致先前能力退化，影响长期稳定性。
analysis.problem: 自进化代理在持续适应新任务分布时，如何避免能力退化并保留已有能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到自进化代理在工作流、技能、模型和记忆四个进化通道上均出现能力退化现象，且进化是非单调的。
analysis.method: 提出Capability-Preserving Evolution (CPE)，一种通用稳定化原则，通过约束持续适应中的破坏性能力漂移来保留已有能力。
contributions: 识别并形式化了自进化代理中的能力退化现象
提出CPE方法，在四个进化维度上均能提升保留能力稳定性并保持适应性能
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅举例工作流进化中CPE将保留的简单任务性能从41.8%提升至52.8%。
limitations: 可能未考虑更复杂的任务分布或长期进化场景
CPE的约束机制可能增加计算开销或限制适应灵活性
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 自进化LLM代理在持续适应新任务时会出现能力退化，CPE方法通过约束破坏性漂移来保留已有能力。

papers.title: How LLMs Are Persuaded: A Few Attention Heads, Rerouted
papers.abstract: Language models can be persuaded to abandon factual knowledge. This vulnerability is central to AI safety, but its internal mechanism remains poorly understood. We uncover a compact causal mechanism for persuasion-induced factual errors. A small set of mid-layer attention heads almost entirely determines the model's answer. These heads write answer options into a low-dimensional polyhedron, with options occupying distinct vertices. Persuasion does not blur belief or merely reduce confidence; it causes a discrete latent jump from the correct-answer vertex to the persuasion-target vertex. We show that decision heads are not reasoning over evidence. Instead, they copy whichever option token their attention selects. Persuasion works by redirecting attention. We isolate a rank-one evidence-routing feature that controls the route. Directly modifying this feature steers the model's choice, and removing it blocks persuasion. We then trace the feature back to a band of shallower attention heads that build it from persuasive keywords in the input. Every step is validated by intervention. This mechanism appears across open-source LLMs and realistic poisoning scenarios such as Generative Engine Optimization, revealing persuasion as a narrow, monitorable circuit.

analysis.tldr: LLM被说服放弃事实知识，其机制是少量中层注意力头通过低维多面体中的离散跳跃重定向注意力，而非模糊信念。
analysis.research_motivation: 语言模型易被说服放弃事实知识，这对AI安全至关重要，但其内部机制尚不明确，理解这一漏洞有助于提升模型鲁棒性和安全性。
analysis.problem: 揭示LLM因说服性输入而产生事实错误的因果机制，并验证其可干预性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 说服不会模糊信念或降低置信度，而是导致从正确答案顶点到说服目标顶点的离散潜在跳跃；决策头不推理证据，而是复制注意力选择的选项令牌。
analysis.method: 通过因果干预分析，识别出一小部分中层注意力头作为决策头，它们将答案选项写入低维多面体的不同顶点；说服通过重定向注意力实现，并发现一个秩一证据路由特征控制该路由，该特征由浅层注意力头从说服性关键词构建。
contributions: 发现LLM被说服的紧凑因果机制：少量中层注意力头通过离散潜在跳跃改变答案。
识别并验证了秩一证据路由特征，可直接修改以控制模型选择或阻止说服。
在多个开源LLM和真实场景（如生成引擎优化）中验证了机制的普遍性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 机制可能仅适用于特定类型的说服性输入，泛化性需进一步验证。
干预方法可能对模型其他能力产生未知影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM被说服放弃事实知识，其机制是少量中层注意力头通过低维多面体中的离散跳跃重定向注意力，而非模糊信念。

papers.title: Beyond ESG Scores: Learning Dynamic Constraints for Sequential Portfolio Optimization
papers.abstract: ESG-aware portfolio optimization is increasingly important for sustainable capital allocation, yet most learning-based methods still operationalize ESG by appending static scores to the policy observation or reward. This creates a mismatch for sequential control: ESG scores are noisy, provider-dependent, low-frequency, and temporally misaligned with sequential portfolio decisions, while financial evidence suggests that ESG is better treated as a portfolio preference, risk-exposure, or hedge dimension than as a robust alpha factor. We propose to impose ESG constraints without modifying the financial policy's observation or reward, using a Multimodal Action-Conditioned Constraint Field (MACF) that learns mechanism-specific ESG costs from point-in-time multimodal evidence and contemplated portfolio transitions. We then introduce MACF-X, a family of optimizer-specific adapters that converts MACF costs and uncertainties into native constrained-optimization interfaces through a shared slack- and uncertainty-aware pressure layer. Across multiple constraint-integration interfaces, MACF-X reduces tail ESG budget pressure while maintaining competitive financial performance. Ablations show that this improvement depends on dynamic evidence inputs and three-head decomposition, while static ESG-score proxies are nearly indistinguishable from score-shuffled noise baselines.

analysis.tldr: 提出多模态动作条件约束场（MACF）将ESG约束动态融入序列投资组合优化，避免静态评分的不匹配问题。
analysis.research_motivation: ESG评分存在噪声、依赖提供商、低频且与序列决策时间错位，而现有学习方法将其作为静态分数附加到策略观测或奖励中，导致不匹配。
analysis.problem: 如何在不修改金融策略观测或奖励的情况下，将ESG约束动态且有效地融入序列投资组合优化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 静态ESG评分代理与随机噪声基线几乎无法区分，表明静态评分在序列决策中缺乏信息量。
analysis.method: 提出多模态动作条件约束场（MACF），从多模态点证据和考虑的投资组合转移中学习机制特定的ESG成本；并引入MACF-X适配器族，通过共享的松弛和不确定性感知压力层将MACF成本和不确定性转换为原生约束优化接口。
contributions: 提出MACF框架，动态学习ESG约束而非使用静态评分。
设计MACF-X适配器，兼容多种优化器接口，降低尾部ESG预算压力并保持金融性能。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的多模态点证据数据。
MACF-X适配器的通用性可能受限于特定优化器接口。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多模态动作条件约束场（MACF）将ESG约束动态融入序列投资组合优化，避免静态评分的不匹配问题。

papers.title: Beyond Accuracy: Evaluating Strategy Diversity in LLM Mathematical Reasoning
papers.abstract: Large language models now achieve high final-answer accuracy on mathematical reasoning benchmarks, but accuracy alone does not capture reasoning flexibility. We introduce a strategy-level evaluation framework instantiated on 80 AMC 10/12 and AIME problems with 217 AoPS-derived reference strategy families. Model outputs are annotated for strategy identity, validity, and correctness using dual-AI coding with human adjudication. Across four frontier models, we find a pronounced decoupling between answer accuracy and strategy diversity. Under a single-solution prompt, all models achieve high accuracy (95%-100%), but under a multiple-strategy prompt they recover substantially fewer strategies than the human reference set. Gemini, DeepSeek, GPT, and Claude generate 184, 152, 151, and 110 distinct valid strategies, respectively, with the largest gaps in Geometry and Number Theory. The models collectively produce 50 benchmark-novel valid strategies, indicating both incomplete coverage of human strategies and some capacity for alternative reasoning. A repeated-run robustness check on 20 problems shows diminishing gains in discovered strategies, with the strongest model recovering only 39 of 55 AoPS-reference strategies (71%) after three runs. These findings position strategy diversity as a complementary dimension for evaluating mathematical reasoning beyond answer correctness.

analysis.tldr: LLM在数学推理中答案准确率高但策略多样性不足，本文提出策略级评估框架并发现模型与人类策略覆盖存在显著差距。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有数学推理评测仅关注最终答案准确率，无法反映模型的推理灵活性和策略多样性，而后者对于评估真实推理能力至关重要。
analysis.problem: 如何系统评估LLM在数学推理中的策略多样性，并量化其与人类策略覆盖的差距。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：1）模型在单答案提示下准确率很高（95%-100%），但在多策略提示下生成的策略数量远少于人类参考集；2）不同模型策略多样性差异显著（Gemini 184种，Claude 110种）；3）模型能生成50种基准中未出现的新策略，但整体覆盖不足；4）重复运行后策略发现收益递减，最强模型三次运行仅恢复71%的人类策略。
analysis.method: 基于80道AMC/AIME竞赛题和217个AoPS参考策略族，采用双AI编码加人工裁决对模型输出进行策略身份、有效性和正确性标注，构建策略级评估框架。
contributions: 提出策略多样性作为数学推理评测的补充维度，超越传统答案准确率指标。
构建包含80道竞赛题和217个参考策略族的评测框架，并系统评估四个前沿模型的策略覆盖与新颖性。
analysis.experiments: 在Gemini、DeepSeek、GPT、Claude四个前沿模型上评估，使用单答案和多策略两种提示方式，并在20道题上进行三次重复运行鲁棒性检验。摘要未提供具体实验设置细节。
limitations: 评测仅覆盖AMC/AIME竞赛题，可能无法推广到其他数学推理场景。
策略标注依赖双AI编码和人工裁决，可能存在主观偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM在数学推理中答案准确率高但策略多样性不足，本文提出策略级评估框架并发现模型与人类策略覆盖存在显著差距。

papers.title: PiCA: Pivot-Based Credit Assignment for Search Agentic Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Large Language Model (LLM)-based search agents trained with reinforcement learning (RL) have significantly improved the performance of knowledge-intensive tasks. However, existing methods encounter critical challenges in long-horizon credit assignment: (i) Reward Sparsity, where models receive only outcome feedback without step-level guidance to differentiate action quality; (ii) Isolated Credit, where credit is assigned to steps independently, failing to capture sequential dependencies; and (iii) Distributional Shift, where rewards are estimated on templates that deviate from the model's natural generative distribution. To address these issues, we propose Pivot-Based Credit Assignment (PiCA), a novel step reward mechanism that reformulates the search trajectory as a sequential process of cumulative search progress. Unlike prior isolated step rewards, PiCA defines process rewards as success probabilities dependent on the historical context based on Potential-Based Reward Shaping (PBRS). This approach identifies pivot steps, which comprise target golden sub-queries and sub-answers derived from historical trajectories, as information peaks that significantly boost the likelihood of a correct final answer. By anchoring these step rewards to the final task objective, PiCA provides dense, pivot-aware and trajectory-dependent guidance while maintaining distributional consistency. Extensive experiments show that PiCA outperforms existing strong baselines across seven knowledge-intensive QA benchmarks, achieving 15.2% and 2.2% improvements for 3B and 7B models. The consistent performance gains across various models show PiCA's robust generalization. The code is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出基于枢轴的信用分配方法 PiCA，通过势能奖励塑形为搜索智能体提供密集、轨迹依赖的步骤奖励，显著提升长程信用分配效果。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于强化学习的LLM搜索智能体在长程信用分配中面临奖励稀疏、孤立信用和分布偏移三大挑战，导致模型难以区分动作质量并捕捉序列依赖。
analysis.problem: 如何为LLM搜索智能体设计有效的步骤级奖励机制，以解决长程信用分配中的奖励稀疏、孤立信用和分布偏移问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出现有方法存在三个关键现象：仅依赖结果反馈导致奖励稀疏；步骤独立分配信用忽略序列依赖；奖励估计基于偏离模型生成分布的模板导致分布偏移。
analysis.method: 提出基于枢轴的信用分配（PiCA），将搜索轨迹重构为累积搜索进度的序列过程，利用势能奖励塑形定义过程奖励为依赖历史上下文的成功概率，识别枢轴步骤（包含黄金子查询和子答案的信息峰值）提供密集、枢轴感知且轨迹依赖的指导。
contributions: 提出PiCA方法，通过势能奖励塑形实现轨迹依赖的步骤奖励，解决长程信用分配三大挑战。
在七个知识密集型QA基准上验证有效性，3B和7B模型分别提升15.2%和2.2%，并展示良好泛化性。
analysis.experiments: 在七个知识密集型QA基准上进行实验，PiCA在3B和7B模型上分别比强基线提升15.2%和2.2%，且在不同模型上表现一致。
limitations: 可能依赖枢轴步骤的准确识别，在复杂轨迹中识别质量可能受限。
势能奖励塑形的理论保证在非马尔可夫环境中可能减弱。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs

papers.title: A Prompt-Aware Structuring Framework for Reliable Reuse of AI-Generated Content in the Agentic Web
papers.abstract: The evolution of Large Language Models (LLMs) and the software agents built on them (AI agents) marks a turning point in the transition from a human-centric Web to an ``Agentic Web'' driven by AI agents. However, for AI-Generated Content (AIGC), which is expected to dominate the Web, there is currently no mechanism for agents to verify its reliability, reproducibility, or license compliance during generation. This lack of transparency risks causing chained hallucinations and compliance violations through the reuse of AIGC. Consequently, a framework to manage the provenance and generation conditions of AIGC is essential. In this paper, we present a framework that automatically attaches structured metadata to AIGC at generation time, including modularized prompts, contexts, thoughts, model information, hyperparameters, and confidence. The metadata is enveloped together with verifiable credentials to support the reliable assessment and reuse of AIGC. This framework enables efficient curation of structured AIGC and facilitates its safe use for applications such as fine-tuning and knowledge distillation.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个在生成时自动为AI生成内容附加结构化元数据的框架，以支持可靠评估与重用。
analysis.research_motivation: 随着LLM和AI代理推动Web向Agentic Web演进，AI生成内容（AIGC）将主导网络，但缺乏验证其可靠性、可复现性和合规性的机制，导致链式幻觉和合规风险。
analysis.problem: 如何为AIGC提供可验证的元数据（包括提示、上下文、模型信息等），以支持代理对其可靠评估与重用。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出一个框架，在生成时自动为AIGC附加结构化元数据（模块化提示、上下文、思考、模型信息、超参数、置信度），并使用可验证凭证封装，支持可靠评估与重用。
contributions: 提出一个自动为AIGC附加结构化元数据的框架，包含提示、上下文、模型信息等。
利用可验证凭证封装元数据，支持AIGC的可靠评估与重用，如微调和知识蒸馏。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 框架可能增加生成时的计算开销。
元数据标准化和互操作性可能面临挑战。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个在生成时自动为AI生成内容附加结构化元数据的框架，以支持可靠评估与重用。

papers.title: EquiMem: Calibrating Shared Memory in Multi-Agent Debate via Game-Theoretic Equilibrium
papers.abstract: Multi-agent debate (MAD) systems increasingly rely on shared memory to support long-horizon reasoning, but this convenience opens a critical vulnerability: a single corrupted entry can contaminate the downstream memory-augmented reasoning, and debate alone fails to filter such errors. Existing safeguards filter entries via heuristics or LLM-based validation, yet they rely on AI judgments that share the same failure modes and overlook the cross-agent dynamics of MAD. We address this gap by formulating memory updating in MAD as a zero-trust memory game, in which no agent is assumed honest and the game's equilibrium serves as an indicator of optimal memory trust. Guided by this equilibrium, we propose EquiMem, an inference-time calibration mechanism that quantifies each update algorithmically against the shared memory state, using agents' existing retrieval queries and traversal paths as evidence rather than soliciting any LLM judgment. EquiMem instantiates calibration for both embedding- and graph-based memory, and across diverse benchmarks, MAD frameworks, and memory architectures, it consistently outperforms existing safeguards, remains robust under adversarial agents, and incurs negligible inference overhead.

analysis.tldr: 将多智能体辩论中的共享内存更新建模为零信任博弈，利用博弈均衡实现无需LLM判断的校准机制。
analysis.research_motivation: 多智能体辩论系统依赖共享内存支持长程推理，但单个错误条目会污染下游推理，现有基于启发式或LLM的过滤方法共享相同的失败模式且忽视跨智能体动态。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖LLM判断的情况下，校准多智能体辩论中的共享内存更新以抵御错误条目和恶意攻击。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将内存更新建模为零信任记忆博弈，博弈均衡作为最优内存信任指标；利用智能体已有的检索查询和遍历路径作为证据，算法化地量化每个更新，无需LLM判断。
contributions: 提出将MAD中共享内存更新形式化为零信任博弈的新视角
设计EquiMem推理时校准机制，支持嵌入和基于图的内存，无需额外LLM判断
analysis.experiments: 在多种基准、MAD框架和内存架构上，EquiMem持续优于现有防护方法，对对抗性智能体保持鲁棒，且推理开销可忽略。
limitations: 可能依赖特定内存结构（嵌入/图）的假设
博弈均衡计算在极大规模智能体场景下的可扩展性待验证
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将多智能体辩论中的共享内存更新建模为零信任博弈，利用博弈均衡实现无需LLM判断的校准机制。

papers.title: Shaping Schema via Language Representation as the Next Frontier for LLM Intelligence Expanding
papers.abstract: Although natural language is the default medium for Large Language Models (LLMs), its limited expressive capacity creates a profound bottleneck for complex problem-solving. While recent advancements in AI have relied heavily on scaling, merely internalizing knowledge does not guarantee its effective application. Defining language representation as the linguistic and symbolic constructs used to map and model the real world, this paper argues that shaping schemas through advanced language representation is the next frontier for expanding LLM intelligence. We posit that an LLM's knowledge activation and organization -- its schema -- depends heavily on the structural and symbolic sophistication of the language used to represent a given task. This paper contributes both a formalization of this claim and the empirical evidence to support it. With a new formalization, we present multiple lines of evidence to support our position: Firstly, we review recent empirical practices and emerging methodologies that demonstrate the substantial performance gains achievable through deliberate language representation design, even without modifying model parameters or scale. Secondly, we conduct controlled experiments showing that LLM performance and its internal feature activations vary under different language representations of the same underlying task. Together, these findings highlight language representation design as a promising direction for future research.

analysis.tldr: 论文提出通过精心设计语言表征来塑造LLM的认知模式（schema），从而在不改变模型参数或规模的情况下提升其智能表现。
analysis.research_motivation: 自然语言的表达能力有限，成为LLM解决复杂问题的瓶颈；仅靠规模扩展内化知识并不能保证有效应用，亟需探索新的智能扩展方向。
analysis.problem: 如何通过语言表征的设计来优化LLM的知识激活与组织（即schema），以突破其复杂问题求解能力的上限。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，即使任务本质相同，不同的语言表征方式会导致LLM性能及其内部特征激活产生显著差异，且已有实证表明精心设计的语言表征能带来实质性性能提升。
analysis.method: 提出语言表征设计作为塑造LLM schema的核心方法，通过形式化论证和受控实验验证语言表征的结构与符号复杂度对知识激活和组织的影响。
contributions: 形式化了语言表征对LLM schema塑造的作用机制，提出新的理论框架。
通过综述现有实践和受控实验，提供了多方面的实证证据，证明语言表征设计可显著提升LLM性能。
analysis.experiments: 摘要提到进行了受控实验，比较不同语言表征下LLM的性能和内部特征激活，但未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 实验规模可能有限，未在多种任务和模型上验证泛化性。
语言表征设计的自动化或通用原则尚未明确。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 论文提出通过精心设计语言表征来塑造LLM的认知模式（schema），从而在不改变模型参数或规模的情况下提升其智能表现。

papers.title: SeePhys Pro: Diagnosing Modality Transfer and Blind-Training Effects in Multimodal RLVR for Physics Reasoning
papers.abstract: We introduce SeePhys Pro, a fine-grained modality transfer benchmark that studies whether models preserve the same reasoning capability when critical information is progressively transferred from text to image. Unlike standard vision-essential benchmarks that evaluate a single input form, SeePhys Pro features four semantically aligned variants for each problem with progressively increasing visual elements. Our evaluation shows that current frontier models are far from representation-invariant reasoners: performance degrades on average as information moves from language to diagrams, with visual variable grounding as the most critical bottleneck. Motivated by this inference-time fragility, we further develop large training corpora for multimodal RLVR and use blind training as a diagnostic control, finding that RL with all training images masked can still improve performance on unmasked validation sets. To analyze this effect, text-deletion, image-mask-rate, and format-saturation controls suggest that such gains can arise from residual textual and distributional cues rather than valid visual evidence. Our results highlight the need to evaluate multimodal reasoning not only by final-answer accuracy, but also by robustness under modality transfer and by diagnostics that test whether improvements rely on task-critical visual evidence.

analysis.tldr: SeePhys Pro 通过细粒度模态迁移基准揭示多模态推理中视觉变量定位瓶颈，并发现盲训练（掩码图像）仍能提升性能，但增益源于文本线索而非视觉证据。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有多模态推理基准仅评估单一输入形式，无法检测模型在关键信息从文本迁移到图像时是否保持推理能力，且缺乏对训练中视觉证据依赖性的诊断方法。
analysis.problem: 多模态 RLVR 中模型对模态迁移的鲁棒性不足，以及盲训练效果是否真正依赖视觉证据的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 当前前沿模型在信息从语言转向图表时性能平均下降，视觉变量定位是最关键瓶颈；盲训练（所有训练图像被掩码）仍能提升未掩码验证集性能，但增益来自残余文本和分布线索而非有效视觉证据。
analysis.method: 构建 SeePhys Pro 基准（每个问题四个语义对齐变体，逐步增加视觉元素），并开发大规模多模态 RLVR 训练语料，通过盲训练（掩码图像）作为诊断控制，结合文本删除、图像掩码率和格式饱和控制分析效果来源。
contributions: 提出 SeePhys Pro 细粒度模态迁移基准，用于评估多模态推理的表示不变性。
发现视觉变量定位是多模态推理的关键瓶颈，并揭示盲训练效果可能源于非视觉线索。
analysis.experiments: 在多个前沿模型上评估 SeePhys Pro 基准，并通过盲训练及多种控制实验分析性能提升来源。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖物理推理领域，泛化性待验证。
盲训练效果分析依赖特定控制实验，可能未涵盖所有潜在混淆因素。
